name: gubami Social
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松壽路9號6樓
reviews:
雙人特餐的每一道菜都風味豐富。四神濃湯、黑松露薏米炸雞翅與法式章魚豬肉凍的創意尤其令人驚艷；小卷烙烤沙拉保留了食材的原味與嫩度，火候拿捏得恰到好處。松露臭豆腐蝦多士上桌時氣味並不張揚，直到入口的瞬間才在口中緩緩化開，與蝦多士的結合十分出色，各種風味取得了良好的平衡。

主菜海陸紅湯牛肉麵的手打細麵富有嚼勁卻滑順好入口，牛小排與牛腱的搭配讓人一次品嚐到不同層次的口感，肉質的嚼勁拿捏得非常剛好；波士頓龍蝦的調味與熟度也掌握得相當完美。

最令人讚嘆的是份量。原以為 fine dining 風格的餐點分量會偏精緻小巧，沒想到每一道前菜都相當充足；還沒上主菜其實就已有飽足感，整套餐點享用完更是十分滿足。

餐廳整體的氛圍輕鬆舒適，服務人員周到卻毫無壓迫感，是一個能自在享受餐點的好地方。

由曾入選亞洲最佳女主廚陳嵐舒所打造的台式餐酒館，gubami就是牛肉麵的台語，主打一碗千元起跳的牛肉麵，以及「松露臭豆腐蝦多士」、酥皮四神湯、蔥餅沾醬等融合台式小吃的創意料理，算是獨樹一格。
目前雖然營業午晚餐，但沒有商業午餐，每人低消1500元，整體餐點味道都不差，但以這個高均價來說，台式元素的融合並沒有讓人很驚豔，甚至會有種不如直接去吃台式小吃版本會更好的感覺，比較可惜。
✅法式砂鍋紅湯牛肉麵(1280元)：紅燒湯頭以醬香蔬果味為主，帶一點淡淡的麻味，鹹度略高，還行吧，不過加進松露辣醬整個大升級；細麵十分Q彈美味，牛肉有美國牛小排、牛筋、牛腱肉，有塊肥肉的油脂味讓人有點反胃，剩下的肉質鮮嫩，但因為肉塊較大煮不透，牛肉中心都是原味，口感稍差了點，與湯沒有融合在一起，我覺得沒有到千元以上的價值，錢省下來去吃天下三絕比較實際。
✅松露臭豆腐蝦多士(390元)：不錯，有得500盤推薦，用台式臭豆腐取代港點的多士(吐司)部分，酸菜致敬台式泡菜，一口咬下先是外面的脆皮麵衣，中間是厚實多汁的臭豆腐和蝦肉餡，不過蝦味少了點，幾乎都是臭豆腐臭味，味道跟夜市臭豆腐差異不大，層次感不足
✅gubami手作蔥餅(380元)：整體還可以，發想自台式蔥油餅的口袋餅，但更清淡乾燥，餅的部分還行，蔥味和麵香都不太夠；不過三種沾醬都不錯，喜歡冰涼的紅油鷹嘴豆泥和香料肉醬，優格莎莎醬較無亮點
✅栗子西米露布丁(220元)：好吃，比鹹食棒多了，很愛濃郁又熱騰騰的栗子泥、西米露和奶油❤

📍 台北信義｜gubami Social
一家把台式與法式靈感完美融合的餐酒館
出自亞洲最佳女主廚—陳嵐舒之手
把我們熟悉的古早味小吃 升級成讓人驚豔的精緻料理✨
這次點了 4人套餐 每一道都驚艷到不行！

✔️ Gubami 手作蔥餅
蔥香味十足 炭火直烤一上桌香氣爆棚！
搭配三款沾醬：蒜酥辣優格、紅油鷹嘴豆泥、咖哩肉醬
大推鷹嘴豆泥 濃郁又涮口！

✔️ 巴斯克蚵仔煎餅
蚵仔煎+西班牙烘蛋的創意組合 淋上自製醬料
Q彈粉漿遇上綿密烘蛋 口感意外超搭~

✔️ 松露臭豆腐蝦多士 🏆
熟悉的臭香一上桌就撲鼻而來
臭豆腐結合港式蝦多士 外酥內嫩、多汁又爆香
一致票選第一名！

✔️ 地中海小卷烤蔬菜
小卷彈牙又鮮甜 蔬菜搭配乳酪豆瓣醬
中式混搭地中海風情 別有一番風味~

✔️ 慢燉牛肉莎莎三重奏
牛小排、牛腱心、牛筋一次滿足
搭配清爽莎莎+酸種麵包
根本是高級版「黑白切」的概念🤣

✔️ 法式章魚豬肉凍
把法式經典肉凍結合南台灣熟肉文化
黑豬頰肉、豬耳、豬舌加上章魚慢燉
口感層次超豐富 每一口都很有驚喜

✔️ 龍蝦伊麵
選用整隻新鮮波士頓龍蝦🦞
肉質鮮甜飽滿、麵條吸滿濃郁微辣醬汁
附的手工蝦餅可單吃、也可撥碎拌麵
還有沙拉可轉換味蕾 細節滿分！

✔️ 板腱牛
美國蛇河農場極黑和牛
油花細緻豐富、三分熟粉嫩多汁

無酒精調飲也超有水準
不喝酒的人也能好好享受調飲！

✨ 明星俱樂部｜微酸＋淡淡花香（我的最愛）
✨ 西貴妃｜桂花香濃郁、尾韻鐵觀音
✨ 楓樂芭｜咖啡＋楓糖 不苦順口
✨ 辦桌芭芒柳｜就是你記憶中的熟悉台味！

每一道都是有台灣味的獨特餐點
味道精緻卻不浮誇 創意滿滿又吃得懂
服務也很貼心 整體用餐體驗超加分！
不論是家人聚餐、姊妹聚會、約會慶祝
都超適合來這裡 好好享受一場獨特台味的料裡！

reviews_detailed.author: Percy Cheung
reviews_detailed.text:
We didn't know what to expect... good places are usually not available at last second which we were able to make a reservation for...and when got there we were the only people there...

BUT BOY WERE WE SURPRISED when the food we ordered made it's way to our table.  The server presented dish after dish and explained with excitement the ingredients and combinations!  The way he introduced the dishes really had us excited to try the dish.  As each dish arrived, we enjoyed and looked forward to the next one coming.  We ordered: Truffle Stuffed Fried Chicken Wings,  Char Siu Pork Ribs with Dark Plums, Szechuan Red Oil and Burrata Salad, Stinky Tofu Truffe "in Memory of HK Shrimp Toast" and the Braised Beef Trio with Tomato Salsa.  Each dish was very well prepared.  The flavour combinations were very tasty and kept us wanting more.

Thanks for the great service and experience.  We look forward to coming and trying other dishes!

reviews_detailed.author: XO Handsome
reviews_detailed.text: Gubami Social is a popular restaurant in Taipei founded by award-winning chef Lanshu Chen.  Online reservation is straightforward.  The main dining room is spacious and clean.  Young servers are patient and helpful.  While the westernized Taiwanese cuisine is unique, most of the dishes have different strong flavors, which do not quite harmonize with one another.  For example, the pungent Bread Basket with Fermented Bean Curd (NT 220) clashes with the fishy BBQ Squid with Do Ban Sauce (NT380/medium; NT 580/large).  Highlight of the lunch is the rich and savory Rice Vermicelli “Bouillabaisse” of Golden Pomfret (NT 1,180).  Price is not cheap as a mall restaurant.

reviews_detailed.author: Precious Tendani Kharivhe
reviews_detailed.text:
I absolutely loved the food at Gubami Social—explosive flavours that even made the simplest pita bread come alive! Their signature beef noodle soup was a standout, and I’d highly recommend it to anyone visiting.

The atmosphere was great—intimate and stylish, with private rooms available for larger groups, making it perfect for gatherings.

The only downside was the service which was a bit slow, likely because they were busy. My waiter wasn’t as attentive as I’d hoped, but it didn’t ruin the experience.

Overall, I’d definitely come back for the incredible food and vibe—hopefully, they can improve the service next time!

reviews_detailed.author: Bryan Shu . The truth
reviews_detailed.text:
I entered it by chance.
A casual, but nice ambience.
Knowledgeable staff, simple but good and tasty dishes.
A cross between French and Taiwanese cuisine.
More Taiwanese than French
All in all, we ate reasonably well

If you do not have high expectations, you can try it.

reviews_detailed.author: James Pan
reviews_detailed.text: A place for group of people the have drinks and share some food. The flavor mainly come from Taiwanese or Chinese food but the presentation comes from the French fine dining. You cannot category the food into a simple type. It is mixed with some there some there. The price is high but the dishes totally worth the price. Cocktails and wine can be choice for the flavor you ordered. The staffs are super friendly and helpful providing good suggestions if you cannot make a decision. Still lot of flavors to try. Definitely come back when I have free time.

name: URBAN PARADISE 信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松高路11號5樓
reviews:
從去年生日來過，再來就是與朋友在春節的時候來用餐了，整體環境如果是坐到沙發區的話真的很寬敞很舒適，雖然不知道怎樣的先決條件能坐到，兩次都是兩個人，生日來的時候跟女友有被安排，跟朋友可能就是因為都是漢子，就安排在一般座位區XD

熟食方面我覺得較一般自助餐精緻一些，可能是因應餐酒館的主題，然後干貝、牛肉、草蝦可以一直去拿取，不會等太久，這點不錯；生食我是拿爆松葉蟹腳與鮭魚、青甘生魚片啦！真的是最爽最划算的~
我吃起來是沒有拉肚子，所以算是新鮮好吃的！飲料的話我們倆都是喝無酒精，調酒師調理時給予的情緒價值很高，感覺很好喝，結果我喝一口就去拿投幣的可樂了哈哈！可能因人而異

整體來說自己是挺喜歡的，推薦三五好友可以成群來聚餐，但一樣沒有那麼好訂位就是了！~

爐烤牛肉
油脂豐富、肉質軟嫩，入口滑順。

鐵板燒牛小排
口感偏乾，油脂香氣沒有完全發揮，表現中下。

鐵板燒干貝
鮮甜度沒有被完整保留，整體普通。

醬烤豬五花
味道尚可，口感稍微偏韌，沒有預期中那種油香化開的層次。

松阪豬
表現中規中矩，沒有特別記憶點。

一夜干
在水準之上，鹹香與油脂比例平衡，不過細刺稍多，吃的時候需要留意。

烤魷魚
水準之上，不乾柴，火候掌握得很好，魷魚的鮮味被完整鎖住，非常適合配酒。

烤生蠔
尺寸很大顆，可惜略乾，感覺放置時間稍久。

烤鳳梨
泰式風味融合度不高，吃起來有點抓不到重點。

辣子雞
炸過頭，口感偏乾硬，吃起來比較像一般炸雞，失去辣子雞該有的香辣層次。

麻辣燙
風味不夠立體，香氣與麻辣層次都偏弱，三顧茅廬還比較好吃。

牧羊人派
味道不錯，香氣濃郁，但油脂感偏重，後段稍顯膩口。

烤甜蝦
味道清爽不厚重，很適合搭配酒類。

生魚片
整體在中上水準，鮮度尚可，但沒有特別驚艷。

握壽司
醋飯偏乾、壓得較紮實，口感少了點鬆軟與水分。

烤甜蝦
口感爽脆，表現不錯。

蒜頭蛤蜊雞湯
大顆蛤蜊搭配高湯熬煮，蒜泥可自行添加，鮮甜溫潤，既暖胃又解酒。

炸洋蔥圈
外酥內嫩、不油膩，炸功很好，賣相也漂亮。

墨魚燉飯
米心與風味融合度不足，不推薦。

酒類
小米酒與調酒表現都不理想，風味平淡、層次不足。

環境乾淨整潔，座位不擁擠，空間感還不錯。
燈光稍暗，音樂風格與用餐氛圍不太搭。

整體來說，品項豐富，以晚餐這樣的價位來看，會傾向選擇其他表現更好的餐廳。

以 buffet 來說性價比很高~~~~
個人也挺喜歡的

這次有吃到烤生蠔、干貝、各種生魚片、帝王蟹腳也有泰式生蝦
牛排也蠻好吃的！白蝦很鮮甜，吃的出來非常的新鮮，也非常好撥，我們也吃了好幾隻蝦

酒水的部分：紅白酒、調酒、清酒跟啤酒都有
蛤蠣都很大顆不論是湯類還是炒類

甜點甚至有蜷尾家可以挑選，在台南可是要排隊的
水果種類也很多，百香果吃了好幾個

平日晚上來用餐，時段是 17:30 到 21:00，一個人1790再加上一成服務費
非常夠時間吃且也有準時入座
排隊基本上不會太久，感覺有在控制人潮
服務也很讚，空的盤子收的速度很快，不會讓這桌面看起來很凌亂

整體來說是推薦的，可以來嚐鮮看看哦！

reviews_detailed.author: Stephanie Lee
reviews_detailed.text:
Urban Paradise truly lives up to its name. This bistro-style buffet offers an elevated dining experience that blends style, flavor, and atmosphere seamlessly. The space radiates good vibes—modern yet warm, making it the perfect spot for both casual gatherings and special occasions.

The food selection is outstanding, with a creative fusion of flavors that feels both familiar and refreshingly unique. Every dish I tried was delicious, beautifully plated, and thoughtfully crafted. The cocktails deserve a special mention—they are not only visually stunning but also perfectly balanced, easily some of the best I’ve had in Taipei.

Service was attentive and professional, adding to the overall polished experience without ever feeling intrusive. Urban Paradise strikes that rare balance of great food, amazing drinks, and inviting atmosphere. A must-visit if you’re in Taipei and looking for something truly memorable.

reviews_detailed.author: Christopher Lee
reviews_detailed.text: The latest buffet spot at Taipei. Lot of quality wines & beers plus cocktails. Fresh seafood and creative food combinations. Friendly & efficient staffs. Will come back again when we visit Taiwan. Just around $60USD per person.

reviews_detailed.author: Cindy
reviews_detailed.text: Nice atmosphere. The food was great and the people were amazing. There’s free-flow tap beer, mocktails, juices (they taste like real fruit juice, not cordial), coffee, and fizzy drinks. Huge scallops and oysters. I recommend the Western-style soup with the crushed pastry on top. We really enjoyed it.

reviews_detailed.author: 陳宥宇
reviews_detailed.text: The waiters and waitresses at the restaurant are very friendly, but you have to make a reservation a month in advance😆

reviews_detailed.author: RB
reviews_detailed.text: The food was decent. The buffet offer international and local cuisines, featuring renowned dishes from all over the world. Some dishes though did not hit the criteria. The grill and teppanyaki section was terrible, their ingredients were not fresh and tasted average, with their meats being extremely dry, as if being left out all day. The alcohol section was extensive, including numerous wine, with a bar offering cocktail and mocktail. The western section was probably the best in my opinion. The corn soup was really good. The dessert section was decent, though some cakes tasted dry. Overall, its a decent experience but I would not be back, instead I would go to sunrise buffet (旭集) for a better experience. They have better quality meats and teppanyaki section, their desserts are much better than this buffet.

name: 老井極上燒肉 台北信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松仁路99號B1
reviews:
在台中美村店吃過覺得不錯，特別帶香港朋友3/1日一起來慶祝自己的生日

可能期待過高，肉質有些不錯，可能服務人員幫烤的時間，香港友人覺得牛舌吃起來不好吃

服務人員有兩個，第二個幫我們烤甜點的先生，服務很好

小插曲是香港友人對餐點有疑問時，服務人員的解釋好像也沒解釋到
明明入座就有提醒有當月壽星，到我們用餐結束
還要我們自己去詢問，不是入座有跟服務人員說，有當月壽星了

服務人員才拿了小蛋糕，盤子甩在桌上，好制式化的問要幫唱生日快樂歌嗎

整個好心情都被打亂

沒有想要再回訪台北門市

這次的用餐體驗雖然中間出現了一些小插曲，但整體服務品質依然無可挑剔，讓人感受到滿滿的用心與專業，無論是餐點的美味程度，還是舒適雅致的用餐環境，都令人十分滿意。

特別感謝服務員全程細心且耐心地協助我們，面對需求時始終保持親切的態度，經理也不時關心每位顧客的用餐狀況，主動提供協助與服務，讓整體用餐過程備感尊重與貼心，真正有種賓至如歸的感受。

更讓人驚喜的是，店家還特地為我們準備了生日蛋糕替壽星慶祝，以及精心手繪的祝福版子，這份貼心的安排不僅增添了滿滿的儀式感，也讓這次的用餐回憶更加難忘與珍貴。

由衷感謝今日辛苦付出的每一位服務人員與經理🙏，讓我們擁有如此愉快的用餐回憶，未來一定會再度造訪！❤️

🔥🔥Jacky、班森🔥🔥的服務真的非常好‼️
答應你們的用餐小小心得作文來了🤣

2/26 公司聚餐選在這裡，真的非常滿意！
除了餐點本身好吃之外，服務更是讓人印象深刻。服務生會主動關心我們有沒有吃飽、口味是否合適，讓人感覺非常貼心。當他們得知我們四個人吃了五人套餐還覺得不太夠時，竟然還貼心招待我們一份龍蝦壽司和一份鴨胸，真的超驚喜！

即使現場客人很多，他們仍然時時留意每桌的需求，處理事情的速度也非常迅速。有些餐點還會主動協助代烤，讓我們可以更輕鬆地享受用餐時光。更可愛的是，在代烤的過程中發現我們想拍照，還特地秀了一段十分專業的烤肉火焰讓我們拍，畫面超帥又超有氣氛，真的很用心😎！

而且他們除了非常熱心以外，也非常健談，相處起來就像朋友一樣自然，讓整個用餐氛圍變得更放鬆、更自在，完全沒有壓力。

整體來說，服務人員態度親切又專業，細心又周到，讓整個用餐過程更加愉快，是一次非常棒、也讓人想再回訪的用餐體驗 👍

reviews_detailed.author: Vince Cheong
reviews_detailed.text:
Ok place to grab supper till past 12 midnight. Not the best of the best, but still quite alright. Not the best value for money, but it’s alright.
The food is fresh and wait staffs were very friendly, albeit very hard to communicate in English.
Our server Yuan (長遠） tried his very best to accommodate us 😅😅😅.

reviews_detailed.author: Olga Maevskaia
reviews_detailed.text:
Visited in September 2025.
Taiwan 🇹🇼 Taipei.

Located within a bustling business mall, Gokujo Yakiniku is a trendy, spacious restaurant with built-in tabletop grills for an authentic yakiniku experience. The interior is bright, clean, and airy, creating a welcoming and open atmosphere that enhances the dining vibe.

FOOD:

The menu revolves around yakiniku-style dining, where you grill premium meats and seafood at your table. Options include curated sets or an à la carte selection for personalized picks. Our meal started with appetizers, including scallop nigiri and cod liver. The scallops were fresh and sweet, but the oversized rice portion overwhelmed their delicate flavor. The cod liver, however, was a highlight—juicy, rich, and perfectly complemented by a fresh onion topping and light dressing. For the main course, we ordered Wagyu tenderloin A5 with sea urchin roe and thin-sliced Wagyu ribeye. Unfortunately, only one portion of the tenderloin was available, and the roe was out of stock. After a brief mix-up, the staff resolved the issue by offering the tenderloin gratis. The tenderloin was melt-in-the-mouth tender, skillfully grilled by our experienced server, though I prefer bolder, wilder flavors with the sweet fattiness of Wagyu. The ribeye, thinly sliced, was exceptional—rich, fatty, and sweet, pairing beautifully with egg yolk and practically dissolving on the tongue. The beef tongue was another standout, packed with flavor and perfectly grilled.

SERVICE:

The service was generally strong, despite a minor hiccup with the tenderloin order. The staff spoke some English, which helped with ordering, and the experienced server expertly handled the grilling, elevating the experience. Dishes arrived promptly, and the staff’s quick resolution of the ordering issue left a positive impression.

VERDICT:

Gokujo Yakiniku is a fantastic yakiniku spot with an impressive selection of meats, seafood, and appetizers. For the best experience, focus on the grill offerings and skip the sushi or nigiri. The bright, lively atmosphere and high-quality ingredients make this a standout dining destination in the business mall, perfect for a fun and flavorful meal. Highly recommended for yakiniku enthusiasts!

reviews_detailed.author: TungChen Wu
reviews_detailed.text: Sorry, I don’t understand why the ratings of this restaurant are so high, really don’t. Consider the price, the food is average, the atmosphere is quite low, staffs are kind but I don’t feel any “service” at all. The rationale I use present tense is I am sitting inside for the lunch with my wife RIGHT NOW, and I cannot wait to share our confusing immediately 😶😶

reviews_detailed.author: Katherine Yu
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent Japanese BBQ place close to Taipei 101.  We didn’t make reservations so we had to wait for about 30 min.  This place has great A5 and Wagyu from different area.  We tried the Wagyu premium 2 ppl set for T¥3290.  It was superb! The set comes with Salad, rice, apps and dessert and had enough meat and seafood to fill up my son and I. The quality of the meat and seafood was great.

reviews_detailed.author: Isa Charm
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent food & service, sets comes with complimentary drinks, yoghurt drinks, appetisers, icecream desserts. The sets provide good selection of beef cuts, choice of salad & dressings. The staff may assist to bbq depending in the set selected. The ambience is nice and the restrooms are clean and well kept.

name: 默爾 pasta pizza(台北信義威秀店)
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松壽路20號2樓
reviews:
位於威秀二樓，內用環境舒適，壁畫有可愛的義大利風貓咪。平日晚上用餐人不多，不太會趕人。薯條好吃。
《秘製鮑魚番茄奶醬大水管麵$490》
口味偏辣偏台式，水管麵Q彈好吃。
《奶油燻鮭魚櫛瓜麵$400》👍
清爽好吃，燻鮭魚放在麵上呈現半熟狀，奶油口味義大利麵不會太膩。
《羅勒青醬牛肉Pizza$480》
普通，可點可不點。如果要點pizza建議選起司加量，否則吃起來偏空虛。
《清炒綜合海鮮義大利麵$470》
口味偏台式。
《紅酒牛頰燉飯 $430》
燉飯米心偏軟。
《米蘭布丁$130》
甜點布丁口感是紮實派，不是滑順軟嫩的那型。口味普通，沒什麼亮點。可吃可不吃。奶油還不錯。
#信義區義式
整體餐點都覺得還不錯，只是麵種沒辦法換有點可惜，大寬麵嘗試後小失望、披薩有點太濕，味道都被辣粉蓋過

前菜的明太子義式香料炸雞好吃，皮不會太厚很脆，雞肉很嫩，明太子不夠可以再加

杜蘭小麥酥炸透抽也不錯，搭配檸檬和附的醬不會膩

披薩點了雙拼-酸豆燻鮭魚+櫛瓜蝦仁披薩，其中的櫛瓜沒味道而且有點出水，蝦仁則是太硬，起司也救不了

酸豆燻鮭魚就還行，基本上酸豆可有可無，燻鮭魚配起司有點單調但是可以給過

整體來說，前菜好吃，披薩偏失望，該有的服務基本都有，價格都算合理，雖然沒有太驚艷，但整體來說也不會雷，假日來生意挺好的，不管是朋友、情侶還是家人用餐都算適合

reviews_detailed.author: Ryan Liu
reviews_detailed.text:
The menu appears to include a variety of items but about half were unavailable when we visited for lunch, including #2 dishes the menu recommended. Disappointing. Our waiter was friendly and attentive, but had to double-check the menu and run to the kitchen twice while taking our order, so it felt like the kitchen wasn’t sure what they could actually make. Note that there’s a 10% service charge as well.

What we ordered: Truffle chips (220 NTD) — these were excellent; Truffle Mushroom Chicken with cream (420 + 50 NTD) — I had this and it was delicious, the upgraded portion was just right for me; Stir-fried Mixed Seafood (470 + 50 NTD); and Paccheri Carbonara (370 NTD).

The food is very good, and worth the premium price. However, the inconsistent availability and what looked like poor kitchen management bring the experience down a notch. Highly recommended if you’re willing to spend a bit more, and hopefully they can improve the kitchen efficiency.

reviews_detailed.author: 黃柄霖Andrew
reviews_detailed.text:
7.5/10 Overall

I wanted the order the cabonara pork pasta, but they only have it in penne and not spaghetti. And somethings are out of stock. Unlucky for me.
For the Truffel Chicken Pasta, the taste is so mild that i cant really taste anything. But for the smell, it is amazing. 6/10
For the Bolognese Pasta, the taste is goodddddd, but the meat is too little. it has more sauce than the meat. 7.5/10

For the service though, it is over the top. Especially the male waiter that greet us, his service is amazing!! His salary needs to be raised, it is hard to find this type of person in this industry. 10/10 for his service.
09/28 Night around 8-9pm

reviews_detailed.author: jodz
reviews_detailed.text: Everything here is of high standard. Delicious food, great service and comfortable atmosphere. At first, they served a bun with some spread (if you ordered a pasta or a risotto). Bun was soft on the inside and nicely toasted on the outside. Good first impression. Food came and we were very surprised as we didn’t check the reviews and left satisfied and pleased. Will strongly recommend the pizza and clams. Food is great for sharing and place is great for celebrations. Thank you to the kitchen crew for the good food and thank you to the service team, very professional as well!

reviews_detailed.author: Tina Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
The quality of food is good.

I highly recommend the shrimp Teppanyaki and salmon  pasta, yum yum.

You can get buy one get one free coupon in your birthday month if you join their Ocard member. However, you can’t choose different items. You have to choose the same item.

reviews_detailed.author: Gwen Mann
reviews_detailed.text:
Went to the branch at Songshan Station but couldn’t find a listing for it on google maps.

Excellent all round 👏We stuffed ourselves❤️

name: Miacucina信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松壽路11號2 樓
reviews:
餐廳位於新光三越A11二樓，交通位置便利，假日用餐務必訂位。
芝麻豆腐炒菇沙拉清爽好吃。松露野菇燉飯稍嫌普通吃了兩口就膩，上面的荷包蛋品質不錯。起司肉醬薄餅偏鹹。

用餐限時90分鐘（不知曾幾何時餐廳都要限時，不管你點多少都一視同仁😅）此次因為久等松露野菇燉飯遲遲不來，提醒服務人員後，服務人員告知今天廚房出餐出問題，目前正在安排中，寬延我們的用餐時間，此時我們才決定再點薄餅，安心繼續用餐。

看了一下用餐的狀況，不建議超過八人以上用餐，店內只能排一排長桌不是很方便大家聊天，另外觀察了一下很多家長帶小朋友來用餐，算是「親子友善」😆小朋友哭鬧在這邊很平常，家長不用有壓力。

餐點🥑
用餐環境✨
用餐限時🥲

MiaCucina 是義大利文，直譯就是「我的廚房」，Mia 是「我的」，Cucina 是「廚房」或「料理」，食踐地中海式的飲食哲學。走進MiaCucina，是因為朋友說他吃全素，而信義區就近就這家，重要的是即使吃素也不能踩雷，所以跟著他開啟對於素食不同以往的美食體驗。這間標榜全菜單無肉，滿滿的蔬菜、起司、堅果、植物蛋白卻讓不是素食者的我吃了之後驚艷，原來素食可以這麼美味!!吃完後默默將這家餐廳成為未來再訪的美食清單裡。
為什麼?真的很好吃啊~~
連假第一天，滿滿都是人，美食值得等待，入座點完餐後，雖然店員說可能要久候，但其實十幾分鐘就陸續上菜了。這家義式創意蔬食讓我驚呼：原來不吃肉也很饗受。分享一下食後感
▌佛陀碗(朋友點)—
碗中堆滿烤蔬、碗豆、酪梨、藜麥、鷹嘴豆、番茄（有些分店加水波蛋）及豆干，食材可說配色繽紛，豐盛卻不雜亂。層次豐富到挖一口就不同風味，酪梨的油潤、烤蔬菜的甘甜、豆干外酥內嫩及穀物的扎實咀嚼感，酸甜醬汁讓整碗口感提升。據說源自佛教僧侶托缽化緣的概念、少即是多，簡單即豐盛。
▌烤花椰菜鷹嘴豆沙拉(我點)—
花椰菜外層微微焦脆，帶著炭烤香氣，口感微辣，內裡卻保有水分與甜度；鷹嘴豆口感紮實，淋上芝麻與檸檬醬汁，讓蔬食更清甜，香氣十足，口感十分清爽，再帶一點點微辣的口感，層次十分豐富。
▌三種起司烤番茄薄餅(朋友推薦必點)
他說MiaCucina的PIZZA每一種都好吃，所以點了一份，原本還擔心是否吃得完，看來多慮了。三種起司（切達、Mozzarella、巴馬）融化拉絲，配上烤番茄的酸甜多汁 + 新鮮羅勒/芝麻葉，口感十分清新不膩，每片都完美平衡，一口接一口，好吃到根本停不下來歐。
令人訝異吃完居然飽足感十足，且覺得好好吃飯，真的是一件令人饗受的事，有種蔬食的溫柔感，推~~

經過很多次 很常在用餐時間看到客滿
今天下午四點多前來用餐 來享受一下
起司三重奏薄餅很好吃 本來以為厚度很薄
吃起來會沒什麼口感 但起司與蕃茄的風味非常的棒
讓每片薄餅 都有濃厚的風味
北非蛋也還不錯 只是沒有很合我的胃口
沒有特別愛鷹嘴豆 如果沒有它 會更喜歡這道料理

reviews_detailed.author: Sophia Lek
reviews_detailed.text: Nice casual dining place. Was looking for vegetarian options nearby the hotel and saw Miacucina. Portions are very generous (good for sharing between 2 smaller eaters). The pesto pasta was delicious! I wished there was more asparagus and mushrooms for the amount of noodles. Delish!

reviews_detailed.author: Culturetravel
reviews_detailed.text:
Healthy Italian meal options.
The bowl was the best. The flat bread was soggy. Salad did not look that fresh..

Friendly and attentive service.

reviews_detailed.author: N Z
reviews_detailed.text: One of the good vegetarian restaurants in Taipei. The service was good, the food was delicious, and the dishes were prepared quickly.

reviews_detailed.author: Yvette Huang
reviews_detailed.text: We visited the restaurant twice this month, and we all had wonderful time. I know it is inevitable that we should order the food online, which made me pretty mad. I still had to know the details about the cuisine, and the pictures in the menu did not help at all. However, the waiters were quick to help. Maybe they need to set two tracks. I am not illiterate, but I really hate to order food in such a cold way. If I have to dine alone, I will definitely cross this out, and prefer to go to a cozy little cafe instead of such “fancy” restaurant.

reviews_detailed.author: Guy
reviews_detailed.text:
Food and atmosphere were top notch. Rare finds for a western vegetarian restaurant. It is located in A11 level 2, entry within the mall. Spent a total of NTD 1500 for a burger, pizza and pasta which was rather worth it. Food were well done, could taste that it is handmade and ingredients were fresh. Highly recommend to try their burger! Non-allium options available.

Service could be improved, just not as welcoming and friendly as it were.

name: 隱世餐酒館(台北永春店)
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區忠孝東路五段297號B1F
reviews:
空間寬敞、氛圍好的音樂餐酒館，位在地下室
那天被安排在舞台正後方，如果本身不夠熱情
容易被駐唱歌手忽略掉因為不會一直轉頭過來
相對的服務員也忽略這邊幾乎不會走過來這
Menu 是掃qr code餐食酒類豐富多樣化
但送上來有些卻是溫的，整體就中規中矩
適合慶生聚餐，聽聽歌手唱歌
用餐時間很準時清場，馬上要翻給下梯次的

先說好的，氣氛跟裝潢真的不錯
難吃的來了，菜難吃到有剩，非常難吃，也有人覺得不到難吃，但絕對沒人說好吃
好不好吃是其次，是這菜色太寒酸了，跟場地、氛圍非常奧不搭。

我看評價不錯，所以選擇隱世
但真的可以隱世了…
避免大家在這邊辦尾牙踩雷
不建議包場，太難吃
空間寬敞、座位舒適、氛圍拉滿、菜式豐富、是味覺加上聽覺雙重享受放鬆好地方！今天的歌手張楷老歌大放送！唱的很棒！必須按讚👍👍

reviews_detailed.author: TY He
reviews_detailed.text: This place is unique and special. The staff and bartender are extremely nice. The drink menu is original and unique. There is live performance every day which is perfect for date night or hanging out with friends. Highly recommend for everyone. Amazing experience for touring Taipei. Only downside is it’s slightly busy and reservation is highly recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Alice Hou
reviews_detailed.text:
Went there with my family for a Taiwanese Hokkien singer performance and some light bites.

I really liked their handmade bean curd rolls, which were filled with chives, coriander, and shrimp.

We also had the sous vide duck breast, turnip cake with salted egg yolk, and braised pork ears.

The duck breast was a bit dry and the texture was too firm. The turnip cake was good, while the pork ears were a bit too oily and salty.

We also ordered some drinks. As for cocktails, I’d say they were mediocre. I’d recommend going for hard liquor or beer instead.

The vibe was great, and the service was excellent.

reviews_detailed.author: hoven liew
reviews_detailed.text: Prices are reasonable but the food is just so-so. The waiter(see attached pic) who served us wasn’t friendly, bad service! Overall, not a very good experience. Probably won’t return.

reviews_detailed.author: G H
reviews_detailed.text: Came to this popular live music bistro. It actually feels like a nightclub with free pouring shot in your mouth. Food was surprisingly good, except for the sesame oil chicken, terrible. Service was OK, not so friendly, and over the phone was even worse. Great atmosphere and all singers that night were great!  Even though I didn't know many of their songs.

reviews_detailed.author: Terence Lim
reviews_detailed.text: Great band but terrible service. We went half an hour past our booking and they gave away our table which is understandable. They had a few empty tables but the male receptionist with shaggy hair claimed that they were all booked. We were willing to wait to see if they would be available but he said they will definitely come even though it was 11pm. Final snide remark that they do not sell standing tickets and so we left.

name: Range Bistrokaya
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區忠孝東路五段71巷25號
reviews:
剛好跟朋友約這家店真的很好吃，雖然我們五個人跟我們坐四個人的位置，從我進來到處去旁邊根本就沒有坐人，覺得應該要給我們六人的位子，我們五個人坐起來蠻擠
酒單是要少桌上QR Code，吃的有實體菜單，整體來說沒有吃到什麼踩雷的東西都很好吃，就是菜上的有點慢
酒的部分都很好喝，尤其是茶類條飲會喝不出來，但是有點小杯

他們家薯條是細長型，我個人很喜歡口感很好
炸雞翅很搭酒
草蝦義大利麵，草蝦新鮮有彈性
整體來說他們家餐點都不踩雷

本次用餐是與女友一起北上
第一次來吃，店內氣氛歡樂，服務都很熱情，推薦的餐點都十分好吃
我們點了好幾道菜，開胃菜的部分我們點了燉煮牛舌，牛舌吃起來軟嫩厚實，份量也是不少，推薦一定要點
蔬食點了烤芥蘭&花椰菜，拌上他們的絲綢乳酪也是非常好吃
排餐我們點了菲力牛排，肉質軟嫩，配上烤大蒜吃真的很讚，不輸高級餐廳，隨餐附上的薯條也是酥脆好吃
主食我們點了海膽燉飯，飯的部分與海膽配合很滑順好吃，配上的干貝也很大塊，十分推薦點來吃
因為餐點實在太好吃了所以我們又多點了兩道

香檸雞松阪推薦給能吃辣的
整體酸辣下酒 也是非常的好吃

金沙軟殼蟹是我跟女友想了一下覺得沒什麼地方吃得到，最後決定點看看
結果點了之後我們兩個都很愛的一道，蟹身軟嫩、蟹足酥脆 整體餐點協調有配上金沙醬與龍眼蜜非常好吃，我跟女友甚至想再點一次
強烈建議第一次來的，或是沒吃過10月新菜單的一定要點！

酒的部分因為女友不喝，我點了兩杯
第一杯是店家推薦的侍女伯爵
伯爵的層次豐富，柑橘味與迷迭香的層次很舒服，如果茶酒不知道點什麼推薦點這杯
第二杯是鐵觀音茶酒，這杯就偏甜，個人認為鐵觀音的香氣很足，但層次上仕女伯爵更棒
最後我點了一杯鐵觀音，茶香很足，冰的也很好喝

女友點的都是軟飲料
奶茶的部分茶香比較多一些，如果喜歡茶香多一點可以點看看
熱鐵觀音茶香很棒，而且可以回沖，女友很喜歡！！

推薦給看到的你來吃看看，建議事先訂位，不建議開車，可以坐捷運到市政府站後走過來大概3-5分鐘路程

下次我跟女友有來北部玩還會來訪，餐點好吃，酒水好喝

平常不太打評論的，但這家實在太好吃，有被驚豔到！

reviews_detailed.author: Phil Mcclellan
reviews_detailed.text:
Was out for a walk, just looking for a drink and some light food. And a place to sit and work a little bit. I was so happy to find this place!  It was early, so it was fairly quiet which was perfect.

I ended up eating more than I had planned because  the food looked great and I couldn't decide!
I especially loved the kale salad, and fillet.  Fillet had roasted garlic  a pepper sauce, and fries on the side which was perfect.
The staff was also very friendly.  I could practice my very limited Chinese a little bit, but the staff speaks better English than I can speak Chinese, so they could always rescue me if I don't have the words!  I will add this to my list if must-gos when I am in town.

reviews_detailed.author: Elaine Wu
reviews_detailed.text: My husband and I decided to check out this restaurant as we were staying at the W Taipei nearby, and it was excellent!  Coming off of a week-long tour of Taiwan filled with delicious traditional food, we were craving something a bit more current.  We're so glad we stumbled upon Range Bistrokaya. As someone with Taiwanese-American heritage, I really wanted to go somewhere exciting, and this fit the bill.  Everything was cooked to perfection with some Taiwanese inspiration, and the service is impeccable.  We loved everything about it and hope others will, too.

reviews_detailed.author: Kate Shao
reviews_detailed.text: A variety of cocktails you can choose from. Including selected and tea cocktail as well as floral herb and seasonal edition. I ordered Long Island 2.0 which was full-bodied and great. I love it! Their wine menu was showed online(google album), I thought it was a little bit inconvenient. Food was tasty but small portion. Noisy and crowded environment.

reviews_detailed.author: Becky Yu
reviews_detailed.text: First time here and this is one of my favorite restaurants in Taipei! Food quality, ingredients, and service are top-notch. Highly recommended: scallop uni rice, fried oyster, truffle egg pineapple bun, fried abalone!

reviews_detailed.author: Alice Lai
reviews_detailed.text:
My cocktail tasted like juice, tho I ordered a light alcohol one.
We order 2 people set, the dishes were good>ok>what>no way! They didn’t came on with what they suppose to be, appetizer was too late, cheese snack was too early. And their main meal was not very good, they cooked the meat too much, can’t be easy to chew. Feel kinda disappointed.
However, their staffs were nice, friendly, and patient. If I have the next visit, I will never order their set meal, and maybe just grab some classical to drink.
But I’m not sure if I will give them another try.

name: HOOTERS美式餐廳 信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松仁路58號14樓
reviews:
蛤蜊濃湯很好喝～～
今天我們是有包一區使用，特別感謝服務我們的Kelly不只長的很美，態度親切又很貼心！我因感冒所以跟她要了兩次熱水，後來她詢問我是否生理期來需不需要給我暖暖包，當下真的覺得很暖心也很謝謝她！希望貴司也能給予優秀員工表揚👍🏻
現場服務人員精神飽滿、身材勻稱，看得出來相當自律與專業。餐點不僅擺盤用心，口感與風味也都有水準，讓人吃得滿足。搭配熱絡歡快的現場氣氛，無論是聚餐或朋友小聚，都能感受到輕鬆愉快的用餐體驗。

本來想吃早午餐，到現場才發現早午餐是慶城店限定，想吃早午餐的人要注意一下❗️
但來都來了，剛好遇到萬聖節裝潢，還是決定用餐

水牛城拼盤的醬料過於死鹹，雞肉也偏柴，不推薦
圈圈薯條吃起來很ㄙㄨㄚ、嘴，沒有提供醬料但灑上胡椒就好吃了
煙燻鮭魚披薩是薄脆口感，配料還算豐富
骰子牛的蒜頭比牛肉更驚豔
當天最好吃的是鮮蝦義大利麵，不過份量偏少

週日中午人潮不多，下午一點多忽然瞬間客滿，要用餐還是建議事先訂位！

reviews_detailed.author: Jeny Rose Torema
reviews_detailed.text:
Need to have reservations to go to this restaurant especially on holiday.  Luckily I go here weekdays and reserve a sit for 1 person on the day and it has vacant. This is not a fine dining experience and expect loud atmosphere especially some costumer already drunk. They have quick activities for fun like hollahoop show. I like also how the girls waitress serve and entertain you as foreigners.  They can speak English and I don't feel discriminated here.

I ate alone with a good food and ambiance.  I reserve 22:00 and I got early in taipei so I move 21:30 in my reservations and have vacant seat for me.

reviews_detailed.author: Jecel Calonia
reviews_detailed.text: We had fun, and it’s a birthday blowout from our September babies friends. We love the ambiance since it is famous already as you can take pictures with taipei 101 from the hooters building. The foods I love is the white Pasta with mushroom, the chickens, not too with the baby back ribs since its dry and no sauce. But overall, the food is good, the view is nice, and entertainment is great. We were thankful that the rain falls heavy when we already got there anyways.

reviews_detailed.author: Ladyz Buatong
reviews_detailed.text: Fun American sports-bar vibe with a lively atmosphere right in Xinyi District. The menu has classic Hooters favourites — wings, burgers, pasta, salads and more — and people like coming for the cold drinks, tasty food, and great views of Taipei 101 from the outdoor terrace at night. The service is friendly and it’s a good spot for casual hangouts or group dinners.

reviews_detailed.author: Kyle Mitski
reviews_detailed.text: Ordered pasta and pizza and it was great, was not a big fan of the fruit beverage I ordered. I politely asked if the server could take a photo of us with the Taipei 101, but she said she’ll get back since she was really busy. Hooters Xinyi Branch could really get busy and jampacked when its near dinner time plus it was a weekend. We made an advance reservation for a 4:30 pm timeslot via their website. Eventually she came back and have taken a photo of us, I really appreciate her time and effort to do so. Regarding the reserved tables we booked, it was really chilly outside and other customers are smoking. They accept credit cards. We left even before our time limit with enough memories of Taipei 101 to get by.

reviews_detailed.author: E T
reviews_detailed.text:
The wings are outstanding. I don’t normally go for wings but I heard about them so had to try and I was not disappointed.

I opted for the boneless and they were so juicy and big! The sauces went well, curry garlic, cheese and bbq. Thinking about it makes me want to go back.

The atmosphere was fun and the punters were friendly and talkative. The staff also tentative and spoke English well. It was an all round good time and the views are pretty nice too, with 101 right there.

name: 渣男 Taiwan Bistro 信義一渣
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區信義路五段150巷315弄12號
reviews:
很有特色的台式居酒屋，很適合下班後和朋友一起小酌🍸

餐點都很台式，像是滷味、大腸包小腸、牛三寶等等，滿好吃的基本無雷，且鹹度配酒剛剛好～當天人多所以點了很多餐點，特別推的
🌟牛三寶、滷味拼盤（人多的話很推薦）
🌟烤餃子（醬汁鹹鹹酸酸的很好吃！）
🌟鹹豬肉
🌟雞翅
🌟大腸包小腸（是切過的很適合分食）
🌟台式伊比利（是培根～超香超下酒）

調酒的部分覺得癡情男子漢還不錯，酒感比較重一點又很有米酒香，鬼島冰茶也很清爽好喝
不過更推的應該是他們的shot～建議可以點一組每種都試試看再看最喜歡哪一款，都各有特色

🌟如果只能選一杯的話最推薦「不要不要」
檸檬配上咖啡粉香氣再shot Tequila 非常非常讚，檸檬皮嚼起來也超香，大推

整體而言是會推薦的店家，環境不錯氣氛好，調酒好喝餐點CP值也高👍

🍹 渣男Taiwan Bistro 信義一渣｜台味居酒小酒館的真實走訪心得

📍 這次造訪的是 渣男 Taiwan Bistro 信義一渣，一間在信義區巷弄裡常常聽到朋友推薦的台式餐酒館。它有種低調卻熟悉的氣氛，裝潢帶一點復古、小酒館的自在感，讓人剛走進去就覺得可以慢慢坐下來喝一杯、聊一晚。 ￼

⸻

☺️ 為什麼我會推薦來這裡

我這次的體驗比原本在網路上看到的評論還要正面很多。這裡不只是喝酒和吃滷味的小店 ‒ 整體氛圍讓人覺得很放鬆、很適合跟朋友下班後來小酌或當宵夜場。店裡音樂不會太吵，座位也不會太狹窄的那種壓迫感。 ￼

而且 店員真的很熱情，我們坐下沒多久，店員就送了幾杯 順口又水果風味的 shot 🍷，喝起來不會嗆，而且帶一點果香，完全不像一般烈酒那麼重，反而像喝一杯微醺版的果汁，讓整晚氣氛從一開始就輕鬆起來。這種貼心的小舉動讓人覺得特別舒服。

⸻

🍜 餐點推薦（我超喜歡的！）
•	烏龍麵（必點）
這道真的很令我驚艷！麵條 彈性十足，而且鹹香味道很討喜，吃起來比一般在居酒屋常見的乾麵更有層次感，配著酒或者單吃都很棒。
•	炸餃子
外皮酥脆、內餡飽滿，帶點台式味道又不油膩，是我覺得 小酌配菜中很推薦的一道。

⸻

🧠 優缺點分析（親身感受版）

✅ 優點
•	氣氛放鬆又有特色，很適合下班後喝一杯 🍻
•	店員熱情、互動很有禮貌且讓人覺得舒服 😊
•	水果風味的 shot 非常順口，是我喝過比較少見、好入口的款式 🍹
•	烏龍麵彈性很棒、炸餃子也好吃，是值得點來的小點 🍜
•	位在信義區巷弄，周末夜晚散步過來就很有氣氛 🏙️

⚠️ 缺點
•	因為是小酒館定位，人多時會稍微有點擠（但不至於很吵）
•	必點小菜有限，如果想吃正餐可能要搭配其他麵/主食
•	停車不太方便（搭捷運/叫車過來是比較好的選擇） 🚗

⸻

✨ 總結

整體來說，這次來 信義一渣 的體驗比預期還要好。
從酒的口味、店員的熱情到餐點的質感都讓我覺得「下一次還會想再來」。尤其是那幾杯順口的水果 shot 和有彈性的烏龍麵，真的是讓我這趟小酌之旅特別印象深刻的部份。

如果你跟我一樣喜歡 氣氛放鬆、小酌配美食的地方，又不想去太吵或太擁擠的夜店或居酒屋，那這裡絕對值得排進台北夜生活名單裡。 🍸🎉

今天是我的生日餐！非常好吃！品項看似很簡單 但都非常入味😍
調酒也很好喝！點了一杯醉美人 荔枝甜甜的很適合女生 Shot每個品項都喝了 都是恰到好處！
老闆還請喝shot 超讚👍🏻

reviews_detailed.author: Cassandra Yeung
reviews_detailed.text: The atmosphere is amazing and the cocktails even better! All the cocktails were fusions of classic cocktails with asian (taiwanese) style flavours, long island ice tea as melon ice tea! it's honestly one of the best in this trip

reviews_detailed.author: Yi Peng
reviews_detailed.text: Very nice place. Great atmosphere, great food and great drink. One of places I like most in Taipei! Will visit again.

reviews_detailed.author: C
reviews_detailed.text:
We were pretty excited to try a bistro bar in Taiwan but unfortunately this was not a good experience.While the food was alright (average), the service was worse.

We had 7 people in our group but the whole place only had 3 other tables there. It seemed like one server was in charge of food and the other one for drinks. We made our order and waited.... and waited... some of us ordered beer so that came at a reasonable time, but that leaves them to make 3 drinks.

I believe we waited for 45 mins to an hour for our 3 drinks and only a couple of cold dishes came (i.e. pre prepped marinated dishes). It's not a great dining experience when you have to wait so long for some food/drinks and wait again for so long for more food. These were small plates too, so we were trying to eat them slowly so we wouldn't be just sitting there waiting. I think we were there for almost 2+ hours and majority of the time we were just waiting.

reviews_detailed.author: Jen Vo
reviews_detailed.text:
It’s a nice place for a catch up talk in a weekend. The foods seem to be Taiwanese style for casual drinking. Their main dishes are noodle and meat snacks. The foods taste are above average and the price is very affordable. It’s also fun to have a seat near the bar section to see how foods and drinks are prepared. The servers and the chef are also very welcoming. We even got some free drinks (the purple ones and they are not in the menu).
Highly recommend the pineapple drink :). Would come back again if there is a chance.

reviews_detailed.author: Rui Zhong
reviews_detailed.text: Amazing spot, chill ambience,a bit pricey, and really flavorful food. Sausage and fungus were the highlight dish. Every order comes in smallish plates. Easy to order either a paper form in English and mandarin that you can pass to a server. Cash only!

name: 心潮飯店｜台北微風信義店 SINCHAO RICE SHOPPE
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區忠孝東路五段68號2樓
reviews:
心潮飯店是一家很有想法的「中式／台味融合」餐廳，空間氛圍走復古摩登路線，整體很適合約會或三五好友聚餐——拍照好看、坐起來也舒服。

優點是創意和完成度在「對的菜」上真的很亮眼：像海鮮類前菜（魷魚／章魚這類）、干貝搭配紫米飯的組合、以及店內招牌走向的飯類料理，都能吃到設計感與層次；味道不是那種傳統家常台菜路線，而是偏「料理化」的呈現。

缺點是整體表現有點看菜色、看當天狀態：有幾道菜賣相很強，但入口後記憶點偏弱，調味有時候差一點「臨門一腳」，所以我會形容它是有亮點、但略微 hit-or-miss 的餐廳。價位也不算親民，更適合把它當成「氣氛＋特色菜」的聚餐選擇，而不是隨便點都穩的那種日常口袋名單。

點餐建議：

優先點他們擅長的「飯類／招牌路線」，成功率最高。

人多一點去更划算，可以把強項和嘗鮮的菜平均分配。

建議先訂位，熱門時段容易客滿。

總結：
有風格、有幾道值得回味的菜，整體體驗加分，所以我給 4 星；但如果你很在意「每一道都要穩」，可能要抱著「挑菜點」的心態來吃，會更滿意。

問我好吃嗎？我說：不錯
問我划算嗎？我說：不錯

必點：九層塔海鮮蝦餅、蒜香鮮蝦炒飯、皮蛋剁椒茄子、桂竹筍炒松阪豬、炭金芋泥流沙球
海鮮蝦餅上面有點像青醬的味道，很特別一定要點（很好吃）
蒜蝦炒飯鹹香夠味，蝦仁超級大，好吃！！
炒松阪豬個人很喜歡，很下飯
厚炸排骨蠻好吃的，可以點
同行家人很推雞湯，很濃郁
滑蛋蝦仁、煙燻大卷、蒜炒豆苗都是可以想像的味道，不錯吃可點可不點
覺得干貝烏魚子炒飯、炸軟殼蟹這兩道可以不用點
最不推溫泉蛋過貓

塗鴨風格的菜單，又見綠色，餐廳的識別體系注重到每一個細節，可見一斑。菜單分類名稱，卻回歸傳統台味，給你滿滿的親切感。「正港手路」菜不點不行，那就來道＂暖心＂的「功夫郁香雞湯」和「招牌冷燻海大卷」；還有我最愛的炸物--「炸軟殼蟹裹蛋金沙與洛神汁」。
「功夫郁香雞湯」這道湯品真的很特別，你沒看錯！茶壺裡裝的不是＂茶＂，而是＂雞湯＂！這道湯有服務生桌邊服務，因為茶壺非常燙！這點很重要，所以服務生一再提醒，提醒我們自己倒的時候，一定要用三層衛生紙包住壺把，以免燙傷。「功夫郁香雞湯」裡面是滿滿的料，有金華火腿、干貝絲、巴西蘑菇、黃金北蟲草等，湯汁非常濃郁甘甜，濃郁到帶著些微黏性。
「炸軟殼蟹裹蛋金沙與洛神汁」秀色可餐，酥炸軟殼蟹香味撲鼻，搭配金沙鹹蛋黃醬與特製洛神花醬汁，幾根青龍椒。不管配色或擺盤，都很用心。很喜歡吃酥炸軟殼蟹，但是常會吃到不是殼炸得過硬，就是蟹肉乾癟的失敗作品。還好「心潮飯店」的軟殼蟹皮薄酥脆，蟹肉飽滿鮮甜。沾上金沙鹹蛋黃醬，鹹香味美；沾上洛神花醬，酸甜解膩，滋味迷人！可惜，量實在不多，令人意猶未盡！

reviews_detailed.author: S T
reviews_detailed.text:
Sinchao Rice Shoppe offers a refined spin on Taiwanese comfort food without losing its roots. The pork cutlet was perfectly crisp on the outside and juicy inside, well-seasoned and not overly greasy. The scallop rice with fish roe was a highlight: sweet, tender scallops paired with the savory roe, all sitting on fragrant rice that tied everything together beautifully.

Even the tea cocktails were thoughtfully done, balanced and not overly sweet, which elevated the whole dining experience beyond just a rice shop.

The space feels modern yet warm, making it a great spot for a relaxed but quality meal in Taipei. Definitely worth a visit if you appreciate comfort food done with finesse.

reviews_detailed.author: Happy Sunny
reviews_detailed.text:
Yesterday, upon arriving in Taipei, we followed glowing online reviews and made a reservation at Sinchao Rice Shoppe, a gem of innovative Taiwanese cuisine, and it was an absolute delight! Every dish was bursting with unique flavors and creativity, showcasing a fresh take on traditional Taiwanese fare. From the perfectly balanced tastes to the vibrant presentation, each plate was a delight for both the palate and the eyes.
This place is ideal for family gatherings or catching up with friends, as the diverse menu offers something for everyone to enjoy. The only downside is the ambiance—it’s fairly simple and not particularly upscale, but the food more than makes up for it. The incredible dishes and welcoming vibe make Sinchao a must-visit. Highly recommended for anyone looking to savor exceptional Taiwanese cuisine!

reviews_detailed.author: Joey Esguerra
reviews_detailed.text:
Food – Great presentation! The taste is unique and delicious.
Service – Superb! The staff are very helpful and even offered a pillow for back support, which was such a nice touch.
Atmosphere – Gives off a luxurious vibe with a lovely view that really elevates the dining experience.

It’s definitely on the pricier side, but if you’re feeling a little boujee on your trip, this place is worth the splurge. And don’t skip the rib eye steak fried rice — it’s their best seller for a reason!

reviews_detailed.author: mmats01
reviews_detailed.text:
I wanted to eat something on the higher end while visiting Taipei. I had my share of street food and cheap eats, but I wanted to see what the Michelin scene was like. I looked up a few places online and realized that I've never been to a Michelin rated rice shop before so I stopped by.

The restaurant is absolutely beautiful, and it's a wonderful place to have a nice meal in.

Service here is polite and well trained. They notice the little details and details matter.

I ordered seafood shrimp cake as an appetizer and the truffle fried rice with bluefin tuna as the main. Both dishes were excellent with lots of flavor. The rice was cooked well, not too oily and the tuna was seasoned and cooked perfectly.

I would recommend this place to anyone, especially those looking for a higher end meal.

reviews_detailed.author: Michelle
reviews_detailed.text:
Came here for christmas dinner.
Ordered the famous steak, and I’d give it a 4/5 - the food was delicious, but it wasn’t hot enough. I know it would’ve tasted better if it was hotter.
The veggie was good, as were the mung bean tiramisu! Very unique tastes.

Very aesthetically pleasing interior!

name: 輪輪1976 和食茶酒駅/ Lun Lun1976/台北信義餐酒館/包廂餐廳
formatted_address: 110405台灣臺北市信義區松壽路11號3樓
reviews:
輪輪1976 和食茶酒駅

📍櫃檯前方的推車上
⭐️很多顆紀念章

輪輪1976 和食茶酒駅位在信義商圈 A11 的三樓，是一間主打日式料理的餐酒館。整體用餐氛圍相當不錯，空間舒適，很適合和朋友一起聚餐聊天。餐點方面，我自己蠻喜歡「炸蝦海老茶香飯」，蛋香濃郁、整體表現很穩定，有來用餐的話可以列入參考清單。

紀念章的部分數量相當多，其中有兩顆是店家本身的紀念章，其餘則多為動畫或市售印章。會出現這麼多動畫主題印章，推測是為了搭配一旁的著色畫，讓小朋友可以一起蓋印、增加互動性。

@lunlun_1976
—————————
Lun Lun 1976 Japanese Bistro & Tea Bar

📍 On a cart in front of the counter.
⭐️ Many souvenir stamps.

Lun Lun 1976 Japanese Bistro & Tea Bar is located on the 3rd floor of Shin Kong Mitsukoshi A11 in the Xinyi shopping district. It is a Japanese-style bistro with a pleasant dining atmosphere and a comfortable space, making it a great place to gather and chat with friends. As for the food, I personally recommend the fried shrimp ebi tea rice. The egg aroma is rich, and the overall flavor is well-balanced and reliable. If you plan to dine here, it is definitely worth considering.

There are quite a lot of souvenir stamps available. Two of them are the restaurant’s own original stamps, while the rest are mostly animation-themed or commercially available stamps. The large number of animation-themed stamps is likely intended to pair with the coloring sheets nearby, allowing children to stamp and color together, which adds an extra layer of interaction.

#輪輪1976和食茶酒駅 #餐酒館 #紀念章
從外觀本身就極有特色，如同東方快車般高級感，入口處有可愛的模型，座位區也模仿火車座位，氛圍感十足。料理部分價位較高，但不論在食材、顏值、口味上都具有水準，非常適合情侶約會，整體感覺不錯，會再來光顧。

輪輪的整體用餐氣氛相當不錯，現場有駐唱歌手演唱，讓人感覺輕鬆又有過節的愉悅感，很適合約會或朋友聚餐。餐點部分表現有高有低，推薦的品項像是串燒、鰻魚飯糰與茶碗蒸都相當好吃，味道濃郁、口感也很有層次，值得一試。不過魚肉、炒青菜以及鱈場蟹義大利麵就比較可惜，味道偏淡，醬汁水水的，吃起來少了期待中的香氣與鮮味，整體表現不太推。
跨年當天如果有訂位，還可以到新光三越頂樓觀看 101 煙火，視野很好、氣氛也很棒，而且以跨年場地來說價位算親民，不會有被當成觀景餐廳而大幅抬價的感覺。整體來說是適合慶祝節日與享受氣氛的餐廳，如果挑對餐點與時段，會是一個不錯的跨年用餐與看煙火體驗。

reviews_detailed.author: XO Handsome
reviews_detailed.text: Lun Lun 1976 is one of the many restaurants in Xinyi SKM Mall A11, Taipei.  Online reservation is straightforward.  This Japanese restaurant stands out with its train-like façade and interior design.  The private cabins with different minimum charges are just as IG-able.  The minimum charge of the cabin which can accommodate up to 8 guests is NT$ 6,000 for lunch on a weekday.  Servers are patient and efficient.  Food is reasonably priced and of good quality.  Highly recommend the crispy Japanese-Style Deep Fried Chicken (NT$ 260), the refreshing Cold Beef Noodles with Sukiyaki Style (NT$ 320), and the flavorful Japanese-Style Taraba Crab Congee (NT$ 1,080) which is only available in October and November.

reviews_detailed.author: Florence Hung
reviews_detailed.text: Love the flavors and the aesthetic of the restaurant. Their servers are very kind and their service is fast, however, the cooking is a slow. Their portions are small and some dishes are on the saltier side. This restaurant is definitely pricey and their minimum charge is one drink per person, so in addition to the meal, you must order drinks. Aside from everything, I had a good time here :)

reviews_detailed.author: Johnny Wang
reviews_detailed.text:
I'm not sure I'd consider their food necessarily Japanese, but it's certainly Japanese-influenced/centric, with staples like sashimi to fusion dishes like mentaiko gratin. With that said, very few dishes stood out to me aside from the gratin and their pork soup: not that anything was bad, but more that they were largely unremarkable.

Many of the dishes are also presented with seemingly unnecessary or out-of-place flair, but given the nice ambiance and vibe of the space, I suspect they're catering to the IG crowd. The old school railway aesthetic is, admittedly, rather eye-catching.

reviews_detailed.author: Tiago Afonso
reviews_detailed.text: Great little “studio gibhli” train vibe restaurant. 5 star staff and decor. Nice food. Couple of set menus for two people. Interesting twist to some dishes, overall would repeat and recommend if you like to try something different.

reviews_detailed.author: A H
reviews_detailed.text: They served very generous portion of food. This Japanese fusion cuisine is very tasty and special.

name: 饗食天堂 台北信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松壽路12號ATT 4 FUN百貨6樓
reviews:
今天帶著夫人來到 ATT 4 Fun 6 樓的饗食天堂（信義店）共進下午茶，整體感受只有兩個字：舒服。

一進門先看到甜點區，視覺直接被療癒；右手邊還有專為孩子打造的兒童專區，這點真的解決了許多爸媽想好好吃頓飯的痛點，對家庭客來說非常加分。

⸻

🍣 分區清楚，動線流暢

餐檯規劃很明確，中式、西式、日式各自獨立：
•	日式料理分為烤物、炸物、現切生魚片、壽司、手捲
•	中式餐區還多了港式料理區（這點蠻特別）
•	西式、冷盤沙拉區也都分得很清楚

動線安排不擁擠，即使人潮多，取餐時還算順暢。

⸻

🦐 海鮮、港點與特色餐點

我個人偏愛海鮮，白蝦新鮮度不錯、口感彈牙。
沙拉冷盤除了基本配料，還準備較高檔的起司與蜂蜜，讓沙拉多了一點層次感。

中式區還有牛肉與魚片可以自己用熱水燙熟，這點和一般 Buffet 比較不同。
港式料理區今天吃到辣燒賣、黑色燒賣都很有特色，鳳爪甜甜入味，也表現不錯。

日式生魚片補餐速度算快，在人潮多的情況下仍維持水準。

⸻

🍰 甜點與冰淇淋真的強

甜點區與冰淇淋區是我最印象深刻的部分。
•	冰淇淋使用 Häagen-Dazs 等品牌
•	還有現場製作的人形燒（原味奶油、珍珠奶茶口味）

蛋糕整體口感細緻，不會太甜膩。
咖啡豆品質也不錯，熱飲表現穩定。
酒水有雞尾酒、台灣啤酒，還能自己用現打果汁＋氣泡水調飲，這點和其他 Buffet 比較起來確實有差異。

⸻

⏰ 用餐時間與停車資訊

下午茶用餐時間兩小時，節奏剛剛好。
ATT 4 Fun 地下停車場可折抵：
•	消費 $1000 折 1 小時
•	最高折抵 3 小時

三人用餐基本上可接近全免停車，對開車家庭很方便。
如果想喝酒，建議搭捷運；單純來吃美食，開車也算好停。

⸻

💛 服務細節讓人加分

今天看到一個細節讓我很有感。
雖然已超過 4:30 收餐時間，但因冰淇淋排隊人多，店家仍讓排隊客人取完冰淇淋、安心吃完再請大家離場。

這種彈性與體貼，是會讓人想再回訪的關鍵。

⸻

整體來說，環境舒適、分區清楚、甜點與冰品表現優秀、對親子家庭友善。
在人潮眾多的信義區，能有這樣的用餐品質與服務態度，我覺得值得推薦 👍

如果你想帶家人聚餐、約會或朋友聚會，這裡會是一個不失誤的選擇。

自助百匯，以下屬個人意見，海鮮＆肉品、中西式麵點，品質皆有相當程度的水準，熟食餐點是個人喜歡的口味，牛排＆德國豬腳風味十足，現沖湯品海鮮＆牛肉，湯品口感香氣風味極好。
烤物＆炸物品質新鮮，口感適中，不會有太硬太焦的口感。
飲料＆茶飲 碳酸飲料品項衆多，哈根達斯冰淇淋品質固定。
甜點是個人喜愛的，但是品項＆風味個人覺得稍嫌一般，關係企業的吃到飽甜點品項更豐富，風味更佳。
洗手間整潔無異味。
服務人員親切，收取空盤速度即時，桌面尚可維持空間擺放新取餐食，就是結帳速度建議可以加快，已經吃飽想離開，仍未完成信用卡結帳，只好繼續閒聊等待。
多次到訪，整體而言，是個人喜歡的餐廳，也是可以放鬆心情享受美食的好場所。
The grilled and fried items are fresh and have a good texture, not too hard or burnt.
The beverages and tea selection is extensive, and the Häagen-Dazs ice cream is consistently of good quality.
The desserts are my personal favorite, but I found the selection and flavor somewhat average. The all-you-can-eat buffets offered by the company have a wider variety of desserts with better flavor.
The restrooms are clean and odor-free.
The staff are friendly and clear empty plates quickly. There's enough space on the tables to accommodate new food. However, I suggest speeding up the checkout process. I was already full and wanted to leave, but the credit card payment wasn't completed, so I had to continue chatting while waiting.
I've visited several times. Overall, it's a restaurant I like and a good place to relax and enjoy a meal.

好久好久沒來響食天堂

曾經的大生蠔🦪已不在
不過有純鮭魚卵手捲很好👍🏿

炙燒的壽司🍣
鮭魚🍣是先炙燒再放進箱子保存
不是現場炙燒
味道與現用的不同，有點可惜

生牛肉🥩沖熱湯
很好喝

天使紅蝦🦐煎的很好吃😋
很好撥～很新鮮

炸蝦🍤
外皮軟不夠酥

甜點🍮
意外的還不錯👌🏿
焦糖布丁🍮好吃😋
提拉米蘇的奶油與蛋糕體
蛋糕體多了點

有個果凍很好吃😋
但不知道是什麼口味的

哈根冰淇淋🍦
有夏威夷果仁😍

巧克力🍫噴泉⛲️
沒有凝固的冰塊🧊水
趕快杯子接～🥰

reviews_detailed.author: ABXY
reviews_detailed.text: We booked the Eatogether Xinyi Restaurant buffet for New Year celebrations and hoped to see the fireworks from 101. However, our table could not see the view, but it was okay as we wanted to avoid the crowd. We arrived at the restaurant quite early because some roads were blocked. The reception staff was not very helpful, maybe she was tired. The lobster was served individually and the food was fresh. I really enjoyed the salmon. Even though there was a long queue, everything moved quite fast. Most of the staff were nice and cleared plates quickly. After dinner, we walked down and could see the fireworks very clearly. It was beautiful and enjoyable. 😊

reviews_detailed.author: Cherish .K
reviews_detailed.text: This is my second time going to this buffet, I went to the one in q square near Taipei main for the first time but xinyi own had a bit more of a selection and it was great.

reviews_detailed.author: Riza Cabrera
reviews_detailed.text: It’s one of the best value-for-money buffet I’ve tried Taiwan A variety of choices and dishes to enjoy. The atmosphere is lively, the environment is clean, and the chefs are very friendly. With such a wide selection of food and drinks.

reviews_detailed.author: JungJung Chang
reviews_detailed.text: My favorite buffet with a variety of choices and dishes to enjoy. The atmosphere is lively, the environment is clean, and the chefs are very friendly. With such a wide selection of food, I can always find something I love. It’s the best value-for-money buffet in Taiwan!

reviews_detailed.author: Paul Yang
reviews_detailed.text:
Quite a lot of food.  Very high quality.
Get the clam soup, prime rib, egg tarts, and chocolate fountain dipped fruit and cracker sticks

Sashimi was great

Afternoon tea price at 2:30 pm was 700 + 10%.  They promptly close at 4:30 pm so the workers can eat

name: SALT&STONE 台北101餐廳
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區市府路45號4樓
reviews:
走進餐廳，溫潤的石材質感，帶著恰到好處的輕奢氛圍，讓人緩緩緊湊的節奏，坐下來好好吃一頓飯，不管是一個人還是有伴，都可以享受片刻的寧靜與與當下的美食。其實在餐廳外最先被那些剛剛出爐的烘焙吸引，對，玻璃櫃內有肉桂捲，也有可頌與鹹甜派，看起來都十分可口，但因為我用餐後完全沒有可以存放甜點的空間，閨蜜也是，所以她挑了一些外帶，之後再補上她的食後感，先分享這餐生日餐的美味。
▌甜蝦燉飯（Amaebi Risotto / Sweet Shrimp Risotto） —
爆發出甜美蝦味與馥郁蝦膏的黃金米粒
燉飯米粒煮得恰到好處，保留微芯的咬勁。讓入口後甜蝦甜美濃郁的海味與沉浸在蝦膏中的黃金米粒，每一口都讓舌尖像被寵壞的小孩，有種衝擊與驚艷的爽度，記不起上一次有這種感覺是哪裡的燉飯，但此次的用餐體驗直接覆蓋以往的美食記憶，好吃，所以每一口細細品嘗，每一口都有不同的層次感，建議必點清單。
▌農夫派（Farmer Pizza） —鹹香、奶香、炭香完美協奏
餅皮邊緣微焦、中央薄軟，帶著炭火香氣的手打麵團的Q彈。綿密不膩的芳提娜起司（Fontina）與瑞可塔乳酪（Ricotta）作為基底，薄切馬鈴薯片微焦香，口感軟綿中帶脆，鹹香培根與甜美紅蔥頭（shallot）煙燻與微酸平衡，中央那顆溫泉蛋，讓流心蛋黃如金色絲絨般裹覆整片披薩，直接把鹹香、奶香、炭香推向高潮，堪稱畫龍點睛。
▌胡桃派（Pecan Pie）— 號稱全台北最好吃，滿滿胡桃很過癮
頂層堆疊著輕盈綿密的鮮奶油，輕灑一層微苦可可粉，派皮乾爽酥脆，邊緣微焦，內餡滿滿胡桃浸潤在焦糖糖漿中，一口有種牛軋糖般的口感錯覺，卻不黏牙、不膩口，也不會過分甜膩，味道恰到好處，評論中很多人說很難分切，這倒是真的，很硬難切，但享用的時候真的很過癮。

下次再試試別的餐點，推~~

台北101 4樓 漂亮精緻又美味的餐廳🥰 最裡面大片綠植佈置的牆面也很喜歡🌿
-
開胃菜推松露布拉塔！醃番茄我真的好喜歡🥹 油醋蕃茄蘸酸種麵包，微酸超級開胃🤤

寬帶麵和彎管通心粉就是很好吃的義大利麵～每一口麵都有均勻裹上醬汁，味道也都恰到好處👏 彎管麵是用雞冠麵，很少見，非常特別！

甜蝦燉飯真的有厲害！味道的超級濃郁的燉飯！甜蝦蠻大隻的🦐
整體燉飯蝦味超濃！但吃多感覺很容易膩，分食會比較剛好～🙂‍↕️
另，友善提醒，燉飯應該是有使用不少蝦膏去料理，蝦蟹過敏的真的一口都不要試！
（蝦蟹過敏的人一定要特別注意！！！）

主餐點香煎嫩鴨胸，超級好吃……🥹🫶🏻🫶🏻
熟度超剛好！外面煎到微微脆脆的，裡面咬起來又是偏柔軟！很喜歡🥰 蘸旁邊的醬也很好吃！搭無花果超特別！也很解膩！

吃太多道了 ，對Pizza就只記得是好吃的Pizza，沒有特別深刻的印象🤣
-
平日晚餐生意也超好！非常建議要訂位～！

用餐期間會隨著菜色，我們大概陸續換了兩三次盤子（我個人確實超級討厭菜色串味），這點真的很加分🥰

但建議還是用餐人數抓在六人以內，因為店家不給加座椅在桌邊，所以長桌的區域我覺得最多坐六個人，這樣的寬度會比較舒服～

這次來 SALT&STONE 台北101餐廳 用餐真的很滿意，整體表現超出期待。

松露布拉塔香氣濃郁，起司滑順細緻，搭配得很有層次感。義式香腸比薩餅皮外酥內Q，香腸鹹香夠味，越吃越涮嘴。蛤蝲麵的海味很鮮明，蛤蝲飽滿，麵條熟度剛剛好，每一口都很享受。

百香荔枝莫西托清爽順口，果香自然不甜膩，和餐點非常搭。最後的起司蛋糕濃郁綿密卻不會過重，為整餐畫下完美句點。

餐廳氣氛舒適，服務親切細心，是會想再訪的好地方。真心推薦給喜歡義式料理的朋友，五星好評！ 🌟

整體不只餐點好吃，環境舒適，服務也很親切。下次一定會再訪，也會推薦給朋友！

reviews_detailed.author: Kristine Orias
reviews_detailed.text:
First time dining here and I thought we needed a reservation to dine. They allow walk-ins and the waiting time is actually fast.

Food was super good, and the service was really fast and they were able to attend to our every need/request despite the volume of customers. They even suggested better food combinations when we place our orders.

Overall, we had a really good time and will definitely come visit again when we come back to Taipei.

reviews_detailed.author: Samo Muránsky
reviews_detailed.text:
After some time in Taiwan I felt like having a taste of home, so I stopped here for lunch. The place markets itself as American restaurant, but the menu is quite heavy on Italian food and I can say this is probably as close as you can get to a proper Italian experience in Taiwan. I arrived at lunchtime without reservation but was able to get a seat at one of the high tables (which I prefer anyway) despite the place being fully booked. The key seems to be to arrive right when they open.

Burrata starter was spot on, rich and well-balanced flavour. Pappardelle pasta was also very good, but the sauce was a bit too mild in taste (the taste was on a creamy side, it lacked the meaty flavour and could use more seasoning/spice) - still a very pleasant dish but could be improved a bit. Cheesecake was absolutely delicious and I highly recommend to not skip it :)

Service was polite and pleasant. Service style is local, so expect the main to arrive either alongside your starter or shortly after. Check is also brought proactively without asking but you can still order more stuff and they will just reissue it.

Overall a great experience and I highly recommend this place if you're ever in need of some European food in Taipei. The lunch set me back 40€ (three courses + a large bottle of San Pellegrino) which is very reasonable for a restaurant of this type at such an exclusive location.

reviews_detailed.author: Tuong Lam
reviews_detailed.text: Food is really good and high quality. The drinks are all impressive too. Wine options are good too. Pizza is phenomenal according to my husband. Get here early tho or they will run out of stuff. All employees speaks fluent English. Nice and quiet option away from the bustling food court on a weekend

reviews_detailed.author: Deborah Reyes
reviews_detailed.text:
We ordered the linguine - it was ok, eggplant appetizer - great choice,
Thai salad was good, the cheese pizza was good - crust was nice and toasted, but the roast chicken took the prize!  It is rare to have chicken breast that is fully cooked yet, juicy! This dish alone is worth going back for.  Mall 101, 4th floor!

reviews_detailed.author: Jony
reviews_detailed.text:
I’ve eaten at Salt & Stone for at least 15 times now. The food is always consistent, fresh and really delicious. The service has never missed a beat. The staff are friendly and attentive and always willing to help.

However my last trip went way beyond my expectations! I took my family here for a Valentines/pre-CNY meal.

We ordered a lot of the great food we’ve always gotten but this time decided to try the lamb chops for the first time. The waitress told us it would take an hour to be prepared which we were comfortable with.

The lamb ended up taking longer than expected, which we actually didn’t mind since we were enjoying our wine and our chat. However the staff were so courteous, giving us updates and even providing a dessert as a show of gratitude for us waiting.

In the end we got our lamb chops which were so good! Tender, juicy and tasted really good without the gamey taste that you sometimes get with lamb. Worth the wait 😁

After we paid and were walking away one of the staff chased after us with a bag filled with amazing pastries. She wished us happy Valentine’s Day, happy CNY and thanked us again for our patience. It was one last surprise that made the experience even more unforgettable.

Thank you S&S staff that was working on Valentines Day 2026!

name: 初泰信義象山門市
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區信義路五段122號
reviews:
沒有柚子味的柚子蝦沙拉、
堅韌的綠咖喱雞、
沒有咖喱味&海鮮燙過直接丟進去的咖喱海鮮、
有冰箱味的月亮蝦餅、
鹹死人不償命的東蔭功炒公仔麵
無功無過的蝦醬空心菜，
說要幫我們反應請店長處理卻消失無影無蹤的員工⋯⋯
大年初二跟閨蜜的一餐

口味普通，服務很好，老實還有很多更好吃的泰式。空間環境很寬敞，聚餐很適合～

月亮蝦餅很讚，又點了一盤。白飯可續。綠咖喱正常發揮。打拋肉普通。檸檬魚很好吃，一整條的。酸辣湯其實不錯喝。

整體來說，體驗看看這個品牌的泰式支線還可以。但泰式料理愛好者會失望，不會回購～

笑死，我懂為何星數這麼高了。

想看更多，dcard/voucs搜尋喵喵貓！

【初泰｜路易莎旗下泰式料理｜信義區】
臨時起意四人用餐（原訂位2位、遲到10分鐘），門市用線上訂位系統，現場服務人員態度很好，快速協助加人與帶位。位置在信義區邊緣，公車到店門口方便、捷運象山站步行較久；店內寬敞明亮、整潔，洗手檯旁有 ATM，外場另有泰式商品販售架。

本次餐點（四人套餐，簡評）

黑金蝦餅：外層微脆、可嚐到細碎蝦殼口感，搭配醬汁順口，本桌最推薦。

柚子蝦拌沙拉：酸鹹度偏重，風味過猛。

清蒸檸檬魚：魚肉嫩，但調味像「辦桌清蒸魚＋泰式醬」的組合，記憶點一般。

打拋豬（微辣）：鹹度略高，辣度對不吃辣的朋友還能接受。

蝦醬空心菜：整體像魚露＋醋感，鹹香明顯。

冬粉蝦煲：黑胡椒風味主導，蝦子表現普通。

瑪莎曼咖哩牛：牛肉嫩、很下飯，調味路線較特別。

羅勒豬肉丸子湯：似「貢丸湯＋冬粉」的配置。

甜點：摩喳喳、椰奶黑米芋頭甜湯風味中規；評論贈的泰奶戚風鬆軟。

白飯可續（單一品項）。

其他

口味整體偏重、偏鹹，香料感突出；若偏好清爽系泰味，可能不合口味。

觀察常客多採單點，初訪若不確定偏好，建議從單點開始再加點。

總評（個人主觀）

餐點：黑金蝦餅表現最好；其餘多為重口路線，接受度看個人口味。

環境與服務：座位舒適、動線清楚，服務親切加分。

CP 值：以地段與份量衡量一般；重口味愛好者可試，偏清爽者不太建議套餐。

reviews_detailed.author: Alex J. Lin
reviews_detailed.text: Pineapple fried rice has very little taste. Chicken satay is ok. No need reservation on a Friday dinner. Not a lot of people

reviews_detailed.author: Marcel Jelke Vercruysse
reviews_detailed.text:
The Massaman curry beef contained extremely low-quality meat that was very tough, and the sweet potato was completely dried out, almost like cardboard. The sauce did not taste fresh at all.

The Tom Kha Gai (chicken) soup was overly sour with a very strange flavor. The chicken in the soup was inedible, extremely tough (see photo).

The only dish that tasted good was the stir-fried pork with kaphrao.
The rice we were served was also very dry, with some grains being hard. Overall, a very disappointing experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Grace Chung
reviews_detailed.text:
When it comes to celebrating special occasions, especially birthdays, we expect an experience that is memorable for all the right reasons. Unfortunately, our recent visit here did not live up to those expectations and left us feeling quite disappointed.
From the moment we arrived, the enthusiasm of the occasion was overshadowed by the quality of the food. We ordered the green curry pork, anticipating a fresh and flavorful dish, but what we received was anything but. The pork tasted old and gamey, which prompted us to express our concerns to the waitress. To our disbelief, she returned to inform us that the chef claimed there was nothing wrong with it, stating that this was simply how the pork should taste. It was hard to believe that the chef could be so disconnected from the expectations of fresh, flavorful cuisine.
Things didn’t improve when we switched to chicken, which also arrived with an unappealing gamey flavor. All dishes, including the pork meatball soup, failed to impress and lacked the authenticity we were expecting. After several underwhelming unauthentic dishes, we decided it was best to simply refrain from raising our concerns with the staff any further.
To add to our frustration, this was meant to be a celebratory gathering. Prior to our visit, we had called to inquire about a complimentary birthday cake. The staff assured us that they could prepare one, provided they checked the birthday person's ID. However, when the time came to remind them about the cake, we encountered further issues. After waiting over an hour, we were finally presented with a plain chiffon cake— devoid of any candles or festive decorations. It felt like an afterthought rather than the celebration we had envisioned. If the restaurant was unable to provide a complimentary cake, we would have appreciated honesty during our initial inquiry. Yet, they insisted on checking the ID for a cake that was subpar in quality. They didn't ask for id when the cake was presented and I guess they didn't bother anymore for what they had offered.
Overall, our experience here was disappointing, particularly in light of the rave reviews we had read. The food lacked freshness and authenticity, and the service fell short of basic expectations. We left feeling offended and discouraged, with a resolute decision that we will not return.
If you’re looking for a place to celebrate, I recommend you stay away from Pikul. There are countless other restaurants that will provide not just good food, but an overall enjoyable experience

reviews_detailed.author: Kai Yin Wang
reviews_detailed.text: we have one of most impressive eating experience at this place. The atmosphere is amazingly relax and pleasant. We had both dinner and lunch here, the dishes are distinguish delicious. Curry soft shell crab, curry  pork and green papaya salad are all very very tasty. Also I had the best chicken wing which I will order every time. Manager Mr Lu gives wonderful service and he told us that he will add 30 more new dishes including green curry beef which is my favorite starting this March. I highly recommend this place for romantic gathering, friends or family gathering.

reviews_detailed.author: C Neon
reviews_detailed.text: This is a traditional Thai restaurant that serves many of the favorites such as curry, salads, desserts, and a few chef specials.   The dishes are tasty as good.  Presentation of the dishes are also well thought thru.   Overall we had a good experience

name: JK STUDIO 法式餐酒館 (台北信義店)｜預約制
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區基隆路一段147巷5弄13號
reviews:
嚴格來說我不是很確定他們算不算法餐
算是有運用些手法，但私以為不算很到位
是兩三年前吃的，口味上沒有特別的記憶點
不過餐廳整體氛圍是頗讚的，印象服務人員也很親切
當然整體價格就是偏高，就是套餐我不會覺得是餐酒館，很適合想花錢在氣氛上的人
週六晚上臨時要吃飯，這邊還有位子就來了，整體的體驗真的不太行，先說食物：兩樣主菜都非常的鹹，最後沒有辦法吃完，再說服務：服務生打破了玻璃杯碎片四射，雖然有馬上清理地板，但我離開時發現我兒子腳旁還有一些碎片，只能慶幸還好沒踩到，除此外，我也不明白為什麼送完主餐一陣子之後就先送來了帳單？雖然服務生有說不需要要馬上付錢，但我們想要加點甜點都覺得不好意思就沒點了😑

氣氛服務很好
環境乾淨優雅安靜

-鄉村麵包/1片（套）
🔹現烤麵包 很好吃
-當日主廚沙拉（套）
🔹好吃 推薦👍🏻
-當日主廚濃湯 可+100升級酥皮主廚濃湯
🔹湯品 普通 味道很清淡 不推薦
-蟹肉餅/1顆（套）
🔹餐點最好的 非常推薦
- 油封鴨腿與芥末籽醬
🔹外皮很酥脆  但 肉有點乾
- Coffee
🔹尚可

reviews_detailed.author: James Ng
reviews_detailed.text: JK STUDIO dining experience is really first-class! The restaurant environment is elegant , and the lights are warm and comfortable, which is perfect for dating or celebrations. The food is exquisitely arranged and rich in flavors. From the appetizer to the main course, you can feel the chef’s thoughtfulness. The waiter is polite, so that you can enjoy your dinner easily. It‘s really worth recommending! ✨

reviews_detailed.author: lemon
reviews_detailed.text:
Enjoyed this meal!

For starters, I recommend the butter and bread, the bread is nice and crispy. The potato and clam chowder puff pastry is thick and flavorful, highly recommend.
For the main course, I recommend the linguine lobster, I really liked the flavors.

The only disappointment was the Lamb and Port wine berry sauce. The sauce itself was good, but the lamb meat was not as tender as I had expected it to be.

Also the desserts were delicious. I ordered the crème brûlée and chocolate cake. Both were absolutely delicious.

reviews_detailed.author: Debo Wang
reviews_detailed.text:
I came here with a group of three for dinner at 7 PM on a Saturday night. We were able to make reservations for dinner via their website the day of around a few hours beforehand.

As soon as we arrived, we were taken directly to our seat. The service throughout the meal was wonderful and they were very attentive.

We ordered a few appetizers to share:

-ESCARGOT: Nice and tasty. It came with toasted bread.

-FRENCH ONION SOUP: Definitely not authentic French onion soup. It tasted like Taiwanese fusion. It was ok, just a bit bland.

For my main I had the Boeuf Bourguignon as a combo meal. The combo came with salad, soup, bread and drink. All were very tasty.  The bread was nice and warm and the soup was a good creamy mushroom soup. The main was well cooked in a good sauce.

All in all, a great dinner option in the area that is a decent price for what you get as well!

reviews_detailed.author: Jennifer Fu
reviews_detailed.text:
What a pleasant surprise! We were afraid that we wouldn't be able to find a decent Christmas dinning place because we booked so last minute, but JK far exceeded our expectation! I must say that the salmon spinach ravioli was the best ravioli I've ever had and all of the meats we had were juicy, tender, and absolutely flavorful. We did have to wait a little because the table before us took a while, but the restaurant was kind enough to extend their working hours by 30 minutes so we didn't have to rush through our meal. Note that if you order steaks or any type of meat, it'll take a bit longer than the pasta or risotto dishes!

100% would come back again!

reviews_detailed.author: Yvonne Liu
reviews_detailed.text: The food in here is acceptable based on their price. I expect the food is a little bit better, but it’s not bad at all. The service is friendly and not too difficult to make a reservation. The wine in here looks good, unfortunately we didn’t try. I think maybe I will update the rating if I try some wine in here next time.

name: SHANN SHANN 小香 台北三越信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松壽路9號6樓
reviews:
點了二人套餐，黑松露蒸蛋與炒空心菜算得上好吃，花生米血骰子牛剛吃的時候覺得口味還不錯，但吃到後面有點膩的感覺，九孔滷肉飯則是敗在滷汁太鹹。但很棒的是套餐可以補差價換菜，我們把蝦卷換成了煎虱目魚，這道好吃！但整體來說，感覺還是高級版的時時香。
另外，能理解店開在新光三越裡面，租金必然影響營業成本，所以對於水要付費這件事情，我其實沒有太多的糾結，因為多的是不提供免費水的餐廳，只是當詢問是否可以給我一杯水時，服務人員很明顯的防禦反應：水要付錢喔的態度，可以看得出來應該有非常多人知道後的反應，才會造就服務人員一聽到水，就神情緊張，急著主張付費的規則。
還有詢問為什麼兩人套餐只有一份甜點？服務人員一樣防禦性的回答告知：夠吃、你們兩個人夠吃。對於我們只是單純好奇「兩人」套餐為何只有「一份」甜點？沒有得到答案，反而讓人感到突兀。

當晚與先生點了二人套餐，結帳總共2189，當中的黑松露蒸蛋與炒空心菜味道還可以之外，其他的炸蝦卷、花生米血骰子牛、九孔滷肉飯口味就很ㄧ般，尤其整盤米血糕比骰子牛的份量還多很多，會覺得似乎在吃夜市小吃的感覺，不是很不好吃，只是覺得價位不符。
最後有點令人疑惑的是，二人餐的飯後甜點只有一小碗，另外又給我們一個空碗？？！服務生請我們自己分著吃⋯⋯
結論是結完帳走出餐廳時，有點空虛，覺得⋯好像吃完夜市的感覺。

原本只是想去嚐鮮「鮑魚滷肉飯」，點了幾道推薦菜，沒想到竟被驚艷到！🤩
花生米血骰子牛，一開始還想像這樣的搭配會呈現什麼樣的味道，沒想到竟有古早味豬血糕的感覺，搭白飯吃真的很下飯。
香煎虱目魚，這是最讓我驚艷的一道菜，不愛吃魚的我還很猶豫這道推薦，當煎得恰恰的魚肉搭配酥脆的米香，這豐富的口感+蔥薑的香氣，讓人停不下來啊。
黑松露鮮蝦蒸蛋，也不讓人失望，一上桌就被松露香爆，加上鮮蝦脆脆的口感，真的很好吃。
相較於傳統台菜，小香的菜色口感豐富、嚐起來非常有層次，也不會太鹹過於油膩，個人非常喜歡。
烏龍茶氣泡飲跟小香綿豆花也很推薦，吃到整個撐肚；下次打算去嚐其他菜色！😋

reviews_detailed.author: Angel Marie Isidro
reviews_detailed.text: 🇵🇭A flavorful and well-balanced meal with bold seasoning and fresh ingredients. The crispy fish was the highlight, with great texture and a nice citrus kick. The stir-fries were aromatic and paired perfectly with rice. Generous portions and perfect for sharing — would definitely return😊

reviews_detailed.author: Critsy Y
reviews_detailed.text:
This spot serves solid Taiwanese comfort dishes, but in a more “posh” mall setting. Think comfy booth seating, polished decor, and service that’s totally on point. Yes, you’re definitely paying a premium for the environment—you can find the same classics for a fraction of the price at a tiny street shop—but honestly, I’ll take air-conditioning and comfortable seats over sweating it out any day.

The food itself is flavorful and well executed, exactly what you’d expect. It’s the perfect place to pop into while you’re already shopping, though probably not a place I’d go out of my way to seek out. And their “fancy” take on fatty pork rice with a little abalone on top? I’m loving it. :D

reviews_detailed.author: Helen Chow
reviews_detailed.text: Came on the valentine’s day, food portion is quite right for 2 people. A mordern version of local food, yet we prefer the traditional ones are way better. a few guests complained their dishes are too salty , and my egg cake came very sweet. the restaurant  also offers a wide range of wine.

reviews_detailed.author: Gari Acolola
reviews_detailed.text: Hands-down one of the best gastronomic experiences of my entire life. Shann Shann is a MUST when it comes to Taiwanese cuisine. Each dish we ordered was 11/10. The taste was unique and remarkable. Service is also excellent!!! Food was served really quickly. Our server Ruby was one of the best I've ever encountered. She was very alert and enthusiastic attending to us, and was very helpful sharing with us what to eat. She is truly a delight. We couldn't decide which dish we liked most because the whole meal was A+! We ordered the braised pork rice with abalone, steamed egg with shrimp and black truffle, sliced beef with ginger and onions, and bean curd roll stuffed with shrimp, and sugarcane oolong tea for drinks. Truly a restaurant worth coming back to.

reviews_detailed.author: C Chang
reviews_detailed.text: Pretty comfy dining space and good service. Waiters are attentive and pay attention to details, food is decent too. Not big portion and goos for small group.

name: Twozzim韓國燉雞-台北信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松壽路12號4 樓
reviews:
餐點部分味道都很好，可能因為沒有額外加起司就不會太鹹；紅醬黑醬都好吃～肉都是雞腿肉帶皮，內有洋蔥地瓜馬鈴薯冬粉蔥，可以自行加點喜歡的配料。

個人蠻喜歡手抓飯的麻油香，很開胃。飯卷就適合多人分食因為裡面包起司，可能自己吃會很飽。

服務人員都滿友善親切的，只是空間比較開放旁邊經過的路人會看在吃什麼東西😆

手機掃碼點餐
要一成服務費
位子很少，兩人座有四桌、四人座三桌
用餐時間100分鐘
點了雙人套餐 黑醬飯卷好吃（中間有起士
玫瑰奶油燉雞 吃起來就是一點點辣的橘醬
肉蠻嫩的，有洋蔥、冬粉、年糕、一片馬鈴薯、一片地瓜 吃到後面有點膩
整體來說就是普通 不知道在吃什麼沒有特色

整體來說蠻失望的，不知道為什麼評論那麼高。這是一間我期待很久的餐廳，終於找時間來吃了，但從最一開始的服務就爛到不行。一到門口沒人出來主動帶位，等了幾秒才有一個男服務生走過來，不知道他今天是心情不好還是怎樣，臉臭到一個不行，搞得好像我們欠他錢一樣，置物籃甚至是我自己拿的，服務那麼爛還敢跟消費者收10%服務費？
再來是餐點的部分，我們三個人點了一份雙人套餐跟單點一個泡菜鍋，除了玫瑰奶油燉雞好吃，其他的普到不行，甚至有點難吃的程度。其實價位也不算低 平均一個人快$500，但飯卷裡面竟然只有起司跟蘿蔔？泡菜鍋也好難喝，而且裡面有花椰菜？到底是怎樣啊？要不要乾脆叫台式泡菜豆腐鍋？
說來說去其實最不滿意的還是那位男服務生的態度，希望公司可以看重這個問題。
我本人是再也不會進到這間店用餐了，非常失望。

reviews_detailed.author: Maswassa Janchua
reviews_detailed.text: Good korean resto in town. Has many yummy recipes. Perfect for group.

reviews_detailed.author: Aleksandra
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious rose dakgalbi, rice roll with radish and cheese was awesome. Half portion was more than enough for two people ✌️

reviews_detailed.author: stephanie kao
reviews_detailed.text: It’s very nice food and cheese love the most ! Rex Spicy Chicken is main recommend

reviews_detailed.author: Joelle Mbatchou
reviews_detailed.text: Had the rose creamy chicken which is promoted as a popular dish. Too creamy for me and the noodles were so hard to swallow. I had the half portion and that would have been plenty for 2 people.

reviews_detailed.author: Michelle Natasha
reviews_detailed.text: food is good, very authentic! must try

name: 30 BRUNCH
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區逸仙路26巷17號
reviews:
早午餐聚會來吃酸種麵包🤩🤩
配料搭配很有趣，主廚會堆疊不同類型的味道讓三明治吃起來層次變得豐富又平衡，特別喜歡海膽醬跟百香果優格的組合！！！

聽說燉飯也很厲害下次再來探探，現在單人點兩份酸種麵包三明治可以有湯或飲料喔！

隱藏在國父紀念館巷子的早午餐。
付款方式可以信用卡、Apple pay、Google pay、三星pay。

早午餐早上9：00-17：30
最後點餐16：00

🔺單人點兩份三明治即可贈送濃湯或飲品

早午餐是有七道
酸種麵包，總共有六種口味，可頌一款。

酸種麵包口感蓬鬆，有嚼勁外層酥脆，麥香在口中越嚼越香。
堆疊口感與香氣，層次感很豐富，食材的堆疊不衝突，吃的到鮮甜！
醬料不單調，味道點綴的很漂亮。
更能表現出來海鮮的鮮甜與很鮮美牛肉、雞腿肉香氣❤️

喜愛酸種麵包不要錯過這家，讓你吃完會滿意的離開。
不只視覺享受，也兼顧營養均衡。

吃到一半才想起來要拍照

氣氛空間都不錯的一間店，平日午餐來不用排隊，但聽說晚上應該是比較熱鬧
餐點部分，沙拉跟中卷表現不錯，義大利麵蠻普通
瑪格麗特披薩不及格，蕃茄的切片跟起司的選用都太平凡，很像是在家裡嗎自己家小朋友手作的感覺，雖然味道不到差，但比較不匹配這個餐廳氣氛應該提供的餐點～

reviews_detailed.author: Olga Maevskaia
reviews_detailed.text:
Visited in September 2025.
Taiwan 🇹🇼 Taipei.

Reminiscent of an American-style bar, 30 Thirty boasts a relaxed ambiance with dark tones and wooden furniture, creating a laid-back yet inviting atmosphere. We chose this spot for its early 11 AM opening, making it perfect for a leisurely brunch.

FOOD:

The menu leans toward European cuisine with subtle Asian influences, offering a variety of wine-friendly appetizers. Since we weren’t too hungry, we opted for their highly praised squid with mentaiko. The squid was tender and perfectly cooked, while the mentaiko inside added a slightly crunchy, juicy burst of flavor. The spices were well-balanced, and the dish was an absolute delight, leaving a strong impression.

SERVICE:

The service was friendly and attentive, with our dish arriving in about 20 minutes, making for a smooth and pleasant experience.

VERDICT:

30 Thirty is a fantastic spot with a cool, relaxed vibe, though it might get noisy and crowded in the evenings. While we only tried one dish, the quality was impressive, and it left us eager to return for more. This restaurant is a great pick for a chill meal with flavorful, well-executed dishes. Highly recommend giving it a try!

reviews_detailed.author: Samuel Bostrom
reviews_detailed.text:
Takes at least 30 minutes for each dish to come out (hence the name). We ordered separate dishes so we were sitting around for over an hour waiting then watching one person eat then repeat. Ended up leaving before the last person got his meal because they "lost" his order.
Food was okay, aesthetic but overpriced. I ordered a mascarpone toast for brunch which also came with prosciutto and fruit (weird combo but my fault).
The waitress gave us 2 menus for 4 people, told us she'd bring more then forgot.
Don't come if you dont have a reservation and don't order separately.

reviews_detailed.author: Artemis Han
reviews_detailed.text:
The food was delicious. We were surprised to see whiskey bone marrow on the menu, and it didn't disappoint. The garlic bread goes very well with the dish. I also love the teppanyaki chocolate cake.
The service can be a little slow during busy hours. We enjoyed our dinner here.

reviews_detailed.author: Chengkang Lee (Ethan)
reviews_detailed.text:
The bistro was not fully occupied during our visit in the afternoon, so the overall experience was great, in terms of service, vibe, and food quality.
We ordered dishes intermittently, and as it's a friend reunion, we didn't find the service time too long to be endured.
The cocktail was good as well as the beer.

reviews_detailed.author: 9emy L
reviews_detailed.text: Fairly speaking the cuisine here is great - you taste the ingredients- they are fresh, tasty, spot on seasoning - probably only the dessert 🍮 pudding one disappointed me - it was relatively small but pricy - forgot to take a photo. It was a 8/10 meal 👌

name: INPARADISE 饗饗 微風信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣台北市信义区忠孝東路五段68號46樓微風信義
reviews:
。平日下午茶（202512）
。食材一般；口味一般；廚藝一般

先說服務員人不錯，有幾道菜還是他幫我拿的，換句話說就是－有些菜沒有服務員幫忙根本拿不到
主要問題就控餐，之前去旭集就有一點點感覺了，這次饗饗可以說演都不演
現煮湯台永遠在排隊，明明有兩個灶台就是只開一個，連服務員幫我拿都等了10-20分鐘

煎台很明顯供不應求但就是不多煎，一個品項故意只煎五塊讓煎台永遠處於缺貨狀態
羊排自由？想多了，直到餐期的最尾巴我也只拿到4塊
煎台旁邊的熱菜從沒補滿過，和牛漢堡跟火焰蝦更是完全沒看過

然後是麵包蟹，明明都只剩一堆廚餘了就是不補，後面還是我主動跟服務員要才給，然後餵個2塊就不給了，我是來乞討的嗎
其他很多菜也都補得非常慢，菜盤裡有一個沒一個，真的蠻誇張

推薦：
。現煎羊排：微鹹味超級嫩超級鮮，火候超好，有些帶筋不好咬就是，堅果醬辣味不怎麼結膩也不是很好吃
。比目魚鰭邊壽司：非常優秀，油嫩鮮甜有點嚼勁加上上面魚軟增添口感
。佛羅倫斯燉牛肚：牛肚調味不錯微辣鮮甜口，口感也行
。夫妻肺片：非常到位，麻辣口感都很好，偏辣，平常不吃辣不要試
。蝦鬆：調味口感都還不錯，少數拿２次的菜
沒了，說實話都在一般水平，不如饗食天堂那種

不推薦：
。烤魚下巴：超油超硬，鯛魚土味也超重
。小缽跟蛋：干貝苦又水，蛋實在鹹，就算同樣的東西硬是比旭集難吃很多，火腿香瓜到底是誰想出來的
。獵人燉雞：超難吃，雞肉完全乾柴跟冷凍感
。蝦餃：腥味超重
特別不推的也不多，饗賓的下限還是不錯的

其他：
石斑魚不嫩，味道也有點腥
烤鴨味道不錯，但口感一般，餅皮稀巴蘭
生魚片整体沒問題但比不上旭集，但甜蝦會苦很不行
螃蟹怎麼說，偏中下了，麵包蟹都瘦，不過鮮度沒問題
比目魚偏鹹，整體軟嫩沒什麼問題，配的醬酸口很無措，就是魚調味太鹹
今天的肋眼還不錯，熟度油度都剛好
蛤蜊很大，難怪大家都在排蛤蜊湯，排骨也還行，湯一般沒鮮味
甜點沒空試不過這次巴斯克還不錯，比旭集好

整場沒看到過的菜：白蘭地火焰蝦、松露野菇和牛漢堡
整場都在排隊的地方：煎台、現煮湯台

不如旭集是預料中的，但海鮮是真的爛
熟食普遍不錯，饗食天堂水平

總共羊排9支；草蝦6隻；比目魚5塊；麵包蟹上蓋半片5片還是跟服務員要的
不是不想拿而是極限大概就這樣，只要起身就去煎台，順路再拿其他菜

最後提一下壽星部分，給幾個旁邊就拿的到的甜點寫上happybrithday就了事了，這個"生日獻禮"還真的是不知道怎麼說，不如不要吧

漲價後我認為饗饗已經不值得來了，特色不如另外幾家

考量到地點、景觀、硬體等綜合因素，整體質感還是挺好的。起碼view好。
因為我不太喜歡吃海鮮生食，生食無從判斷；熟食的話，食材都是好的，細節上精緻度還是普通了一點點，依照自己喜好吃就好，不會失望也不會太驚豔，高單價熟食料理有一定水準。以吧費來說，整體還是很優秀囉。
甜點我很滿意。
水果是處理好的，大部分好吃，鳳梨百香果頗酸。
飲料我只喝了錫蘭紅茶跟碧螺春，還行。
廚師跟服務人員的氣質都很好，談吐禮貌佳。
可以看到101，踩著昂貴地磚，使用高價餐具，偶爾奢華一下過過癮挺開心的。

之前吃過 饗JOY 和 旭集，
饗JOY 提供的是 多元的國際料理，再加上 高空景觀（像是 101 景色），
整體菜色選擇非常豐富，甜點也做得相當精緻，
很適合 不想被單一菜系侷限、想一次吃到多種風格料理的人。

而 旭集則是主打頂級日式料理，
像是 帝王蟹、和牛、生魚片、握壽司 等日料選項都很有水準，
對於 日式料理愛好者來說會是首選。

這次用餐的這家整體定位與風格則 介於饗JOY與旭集之間，
不論是服務或餐點表現都相當穩定，整體水準平均都有 4⭐️以上，
非常適合朋友聚餐或家庭聚餐，
而且 座位區也能看到 101，增添不少用餐氛圍。

餐點部分印象最深的是 干貝和牛肉塊，熟度掌握得剛剛好。
晚上還有 母香魚，魚卵飽滿、烤功到位；
另外 豬肋排 也很好吃，肉質軟嫩、調味恰到好處。

這次選的是 晚餐時段（17:30–21:00），
整體用餐時間 非常充裕，可以慢慢吃、慢慢聊天，
完全不會有被趕的感覺。

整體來說是 有景、有美食、也有酒可以小酌，
再加上時間安排得很舒服，整體 CP 值算滿高的，
是會讓人願意再訪、也很適合聚餐的一家餐廳。

reviews_detailed.author: othniel wang
reviews_detailed.text: I love how the place has such high ceiling and warming decorations, the food was amazing from the Chinese cuisine to the European cuisine. Not to mention their salmon sashimi melt in your mouth great choice and quality of fish along side with other sashimis as well. It was a great experience the creamy pasta show inside the parmesan cheese wheel. Definitely was a great experience was just a little upset didn't get the window view, the reception said it was full turns out there are some empty spots left just perfect for 2 persons. Overall the food was not to doubt and the desert is not too sweet light for closing the night.

reviews_detailed.author: Dave Chen
reviews_detailed.text: A last minute reservation resulted us having some of the poorest seats in the restaurant, but still a five star experience. We got there at 5:30p and our window was until 9:30p. Amazing! Food was fresh and excellent, service was frequent, views were immense and satisfying. Worth the price of admission for the food, time, views, and service. Would definitely visit again.

reviews_detailed.author: Ada Chiu
reviews_detailed.text: We visited for Lunar New Year Eve lunch and the food selection was great. High quality food and beverages. Dining time was 11:30am-2pm. The layout of the restaurant is unconventional, with buffet areas separated into 3 different sides.

reviews_detailed.author: TAN KC
reviews_detailed.text:
Buffet - International

Just at ar breeze top floor. A upclass buffet. Big and has a huge spread.

Managed to get in. Spread is great. Varieties is big. Had a great time there. Service is great.

Yes celebrated a birthday there. :)

reviews_detailed.author: Cery and Jennifer Coker
reviews_detailed.text:
Came for family reunion with 19 people. We booked our reservation using app "klook" and pre paid

Reservation based with time slots and limited to 2 hours - arrived early since the clock ticking on time on the dot

Great choices of good selections. Mostly arr Japanese styles of food. Sushi, seafood, grill lamb, few different Chinese style dishes and can't left out the deserts

We sat where we got a greta view of 101 building

name: 艾朋牛排餐酒館
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區忠孝東路五段139號2樓
reviews: 能讓我一直吃的餐廳不多，但艾朋我至少來過15次，味道很不錯且很穩定，這麼多年一直這麼好吃，麵包鬆軟松露奶油很香，牛排義大利麵盲點都不會踩雷，湯沙拉甜點飲料也都在水準之上

已回訪多次
餐點的部分還是很美味
現場也看到出來安排了很多服務人員
但實際需要找人的時候
還是經常有叫不到服務人員的問題

安排的座位很寬敞
景色也很棒
用餐區域及洗手間都非常乾淨
洗手間有充足的備品
（酒精、衛生紙🧻、女性生理用品等等）

單杯紅、白、氣泡酒有買一送一
價格上很優惠
可以選擇的口味也蠻多的
今天也喝到了非常多樣的湯品
推薦蕃茄牛肉湯

主食分別享用了肋眼牛排、菲力牛排
以及南瓜🎃海鮮燉飯
牛排🥩口感都推薦三分熟比較嫩
有因長輩口味
點了一份五分熟 口感差別蠻大的
牛排火候、熟度的部分掌握的非常好
南瓜海鮮燉飯的口感微帶米芯
應該是使用進口米
口味是真的南瓜🎃下去燉煮的
不會膩～

餐點的部分等比較久
從點完菜到上第一道菜
約等了20分鐘至30分鐘
接著突然上菜速度非常快
包含湯品、沙拉、前菜、麵包🥖、單點
這些都吃完了以後
主餐又等了一陣子 桌上都是沒有餐點的
如果是附近上班想要吃商業午餐
可能需要考慮一下

幾次遇到棕髮的女性經理
能感覺出來她應該服務很多年
但最近兩次來用餐
都會從這位經理身上感覺到不耐煩

消費很高，服務品質跟不上啊！

食材等級好像有比較好一點

不過同桌友人的點龍蝦好像半生的，肉中間不好切也不好咬

位子安排在外場服務臺旁，服務員拿東西也不側身一下或是蹲下去，就彎著腰屁股就在桌子旁邊、對著用餐的客人

運動餐廳品質，高級西餐消費

reviews_detailed.author: Christen Johansen
reviews_detailed.text: Just a short walk from Taipei City Hall Station you will find this small, but excellent steak house. The service is efficient and friendly. The meat cooked to perfection. Not sure about that big TV screens showing sporting events, but the volume was set very low, so it didn’t affect the overall experience that much.

reviews_detailed.author: Vannessa Adrienne
reviews_detailed.text: A stylish steakhouse in Xinyi with well-grilled, juicy steaks and a warm, wood-toned interior — perfect for date nights or special dinners. The service is friendly and attentive. Great choice if you’re craving quality Western cuisine near City Hall.

reviews_detailed.author: Chelsea Yong
reviews_detailed.text: It was as a short walk from W Hotel Taipei, easy to access to the restaurant. What I love about this restaurant is the ambiance and food portions are fantastic. All foods are delicious except one thing, the food server tends to rush and they don’t smile, the guest servers are great. Perhaps need to train the food servers on hospitality skills. Overall experience is pleasant.

reviews_detailed.author: Kenna Marcelo
reviews_detailed.text: The service is great and very welcoming. We were led to our table and given an English menu. The staff spoke in great English which they didn’t have to but is greatly appreciated. The steak was the perfect size and quality. It was perfectly cooked. The hokkaido scallops were delicious. They even cut open my lobster for me! Oh and the bread and truffle butter… yum!

reviews_detailed.author: Andrew Ho
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent food and atmosphere. Service is up-to-mark. If you want excellent western food in Taipei, this is the place to visit.

name: 稻舍食館 微風信義店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區忠孝東路五段68號4 樓
reviews:
信義區午餐或聚餐地點這個標準來看
這家真的不錯！空間寬敞，四位用餐都還蠻足夠

餐點中規中矩，雖然上的有點慢，大概等了快20分鐘，但餐點都還算好吃
金沙蝦球：沒有其他評論說的泡水味，個人覺得其實不錯，也下飯，不過荸薺藏在最下方，開心吃完蝦子才發現它，有點可惜最後都沒有蝦子可以配只能單啃
牛肉：口味不錯，下飯，燉的也算軟爛～
雞湯：好像是期間限定！看到那鍋上來都嚇到耶
客飯隨餐小菜：認真說每項都不雷！龍鬚菜佐胡麻醬微開胃，份量不小喔；有雞蛋豆腐太讓人開心了吧！小盅雞湯也好喝，整體優秀
飯雖然有點小碗，但整體來講就是舒適飽而且一剛開始還想說不太喜歡豬油耶，直到淋上去才知道多好吃耶！果然是經典

就餐點口味來論，看似平凡，且感覺又台式又客家，調和的不溫不火，恰當得宜。
豬油拌飯也是一絕，店員有建議的調法，但喜好重口味的，也完不用客氣，一整罐隨便你加！
還好，有一個帶位男店員，服務很讚，也很會聊天，讓我們吃的很開心。

這次主餐選擇了金沙蝦球，鹹香入味且份量十分充足，表現令人滿意。店內的一大特色是可以自製豬油拌飯，充滿古早味，比較可惜的是米飯提供的份量稍微偏少，對於食量較大的人來說可能稍顯不足。
小菜的部分則表現較為中規中矩，缺乏記憶點。由於是初次造訪，不確定店家是否會定期更換品項，若未來能提供更具亮點或精緻的小菜，整體餐點的豐富度勢必會大幅提升。
以台北現今的餐飲物價衡量，整體的 CP 值還在可接受範圍內。不過，關於用餐限時 90 分鐘的規範，有一點小小的建議：我們是在週一晚上用餐，當時店內尚有許多空位，但服務人員依然在結束前 10 分鐘準時提醒時間已到。雖然理解店家有其規章，但在現場並未客滿的情況下，若能適度放寬彈性，整體的用餐感受會更加愉快。

reviews_detailed.author: raymond ho
reviews_detailed.text:
I came to this restaurant everytime I visit taipei.
The menu dont have a lot of selection. They mainly sell set meal which I think is value for $.
The main thing to eat here is the 猪油拌饭 (pork lard with rice).
They recommended to swirl the warm pork lard 2 rounds on the rice and 1 round of light soy sauce in the rice, mixed and eat it.
I normally swirl a lot more, lol.
The 红烧肉 (braised pork in dark soy sauce, in the pic) is a must try. It's soft and the skin melts in your mouth. You can feel the collagen sticking on your lips.
After your meal, order a pot of oolong tea and enjoy it with you friend.

reviews_detailed.author: pcm lim
reviews_detailed.text: We stumble upon this restaurant when visiting breeze. Love the food. Not much difference from Singapore style cooking, may be we copued from Taiwan. Food presentation is good.  The pork oil on the rice is delicious. Service is good.

reviews_detailed.author: Dexter C
reviews_detailed.text:
Decided to try this place near our hotel as our last lunch in Taipei.

Surprisingly, the food is good and very filling. We had the black date roast chicken and the roast pork set.

Also found the osmanthus dongding oolong tea to be so good that we bought some back home (had to stuff them into the luggage last min).

Lunch crowd from office can filled up the restaurant. Advise to do reservation.

reviews_detailed.author: Sheng Yang
reviews_detailed.text:
Salty egg fried shrimp is great.
Rice is great, with lard and soy sauce. Simple and delicious.
Like all the small dishes too, especially the tofu.
Mullet roe cocktail has been cooked to perfection. Best way to enjoy mullet roe so far.
Tried braised pork, it’s also great.
Will definitely come back.

reviews_detailed.author: Richard Chen
reviews_detailed.text:
Very authentic traditional Taiwan cooking. Best part is the soups and braised foods. They say to pour 2 circles of pork oil and 1 circle of soy sauce on the rice, but you should double it to really taste the flavor. The chopped fruit yogurt took away from the fried dough.
