reviews_detailed.text: Terrible just terrible food

name: 肉執事台北松山門市
formatted_address: 105057台灣臺北市松山區市民大道六段135號
reviews: 第一次一個人吃燒肉，飲料有4種，雞湯熱熱好喝，醬料種類不多，因為下雨就沒吃冰，今天點平日的商業午餐+櫛瓜和杏鮑菇，飯少量，用餐只有60分鐘，如果時間能長一點點也許會再加點，加點蔬菜種類不多，牛五花不錯吃

超推薦肉執事 Meat Butler！
整體用餐體驗真的太棒了～
店內環境乾淨又有設計感，燈光柔和、位置寬敞，一個人來吃也不會尷尬。
他們的送餐方式非常特別，餐點會搭著小列車滑到面前，有趣又新奇！
（也是第一次看到個人燒肉那麼豪華的

肉質部分真的沒話說，油花分布漂亮、口感鮮嫩，搭配他們特製的燒肉醬超對味！
套餐份量剛好，服務人員態度親切～
來店禮還有一份肉🥩可以換

吃完完全沒有油煙味，環境清爽舒適
讓人想一再回訪～
一個人也可以放鬆吃燒肉
已經列入我的口袋名單❤️

2026/01/10
這次點牛五花+豬五花雙拼
不用$400就可以吃到
杏鮑菇非常多汁👍🏼

🚎位置在松山火車站附近，店裡有很多座位可以坐
平日去的時候客人不多 但週末建議提前預約
🥩菜單品項不算多 這樣一份是 389 烤著吃很好吃，
但我覺得對男生的食量來說可能不太夠，這樣一份吃完大概不會太飽
另外還有提供飲料跟冰淇淋🍦

reviews_detailed.author: Apriandy Angdresey
reviews_detailed.text: A fun yakiniku spot where you get your own grill at the table. The most interesting things is of course the small shuttle bus that speeds by carrying your order, it’s entertaining to watch. Staff were super nice and welcoming, which made the vibe even better. However, the downside is that the food takes a while to arrive.

reviews_detailed.author: EmmaN CrisAnto
reviews_detailed.text:
It is my first time to try this kind of dining experience 🥰 very unique yakiniku restaurant with your own table for bbq and your orders will come with a little shuttle bus from their conveyor belt 😍😍😍 very cool and the food was also great 😋
Their service is good and i will come back here next time 👍👍👍

reviews_detailed.author: B W
reviews_detailed.text: This is a pretty cool spot in Songshan District if you’re craving for some bbq. They’re not all you can eat, but just order more meat if it’s not enough because their pricing is pretty good for bbq. I got the 美國安格斯板腱牛/美國安格斯翼板牛 combo set with rice and side dishes included for $489 and I was satisfy with it. Don’t come here and expect top tier quality meat, but the price you pay is good enough for what you get. The employee’s was also very helpful as well. I’ll definitely come back next time.

reviews_detailed.author: Jack Lim
reviews_detailed.text:
Walked in… and it was crickets. No one greeted us — no “hello,” not even a nod. After a minute, we tried walking in a bit. That finally triggered someone to say, “Please wait at the counter.” So we waited… for over 5 minutes… while 90% of the seats were still empty.
(We were first-time visitors, by the way.)

While waiting, we noticed a bunch of lockers and thought, “Maybe we’re supposed to put our bags there?”
We opened one — oops, someone’s bag was inside. We closed it immediately.
Two minutes later, a staff member came out from the kitchen and told us not to touch their personal lockers.
To be fair… how would anyone know? No lock, no sign, and they’re sitting right next to the public waiting area like part of the furniture. Honest mistake! 😅

🤖 After ordering, our food arrived via auto-cart — very cool and futuristic!
But then… nothing. No explanation, no one checked on us. Maybe that’s the point of the robot delivery.
Luckily, there were some instructions written near the seat — but only in Mandarin. Good thing I could read it!
It quickly turned into a “mystery grill challenge” — we had to figure out how to cook everything, locate the spoons and chopsticks, and grab our own utensils.
(My friend cranked the heat too high and torched his meat. That crispy beef became the highlight of the night.)

🔥 Thankfully, the ingredients were fresh and the meat quality was decent. Once we figured things out, it was actually quite fun — but you definitely have to take the lead.

💰 Prices were reasonable, and the overall experience felt more like an interactive food mission than a restaurant meal.
Just don’t expect attentive service — you’re the chef, the server, and the grill master here. 😄

reviews_detailed.author: Albert Yau
reviews_detailed.text: Yakiniku with a modern twist. A mini train capsule transports your dish directly to your table. A mini grill for a single person seating. Portion can be selected thru the ordering app. Meat quality is normal. Chicken soup is hearty.

name: 萬芳冰室 南京店｜茶餐廳｜南京三民美食推薦
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區南京東路五段66巷16號
reviews: 咖喱魚蛋三寶，香而微辣，炸豬皮吸滿咖喱湯汁很好吃，叉燒撈丁拌蔥油也好吃，碗仔翅比較像不酸不辣加上魚翅的羹湯。

2026年02月04日星期三
現場購買
干炒牛肉河粉$190元
小孩愛吃，所以跑來買
進門以後小哥立刻詢問需要什麼，
點餐完畢稍微等一下就好了，
出餐迅速！

2026 年 1 月 26 日下午 3:51
Ubereat第二次訂購
Stir-fried Beef Pho Noodles$205.00
好吃欸，小孩也喜歡！

2025 年 10 月 16 日星期四
Ubereat第一次訂購
買一送一
油蔥叉燒撈公仔麵 Char Siu Pork w/ Soy Sauce on Instant Noodles
$410.00
口味上來說滿好吃的，
麵條軟硬度搭配醬汁剛剛好，
香蔥搭配著吃好吃，
唯一小小遺憾是，
肉太柴，
個人偏好軟嫩然後肥的部分多一點，
下次還會想嘗試看看炒河粉！

乾炒牛河，揚州炒飯，蔥油叉燒撈公仔麵超好吃
乾炒牛河有鑊氣，香又美味
炒飯粒粒分明，一樣有鑊氣
鹹檸檬七，好喝
有港食的味道，下次會再訪的店家

reviews_detailed.author: John Lim
reviews_detailed.text:
This is a truly authentic Hong Kong-style restaurant, and it ranks in my top three Hong Kong-style restaurants.
The Hong Kong-style milk tea is rich, smooth, and comes in a generous portion.
The salted fish and diced chicken fried rice is aromatic, full of wok hei, and absolutely delicious. Prices are reasonable, making it well worth recommending!

reviews_detailed.author: JOY CHEN
reviews_detailed.text: good service and of course food is good. Nice they keep the building and interior design as original and Hong Kong style. Can't travel to HK but can enjoy Hong Kong food. The sandwich and radish cake are good 👍

reviews_detailed.author: Sophia Shih
reviews_detailed.text: I ordered curry seafood ball, beef chow fun, HK milk tea and ham toast. The milk tea was authentic and smooth. I liked that the sugar was not added, which can be adjusted by ourselves. Others were not bad.

reviews_detailed.author: Miyan Miyan
reviews_detailed.text: Really authentic in comparison with the HK taste of food. I find many so called hong kong style restaurants in taiwan with food that tastes different, so this one is a nice find if you want authenticity.  A bit pricey but I’d definitely go back again!

reviews_detailed.author: Carmen Lo
reviews_detailed.text: A so called "Hong Kong style tea house",  good HK style milk tea, but the pineapple bun with butter is not up to standard. The pineapple bun is small and not soft, in addition, not crispy topping, think butter but cost TWD60. A bit pricey compare with HK.

name: 阿東師
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區市民大道五段173號
reviews:
#大台北松山區
#阿東壽司🍣
#臺北市松山區市民大道五段173號

姐姐來上菜：東哥搬新店，趁著年前和好友一起過來聚聚。餐食美味，友善店家可自帶酒，不收開瓶。目前沒有時間限制🚫新店裝潢很明亮寬敞，菜色價位1500/2500，很適合包場，座位11位。

今日2500菜單🍣
東哥醃製醬菜
鮭魚軟蒸蛋🥚
日本生蠔🦪
水イカ寿司
真鯛寿司
牛角貝寿司
トロ寿司
白鰻海苔寿司
海膽迷你丼
鮑魚淡磯煮
蟹迷你丼🦀
獅魚寿司
烤獅魚🐟
水針寿司
鹽烤白子
海藻蒜蛤仔湯🥣
炸牛蒡
日本哈密瓜🍈 — 在阿東師。

#無菜單日式板前料理おまかせ
#江戶前板前料理，每人 $1,500 ，無收服務費、無開瓶費、無刷卡、無行動支付，只收現金。

全套餐制，以生魚片、握壽司等生食為主，採預約制：午餐/晚餐/包場

每道食材都是阿東師親手操刀處理，擺上板前的每一貫壽司都是現場在客人面前捏製而成👍👍
東哥真的強大！赤貝真的超級好吃，其他地方我都吃不習慣，台北那哪裡可以吃到活明蝦直接處理成壽司給你呢？ 醋飯顧的也妥妥的，每次去吃都有回家的感覺❤️

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel Santoso
reviews_detailed.text:
Great omakase. all ingredients are fresh and served well. the sea urchins (Uni) in this place is so good. It has a slight briny taste only. it tastes slightly sweet savory flavor with buttery texture.

the portion of their nigiri is not too big, but the fish slices are bigger than the normal portion of nigiri.

since I love savory and salty food, I like all of the menus that are grilled. it is served hot and the fat is so smooth and melt immediately in your mouth.

reviews_detailed.author: Wei-Shien, January Chang
reviews_detailed.text:
💫tl;dr - The fish quality is extremely good and the nigiri is well made. It is indeed a worthy try.

🌟Revisit: Yes!

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Food: Really impressed by the fish quality and the skill set of slicing and “wrapping” nigiri. Personally I have tasted many Japanese restaurants before, however only a few of them can produce such firm and well wrapped nigiris. The texture and taste are really something amazing. It is worth trying.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Prices: I chose NT$1,000 set today. The place offers 3 sets- NT$800, NT$1,000 and NT$1,500. NT$1,500 is only reserved only. Set price equal and above NT$1,000 would present with oyster.
NT$1,000 set served 12 dishes not including the free self-served miso soup. Uni nigiri and salmon sashimi were the most impressive dishes. Though the portion was not big and just about 70-80% fullness after the meal it was overall pretty satisfactory.

⭐️⭐️⭐️
Environment: It is like a street food setup, a “stall” next to the expressway. Therefore it could be a bit noisy and the air pollution could be bothering. Also if the weather is not good it could be quite uncomfortable. Cool day w/o rain would be the most suitable day to visit.

⭐️⭐️⭐️
Location: It’s situated next to the viaduct and by the pedestrian. No major public transportation can reach. It would take about 10mins walk from the nearby bus station. The easiest way would be riding scooter and parking in the lanes.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Others: The staff was quite friendly and helpful. The chef was really concentrating and professional at making the nigiris. In terms of the fish quality and the cooking skills I would give out 5 stars w/o hesitation yet the environment and service could be relatively simple and even a bit crude therefore 1 star was deducted.

reviews_detailed.author: First Last
reviews_detailed.text:
I feel conflict about this "restaurant". The quality is great, but not the quantity or price.
It's a market stall, so no AC, but lots of fans.
It was $800 for a set, no other options, soup is free, beer is $150 per glass.
At this price I can dine at all you can eat Japanese restaurants that has AC and decor.
It's hard to recommend this stall mainly because of the price.

reviews_detailed.author: Foodie Attorney
reviews_detailed.text:
The quality of food in this omakase sushi restaurant was good, which should be expected because of the relatively high price  ($2,500 NTD per person). Unfortunately though, it was one of the worst omakase experiences I’ve ever had due to the chef’s unwelcoming behaviour.

Customer service is paramount in omakase. After all, “omakase” directly translates to a customer putting themselves in the host’s care. Unfortunately, customer service is where this restaurant falls well below standards.

I’ve dined in dozens of omakase sushi restaurants in Japan and in my home country, from relatively affordable to Michelin Star standouts. Chefs typically fall into two categories in terms of personality: chatty and personable or quietly focused. At this restaurant, I experienced something unpleasant and unexpected — a Japanese sushi chef/owner who was constantly conversing, drinking, and joking with one half of the customers (in Mandarin), while completely ignoring the other half. Despite being conversationally proficient in Japanese, the owner only spoke with my wife and I to introduce each fish in Japanese. Since there were only five customers in total, the chef’s behaviour left my wife and I feeling alienated and unwelcome. At best, this behaviour can be seen as poor customer service. At worst, it can be perceived as unintentionally, or perhaps intentionally, being rude.

On a more positive note, the quality of fish was generally high. The fish contrasted nicely with the well seasoned and warm vinegared rice. Some of the nigiri garnishes (e.g. yuzu kosho and pickled shallots) were interesting as well. The quality of the kaiseki dishes was also generally remarkable.

To summarize — If you value customer service at all as part of your omakase experience, which you should if you’re paying $2,500 NTD per person, I can’t recommend this restaurant at all.

reviews_detailed.author: Blair Ho
reviews_detailed.text: Japan quality! It was even better than the one I had in Tokyo last time. Must go In Taipei!

name: 虎笑麵屋 無訂位服務
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區三民路113巷18號5樓
reviews:
主打似台南的現沖溫體牛肉湯
牛肉是台灣溫體牛莎朗心的部位，有7~8小片份量
但湯頭卻跟不上牛肉的品質，不夠鮮甜，反而比較像滷味的味道， 小可惜

總結：牛肉湯還是得去台南喝🙂‍↔️
-
📌個人喜好：6.5/10

#虎笑麵屋 #台北溫體牛 #台北牛肉麵 #松山區美食

麵的份量不少，還有附一個油條口感很脆口！
溏心蛋跟小黃瓜中規中矩，牛肉的部分口感就是火鍋牛肉片，湯可以喝，還算溫潤。
餐都有附紅茶。
週末晚上前往，運氣好剛好不用排隊，入座後人潮很多，後面很多人在排隊，點的是清燉牛肉湯套餐280，整體CP值不是很高，唯一的亮點在乾拌麵，麵體Q醬汁調味鹹甜，吧附在麵上吃下去還是挺美味的，牛肉湯部分，湯頭是有調味過的燉煮湯頭，牛肉有嚼勁帶點筋，只能說這部分蠻普通的，不過若突然想吃現沖溫體牛，還算可以解解饞的。

reviews_detailed.author: Janine
reviews_detailed.text: Food was great! Glad to try this place as an alternative to other chain restaurants available. Really enjoyed this meal.

reviews_detailed.author: C
reviews_detailed.text: This place was clean and neat. The menu was written on the blackboard. There were only 3 sets with some side dishes. Each set came with a bowl of noodle and soup. You also get half of hard boiled egg with marinated cucumbers and ice tea. The portion was decent but it was a bit pricy. The “beef” set that I got was 250NT. It was decent but not the best. The noodles were tasty but the broth was too oily. I feel like if the set was under 200 it would’ve been more reasonable. Taste-wise it was not worth 250NT. It’s ok to try this place out but I’d be hesitant to come back again.

reviews_detailed.author: Jeff Tan
reviews_detailed.text:
Quite an enjoyable experience. Only a few selection of noodles but taste was great. Portion size was fair for the price.

Service was good and friendly, restaurant size is not so big, and we were politely asked if we could move to a smaller table so they could accommodate a larger group which we had no problems with.

reviews_detailed.author: Eli Chen
reviews_detailed.text: different, but amazingly good! noodles are perfect separated. soup is delicious. top tier quality - the creators of this place are true artists

reviews_detailed.author: -T- H
reviews_detailed.text:
Damn.
These food recommended are actually quite nice. Very authentic taste of taiwan.
So delicious. Must try! 😉

name: 合居酒屋
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區新東街6巷4號
reviews:
優：氣氛歡樂，用很多古玩具裝潢

缺：有五星活動，Google maps平均分數失準；服務不夠友善積極；許多豬肉、雞肉燒烤料理調味寡淡，例如豬五花水蓮卷、手羽先

推：牛五花起司捲 (牛味足夠，調味夠味，烤到些微乾脆，跟起司濃稠感及奶香相當搭配)

Ok：炸豬排 (肉排夠厚，口感偏紮實但不乾不硬；底部有少量生菜，頂部淋上經典豬排醬，沒有加分；整體份量充足，豬排品質不差)

蛤蜊湯 (蛤蜊不少，新鮮度不錯，湯底重白胡椒味)

小魚干豆乾 (冷菜，小魚干尺寸足夠、有肉感，豆乾仍有豆香，但整體調味過鹹)
社區居酒屋很熱絡，有親子，好友，夫妻適合各式各樣的搭檔，沒啥壓力，口味不錯，尤其是串燒類，清酒順口。

無意間走進來的小店，竟然讓人驚喜！
烤羽與蛤蜊絲瓜都非常好吃，味道剛剛好、不會過鹹。
店家招待的豆乾小魚小點心也很有心意，感覺得到用心。

整體用餐環境舒服、餐點美味，以後一定會常來！😌✨

reviews_detailed.author: Grace C
reviews_detailed.text: Happy birthday! Great place, food and drinks, for relaxing after an exhausted day!

reviews_detailed.author: Pauline Lin
reviews_detailed.text: He Izakaya offers nice foods and drinks, you could feel relax like home. Fantastic atmosphere and staffs made you return again and again. Why not give a chance to visit to this warm restaurant in Taipei!

reviews_detailed.author: WenHua 文華 Chao
reviews_detailed.text: Upset with the sashimi when we came to the 2nd time.

reviews_detailed.author: 評論家
reviews_detailed.text: Good

reviews_detailed.author: Thibault Back de Surany
reviews_detailed.text: Amazing neighborhood Izakaya

name: 大師廚館
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區民生東路五段258號
reviews:
蠻好吃的，價格也不貴，不過感覺店家人手不足，所以上菜和送菜菜單都相對比較慢，
另外建議店家可以在廁所裡面放一個掛勾，脫個外套卻沒有地方掛，蠻麻煩的

民生社區的老店之一，從原本巷子搬到大馬路上的店面，手藝依舊，主要以家常料理為主。
炒菜類都是常見的菜色，我們點了青菜、金莎軟絲、三杯鳳腿、糖醋排骨等。
炒高麗菜、空心菜的火候掌握很好，算是青菜類的好選擇。金莎軟絲個人覺得過鹹，即便配飯吃還是蠻鹹的；糖醋排骨還不賴，酸甜好滋味；海瓜子也不會過老，鮮度剛剛好；三杯鳳腿就是青蛙腿做出三杯料理，其實跟雞肉差不多；客家小炒個人覺得有點雷，口味太重鹹，這樣就不像是客家料理了。豆腐煲和茭白筍算是中規中矩。
整體來說，用餐環境很不錯，不過點菜速度頗慢，菜色選擇多，可以挑選自己喜歡的家常料理。
有免費茶水，醋香海魚：口感超級酥脆，咬下去咔呲咔呲的，很香很香，口感非常特別，第一次吃到這種做法， 很推薦的一道菜。茄腸藵：大腸非常的軟嫩，新鮮感十足。

reviews_detailed.author: Marionette Mored
reviews_detailed.text:
I’ve been here for countless times since I was a little kid. Chefs are really nice, and the food is just ✨astonishing✨
A really great place for family gatherings

reviews_detailed.author: C Rabbit
reviews_detailed.text:
The food was quite delicious and reasonably priced, but it seemed the restaurant was understaffed, so serving food and ordering dishes was relatively slow.

Also, I suggest the restaurant add a hook in the restroom; it's quite inconvenient to take off your coat without a place to hang it.

reviews_detailed.author: Allen Chien
reviews_detailed.text:
One of the oldest restaurants in the Minsheng community, this shop has moved from its original alleyway location to a main street location, but the craftsmanship remains unchanged, mainly serving home-style dishes.

The stir-fries are all common dishes; we ordered leafy greens, shredded pork with shredded vegetables, three-cup chicken leg, and sweet and sour pork ribs.

The stir-fried cabbage and water spinach were cooked to perfection, making them good choices for leafy greens. Personally, I found the shredded pork with shredded vegetables too salty, even with rice; the sweet and sour pork ribs were quite good, with a pleasant sweet and sour flavor; the clams weren't overcooked, with just the right amount of freshness; the three-cup chicken leg was essentially frog legs cooked in three cups, similar to chicken; the Hakka stir-fry was a bit of a disappointment, too salty, which didn't feel like Hakka cuisine. The tofu casserole and water bamboo shoots were average.

Overall, the dining environment is very nice, but the ordering process is quite slow. There's a wide selection of dishes, allowing you to choose your favorite home-style dishes.

reviews_detailed.author: Je ming 振銘
reviews_detailed.text: Free tea is provided. The vinegar-flavored sea fish is incredibly crispy, with a satisfying crunch when you bite into it. It's very fragrant and has a very unique texture; it's the first time I've had this kind of cooking method, and I highly recommend it. The eggplant and sausage dish features very tender and fresh large intestines.

reviews_detailed.author: Chen Esther
reviews_detailed.text: The dishes were authentic, but I prefer lighter flavors, so I found the taste a bit strong, but it was still delicious 😋 The owner was very nice, and the bento boxes were also tasty :)

name: 絕好調 和食海鮮酒場
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區吉祥路61號
reviews:
烤功很強的居酒屋，食材也很用心，特別推薦商業午餐，除了主食外還有附沙拉、野菜、缽物、吸物、食事(澱粉)和甘物，這樣一份400元上下，CP值高，而且每道小菜都頗有水準，用心製作！
這次點精選刺身七切套餐，生魚片切得很厚實，有三塊鮭魚、兩塊鮪魚和兩塊青甘，肉質Q彈不會軟爛爛，很讚👍 另外單點的雞軟骨、雞肉串和櫛瓜也都好吃，很有水準。
✅鮭魚卵山藥細切(套餐沙拉)：不錯，黏性十足的山藥切細，搭配鮭魚卵和哇沙米，很開胃
✅明太子烤山藥(套餐野菜)：不錯，山藥夠脆，明太子味稍少了點
✅炙燒握壽司(套餐食事)：不錯，上面加了點明太子的炙燒鮭魚很香很好吃，飯稍偏硬
✅椒麻一口翅(套餐缽物)：超好吃，炸雞翅切成一口份量，用七味粉簡單調味，有夠香酥有夠juicy的，必點
✅鮮魚味噌湯(套餐吸物)：不錯，味噌味濃但不過鹹，豆腐和鮭魚碎都很香，裡面有些細骨要注意
✅起司炸麻吉(套餐甘物+30元)：好吃～麻糬外酥內軟，還有流心感簡直不要太強，除了糖粉有點甜外一切都好，推薦加購
✅綠櫛瓜串(單點)：不錯，汁水充足的櫛瓜
✅四方雞肉大蔥串(單點)：好吃～烤得水水潤潤的Q彈雞肉，簡單用蔥調味點綴，美味

鮭魚肚生魚片薄切份量少，口感吃起來毫無鮮甜味，今天讓人蠻失望的單點。
牛肋條咖喱套餐，想要吃熱的口感，但牛肋條上桌是溫熱的、咖哩醬汁溫冷，牛肋條沒有保溫情況下，口感越吃越硬，希望有熱的烤盤可以維持口感。
套餐內容選項多，唯一的優點。
記憶點不高的一餐。

之前朋友請客的時候就來過了，一直對這間餐廳念念不忘，因為一進來真的彷彿來到了日本居酒屋的感覺，而且客人還真的有日本人，之前只能用現金，好消息是現在已經能夠刷卡了，就可以有現金回饋了，最適合貪小便宜的我了，而且一樣不用加收服務費，真是揪甘心，這次來只有兩個人，平均一人一千元，吃很飽，而且還吃到平常不容易吃到的“雞生蠔”（sot l'y laisse）聽說一隻雞只有兩塊，算是隱藏版菜單，吃起來真的軟嫩多汁非常好吃，還吃了雞菲力，原來不只牛排有菲力，連雞也有，生魚片當然是必點的，因為這家的海鮮非常新鮮，店員還推薦我蒜香奶油蛤蜊和日式春捲蝦也都非常好吃，又點了鮭魚肚握壽司，烤節瓜，特選鯖魚鹽燒，吃這些下酒菜怎麼能夠沒有酒呢？當然還要點個“檸檬啤酒”配這些下酒菜，最後再點個“起司炸麻糬”和“黑糖豆漿豆腐”來個完美的ending ，也感謝老闆多送了一份黑糖豆漿豆腐讓小弟嚐鮮，起司炸麻糬也是小弟第一次，真的非常好吃，總之點了這一大堆每人卻只要一千，真是相當划算，下次再來開箱其他菜色，洋洋灑灑打了這一大堆，還不如直接看照片比較快，在此祝店家生意興隆，還有看到此分享文的大大們，都能平安喜樂健康幸福每一天🙏

reviews_detailed.author: MR Lee
reviews_detailed.text: Took my mom and auntie here for a quick lunch. The value of the lunch set and freshness of seafood were exceptional.  We had 烤海鱸魚肚 & 花鯧，it came with 4 dishes of appetizers and soup; plus dessert. Definitely recommend to take both desserts if you have the stomach 😋😋; cheesy mochi and brown sugar tofu bean curd. I heard the price is higher for dinner, but judging by the quality of lunch set, I will definitely give it a try.

reviews_detailed.author: Johnny_NY
reviews_detailed.text: The best part of the dining experience was about its service.  The waitress was outstanding, genuine in providing best food & service possible.  The cashier(maybe the manager) was also very friendly.  The food was delicious, although some dishes were sold out already.  Overall, it was a great experience and a place for small gatherings.

reviews_detailed.author: Phil C.
reviews_detailed.text:
I am giving it four point three out of five.
This was my second time visiting the restaurant. The restaurant maintains a very good quality of their food and service.
Among the items I ordered this time, I want to recommend deep fried chicken cartilage, and beef tongue stew. The crunchy texture of and the spices on the cartilage make it a perfect match with the draft beer. And when you start feel thirsty for having deep fried stuffs, the beef tongue stew came served to ease your thirst.
There was one thing very interesting. I found there were five rolls of toilet paper in the toilet. I think the owner must need strong sense of security when having nature calls.

reviews_detailed.author: D
reviews_detailed.text: Just a ordinary restaurant with unknown cuisine.  Some fancy skills as you can tell from the photos.   Not an izakaya restaurant.   Not a Taiwanese restaurant.  Owner's innovation or homemade omakase.   Just crunch your hunger 😂.

reviews_detailed.author: M. Morgan
reviews_detailed.text:
Very tasty, unfortunately also a bit pricy. But as the taste is really special, the overall cp ratio is still very high!

Highly recommended!

name: 富錦樹台菜香檳 敦北店
formatted_address: 10548台灣臺北市松山區敦化北路199巷17號1樓
reviews:
整體菜色都在水準之上，是那種帶外國朋友來不會丟臉、自己聚餐也能吃得開心的精緻台菜
這幾道讓我印象深刻：
蒼蠅頭是實至名歸的白飯小偷。韭菜花的脆度與豆豉的鹹香拿捏得極好，香氣逼人，連我平時不太碰米飯的人，都為了它嗑掉整碗飯
最驚豔的是季節野菜炒蓮霧。老實說點餐時有點懷疑，但蓮霧入菜竟然毫無違和感，大火快炒出的鍋氣鎖住了水果的清甜，口感爽脆，非常特別且推薦嘗
XO醬燒豬肝的調味極強，厚實且鹹甜適中，處理得很好，完全壓住了豬肝的腥味。不過這道菜口感較重，若不特別偏好豬肝的人吃到最後會有些膩口，建議多人分食
最後的青木瓜蘋果排骨湯 讓這頓飯有了完美的收尾。湯頭清甜得不可思議，我連喝了三碗。木瓜燉得極度軟嫩，與蘋果的甜味融合，喝起來非常舒心

舒服的用餐體驗，從餐點前菜 紫蘇紅心芭樂就很棒，酸酸甜甜，好吃！

我們這次點了：白斬雞、樹子水蓮、老皮嫩肉、富錦小炒、烏魚子炒飯、菜乾烘蛋、荔枝咕咾肉、北海道干貝竹笙雞湯及時令水果冰。

水蓮很大盤，非常好吃；老皮嫩肉小小一口但風味佳；富錦小炒是客家小炒的變型，裡面有臭豆腐，很特別！

喝了竹笙雞湯整個人胃暖暖的😊

結論：特色預訂菜3天前該訂的記得訂，但電話非常難打，我是21:30以後才打通，適合餐聚，但開放式空間且位子偏少，不要太吵以免影響其他人用餐。

6大1小，人均1600元我覺得ok，也吃得滿飽，有機會會再回訪。

老實說不知道自己吃了什麼特別的菜色或食材這麼貴，味道都不錯但不算驚艷，我們只點了一條魚、一個佛跳牆、一個炒青菜、一個烏魚子炒飯（份量很少），一個骰子牛跟一個老皮嫩肉（豆腐），後來又多加了兩碗白飯，總共花了1萬2000😅

水的部分也只有滿貴的礦泉水跟氣泡水可以選，我們很渴所以也只能點來喝，台北的水其實算是世界上品質很好的水之ㄧ，過濾過就很好喝了。

reviews_detailed.author: Welly Lee
reviews_detailed.text:
We tried several dishes here and overall had a delicious experience.

• 🦪 Stir-fry oyster with Chinese doughnut: Easily the highlight of the meal. The oysters were fresh and perfectly cooked, and the pairing with the crispy doughnut was brilliant — the textures and flavors worked beautifully together.
• 🌿 Cordia and white water vegetable: Slightly crunchy with a touch of sweetness, making it refreshing and light.
• 🐖 Pork neck with squid and stinky tofu: Flavor was good, but the pork neck pieces were cut a bit large, so they came out a little chewy.
• 🥭 Green mango dessert: Pickled green mango served over shaved ice. Unless you’re a big fan of green mango, this one may be worth skipping.

⚠️ Note: The restaurant has a NT$1000 per person minimum, so be prepared to order above that amount for your table.

reviews_detailed.author: Scott Nguyễn
reviews_detailed.text:
Worst meal we had in Taiwan. The food was either so salty (oyster & pork), or bland and fatty/oily (dongfa pork). We couldn’t even finish and decided to give up more than half and ran to Raohe night market right after.

The service was extremely subpar. We were given a table next to the bathroom, despite there were so many other tables available. The staff spoke very little English and didn’t even try to communicate. We asked for sparkling water, cold but without ice - was given lukewarm sparkling water lol.

We ate a 1-Michelin star Chuan Ya the previous night, they tried their best to explain the dishes to u. Here, they just drop the food on our table and run away?!?!?

What ashame. Not at all deserving of the star.

reviews_detailed.author: Matthew Tao
reviews_detailed.text:
This was my first time at Fujin and I’ve only heard about it through the Michelin guide! Wanted to try a Michelin star restaurant without breaking the bank. I’m from America and we ordered the 4 set menu and added a lychee pork to offset the (1,000 TPE) per person.

I have to say the experience here was amazing! The food was soo delicious and super light and easy on the stomach yet providing such richness in flavor and pairing that has been amazing for my friends and I.

Lilly was an AMAZING server who went out of the way to make us feel welcomed, appreciated and cared for. She gave us outstanding service and truly went out of her way to make us have the best experience at this restaurant!

Overall, this meal is a thoughtful dialogue between past and present. It doesn’t try to reinvent Taiwanese cuisine it refines it. Every dish feels rooted in memory, yet polished with contemporary technique and balance. A truly memorable experience that shows how tradition can evolve without losing its soul. I can’t wait to come back and bring others here as well!

reviews_detailed.author: edwin Ilagan
reviews_detailed.text: We came here to celebrate our wedding anniversary. And it did not disappoint. The food was great. We especially liked the braised tenderloin beef, sweet and sour pork with lychee and the braised dongpo pork. The braised beef tenderloin and the braised dongpo pork are new and yet they taste familiar. The braised beef reminds me of the beef pares I had in Manila. The braised dongpo pork, on the other hand, reminds me of pork humba. All in all, they served us the best Taiwanese food we’ve had. The desserts, on the other hand, were not good. We had the sweet peanuts and almond tofu and none of them were delicious. It’s such a shame because all the other food we ordered were great. Even the guava juice is refreshing. It balances out all the richness of the food we ordered.

reviews_detailed.author: Critsy Y
reviews_detailed.text:
There are a few Fujin Tree locations - at least two in Taipei from what I can tell - but this is the one that actually holds the Michelin star. Some people assume all branches automatically share the accolade, but that’s definitely not how it works. I’ll review the Taipei 101 location separately.

We arrived and were seated right away after the hostess checked the book. The vibe is modern, clean, and casually chic. Service was on point — well-trained team, attentive without and friendly. They started us with a little amuse bouche of watermelon radish that woke up our appetites. We ordered the minced pork with chives, century eggs & peppers, boiled chicken with sauce, the braised Dongpo pork with candied dates, and the Pu’er Tea sweet dumplings for dessert. Everything was genuinely delicious. When the Dongpo pork came out, the server actually paused to let me get my photo, then took it back to the kitchen to have it cut.

Thoughtful touches like that go a long way. This location truly earns its star. I can’t say the same for their other one. I’d happily come back and would recommend this branch without hesitation.

name: YAYOI彌生軒 南京三民店
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區南京東路五段92.94.96號1樓
reviews:
蠻喜歡蜜黑醋也在雞肉定食
酸酸的醬很開胃！
日式炸豬排煮定食也不錯 但整體偏鹹

白飯湯都可以續
很下飯可以吃很飽🤭
鮭魚丼的份量稍微少了點，提供的醬汁斟酌倒，不要倒太多很鹹，比較讓人驚艷的是一口壽司，鮭魚卵意外的沒有腥味，且吃起來甜甜的，相當不錯

2026/2/7 豪華煮定食（豬）$360，炸豬排、豬肉片、炸蝦與蛋液與丼飯醬完美結合，搭配粒粒分明的越光米，相當下飯。
白飯、味噌湯及醃蘿蔔都能免費續用。
環境舒適明亮，店員會主動詢問倒水。

reviews_detailed.author: Joe Chen
reviews_detailed.text:
Japanese comfort food
90 minutes dinning time
Grilled eels are not cooked ( roasted) from scratch

reviews_detailed.author: Lorraine Frederica
reviews_detailed.text: The food is really delicious and worth the price point, considering the location. They are located within walking distance from an MRT station, makes it very easy to visit. The only downside is the poor employee, who was incredibly helpful and friendly, but she definitely deserve a raise. She was alone during my visit and she was the waitress, cashier, greeter all at once. She was extremely busy and had to run to accommodate every customer. Poor management.

reviews_detailed.author: Will Chiou
reviews_detailed.text: Interesting place. Each table has a tablet where you can browse the menu and place orders. You can also track the progress of your order as well. Overall I felt like this place is overpriced. The presentation is nice but portion is small.

reviews_detailed.author: Benjamin Wu
reviews_detailed.text: Portions are not great, but decent standard for Japanese comfort cuisine with an affordable pricing strategy. Of course you are also paying for the ambiance which is clean and tidy.

reviews_detailed.author: 劉廷軒
reviews_detailed.text: Japanese chain store opens in Taiwan which tasted authentic, with rice, soup, cabbage unlimited supply for free

name: 夏綠沁私房義大利麵燉飯
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區敦化北路244巷37號
reviews: 可以先訂位，店內位子不多，空間也小小的，附近算好停機車，位於熱鬧的商圈，餐點現點現做要等上一陣子，還蠻好吃的！份量也多，吃完好飽啊～品項沒有到很多可是很夠了！整體來說很讚👍值得吃～多人聚會好去處
餐點表現出色，用餐氣氛輕鬆舒服，非常適合聊天聚會。因為太急著開動，主菜來不及拍照就被掃光😂，整體 CP 值很高，會想再訪。

餐點非常好吃、環境也相當舒適的義式餐廳，提供口味特別的義大利麵、燉飯、鬆餅&飲料等～大推海鮮椒麻義大利麵！！麵體吸飽了醬汁，超級涮嘴😋紅酒牛肉飯的牛肉也很大塊，燉到入口即化❤️巧克力鬆餅也是我的愛，趁熱吃有夠酥脆！配上冰淇淋&巧可力醬超級享受！建議巧克力醬份量可以再多一點，不然一下就吃完了，不太過癮～店內裝潢也滿雅緻的，氣氛也滿好的，非常適合與三五好友聚聚聊天、享用美食👍第一次來用餐時，郭子乾還坐我們隔壁桌，但他和朋友聚餐，就沒有打擾了～

reviews_detailed.author: Lizzie S
reviews_detailed.text: A small and cute pasta shop with a cozy vibe. I had the seafood pasta — the seasoning was just right, and I really enjoyed the crunchiness of the vegetables and the freshness of the seafood. A lovely spot for a small gathering or casual meal.

reviews_detailed.author: Patrick Selvan
reviews_detailed.text:
If there was a 10, I would give this lovely place that score.  I was super tired after travelling and wanted to have a good meal and sleep. Wanted to have the Risotto for some strange reason and saw the review for this place.  Food is fantastic, ambience was very cosy and music very soothing.  It was my lucky day and met David who is the owner and Fei Fei who’s the head chef.  I had the spicy beef risotto with peppercorn that was served Szechuan style, the pumpkin soup with bits of bacon, the cranberry cocktail and caramel pudding what was literally super awesome. Definitely recommend to anyone who is here in Downtown Taipei area.

Came back the second time on Boxing Day and it was even better. I had the 13 Flavoured Rib Eye Risotto and the Transparent Beauty Cocktail(did not have a description but it had Rum I think). Very crowded during lunch which speaks volumes for the quality and taste of the food 🤗

reviews_detailed.author: Melanie Hua
reviews_detailed.text:
This small eatery is located a crossed from a community park in the midst of various options of food.  The place is clean and filled with adorable cat decor.  The waitress was welcoming and explained the menu to us clearly (in Mandarin).

I ordered the house special pasta and it was delicious.  The spice was good and not overwhelming.  The presentation was excellent with big portions.  You get free drink or soup if you order the main entree before 11:20am!

The caramel latte was good that came in a cute cat handle!  But I wish the cup was bigger.

Lastly, it is cash only and serving utensils and water are all self-service!

reviews_detailed.author: Jie-Ting Jiang
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent creative cuisines and super friendly staffs. The dining area and the kitchen are both super tidy. Everything’s well arranged. Such an amazing restaurant. Great dining experience. Highly recommend.

reviews_detailed.author: Frank Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent food and service. The atmosphere is just amazing and relaxing. Really appreciate the owner and her staff!

name: 大戶屋 松山車站店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松山路11號
reviews:
裝潢已經有些偏老舊，很多年前吃過印象不錯，但是這次去吃的時候不能說都很好吃，蕎麥湯麵很雷，幾乎沒什麼味道
豬排蛋蓋飯的外皮軟爛（沒有淋到醬汁的部位）,牛排490的價位偏高，肉量並不多，cp值不高，而且套餐選擇的飯量大碗實際上跟一般飯量一樣，甚至更少，只是用大一點的飯碗盛裝，飯量不到碗的7分左右
雞肉沙拉用很大碗裝，只有上面一層雞肉跟周圍輕微生菜，下面是滿滿的高麗菜絲，味道也是普普（只有雞肉上面澆的是青醬，然後生菜是另外的醬汁）2個味道是有點衝突
蒸蛋部分建議不用特地加價80去換成干貝蒸蛋，因為這是多了一小顆有點乾硬的貝柱
定食附的小菜跟馬鈴薯泥的調味也是很馬虎，整體是偏失望的
當天用餐裡面可以推薦的只有炸里肌豬排跟松阪豬是覺得好吃的

鹽麴五花肉拼醬油麴雞腿，好吃，五花肉不會有油膩感
烤鯖魚，新鮮、好吃，下次想試試烤花魚。
豬肉鍋就普普了，肉很少、其他配菜也少...，下次不會想點的餐...
服務，很好。入座前，也看到他把桌子用酒精消毒擦拭過
點餐方式，也是有彈性可以選套餐或單點。飯也可以加價換五穀飯
我們倆人點了2份套餐和一份單點，好吃又很飽
不過，下次會想改成都單點，因為套餐雖然比較划算，但如果沒遇上喜歡的配菜和味增湯，就不如單點，選自己想吃的∼

這次在大戶屋用餐的體驗相當不錯。餐廳環境乾淨明亮，營造出舒適的用餐氛圍。服務方面，點餐系統使用了平板，這不僅方便快捷，也能更清楚地瀏覽菜色。
​我點的餐點是日式定食，菜色包含主食麵、蒸蛋、小菜以及味噌湯，擺盤精緻，份量適中。麵條口感Q彈，湯頭清爽不油膩，搭配海帶和蔥花，味道很不錯。蒸蛋口感滑嫩細緻，帶有淡淡的柴魚高湯香氣，小菜則解膩爽口，讓整套餐點吃起來更有層次感。
​此外，大戶屋的菜單品項豐富，提供了多種烤魚、炸物和蓋飯等選擇，無論是想吃輕食還是想吃得豐盛，都能找到合適的餐點。整體而言，這是一次令人滿意的用餐經驗，很推薦喜歡日式定食的朋友來這裡試試。

reviews_detailed.author: Rorpin Dong
reviews_detailed.text:
In my definition, this is a fast food restaurant. The only difference is the platting and the pricing.

Service provided by the waiter was really thoughtful.

Pork chop was dry. Miso soup, rice and shredded cabbage are all you can eat!

It's crowded and noisy as fast food restaurant should be. And it's convenient.

Cashier mixed up my check with other's, twice! Be sure to double check yours before paying for it.

reviews_detailed.author: あん
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious!! I love their grilled chicken salad set.

reviews_detailed.author: Eric Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
Food and service……..great!
You should try

reviews_detailed.author: Phil C.
reviews_detailed.text: Comfortable environment and service

name: 小韓室 韓食 飯捲專賣 @台北松山店
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區新東街7號
reviews:
餐點⭐️⭐️⭐️
口味還行，不會太重鹹吃到膩，但一個韓式部隊鍋要260裡面配料只有香腸和午餐肉就沒了，麵也是普通的王子麵，當作體驗和小菜飲料的套餐價格的話還算可以接受，過路客還是可以試試。

服務⭐️⭐️⭐️
人手看得出來很不足，餐盤回收區從進門到用餐離場都沒怎麼動過，但小菜區跟飲料台一直很足夠，沒有見底的情形，叫號的話其實聽不太到數字聲，只能看其他比較早來的客人有沒有都拿到餐點，出餐時候才有辦法走過去問是不是自己的號碼，建議可以在店內加裝號碼顯示的設備。

氣氛⭐️⭐️⭐️
店家沒什麼人的時候氣氛還行，但今天坐在最外面桌的客人，一個滿臉痘疤的父親要一個小一左右的男孩自己去搬鐵鍋，過程非常危險還一直出言譏諷，在旁邊吃個飯還要戰戰兢兢地，真的很靠北。

衛生⭐️⭐️
小菜區、飲料bar、冰淇淋機台都很正常，但是醬料罐尤其是辣醬的外圍都是結塊的醬料，開蓋手會一直摸到。餐盤回收區回收速度太慢容易滋生蚊蟲，吃餐點時候有個長得像果蠅的就飛掉進我裝的奶茶裡抽動，挺影響食慾的，儘管蟲有豐富的蛋白質但我沒有付錢購買受之有愧。廁所的話整理的算乾淨，不會讓人不敢進去使用。小孩的矽膠湯匙請要定期更換，沒洗乾淨日積月累都會卡食物汙垢，藍色矽膠湯匙周圍都是辣醬的顏色。

沒有衛生的選項，就算在服務裡面，平均下來服務部分兩顆。
下面附上餐點供參考，果蠅奶茶不是惡意抹黑，這是當下拍的鐵杯奶茶

終於在台北吃到令人感動的韓式飯捲了！這間的飯捲水準真的沒話說，一入口海苔刷上麻油的香氣直接在嘴裡炸開，內餡紮實、比例拿捏得非常精準，每一口都能吃到食材的新鮮度，完全不是那種敷衍的口感。
最驚喜的是店內竟然還有包廂空間！在松山區這種寸土寸金的地方，能跟朋友在獨立空間裡一邊吃著道地飯捲一邊聊天，隱私感滿分，完全不用擔心被打擾。

-紫米小韓室飯捲：飯偏濕軟，整體還行！
-韓室豬肉拌飯：偏台式，辣醬另外放，隨自己的辣度調整。
-魚板湯：不錯，湯頭不會過鹹。
-自助吧有小菜、餅乾、飲料、冰淇淋，很讚！冰淇淋味道個人不喜歡，奶茶不錯喝！
-需自己取餐、回收餐盤。
-202510

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel Ostling
reviews_detailed.text: Impossible to order. Workers standing around while we try to buy their food. Food not bad but not worth frustration.

reviews_detailed.author: Dylan Chen
reviews_detailed.text: This cozy Korean spot offers a variety of tasty kimbap, bibimbap, hotpot, and snacks like rice cakes. The all-you-can-eat side dishes are a great bonus, and the bright, modern space is perfect for a casual meal. Highly recommend!!n

reviews_detailed.author: Jessie Chou
reviews_detailed.text: If you know what Korean Bibimbap or Janangmyeon tastes like, you will rate their food less than 2-star. I would not recommend this to my family and friends; also, it is pretty pricy.

reviews_detailed.author: Elise Liao
reviews_detailed.text: There are quite a few side dishes and drinks for free if you eat in.

reviews_detailed.author: Max Chang
reviews_detailed.text: nice food and clean restaurant.

name: 丸亀製麵 Citylink松山店 烏龍麵餐廳
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市信義區松山路11號2 樓
reviews: 點了花蛤烏龍麵（大），烏龍麵好吃就不多加敘述，湯頭也好喝但是裡面蠻多花蛤的碎殼，如果能濾一下碎殼就再好不過了。

丸龜製麵感覺不管開在哪間百貨
每家生意都好好
雖然百貨很多美食可是沒有像丸龜這樣CP值高
份量剛剛好、好吃、平價，翻桌快速又不用等太久
各類湯頭可續湯，烏龍麵很Q彈有勁，配料炸物有多種選擇，有飯也有烏龍麵，搭配多元，佐料也開放自取，現場座位多。

reviews_detailed.author: Mikhail Tiu
reviews_detailed.text: This restaurant offers very good yet affordable udon. I especially like their tomato broth and their spicy one. You can also upgrade to a big bowl but the regular one is already enough for me. They also have some fried food which matches well with the udon. You can also add spring onion and sprinkle some crispy batter left from frying the other fried food. The menu has English and you can just mention the number of the order you want. They accept local and foreign credit cards as the mode of payment apart from cash.

reviews_detailed.author: Eric Liu
reviews_detailed.text:
Great spot for quick lunch.
Order a noodle then pick fried snacks and meat you like. You can get your food within 5 mins waiting.

Crowded around lunch period since there are lots of company employees seek for lunch.

reviews_detailed.author: C T
reviews_detailed.text: Great team

reviews_detailed.author: 抹茶Ramen
reviews_detailed.text: I ordered the clam udon noodles (large). The udon noodles were delicious, so I won't go into details. The broth was also good, but there were quite a few broken clam shells in it. It would have been better if the shells could be strained out.

reviews_detailed.author: KAI SHUN
reviews_detailed.text: Marugame Seimen seems to thrive no matter which department store it's in. While many department stores offer a variety of food, none offer the same level of value as Marugame. The portions are just right, the food is delicious, and it's affordable. Tables turn over quickly, so you don't have to wait too long.

name: 添好運 松山車站店
formatted_address: 110台灣臺北市信義區松山路11號號 2 樓
reviews:
感覺松山這家添好運比北車的好吃，主食份量偏少，不確定用的是什麼米偏細長，比較不是我喜歡的口感，但味道還是不錯的

海鮮韭菜煎餅蠻不錯的，炸的酥脆，餡料也好吃😋
蠔皇鮮竹捲 味道很入味，唰嘴，黑糖蛋塔也還不錯，不油，就是可惜有點冷掉了！

感覺店員想呈現有在認真做事的態度，但帶位入座時發現桌子沒擦乾淨，用餐時，我上一秒才剛吃完一道菜，下一秒盤子已被收走⋯⋯整體觀感沒有太好😅

知名連鎖港式餐廳，用QRcode點餐，上菜時都有蓋塑膠上蓋，乾淨又衛生，用餐空間就是一般的連鎖餐廳，桌距不會太小但也要小心，服務員都很親切。

🥢酥皮焗叉燒包：好吃！必點！外皮的酥皮很脆裡面的叉燒肉很嫩，很好吃。

🥢好運咖喱鹹水餃：很特別的鹹水餃，咖喱味很重很像在吃咖哩魚蛋，鹹水餃外皮蠻Q的，很特別，可以嘗試看看。

🥢豉油皇叉燒炒麵：最普通最失望的一道，是主食但超小一份，麵很乾硬，炒的也不是很好吃，十分不推薦。

🥢鮮蝦腐皮卷：很推薦很好吃，單吃沒有沾醬也不錯，外面的腐皮卷十分酥脆，裡面的蝦子也很不錯，而且吃起來不會很油膩，一個人就可以吃完三個，大推！

🥢香煎蘿蔔糕：很好吃，不是煎的很脆的那種，但蘿蔔糕本身很好吃，很推薦。

🥢醬皇蒸鳳爪：沒有很辣，鳳爪很軟很好脫骨，還不錯，可以點。

🥢晶瑩鮮蝦餃：很普通，皮很厚也沒有透，裡面的蝦子也沒有滿出來，外皮和內餡也都不Q，其他港式餐廳的更優，不推薦。

整體來說還不錯，一半以上的餐點都好吃，只有少數的很雷不推薦，價格也是相較其他港式比較便宜一些，突然想吃港式但又不想花大錢可以考慮吃這家。
來松山火車站辦事，想說順道吃個午餐。看見有港式茶餐廳，就叫了些茶點來吃。午餐時間，客人滿滿。偶爾吃點不一樣的，放鬆心情！

reviews_detailed.author: Jessica
reviews_detailed.text: Food was good! Pretty standard with all the other locations. They seemed really short staffed. Really hard to get water refills or anything else we needed.

reviews_detailed.author: Paulina Ziecina
reviews_detailed.text: It was my first time trying Tim Ho Wan, and honestly, I was disappointed. I was particularly surprised to learn the restaurant holds a Michelin star, as the experience fell short of expectations. The food isn't bad, but it's definitely not worth the price. There are so many better options for dim sum in Taiwan that offer superior quality and value.

reviews_detailed.author: Jolly Roger
reviews_detailed.text: The dishes here are barely close to one-star award by Michelin Guide. They're not too bad to taste, yet never close to what we expected from Michelin. I personally found the snacks taste more like Taiwanese flavors than Cantonese. What hindered the dining experience was the service. The servers were chatting loudly around the counter. The dumplings were tilted and rolled to one side of the steamer (see photo) which was not properly served at table. The tags they were wearing said interns. So they were learning how to work in a Michelin awarded restaurant, but where were their mentors? I wonder whether it's the company's intention to cut down on the cost on weekends wage.

reviews_detailed.author: C
reviews_detailed.text: I mean, is it the best dim sum I’ve ever had? Not really. Is it bad? Not exactly either. This place was just OK. Nothing too fancy. Most of what we got were decent but definitely no wow factor. Some were a bit too oily. I didn’t like the fried rice at all. The rice was very hard. The two must-try dishes were probably the BBQ pork buns and the egg custard buns. This brand, not necessarily this branch, had received one Michelin star so I’d assume that the quality should be somewhat close to top-notch. I was slightly disappointed honestly. it’s one of those places that’s worth trying, and trying it once is probably all you need.

reviews_detailed.author: NDi M
reviews_detailed.text: A bit expansive and no free water / tea.

name: 京鼎小館
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區敦化北路155巷13號
reviews:
🥟 小籠湯包：薄皮與鮮湯的圓舞曲
這裡的招牌小籠湯包，皮薄而不破，拎起來沉甸甸的很有份量。
• 口感： 輕輕咬開一個小口，鮮甜的肉汁瞬間湧出。
• 特色： 內餡肉質紮實，沒有過多的油膩感。沾一點薑絲與醋，那種鮮味在舌尖炸開的感覺，真的會讓人一顆接一顆停不下來。

🍛 排骨蛋炒飯：飽足感的標準

• 排骨： 份量非常有誠意，厚度適中，可惜醃漬雖有入味，卻稍嫌不足。炸得酥脆卻保有肉汁。
• 炒飯： 走的是米粒分明、蛋香四溢的路線。乾爽不油膩
。
🥣 酸辣湯：最完美的配角

• 料多實在： 隨便一撈都是滿滿的豆腐絲、木耳絲和肉絲，份量給得很大方。

• 口味： 芡汁勾得恰到好處，不會太厚重。酸度與辣度平衡得很好，喝下一口暖胃又解膩，為這餐畫下完美的句點。

小菜：份量夠，好吃😋

二訪內用
小籠包一籠20顆備飽到
滑蛋蝦仁加了醬油有古早香
排骨炒飯跟醉雞還是必點
小菜冬粉是醋溜很開胃
用餐時段態度還是很好
把客人當朋友一樣招呼
-
外帶排骨炒飯
店員超級親切
叫我坐著慢慢點
還問我要不要喝茶

炒飯蛋香味清淡
不是重口味那種
但你就會默默吃光
不會負擔

醉雞很入味
酒味不會太濃
薄度適中
有肉的咬勁

炒小松菜
菜量真多
清脆爽口

下次想試試內用

一踏進餐廳就讓人感到非常舒服，整體氛圍溫暖親切，裝潢帶有一種我小時候記憶中典型外省人經營餐廳的風格，充滿懷舊感，讓人一坐下來就很放鬆。

餐點表現相當驚艷，無論是炒飯、小籠包還是湯包，水準完全不輸鼎泰豐，但價格卻只有鼎泰豐的一半，CP 值非常高。服務品質也值得稱讚，服務人員相當貼心，會主動、頻繁地幫忙加茶，讓人用餐過程十分舒適。

因為是中午時段前來用餐，附近的上班族幾乎都會選擇來這裡用餐，生意非常好，用餐尖峰時段經常高朋滿座。整體而言，無論是餐點、價格或服務都表現出色，非常推薦大家一定要來試試。

reviews_detailed.author: Nam Cap
reviews_detailed.text: Possibly the 2nd best or really compatable contender to Ding Tai Feng TW's style little steamed dumpling. Very thin dumpling pastry yet very juicy and 50% larger in size to DTF's version. Well cooked and flaovored pan fries vege! Must try!

reviews_detailed.author: Kenny Tang
reviews_detailed.text: All the flavours were a bit off. The food in general was just not flavoured well. The skin on the xiao long bao was a bit thick and the meat inside didn’t have much flavour. The pork chop was extra dry; the vegetable dumplings had a weird stale flavour; the hot and sour soup was not hot or sour….  Service was fast and felt rushed to finish and get out. Overall disappointing. I would not recommend

reviews_detailed.author: K M
reviews_detailed.text: Friendly staff, quick service, and delicious food! English and japanese menu with pictures and item number available. To order, request menu/ order slip before sitting. If you want to try a lot of dumplings, they can do 5 piece instead of 10 per order (cost is less!)

reviews_detailed.author: Drlogan Drlee
reviews_detailed.text: I was going to give this review a 5 stars but having to pay $34 for tea in the end was a bit disappointing.  Tea was served without asking so I presumed it’s complementary. It’s good tea so I don’t mind paying, just wish I’ve been told. The egg fried rice was one of the best i ever had and the pork cutlet was largely good, a few bit felt a little dry.  The soup was good too, but not the flavour that I’m used to, maybe it’s a regional style, i won’t mark it down cos it’s not what I’m used to.  Dining environment was good too.  Air con was very powerful but the food stayed mostly hot right till the end.

reviews_detailed.author: TaiwanWalker
reviews_detailed.text: I love the fish dumplings here a lot, fillings are fresh and it doesn’t have many places serving fish dumplings. Xiaolongbao, spicy and sour soup, fried rice and appetisers are all good, if you want to try some other xiaolongbao and dumplings besides ding tai fung, I’d recommend here.

name: Snail 蝸牛義大利餐廳 民生店
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區民生東路四段56巷3弄10號
reviews:
看Google maps上的評論，竟然是個高分餐廳，但個人的感受並不好！
一進門就要「手機號碼」，不是電話訂位是親訪，要手機號碼幹嘛？現在是什麼時代，手機號碼可以隨便給人嗎？這已屬個資的一項，不能不𧫴慎。
才剛坐定就來說，我們將在xx時間休息，看了手錶還有50分鐘，隨后也看到有其他客人進來，既然還要收客人，就不要講些讓客人有壓迫感的話。
正表明要吃點簡單的，馬上告訴我，我們這裡有低消的，因在附近曬太陽散步，原本只想喝杯咖啡，但既然有低消，就點個沙拉餐加咖啡=396元，店主應該滿意了吧！
至於沙拉餐與咖啡普通。
餐廳裝潢由於沒裝天花板，客人講話聲產生回音，感覺有些吵。

田螺味道重，不推；塔塔醬炸魚好吃；小披薩皮鬆軟帶點Q的口感，好吃；佛卡夏麵包好吃，配的橄欖油很新鮮；培根義大利麵的醬有點水，起司香也不夠，不愛；松露燉飯味道濃郁，很棒，牛肉也不錯。

服務的部分，我們點雙人套餐，正常速度、不疾不徐地吃，結果用餐時間1.5小時內會吃不完，或者要吃非常趕，設計不良，大扣分。

可以再訪，但考量到用餐時間，點套餐的話絕對要三思，義大利麵也要挑一下口味

餐廳雖然不大，但是裝潢也很有品位；食物方面樣樣的味道都很不錯，披薩或他們的意大利麵必須多品嚐；服務方面也很好
今天還不小心打破了一個杯子，服務員的態度也很有禮，非常感謝

reviews_detailed.author: Ellis Yao
reviews_detailed.text:
@snail_italian_restaurant
The smoked salmon Mediterranean salad as a starter is so refreshing and instantly whets your appetite 🤍

The truffle Iberico pork linguine is a true classic—
pan-seared Iberico pork jowl paired with perfectly cooked durum wheat linguine, coated in a fragrant truffle and olive oil sauce.
Rich, savory, and absolutely delicious. ✨🍝

reviews_detailed.author: shelly chiang
reviews_detailed.text:
Came with a friend had a surprising delicious lunch. Came again 2 days later for dinner was solely disappointed with both food and atmosphere. It was terribly noisy that we had to shout in order to hear one another from across the table.

I ordered the same entree from 2 days ago which tasted totally different. It was flavorful at lunch but very bland and the risotto was half cooked at dinner.

Only come if you accept mediocre food standards and dining with very noisy people.

reviews_detailed.author: JT
reviews_detailed.text: Quality service and decent food. A great place for family and friends gathering.

reviews_detailed.author: YAHYA KYRIOS
reviews_detailed.text: This restaurant is truly extravagant. This was my 1st vist with my girl. And we loved it. The service was quick and delightful. The food was absolutely delicious 💯. And the atmosphere was awesome. Definitely going back again. Make sure too book a reservation in advance. It'll probably make your life easier lol. And take someone that you care about, or want to care about you😜😅. I promise they will love you for it.

reviews_detailed.author: Jason
reviews_detailed.text: Very nice ambience and certainly above average food. Recommended!

name: 松山機場2F美食廣場
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區敦化北路340-9號第二航厦 (國內線航厦)
reviews:
占元府香菇雞湯整體給人的感覺相當樸實，但越喝越順口，是那種會讓人想再回訪的店。主打的香菇雞湯一上桌香氣就很明顯，香菇味濃而不刺，湯頭清澈卻不單薄，入口溫潤，喝得到雞肉慢慢熬出的自然甜味，不會過鹹，也沒有多餘的油膩感，屬於耐喝型的湯。
雞肉份量給得不小氣，肉質扎實卻不乾柴，咬起來仍保有彈性，搭配吸飽湯汁的香菇一起吃特別對味。香菇本身處理得不錯，口感柔軟，帶著淡淡的甘甜，讓整碗湯的層次更加完整。桌上還有辣椒可以自行添加，辣椒香氣足、辣度明確，加一點進湯裡，風味立刻變得更立體，既暖胃又過癮。
值得一提的是紅茶可以一直喝，對於喜歡邊吃邊配飲料的人來說相當加分。紅茶味道不會過甜，清爽解膩，搭配香菇雞湯剛剛好。整體而言，占元府香菇雞湯走的是實在路線，沒有過多花樣，但湯頭表現穩定、調味到位，是會讓人喝完覺得舒服、滿足的一餐。

松山機場第二航廈二樓設有美食廣場，有提供很多品牌的餐飲選擇，用餐環境寬敞明亮。聚集了多家知名餐飲品牌，方便旅客及民眾在候機用餐。

建議可在松山機場半日遊，除了觀看飛機起落的觀景台外，也可順道來美食街用餐休息，而且在松山機場第二航廈二樓的美食街，長榮航空還設有飛機模擬器，以及引擎模型，可以實地體驗，是很難得的設施。

除了松山機場第二航廈二樓有美食街，在第一航廈的二樓，也就是國際線的出境處，也是設有美食街，所以無論在一航或二航，都可以上去逛逛。
價錢跟桃機差不多，不過裝潢很新很舒適，還有我喜歡的摩斯漢堡

reviews_detailed.author: Quynh Pham
reviews_detailed.text: Many dining options, many seats, many places to charge phones, I think this place is more beautifully decorated than Taoyuan airport

reviews_detailed.author: Tyy Yi
reviews_detailed.text: many choose food no problem seating

reviews_detailed.author: Neil OSullivan
reviews_detailed.text: I had lunch at Starbucks. Food, service and atmosphere was excellent.

reviews_detailed.author: 台灣金針菇
reviews_detailed.text:
Zhan Yuan Fu's mushroom and chicken soup has a simple yet satisfying flavor that grows on you, making it the kind of place you'd want to return to. The signature mushroom and chicken soup has a noticeable aroma as soon as it's served; the mushroom flavor is strong but not pungent, the broth is clear yet not thin, and it's smooth and mellow. You can taste the natural sweetness of the chicken that's been slowly simmered, without being overly salty or greasy – a soup you can enjoy for a long time.

The chicken portion is generous, the meat is firm but not dry, and still retains a springy texture. It pairs perfectly with the broth-soaked mushrooms. The mushrooms themselves are well-prepared, with a soft texture and a subtle sweetness, adding to the overall flavor of the soup. Chili peppers are available for you to add yourself; they are fragrant and have a distinct spiciness. Adding a little to the soup immediately enhances the flavor, making it both warming and satisfying.

It's worth mentioning that the black tea can be enjoyed continuously, a great bonus for those who like to have a drink while eating. The black tea is not overly sweet, refreshing and helps cut through the richness, a perfect complement to the mushroom and chicken soup. Overall, Zhan Yuan Fu's mushroom and chicken soup takes a down-to-earth approach, without too many frills, but the soup base is consistently good and the seasoning is just right, making it a comfortable and satisfying meal.

reviews_detailed.author: Lin Brian
reviews_detailed.text:
The second floor of Terminal 2 at Songshan Airport features a food court offering a wide variety of restaurants in a spacious and bright environment. It gathers many well-known eateries, providing convenient dining options for passengers and the public while waiting for their flights.

A half-day trip to Songshan Airport is recommended. Besides the observation deck for watching planes take off and land, you can also stop by the food court for a meal and rest. Furthermore, EVA Air has set up an aircraft simulator and engine model on the second floor of the food court in Terminal 2, offering a unique hands-on experience.

In addition to the food court on the second floor of Terminal 2, there is also a food court on the second floor of Terminal 1, near the international departure area. So, you can visit either Terminal 1 or Terminal 2.

name: 浮誇海鮮丼飯專門店
formatted_address: 105台灣臺北市松山區南京東路五段291巷20弄24號
reviews:
看評價超好就來吃吃看，送的味噌湯裡面有鮮魚|鮮蝦、蛤 蜊,食材都很新鲜而且蠻好吃的! 小可惜的是酒真的蠻小杯的，環境冷氣比較不涼,會吃到流汗。（幾個月前去的）

價格:
$180 紫蘇梅酒
$480 多燒盛和丼

附贈的湯，蝦子很新鮮（但湯本身沒什麼味道
其他的…….如下
1.餐具有黏感且餐具自助區都是果蠅🪰
2.丼飯的飯有結塊，一份裡三分之一都結塊☹
3.炙燒牛壽司不知為何有怪味🫠（抹布味?!

一家隱身在南京三民站週邊小巷弄，門面低調但料理實力不錯的日料店。
1.生魚丼飯：食材新鮮豐盛多樣化，醋飯口感偏軟但醋香十足，是丼飯該有的味道。
2.烤鮭魚頭：口感新鮮，肉質甜嫩。
3.味噌湯：口味鮮甜，味噌建議可再放多一些。
4.涼拌洋蔥/玉子燒/柚香蘿蔔：都好吃。
5.用餐環境：屬台式路線，如能多點日本元素，會更匹配日料店應有的樣貌。
6.服務品質：老闆態度謙和客氣，上餐速度快。

reviews_detailed.author: Eric Jaw
reviews_detailed.text:
Wow. SO GOOD. The best donburi in this area. The first time getting an actual real miso soup that isn't water and a piece of seaweed.

Still so good. Cash only

Still my favorite spot

reviews_detailed.author: Wayne Sun
reviews_detailed.text: Very nice and hot miso soup, and you could enjoy lots seafood before main course. Very tasty seafood-top bowl. Fresh and gorgeous laying out of seafood, and please enjoy this jewelry box before eating. Improving environment will be too issue to achieve top level, but you must appreciate this couple to focus on excellent cuisine.

reviews_detailed.author: Navarat Te
reviews_detailed.text: We had to wait a little bit to order since there were only two owners working in the restaurant. The food was really good. Rainbow exploded out of my mouth! Definitely come again if I have chance.

reviews_detailed.author: George Chang
reviews_detailed.text: Great value and fresh seafood! sushi rice was well prepared and balanced with the sashimi, they also have fried snacks to go with their ice cold draft beer!

reviews_detailed.author: Albert Yau
reviews_detailed.text: Come early for the sashimi. They sell out quick. Lobster and steak is a signature.

name: Tierra Casa Restaurant-台北內湖西餐廳 在地食材創意料理 價格訂位推薦 義式法式料理 2026人氣必吃美食 精品茶葉咖啡 聚餐親子餐廳 PTT Dcard
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區金龍路177號
reviews: 餐點好好吃，特別是義大利麵的醬汁調的真好！鴨胸也很讚，回神過來想到要拍照的時候只剩下一半了。店內有很多很讚的繪畫塗鴉，下次還會想再回訪~~
這家真的好吃，我第一次吃到可以把鴨胸和章魚處理到很嫩不材還很好吃的店，尤其是章魚，真的很厲害！時常處理/吃/做料理的人都知道，章魚很難煮～一不小心就會過老像是嚼蠟～他們的麵包也是自己做的，很好吃～
店面不大，裝潢很簡單，平日下午有兩三桌都是很有氣質又悠閒的長者在用餐聊天～看菜單覺得單價算高，但是餐點上桌後覺得很值得！生菜很新鮮，肉烤的剛剛好，麵包紮實好吃！下次會再來～

reviews_detailed.author: Terry Pi
reviews_detailed.text: Lovely and cozy little spot in Neihu, with great food quality. Good views of the tunnel from within the restaurant. We ordered 5 dishes for 3 people, the ingredients were fresh, from the vegetables in the salad to the lamb and meat, and each dish was presented beautifully. Good atmosphere within the restaurant, except they probably didn’t pay for music streaming because there were ads interrupting the music every 10 minutes which was distracting. Otherwise great dining experience!

reviews_detailed.author: Niccolò Fagherazzi
reviews_detailed.text: A nice place for brunch or to have an appointment and a nice talk. The restaurant is very clean and the service is quick and efficient. A lot of natural light and a big window along all the wall. You need to come here because of their bread. Simply amazing. Homemade. Unique. With a taste you can't find anywhere else. You can also purchase a big piece and bring it back home. Great bread!

reviews_detailed.author: A H
reviews_detailed.text: Every dishes are fresh and great, highly recommended, only one thing is not easy parking around here.

reviews_detailed.author: Chris Smith
reviews_detailed.text: Really excellent food. The perfect place to relax.  Highly recommended!

reviews_detailed.author: Kevin Tang
reviews_detailed.text: A nice and cozy western restaurant that serves great food and coffee, a great place to be and just relax and enjoy the delicious food that is served.

name: 飯BAR 內湖創始店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區內湖路一段360巷2號
reviews: 很不錯的餐廳，假日內科餐廳大都没什麼客人，但他們一樓幾乎客滿，鹹光餅東坡肉好吃，芝麻豆花甜品也不錯，環境乾淨、服務也很好，有機會再帶朋友來。

位於台北市內湖區的 飯BAR內湖旗艦店
是時尚的中菜餐廳，店內裝潢時髦、有設計感。
餐點從單點到套餐選擇非常多。集合了多種菜系，環境清新明亮，菜量很適合小家庭。
鹹光餅遇東坡肉，東坡肉滷得油亮，肥瘦比例剛剛好，上桌時服務人員會幫忙剪開，方便食用。
鞦韆晾肉架，薄切豬肉片掛在架上，像在晾衣服一樣很有造型。我很怕肉腥味，他的肉片不腥處理的很好，夾著小黃瓜一起沾醬吃很清爽。
小農葉菜蝦鬆，蝦仁裡帶著一點淡淡的紹興酒味，很有香氣。
傳統豆沙鍋餅，餅皮煎得金黃酥脆，內餡是細緻的紅豆沙，甜度適中，做為完美的收尾。
整體吃下來，飯Bar內湖旗艦店是很舒服合胃口的，適合約會或家庭聚餐。
旁邊就有地下停車場，服務非常周到，點了幾樣餐點都非常好吃菜飯的米飯烹煮口感非常適中，東坡肉煮的軟爛醬料調製非常香濃，配上芝麻餅吃起來香味十足，服務人員還免費送了醃漬的醬瓜，點東坡肉也送了一湖去油膩的泡茶，蒼蠅頭的口味稍微清淡了一點，紹興醉雞味道非常香濃，整體來說是非常有水準的餐廳～

reviews_detailed.author: 冉Jan至杰Thomas
reviews_detailed.text: An affordable place for delicious Chinese cuisine. Other than wine, sweet disserts are recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Ling Ho
reviews_detailed.text:
A friend hosted us here and we were introduced to fusion Chinese cuisine.

Dong Po Rou (pork) that is braised till the meat and fat were so soft and tender with the meat juices retained in the meat. Served with sesame bun and tea (the latter to wash down the greasiness), shrimp with fresh and crunchy veg which was another highlight, stir fry prawn glass glass noodles, fry rice that was very fragrant, tasty yet have a clean taste, and stir fry broccoli dish. All was very good. Food was served quickly and service was pleasant.
Recommend!

reviews_detailed.author: Joyce Yen
reviews_detailed.text: Nice food and service. The dishes were served very fast. The only downside but serious was the constant smelt of smoke.

reviews_detailed.author: Emily Lu
reviews_detailed.text:
Fusion Chinese food. Creative combination of flavours and ingredients. Also the tiramisu was made at table side, which was fun to watch.

Although a bit on the pricey side I think the quality is worth every penny.

reviews_detailed.author: Pno Ens
reviews_detailed.text: Surprisingly, it turned to be a delectable eatery. Kind service and tasty dishes! The noise level was a little too high unfortunately!

name: P.Ming泰式廚坊
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區內湖路一段600巷2號
reviews: P.Ming泰式廚坊給我的感覺就是用心又帶點小驚喜的泰式料理店。餐點的味道相當道地，酸辣平衡得很好，不會死鹹或過辣，像是打拋豬、綠咖哩、月亮蝦餅都很推薦，香料味濃郁卻不膩，吃完還會想再來。店內環境乾淨明亮，座位不算太多，但氛圍舒適，適合朋友聚餐或家庭小聚。服務人員態度親切，介紹菜色時也很耐心，讓人感覺很放鬆自在。價格以泰式料理來說算合理，份量也不會太少，CP值不錯。如果想在市區裡找一間不用飛泰國就能品嚐道地風味的餐廳，P.Ming泰式廚坊很值得一試。
比比覺得很讚！有一點點台味的泰國菜，可以調整辣度，蝦醬空心菜很讚酸辣海鮮湯也不賴，奶茶好喝。

生意很好，假日人潮眾多，建議都一定要電話訂位，如果沒訂位直接前往可能有很高機率沒有位子。

用餐有時間限制，我們點了幾道菜，重口味下飯，整體好吃度我覺得就跟一般泰式餐廳差不多，剩在可能CP值高，而且不用再收一成服務費。

涼拌大薄片：很開胃的涼拌菜，份量十足，大薄片薄嫩好入口，醬汁酸香濃郁，表現不錯可以點選。

蝦醬空心菜：每次吃泰式料理必點的菜色，這裡的蝦醬空心菜表現有在水準，炒得香而入味，脆口度剛剛好。

黃咖哩鮮蝦：濃郁且非常適合配飯的角色，咖哩醬濃厚且香氣爆表，鮮蝦有部分去殼很方便食用，且口感Q彈新鮮，可吃蝦的都要點。

椒麻雞：表現中規中矩，雞肉塊也是切得比較細的那型（但不會到太碎）。

香茅酸辣魚：這道是炸魚，再搭配香茅調料，魚肉吃起來外酥內嫩，份量很夠，酸香氣也非常濃郁。

月亮蝦餅：普普通通，但是比很多其他吃過的月亮蝦餅還有厚度。

reviews_detailed.author: Patranit Wanida
reviews_detailed.text:
There are many kinds of food, desserts and beverages.Other food are also good as well but those have been adjusted to be suitable for Taiwanese tastes already. However, the most authentic here I tried was durian ice-cream 😍
The service and staff are great!
I went there for my dinner, they served the order faster than what I expected.

reviews_detailed.author: Chlotus
reviews_detailed.text:
When it comes to Thai food, what’s the first dish pop out in your mind? In Taiwan you can find shrimp pancake in every single Thai restaurant. It’s funny it’s not even a Thai dish, but it does tastes really good, especially with the sauce.

Every dishes we had in this Thai restaurant were great, flavorful, and tasty.

The only dish I didn’t have much is the Yunnan sliced pork, just cuz I’m not a pork person, it was too porky to me.

Remember to book a table in advance before coming here.

reviews_detailed.author: Tung Yi Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
Really decent Thai food place
I would say it’s one of the best Thai place I’ve been to in Taipei

The atmosphere wasn’t really Thai but the food was authentic enough
All of the dishes that we ordered were great

Highly recommended to come with a group of friends to try as many dishes as you can
And don’t miss the Thai milk tea!

reviews_detailed.author: Shao-Yu Yen
reviews_detailed.text:
gonna have a second visit for sure

North Thailand food is different from common commercial Thai food in Taiwan.

very fresh n unique seasoning

Reservation in advance is recommended 👍🏻

reviews_detailed.author: Jeje Maria
reviews_detailed.text:
Got a spot in very busy lunchtime hour by give them a call on previous day.
The food is amazing, they prepare it quite fast. I like that the taste is strong, spicy and sour.

Their fish is very fresh and mango sticky rice is must when it’s on season.

name: Pastaio 內湖
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區瑞光路584號
reviews:
被多款自製義大利麵所吸引，嘗試了最基礎的蛋黃麵，吃起來醬跟麵是分離的，不確定是否道地，但個人沒有喜歡。下次想試試看其他麵的表現
反而被它的沙拉吸引，非常新鮮，且吃到難得一見的新鮮無花果，整體搭配起來清爽，可惜核桃糖切的太大塊，如果再碎一點更完美。
大蒜麵包又香又脆，搭配起司，還不錯。
烤雞中規中矩，倒是烤羊排令人驚艷，雖然外表看起來有點烤焦，裡面切開相當軟嫩，價位偏高，份量有點少。
加點提拉米蘇，不是個人喜愛的，可以跳過。義式冰淇淋選了香草與太妃糖口味，好吃且融化非常快。

中高價位的義大利麵
味道很讚👅
餐點都是很有水準的
墨魚麵是真的有海味，吃一口就驚豔
酥炸中卷300有找，覺得划算
唯一遺憾就是想吃哈密瓜盅點到莫扎瑞拉起司
松子青醬上也有一球起司
導致所有餐點吃下來起司量太高了，有點膩
服務蠻不錯的，環境偏吵雜
廁所不在餐廳內，是與大樓共用

手工義麵每道都優秀美味
現今的生義麵品牌也越來越多了
但這家店的口味設計獨具創意特色
不走傳統保守路線的口味
顛覆對義麵的味覺想像
不同的麵寬搭配不同的色香味
在台北分店也不少了
價位符合對它的期待
開放式的廚房
可以欣賞主廚們炒製的樣貌
也很賞心悅目

reviews_detailed.author: A Chang
reviews_detailed.text: The food here was good and very cheesy, making it a nice place to enjoy a comforting meal. Every dish leaned into rich, melted flavors that felt indulgent without being overwhelming. The pasta was especially good, cooked well and coated in a creamy, cheesy sauce that made each bite satisfying and warm. It felt like the kind of food meant to be enjoyed slowly, with plenty of flavor and a relaxed mood. The overall setting was pleasant and welcoming, giving the meal a casual and enjoyable vibe. Service was decent and steady throughout the visit, with staff handling orders smoothly and keeping things moving at a comfortable pace. While it was not overly fancy, the combination of cheesy dishes and good pasta made the experience worthwhile. It is a place that works well for a simple meal with friends or family when you want something hearty and familiar. The balance of tasty food, a nice atmosphere, and acceptable service made the visit enjoyable overall, and it left a positive impression as a spot for casual dining and comfort-style meals.

reviews_detailed.author: Lucia M
reviews_detailed.text: I ordered the ravioli and a salad. I think the salad was fine and quite generous. As for the ravioli, they only gave me six pieces, and the sauce didn’t taste very good—it lacked salt and was too bland. The mushrooms also had no flavor. For the price, the quantity and taste are not worth it. Even though the place looks nice, I feel the food could be improved with better seasoning.

reviews_detailed.author: Kuo Walter
reviews_detailed.text:
High quality and tasty food with  great vibe.

Waiters patiently take our orders as we have a bunch of kids. No orders was wrong and all at the right tables.

The only thing to me is fries too salty but it’s just me. Kids enjoyed it.

reviews_detailed.author: Eugenia Chiang
reviews_detailed.text: Beautiful environment with great food. Pasta and desserts we ordered were superb!

reviews_detailed.author: Rick Pennington
reviews_detailed.text: A nice atmosphere and good food.  The bolognese was pretty good. A little less cheese and more meat sauce would be preferred but still a good dish.  Recommend the Caesar Salad. Thumbs up!

name: LEAVES Cafe 午葉內湖旗艦店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區瑞光路168號1樓
reviews: 推推培根蛋黃酪梨義大利麵，新品羽衣甘藍綠拿鐵也非常好喝！吃得非常飽，適合商業午餐、朋友聚會、午後也可以用用電腦。
儲存已久的店家 終於有機會到訪 假日附近蠻好停車的 環境空間都很不錯 佈置很愜意 去的時段剛好沒什麼人 店員蠻客氣的 但餐點還是等了好一陣子 餐點選擇不算少 份量來說 價格有點小貴 很多餐點都有酪梨🥑 朋友大推能量碗 炸節瓜也不錯 食材都還蠻新鮮的 很適合幾個朋友 聚餐 有機會會再到訪

這間餐廳真的名副其實主打「酪梨」，從門口到室內都是被綠葉包圍的氛圍，還放了超可愛的酪梨抱枕，整體環境很療癒、很好拍。餐點大部分也都能看到酪梨的身影，喜歡酪梨的人一定會很開心。

我這次點了 乾酪奶醬培根酪梨蛋黃義大利麵，蠻濃郁、酪梨也融合得很自然；再搭一杯我覺得超驚喜好喝的 芝麻拿鐵，風味真的很特別。還有點了一份凱撒沙拉，份量跟味道都不錯。

整體來說，環境舒服、餐點帶有創意，尤其喜歡酪梨的人會覺得很值得來試試。

reviews_detailed.author: Kelly
reviews_detailed.text:
Love the vibes here! Pasta looks better than it taste. It’s too dry and bland.
Mocha taste good and I definitely won’t mind two cups in a row 😋
Worth another visit to try their avo toast with scrambled eggs and truffle fries !

reviews_detailed.author: Janine
reviews_detailed.text:
Great stuff always! We usually go for the pastas here, but decided to try something new recently with the Dutch baby pancake and wasn’t disappointed.

Recently came back and saw they have new things on the menu — had the avocado shakshuka and sweet potato churros this time!

reviews_detailed.author: Jon
reviews_detailed.text:
Food is excellent, the atmosphere is well-designed to have ample natural light along with greenery everywhere.

However, we pre-ordered the food more than an hour before arrival and there were two dishes already sitting at our table when we arrived and the other dishes came out at various times.

So while we were here, some of us were close to finishing our meal while others just started their meal. The appetizer of fries also came much later than our mains and drinks for some reason.

Overall, still a nice experience, and would still recommend this place, but the service could be better.

reviews_detailed.author: Andy Lin
reviews_detailed.text:
Excellent chicken salad with a spicy dressing. The chicken was nicely marinated, so the salad didn’t just rely on the dressing for flavor.

You order at the counter and the food is delivered to your table. Water and utensils are self-serve.

A nice place to come to meet friends and have a relatively healthy meal.

reviews_detailed.author: Jimmy Ray
reviews_detailed.text:
Steak in the steak sandwich was so hard to chew, every bite would make the sandwich fall apart.

Bolognese pasta was even worst, tasted like it was canned bolognese sauce, oily, salty.

The place was clean and the vibe was ok. The food was definitely not I would come back for again.

name: Knock Knock Heaven 內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區南京東路六段501號
reviews:
馬告鹹豬肉溫沙拉：淡淡馬告香，非常高級感👍
黑松露燉飯：松露味沒有很明顯，但也不錯！
辣牛肉醬通心粉：一般能吃到的肉醬味，但帶有點微微煙燻酸味，也可！
炸魚薯＆熱美式：尚可
壽星贈送
堅果提拉米蘇荷蘭鬆餅：超級好吃👍
本日服務人員親切專業5顆星給她！
用餐環境後來人多了就需要大聲說話，有點累！
低消$500／人

最近到台北內湖找朋友聚餐，發現一間氣氛很好、料理又有趣的餐廳 —— Knock Knock Heaven 內湖店。這裡主打創意無國界料理，把世界各地的風味巧妙融合成一道道有驚喜的餐點，從前菜、小食到主菜都有新意。我們點的厚培根奶油寬麵、墨西哥塔可和松露薯條等，口味都很好都讓人想一口接一口。
餐廳空間設計簡約又明亮，落地窗讓自然光灑進來，就算日間或夜晚來用餐都有不同的氛圍，適合朋友聚會、下班小酌或悠閒約會。料理不僅好吃，擺盤也很精緻，每一道上桌都會讓人想拍照。
因為餐點和環境都給人很有質感的感覺，來過一次就印象深刻，是那種之後聚餐還會想再帶朋友來的氛圍。
首次嚐鮮🤗很好吃喔！臨時前往，感謝店員還是幫忙安排座位，燉飯的米粒沒那麼軟，義大利麵蠻好吃的，風味很不錯👍下次還會再光臨，想試試早午餐系列。

reviews_detailed.author: Iling Wang
reviews_detailed.text:
Good food.  My husband had the Turkish yogurt poached eggs and was impressed.
I order the salad a s coffee. Everything is good and the service. Definitely visit again.

reviews_detailed.author: Hans Liu
reviews_detailed.text: Where is the avocado?  Don’t order Korean Style Grilled Steak Energy Bowl if you are an avocado lover!  Eel bowl is good, very tasty and matches what it looks on the menu.

reviews_detailed.author: Agatha W. Ritz
reviews_detailed.text:
Good experience.  Fish n chips recommended.
Somehow the energy bowl took longer to serve. We waited for like 15 min or so.

reviews_detailed.author: Vao JC
reviews_detailed.text:
The third time coming here, love the food and the service is always extra kind.

Will definitely come back for more!

reviews_detailed.author: Bc
reviews_detailed.text: Food is yummy. Coffee is good

name: Fogant
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區民權東路六段200號1樓
reviews: 餐點精緻好吃 服務很好 主廚是很專業的 進來這家店後 會發現自己的氣質都提升了不少 每一樣餐點都可以感覺得到主廚的用心 口感極好👍🏻大推
每一道料理都非常的用心，層次分明。味道豐富。餐酒搭配非常的順暢。
舒適的接待，讓人覺得很放鬆，謝謝主廚精心製作還有每一道每一道不厭其煩都會出來跟我們解說，由來和做法，每一道都是驚喜，連牛舌都可以燉煮像蛋糕一樣酥軟，真的太厲害了👍我要推薦更多朋友來吃，也謝謝主廚的生日蛋糕

reviews_detailed.author: Mike Lee
reviews_detailed.text: Best western cuisine I'd ever have.  Every course is just perfect with quality & quantity.  Atmosphere is relax.  15 minutes taxi ride from city centre.

reviews_detailed.author: Alex Yao
reviews_detailed.text: Absolutely amazing! From the creativity of the chef to the execution and cook of every ingredient, this has been one of the best dining experiences ever! I've dined in Michelin star restaurants all over the world. But this humble restaurant is a diamond in the rough! The chef seems to take apart every famous dish and put them back together differently, his way. And his way works! It's just an amazing experience from a crazy good chef!

reviews_detailed.author: Patrick L
reviews_detailed.text: Finally a true fine dining on MinQuan East Rd, Sec 6th！Come fir its testing menu

reviews_detailed.author: Jay Lin
reviews_detailed.text:
ZERO rating
2024/1/3 lunch.
My main was fish which was not cooked thoroughly and still raw on the inside!
Sent it back but didn't have time to finish at the restaurant so asked for a takeout box.
Unbelievably they simply continued cooking the same piece of fish instead of giving me a new piece!!

reviews_detailed.author: Bo-Shiuan Li
reviews_detailed.text: One of the best meal I had in Taiwan. Great food, excellent service, and perfect wine pairing, what else can you ask? Will definitely revisit

name: DA ANTONIO by 隨意鳥地方 內湖花市概念店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區新湖三路28號A館2樓
reviews:
#台北吃到飽
#隨意鳥地方內湖店

好ㄧ陣子沒來，現在多了很多主餐含自助吧的選擇

之前是清炒蛤蜊義大利麵，現在義大利麵自助式，客人自選麵條醬料自己煮，自選醬料配料。檯面直接整鍋炒海鮮，應該有加一些白醬，還堪吃。蝦子不大而且有腸泥要清，但這應該是檯面上的大主角了。其他菜色跟之前差不多，松露pizza如果可以拿到剛出爐會牽絲的真是人間美味。美式炒蛋不錯，茶葉蛋有入味鹹度剛好神美味 ，欲罷不能吃了15個
現在好像都只供應義式蕃茄蔬菜清湯，因爲最近3個月去都是這樣。只有加優格的配料有水果，蘋果丁芭樂丁加罐頭水蜜桃、糖漬鳳梨，新鮮水果跟加工食品併存不知什麼概念
清炒玉米筍杏鮑菇好吃，生菜新鮮，萬年不變的蜂蜜檸檬汁跟國寶茶。冰淇淋口味多樣但我覺得味道有點怪，鳳梨口味吃起來像檸檬，西瓜有很奇怪的人工香料味。還是之前的芭樂檸檬好吃

用餐環境還算舒適整潔，服務普通，會準2小時請客人離開。消費一千抵一小時停車，每小時30元。以這價位配這樣的菜色跟環境是差不多了，其他的就算了吧

之前來了好幾次都是客滿，這次到了之後發現客人不到1/3，原有的多種起司沒了，生菜種類有多一點，原本有的現場熱菜都取消，只有一個牛肚，牛肚入味軟爛，非常好吃，其餘是炒蛋，早餐腸，炒蔬菜

冰淇淋種類有多，改成自己挖，自己煮的義大利麵麵條剩兩種，煮麵爐兩個收到剩一個，如果希望客人點主菜，或許可以調整供餐條件與價格

之前吃過主餐是好吃的，份量也夠，只是單點沙拉吧一樣同價但內容砍成這樣，讓人不敢恭維。口味用料沒問題，只是這樣砍很沒意思，炒蛋還吃到蛋殼，之前從來沒碰過。

20250901 隨意鳥地方 內湖花市概念店，平日午餐，首訪

#台北吃到飽
#隨意鳥地方
#內湖美食

這家餐廳之前一直想來，
但對於住在中山站附近的我來說，
交通實在不甚方便！

最好的方式就是騎摩托車來，
然後還可以順便逛好市多！
這樣就不會覺得很遠！

餐廳的營業時間是
11：00~15：00
17：30~21：30
用餐時間限2小時

可以點主餐含沙拉吧
最低799+ 10% 以上

也可以只吃沙拉吧
原價 699+ 10%
網路上也有其他優惠！

午晚餐一樣價格。

餐檯菜色種類不多，
有生菜，pizza，火腿，起司腸，
炒蛋，白酒燴海鮮，麵包，優格，
茶葉蛋(晚餐沒有）
手工冰淇淋，
有南非國寶茶，沒有咖啡，
還有可以自己煮義大利麵，
基本上蛋白質的比例少，
幾乎都是澱粉！

其中我覺得最棒的是~
自煮義大利麵，
3種麵條可以選擇，
三色闊條麵，
雙色麻花麵，
原味吸管麵，
很特別的麵，而且按照店家建議煮3分鐘，
口感剛剛好，
然後加上牛肉醬或南瓜醬或燻鮭魚醬，
好吃！

愛吃義大利麵及pizza的人，
應該會覺得這裡很棒！

我們今天是吃午餐，
但既然午晚餐一樣價格，
我下次會比較想吃晚餐，
而且要點主餐才有足夠蛋白質。

因為地點的關係，
餐廳位於台北花市樓上，
晚上的客人會比較少，
我喜歡在客人相對少的時段用餐，
還不用早起！

#菁菁帕妃

reviews_detailed.author: E C
reviews_detailed.text: I really enjoy the dishes and the atmosphere. It’s quite nice for celebrations. This branch has a different menu from Taipei 101 location. I will definitely drop by again.

reviews_detailed.author: Wiji Aningsih
reviews_detailed.text: The service is very friendly, the food provided is delicious. The place is also clean. There are toilets and parking.

reviews_detailed.author: Aleksandra Z
reviews_detailed.text: I really enjoyed my meal here. I ordered chicken and was surprised by the huge portion. I almost couldn't finish it. The waiter was very competent and friendly. I highly recommend visiting here.

reviews_detailed.author: Jeremy Firster
reviews_detailed.text:
This is fake Italian. I came with my family for the brunch buffet and they had a make your own pasta bar, which was nice.
Good ice cream and Greek yogurt.

But if you care about the main courses, nothing is Italian. The pizza they provide was very weak. Pepperoni and pineapple, mushroom. Not what you’d expect from an Italian buffet - especially not pineapple!!! That is a sin on pizza itself.

I’m never coming back and I wish I never came.

Now this is the brunch buffet, but they should be more considerate. The meat selection was of low quality and the cheese platter they have is a joke. These are cornerstones to any place that calls itself Italian.

I wish I just went to Costco and bought Italian food to make at home. It would be much better than this place.

reviews_detailed.author: Tim Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
for $699 +10%。the selection was very limited。  atmosphere was ok. But shared bathroom with the old building.  Which wasn’t kept properly.  Overall, don’t think it’s worth it.
do it yourself pasta with 3 sauces.
Pizza 3flavors. Pepperoni. Hawaiian. Mushroom
Steamed scrambled eggs
Shrimp and clams
Bacon carbonara penne pasta
1 type of Bread 3 sauces.
Salad
2 drinks.
Ice cream

name: 18冠軍牛肉麵 台北內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣台北市内湖区基湖路3巷9號1樓
reviews: 牛肉麵的牛肉非常軟嫩、讓我非常驚艷，湯頭好喝不死鹹❤️家常麵也是我喜歡的，很推薦，附近也有停車場，很方便前往用餐😊🍀

過年時經過才發現這間店
今天下班過去品嚐看看
點三種牛肉麵試試看
我們最喜歡清燉牛肉麵👍
魯牛肚挺好吃的👍

滿不錯的晚餐，紅燒湯頭鮮美，不會過鹹過油。粗麵有勁不會太軟，湯有新鮮蕃茄丁點綴，牛肉也好吃，很不錯的用餐體驗。希望牛肉份量可以多一些。

天氣冷的時候吃百菇雞湯麵有夠讚！雞翅也好好吃，謝謝你們來內湖開店。🥹

reviews_detailed.author: 87920010A
reviews_detailed.text: Nice

reviews_detailed.author: Chris Cheng
reviews_detailed.text: The beef in the beef noodle soup was incredibly tender, which surprised me. The broth was delicious and not overly salty ❤️ I also love the home-style noodles. Highly recommended! There's parking nearby, making it very convenient to get there 😊🍀

reviews_detailed.author: MEI Hello
reviews_detailed.text: I only discovered this shop when I passed by during the Chinese New Year. I went to try it after get off work today and ordered three kinds of beef noodles. Our favorite was the clear broth beef noodles 👍 The braised beef tripe was also quite delicious 👍

reviews_detailed.author: Welson Ho
reviews_detailed.text:
A pretty good dinner. The braised broth was delicious, not too salty or oily. The thick noodles were chewy but not too soft, and the soup was garnished with fresh diced tomatoes. The beef was also tasty. A very good dining experience. I hope there could be more beef in the portion.

Eating mushroom and chicken noodle soup is amazing on a cold day! The chicken wings were also delicious. Thank you for opening a store in Neihu. 🥹

reviews_detailed.author: Jack Lin
reviews_detailed.text: Absolutely delicious, better than the hidden gem in front of the shop. The large bowl of Champion Beef Noodles is incredibly generous in portion size. I recommend ordering the small bowl with half a pound and a half of beef, plus some braised beef tongue and tripe—it's super tender and flavorful! ❤️

name: 澄食小人屋2《江南店》內湖美食 內湖restaurant 內湖日本料理 內湖生魚片 內湖日本料理 內湖壽司
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區江南街26號
reviews:
第一次路過造訪，點的是生魚限丼（是台式諧音梗嗎？不過“丼”其實注音是ㄐㄧㄥˇ）270，升級定食加120。

入座後桌上有前菜毛豆，熱茶自斟，點餐完後店員告知有贈送飲料（應該是定食裡的？），可以自己到冰箱選一瓶鋁箔包。

隨後定食和湯很快就上了，冬天先喝幾口熱湯準沒錯，湯汁不會太鹹，不像純日式超鹹那種。小菜也都蠻可口，不過高麗菜稍微太軟了些。

茶碗蒸也很有誠意，一顆干貝，還有鮭魚卵及海瓜子，唐揚雞肉質很嫩，沒有軟骨，如果有唐辛子就更棒了。

主菜生魚片丼不算太，但生魚片厚度足，新鮮好吃，中間的應該是鮪魚碎，蝦味魚卵也是一大球，整體有水準之上。

吃到最後，以男性成人的食量還蠻有飽足感，CP值很高，不過內用座位不算多，所以也無法訂位，只能現場候位，門口備有候位座椅。

1.跟第一家的食物比起來水準差非常的多不知道是什麼原因？難道是因為點的不一樣嗎？
2. 點的唐揚炸雞飯，整體吃起來只有毛豆最好吃，再來就是味噌湯跟胡麻青菜
3. 主食跟配菜根本完全不行
飯的部分感覺像是很久的白飯，沒有米香也沒有有彈性
唐揚雞的部分有一點顛覆個人認知居然是小塊的類似雞胸肉去切的雞塊沒有骨頭，但是是用燒烤的方式做的沒有雞皮，根本像是在吃雞胸雞丁若不是加了所附的醬，還真難吃
青菜的部分也是感覺沒有很新鮮
4. 記得第一家店去吃過了，豬肉丼品質都算不錯，怎麼會差那麼多呢？
5. 只收現金，但有發票。用餐環境普通還是比不上第一間店

服務態度很好
丼飯定食很划算，但對我個人來說醋飯口味偏甜

reviews_detailed.author: Jack Huang
reviews_detailed.text:
The quality for the price here is superb. Highly recommended.

Came again twice in two days. It’s so good!!

reviews_detailed.author: K T
reviews_detailed.text: Food is mediocre. The price is cheap but nothing impressive.

reviews_detailed.author: Jack Hwang
reviews_detailed.text: Just great Japanese food

reviews_detailed.author: C.C. Wang
reviews_detailed.text: Pricy and over rate

reviews_detailed.author: 鐘阿邦
reviews_detailed.text:
This was my first time visiting. I ordered the sashimi-only donburi (is that a Taiwanese pun? But "donburi" is actually pronounced "don" in Mandarin) for NT$270, and upgraded to a set meal for an extra NT$120.

After being seated, there were edamame as an appetizer on the table, and hot tea was self-service. After ordering, the staff informed me that there was a complimentary drink (probably included in the set meal?), and I could choose a foil-wrapped bottle from the refrigerator.

The set meal and soup arrived quickly. In winter, a few sips of hot soup are always a good start; the broth wasn't too salty, unlike the overly salty typical Japanese style. The side dishes were also quite delicious, although the cabbage was a little too soft.

The chawanmushi (steamed egg custard) was also very generous, with a scallop, salmon roe, and clams. The karaage chicken was very tender, with no cartilage; it would have been even better with chili peppers.

The main course, sashimi donburi, wasn't huge, but the sashimi slices were thick, fresh, and delicious. The center seemed to contain tuna flakes, and the shrimp roe was a large sphere. Overall, it was above average.

By the end, I felt quite full, even for a male adult. It was great value for money. However, there aren't many seats for dine-in, so reservations aren't possible; you have to wait in line. There are waiting seats available at the entrance.

name: 美福乾式熟成牛排館 Fresh & Aged Italian steak house
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區民善街128號2F
reviews:
沙拉吧彩色豐富口味不隨便
有酒精成分的全部都有紅字告知
算是孕婦兒童友善
牛排熟度掌握佳
配料的辣根醬非常優秀感覺帶了一點蒜味
有趣的是用餐的發票只能抵樓下三個小時的停車
但第二台車贈送的停車券是4個小時
不過小事情瑕不掩瑜

今次也是分環境, 服務, 食物評論

環境: 衛生, 高級, 有透明而十分乾淨的熟成房, 提高對牛肉品質的信心, 座位之間位置適中, 可以安心品嘗食物

服務:有五星酒店水平, 職員禮貌有笑容, 有對顧客鞠躬(有驚訝到), 會耐心為顧客講解和溝通客戶需要, 收餐碟, 整理速度快  因為一人的關係被安排到一個偏靜的位置, 恰恰可以靜心享用食物, 感覺有用心安排

食物:
飲用水/汽泡水要另外收費(一般高級餐廳標準)

加1千圓有自助沙律吧, 包含了前菜, 湯和甜品, CP值高, 沙律菜滿分新鮮乾淨, 菜式不多但都有思考過用心烹調, 甚至不起眼點餅乾的醬也很讚, 南瓜湯加錢升級做明蝦生蠔湯, 味道可以但似港式金蠔乾而非鮮蠔, 甜品不是本人喜好但整體ok, 提拉米蘇是沒放酒的做法, 其中楊枝金露和綠茶布丁也不錯, 唯一可惜是藍貝過熟了

每桌附送的麵包好吃, 上面餡料的做法稍微似批薩而麵包鬆軟, 需要還可續添

牛排點了55天熟成24oz丁骨3分熟, 感覺熟成的功力都點滿了在肉的質感, 油脂也因熟成而升華, 本人平時只能吃2小口各類A5和牛, 今次居然可以獨自吃掉整盤丁骨而不感到膩滯, 可見油花變得優質, 牛肉的烹調沒放太多的鹽或黑椒, 以最接近原味的方式表現, 個人十分喜歡, 牛肉味不算澎湃但越吃近骨位越有味, 菲力的部份鬆軟易嚼, 紐約的部份會稍為結實(但仍然嫩滑)而肉味更濃, 牛肉稍下刀便鬆鬆分離, 建議砌到尾指未節大小更能細嚐其中精緻之處

唯一美中不足是沒有岩鹽,  能提供優質牛肉的餐廳只有海鹽有點意外, 個人認為岩鹽更能襯托優雅肉質

另外點了2款可杯上的紅酒, 法國的Lu Puy 酒身厚木桶味濃, 意大利的一款相對酒體較輕而中間有輕微黑胡椒味也跟牛肉很搭, 所以服務生問我哪款較好我回答很難取捨哈哈, 酒單上的酒普遍在2020年之後, 對年份有要求人士建議自携哈, 1000/支的帶酒費在這種餐廳尚算合理

自助吧很讚，數量不多但種類多元，鹹甜冷熱、水果甜點都有，絕對值得加價購買！

主菜點28盎司的熟成肋眼，3分熟，感覺外皮酥脆、內肉細嫩，可惜油花太多太肥。

因為有小孩，所以請他們拿一部分回烤到5分，結果肉質雖然不老，但熟成的口感特色就不見了，不過油花也少很多就是了。

附餐麵包普通，甜點也不太厲害。

座位寬敞，桌與桌的間距很大，連娃娃車應該都能輕鬆推過，不用擔心被隔壁客人影響。

女廁清一色免治馬桶，坐墊溫溫的，冬天使用很舒服。

晚上9點準時打烊，用晚餐的話切記預留足夠時間。

reviews_detailed.author: Willy Lo
reviews_detailed.text: Lovely experience. I had the 55days dry aged 24oz T-bone steak with salad and dessert bar. The steak is really delicious. The flavor of the steak is very condense and strong. The meat is so tender. The chef grilled it perfectly. Dessert is excellent! Everything is really yummy. Will definitely go back.

reviews_detailed.author: yuan yuan shih
reviews_detailed.text:
5 stars for the food n 1 stars for the service.

We asked some questions and the waiter asked us to read again on the menu by ourselves. Rude to my parents. Mayfull might as well just generate a QR code for us to take orders. Easier.

We had the 28oz wiv lobster.  Semi-buffet is the second best in town. price range about $3500/person. Had a nice time only because we chill well.

will visit again but not anytime shortly.

reviews_detailed.author: Michael Liu
reviews_detailed.text:
Food: 5/5 Averaging 1,300NT per person
Service: 5/5
Value: 4/5
Food - is spectacular and reasonable for the price, the only reason the value - isn’t 5* is because the waitress insisted on charging us for water, they don’t provide tap water.
Service - is still great! They were very polite and even willing to wait for our party to leave after hours.
Interior Design is beautiful! Will definitely come back and will definitely recommend, such wonderful experience!

reviews_detailed.author: Violet Bauer
reviews_detailed.text: Pristine service in a fine setting without serious dress code! Choose from set menu with aged steak and scallop/oyster appetizer and a choice of soup. The salad bar was pleasantly abundant with lots of vegetable options and delicious desserts.

reviews_detailed.author: Chloe Tsui
reviews_detailed.text:
A wonderful steak house which never fails me👏🏻

Visited here a few times, the pics are from three visits.

We tried several kind of steak: the aged steak taste really different if you order different date, some taste like blue cheese; the Wagyu is also good but not good as aged steak (the thinner one).
You can get a buy one get one free for any seafood if you ordered aged steak. Seafood platter and lobsters are all good. ($1800for 2)

I will totally recommend the salad bar to you, only $800/person, with delicious salad, appetizers and dessert. Not many choice provided, while the quality is high. Tiramisu is my favorite, I always reserve my tummy for it!

name: 大湖餐館 內湖
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區內湖路二段103巷76號
reviews:
經由朋友介紹到此用餐體驗，整體感覺是讓人愉悅的，從訂餐到用餐結束都讓人感到十分滿意，外場服務的大姐、櫃檯結帳的小姐都非常親切，菜色就更讚~~我們四人點的全部光盤，其中一鍋熱湯（薏仁豬肚湯）👍我們喝光光，連櫃檯小姐說以為我們會喝不完打包，結果全部都底朝天囉！
這餐廳是會讓人想再度光臨飽餐一頓，服務親切、菜色豐富且不鹹不膩，餐廳推薦的菜色都不錯吃，價格也算是大眾親民價，唯獨桌數不多（大小桌共約7桌），要提早預約才不會空等白跑一趟喔！👍讚啦...

餐點好吃～
服務非常好！
會依照客人的數量調整餐點！！
超級貼心❤️❤️❤️
停車也算方便～

大湖廚館用餐心得
*客人吵雜聲超大
*訂位安排很爛
*店員專業度蠻差的，只有收銀員很客氣
*餐點是可以吃的

第一次要用餐未訂位，店員說沒訂位沒辦法，能理解

後來再訪有先致電訂位5位，但同行友人無法前往，在用餐前一天已經致電告知店家用餐人數5人改2人

到當天安排座位，我們都已經坐下來，都已經倒好茶水了，又臨時移動我們的座位，店員用不乾淨的手套摸我們的茶杯，也沒更換新的茶杯

安排我們坐在打包外帶區，我們位置本來就小，還一直縮小我們能用餐的範圍，打包的店員一直搖晃我們的餐桌，用餐環境真的很差

如果不是 8_10人那種可以坐大桌那種，一點都不建議去吃

還收10%服務費，上完餐後也沒什麼被服務，還收什麼服務費

而且我們等餐的時候，別的客人明明也有致電訂位，店員說沒記錄到，真的蠻讓人傻眼的

此生只會吃這麼一次

reviews_detailed.author: Thong Kurus
reviews_detailed.text: A local, corner dai chow place. Everything from soups to stir-fry, hotplate, steam, fried, grilled, local '3 cups' marination. Ordered a few of their signature dishes to try. We had fried you tiao with fresh oysters, stir-fried green beans with deep fried pork intestines and 'dong po' pork - classic uncut version of braised pork belly, before it becomes lu rou fan! Fed us a family of 6, 4 adults and 2 kids after a late morning stroll and exercise at the nearby park. It was really well prepapred and cooked to perfection. Portions were medium sized. Just slightly too salty to my liking, but bearable with white rice and some brown rice tea which was served on the house. Good, kind, friendly service. Must visit if you are in the Neihu area!

reviews_detailed.author: Karen Chan
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious local Taiwanese cuisine experience! The oyster with fried dough fritters is a the star of the show, and the restaurant’s specialty. The other two dishes are tasty and flavorful. The vibe is typical, family style and cozy, filled with neighbors and locals. Don’t forgot to order a Taiwanese beer to get the total experience!

reviews_detailed.author: SuN MoSs
reviews_detailed.text: No longer what it was. Food bland and tasteless. Allows drunken, loud, and disorderly people continue drinking and destroy any type of dining atmosphere. Avoid.

reviews_detailed.author: Henry Hsu
reviews_detailed.text: Affordable food, generous portion and friendly efficient service

reviews_detailed.author: Frans Oilinki
reviews_detailed.text: This is a gem of a restaurant. The cooking is better than in many expensive restaurants. Dishes are made with high quality ingredients, prepared with love and appreciation, and service is fast. Big tables to enjoy your food with your friends or family. Passing close by, I came to eat here after some time. After eating here I feel so happy! It is like more than my body was nourished!

name: 金泰日式料理-內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區舊宗路二段121巷34號
reviews:
多久沒來金泰了?
還好水準仍然維持著新鮮，美味。
「大豆苗」好大一盤，才160好吃，又划算。

位在內湖的金泰日式料理，鮮甜超值的海鮮料理，內湖金泰日式料理的前身為海鮮批發商，營業至今約有15年了，用餐時間依舊大排長龍一直是很有人氣的店家。出餐很快，不用等很久。
質樸的日式餐廳，供應海鮮料理、生魚片、蓋飯和甜點，並設有戶外座位。
食材用料新鮮，生魚片口感Q彈，丼飯份量足，很有飽足感，CP值高。蓋飯附贈的味噌湯調味清甜。
醋飯酸甜度掌握的非常好搭配鮮甜的海鮮，讓整體口感更加滑順
用餐環境簡約乾淨，吵雜但仍可交談。很適合小家庭用餐。

週間午後到舊宗路辦事，近中午步行繞了點路來這間有名的金泰日式料理。運氣很好，與朋友兩人剛好遇到最後一張空桌。

餐廳環境乾淨整潔，桌椅、碗盤、餐具都很有質感。服務人員親切細心，對菜單也十分熟悉，能耐心地推薦與解說。

我們點了 鮭魚片套餐 和 魚肚丼飯。我不太吃生食，魚肚丼原本附的生蛋黃，店家還能貼心地幫忙煮熟。整體用餐體驗非常舒服，份量剛好、口味滿意。

是一間值得再訪的餐廳，只是生意真的很好，用餐時段來訪要有排隊等候的心理準備。

reviews_detailed.author: Yuan Chang
reviews_detailed.text:
A well-known place mainly for its donburi (among other dishes). Although the place is often quite busy, service is very fast — and hence turnover great. If you're visiting for dinner, the street-side parking spaces around are free.

Their seafood stock is very fresh, and the portion generous. It is a bit unusual in using warm unflavored rice.
