Extra point for service (I'd give 4.5): no vegetarian menu, but waitress was quick to suggest ordering bowl of rice and natto — make your own natto don. That worked great.

Reasonable prices with the fresh seafood is probably why they're packing the place all the time. Recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Kate Shao
reviews_detailed.text: Sashimi was fresh and awesome! The famous one was 無敵海鮮丼 but I ordered 生魚丼飯 which was full of raw fish and provided one raw egg yolk. Big portion for female. One donburi including Taiwanese Miso soup(many meats inside), donburi (hot rice) and free hot tea. Cause the restaurant is popular, you need to wait at least 30min but it's worth it! Cash only. Nice service.

reviews_detailed.author: Wilkie Keira
reviews_detailed.text: Yummy seafood bowel, especially like uni bowel. Complimentary soup full of fish and veggies. But not traditional Japanese miso soup. More like al the scraps into a soup, but still fresh and yummy. I come regularly when I wanna valuable seafood sashimi bowel. Highly recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Allen Suei
reviews_detailed.text: Nice Japanese restaurant with local style, food are nice and services are above average. But must make reservation, or else you will be queuing outside for a while. Special note for those who is allergic to shrimp and crabs, their set menu soup is cooked with shrimp shell, which I took a few zip and felt wrong afterwards.

reviews_detailed.author: mimi teacher
reviews_detailed.text: All seafood they serve are very fresh and delicious 😋

name: Marcus老倉庫內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區瑞光路583巷25號1樓
reviews:
假日到訪，店內空間寬敞舒適，掃碼點餐很方便，點了牛肝菌松露野菇燉飯加價升級套餐，粉紅醬鮮蝦雞肉義大利麵、凱撒沙拉、炸物拼盤、麥片奶酪、氣泡飲。個人最推牛肝菌松露野菇燉飯，燉飯煮的軟爛適中，松露的香味在口中散發出來，搭配上野菇的口感，味道層次在嘴裡併發出來，甚是美味。加點的湯品與麵包也十分滿意，雞肉凱撒沙拉很好吃，但以個人而言，凱撒醬有點過多，吃到後面覺得很膩口，氣泡飲也是個人覺得很好喝的飲料，炸物拼盤搭配了炸薯條、炸雞、炸熱狗，炸物拼盤推推，炸雞炸的酥脆好吃又不乾柴，薯條也好好吃，唯一失敗的就是粉紅醬鮮蝦雞肉義大利麵，完。全。沒。有。味。道。吃第一口就無法再吃的難吃⋯基本上餐點都很好吃，義大利麵應該是師傅沒調味好，不然其他餐點都還不錯。
以上口味純屬個人喜好，僅供參考。

從一開始進來門口放了告示說要等你們帶入座，一般來說看到客人在門口等，難道不應該是到客人面前帶客人入座嗎？你們則是服務人員走出吧台，在要我入座的桌子旁，要我過去，我也不是老大心態一定要人從門口帶位，只是你們店內燈光較暗，你們也沒考慮過客人從很亮的環境進到你們店裡，眼睛是否能適應到看到你們的服務人員在那麼遠的地方招呼客人，這可能不是服務的態度
入座選後也沒有介紹消費方式，看完菜單之後請服務人員來點餐才告知要用QR CODE 原以為貼在桌上，結果她從我桌上的視野盲區拿出來，如果你們人員沒打算介紹點餐方式，那就請把點餐方式直接一點的讓入座的客人能自己知道
雖然我只點了把啤酒和炸薯條
但我覺得店家服務邏輯應該要想想
客人這樣點無非是希望薯條和啤酒一起搭配
但是你們先上了啤酒，再者你們這瓶賣這個價位，至少應該有個冰杯，我感覺不到你們的價值
松露薯條我不知道你們自己有沒有試過這個醬比例是否足夠，我醬沾完薯條還有將近一半（我一根薯條沾1-2次），詢問你們沾醬是否可續，你們告知一個30元，你們可能覺得理所當然，但你們這個餐點價格水準似乎不應該如此，我覺得醬1+1應該是你們這個價位應該做到的
所以就問那可以給我番茄醬吧，你們服務人員指了指旁邊的架子說自取，好吧我可以接受，這一切的服務，我想你們應該不收服務費吧~~很抱歉，你們照樣收服務費
憑良心你們薯條還算可以，但是其他部份就看你們自己想不想聽客人的

義大利麵不好吃，麵條很乾，裡面還有一根頭髮，有食安疑慮，不推

套餐附贈的果汁，來了只有半杯，很詭異，很像是別人喝剩下又端出來的

餐廳的空間很大，寬敞舒適。店員每個都面無表情又冷漠，不像美式餐廳會有的熱情

整體而言不推薦。這家餐廳原本看到評論蠻高的，覺得很期待，實際來之後，完全不會想要再來第二次

reviews_detailed.author: Johnson Chou
reviews_detailed.text:
After read most recent reviews, we would give it a try.
Yes, some of reviews are true, the reception and  waitstaff not energetic, too cool, that’s how I feel. However, one of waitress came out from nowhere, her service totally gain back confidence of this place services.
The wait of brunch is reasonable, and the presentation is not bad, food quality is average, food portion might be bit small.
This place vibe is good and design is simple but up to date.

reviews_detailed.author: Nate
reviews_detailed.text: Good burger that leave you feeling full! The portions are generous, and the flavors are spot on. Plus, they offer an extra discount if you leave a review on Google.

reviews_detailed.author: Celine Lee
reviews_detailed.text: Service is ok. Came early and had the whole restaurant for us haha, good atmosphere, pretty chill and nice music. Drink is refillable. Overall nice experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Sharon Daniel
reviews_detailed.text: Not many options for vegans but vegetarians can find a few things on the menu. I had the mushroom and vegetable pasta which can be made vegan. They added extra garlic and chili pepper at my request. The Spaghetti Alla Puttanesca has anchovies. The vegetarian breakfast meal has eggs. For 90 nt you can add bread, soup, and drink to your meal. For an additional 50 nt they will add a side salad.

reviews_detailed.author: amy tsai
reviews_detailed.text:
Excellent food and service. Highly recommend and would definitely visit again! Staff was very friendly and knew the menu well.

I ordered the pink sauce pasta. The sauce was very rich but not too thick. The chicken breast was well marinated, not dry at all. The pink sauce was infused in the chicken breast, very juicy!

My boyfriend ordered the fish burger and it was delicious. The fries on the side was freshly fried so it was hot and crispy!

I'm glad I randomly walked into the restaurant. Would come again to try other dishes!

I forgot to take food photos cuz it was too good

name: 託你の福Tony’s Food 豬排
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區港墘路82巷9號
reviews:
△ 超普 真的不好吃
▲ 週一 公休日
△ 下午時段休息
▲ 禁止外食、飲料
△ 內用 座位不多
▲ 可內用 / 可外帶
△ 現金、電支
▲ 無法訂位 賣完為止
△ 豬排專門 但豬排不行
▲ 提供洗手間、熱茶
△ 附近自找停車場 / 格
▲ 自行掃碼點 有會員活動
△ 不收服務費
▲ 建議去吃連鎖品牌就好

剛好朋友說想試試，就特別過去等，在開門前就在門口先等候，店家準時 11：30 就開門。

店家不提供訂位，所以就是先來可挑選座位，滿了就是要現場候位，而內用座位不多，但是也有可能賣完就沒了，所以如果真的想吃的，建議早點來。

內用是掃碼自己點，店家很客氣，會提供熱茶也會介紹餐點，第一次來就是直接是招牌「濃黑巧克力咖哩 梅花肉炸豬排」的餐點，想說咖哩、豬排都一口氣試試。

等了一會餐點就來了，看起來整體的賣相是不錯，就直接來試試，體驗一下味道如何。

先說「米飯」。本身是尚可，但是我覺得配咖哩，可以飯再硬一些，米粒感再紮實一些會更好。

再來是「豬排」。這個豬排...本身的肉沒甜味、沒香氣，嚼起來還帶微微豬味，而麵衣跟肉是完全分開，沒有一體性，試了沾醬，只有鹹而已，我覺得這個沾醬口味太重，完全不搭。

然後試「咖哩」。就是只有一個字「鹹」！！而且是很鹹... 鹹到不適合配豬排，配白飯也完全不搭，吃起來毫無層次可言，本來也沒甜感跟香氣，就是吃到一個鹹，而且口味過重。

然後喝了湯、醃漬醬菜.. 也都是鹹，味噌湯的口味也是偏鹹，整體平衡沒有一個可以解膩，吃完好想喝個甜的或是喝一個清爽的... 第一次吃豬排，吃到這麼膩..

嚴格來說，沒有一個好吃，雖然在 12：30 左右就差不多客滿，生意真的很好，但我覺得可能附近沒有競爭者吧...

這個體驗後的感覺，我覺得不會推也不會回訪，雖然服務費不收，態度也很好，可是餐點真的不行...  而且這個價格，一個咖哩豬排要 450 ... 成人根本就吃不飽..以這個價格來看.. 我覺得有更好的選擇。

說真的.. 這個豬排店的品質，跟連鎖比，也是完全被連鎖品牌比下去，連鎖品質穩定，高麗菜絲、湯、飯 都可以無限續，價格加上服務費也跟這裡差不多。

我覺得是不是洗評價... 唉.. 最多就是兩星，給服務跟店裡環境.. 餐點我個人真的不推、不給過，但..也許是我自己問題，看來還是很多人喜歡，就留給其他人來試試吧。

本來怕黑巧克力咖哩很辣，但濃黑巧克力咖哩香煎嫩豬的咖哩只有小辣而已，可以放心吃～

沙拉附的山葵醬是辣的，會怕辣的話可以點青檸醋

店員服務態度也很讚，看到備注寫「不要辣」還特別到座位確認飲食口味👍🏻

📌［梅花肉炸豬排-特盛］
好吃，可以續飯乙次，可以吃很飽
📌［濃黑巧克力-香煎嫩豬］
巧克力咖喱不會有很重的巧克力味，小辣

味噌湯料給的也滿豐盛，整體很不錯，不過特盛稍顯貴了點，推薦可以點一般的即可👍

reviews_detailed.author: Jason Zhou
reviews_detailed.text:
Great tasting Tonkatsu, using special 五花肉 and dark chocolate in the curry sauce. Flavorful!
It’s a new restaurant in the neighborhood. Each main course about $400NTD.
Less one star because they only served room-temperature tea, instead of hot tea! But that’s a small factor. Will return to fine here again.

reviews_detailed.author: Little Lunalis
reviews_detailed.text:
We ordered the tenderloin pork cutlet. I find it easy to eat and not fatty at all, perfect for those who doesn't like it too oily. The radish and cutlet sauce cuts through the richness and oil of the meat which was a nice touch. The curry sauce was my favorite with a strong pepper taste that grows with every bite.
We were told beforehand to eat it asap since it's fried goods. The restaurant itself looks very well renovated with a cozy ambience and a strong curry smell when you first walk in.

reviews_detailed.author: Eric Wu
reviews_detailed.text:
Conclusion: everything was great except for the tonkatsu itself.

I could feel the effort that the chef put into the miso soup, salad, and radish, but unfortunately, the tonkatsu was just not up to my standards in terms of flavor, tenderness, and juiciness, and it’s slightly dry. I left feeling disappointed.

reviews_detailed.author: Michael Koo
reviews_detailed.text:
Order the double meat. One was more tender. The other was fatty for me. The cut given to me was 50% fat. A bit bad luck for me. A bit disgusting.

Should be sous vide meat

The spoon was nice looking but not easy to use if you ask me. The stem of the spoon is straight and round.

Service was good.

Concept is similar to KATSU Shin
KATSU 鑫豬排蓋飯｜中山店.

If you ask me, I prefer eating KATSU Shin. But there is no queue here, which is a good thing.

reviews_detailed.author: han sarp
reviews_detailed.text: Ok

name: 六品小館內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區瑞光路421號
reviews: 六品小館內湖店 就開在瑞光路上 靠近捷運港墘站 是內科桌菜餐廳。星期日晚上一家五口去用餐 點了 鲜魚燒豆腐（大盤 $1480） 豆乾豬肉𢇃 左宗棠雞 乾扁四季豆 四碗飯 $3058 價位中高段 好吃！
這次是與公司同事四人一同前往六品小館內湖店用餐，整體環境乾淨明亮，用餐氣氛也算輕鬆。菜色選擇豐富，從家常熱炒到招牌菜都有，出餐速度算快，適合多人聚餐。這次點了幾道經典菜色，其中糖醋咕咾肉的酸甜比例拿捏得不錯。不過其餘幾道菜，口味偏淡，少了點層次感，整體調味較為清淡。服務方面人員態度親切。以這個價位與份量來說仍算合理，適合家庭或同事間的聚餐。如果能在菜色風味上再多些變化與細節，相信整體印象會更好。
因為公司聚餐來吃，聽說在永康街很有名氣但我沒聽過，實際來用餐後也還不錯，只是口味偏甜，我最愛的是花椒荷包蛋，今天是被肉肉填滿的一天啊～

reviews_detailed.author: Behnam Nikouei
reviews_detailed.text:
One of the good restaurant around here
Check it out if you were around here

reviews_detailed.author: DW
reviews_detailed.text: Great food great place for gathering with reasonable price.

reviews_detailed.author: Flyerboi333
reviews_detailed.text: Waitor keeps pushing you to grab the bill. Uncomfortable.

reviews_detailed.author: nope no
reviews_detailed.text: Tasty food, really fast service but extremely salty! Not sure I would go again unless the saltiness can be adjusted. A popular place for office workers to gather with coworkers, seems pretty busy at lunchtime with large groups.

reviews_detailed.author: Esther L
reviews_detailed.text: First time visit and I’m already in love with this restaurant, price are reasonable, the taste are super good, service are professional, not too salty and taste awesome!! I really do recommend this place, parking are just nearby only 40$ per hour for car, which is very convenient.

name: 澄食小人屋《湖光店》
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區成功路四段41巷1號
reviews:
湖光市場附近的人氣海鮮丼，和金泰、百魚、美川等內湖名店的討論度都頗高，假日內用人超多要排隊，整體魚料味道和新鮮度都不錯，CP值部分中規中矩。
這次來外帶漁夫丼(470元)還滿豐盛的，有鮪魚/鮭魚/旗魚/花枝各兩塊、大明蝦、螢烏賊(應該是)、玉子燒，飯上面還鋪了魚卵和蝦卵，整體新鮮度不錯也好吃，尤其是蝦肉有夠讚，不過生魚片偏軟爛就是普通部位，蝦頭有微腥味，小扣分。另外一定要稱讚套餐附的味噌湯，不僅有鮭魚肉邊角料，每碗還有7~8個花蛤，很豐盛！
如果不想吃海鮮，強烈推薦招牌豬五花丼(270元)，豬五花三層肉的大塊切片實在有夠香，超讚👍👍 燒牛丼(210元)則是牛五花，肉質不錯，但沒有豬五花驚豔。
另外點了有卵柳葉魚串(4串100元)，吃起來新鮮，不過柳葉魚口感有點瘦弱不夠肥美，卵倒是夠就是，建議不用點。茶碗蒸(60元)有附一隻蝦但普普，想吃再點。

今天2人用餐，店內座位有吧台和餐桌，適合不同人數的客人，座位舒適，用餐環境良好。

今天主要點烏龍麵、茶碗蒸、串烤類、生魚片等類型，食物新鮮好吃，串烤類也都軟嫩入味，生魚片很鮮，肉質有彈入口帶甜味，鮭魚的油脂味恰到好處，搭配蘿蔔絲和山葵，相當舒服。推薦給喜歡日料的朋友👍👍👍

蘆筍跟綜合手捲好吃。
以日本料理店來說這裡的湯雖然是免費的給得很有誠意   料好多  有海瓜子跟魚肉。
我故意選了一個最便宜的豬肉口味丼飯
雖然價格最便宜，但是很好吃喔
我同學點生魚片口味
用餐有驚喜的體驗，我吃到一個像石頭的醬，竟然是黑芝麻加豆腐。 很值得學習。

reviews_detailed.author: Merve Shen
reviews_detailed.text:
Unfortunately, this restaurant doesn’t have an English name listed on Google Maps. With over 1,400 reviews, we decided to give it a try.

The space offers bar seating by the chef’s counter, where you can watch the chefs prepare the dishes, as well as rectangular tables suitable for groups of four. It’s clearly a popular Japanese restaurant among locals in this area.

That said, the food didn’t quite live up to the hype. The sashimi wasn’t as fresh as expected—still acceptable in taste, but nothing impressive. The chicken dish took quite a long time to prepare and ended up being below average in flavor.

On the positive side, the complimentary salad and edamame were surprisingly good and nicely done.

Overall, while the restaurant has a strong local following, I personally found it quite overrated given the high expectations.

reviews_detailed.author: Dru Lu
reviews_detailed.text:
Cheap Japanese bento place. They get quite a bit of take out business and they have no issue telling dine in customer to wait for half hour for their order. While the edamame is complimentary, I don’t think I’ll want to eat here again.
The place also has a very strong fish smells. The freshness of the fish is decent but not of  high quality. You do get what you pay for. The presentation of the food is nice though.

reviews_detailed.author: J Seng
reviews_detailed.text: Great value for money, large portion and tasty too. Shop is small so it's always crowded during mealtimes.

reviews_detailed.author: Joey Kuei
reviews_detailed.text: Neihu top 1 choice! I have been to several similar restaurants, this is definitely by far the best with it's CP value.

reviews_detailed.author: Zeb Dropkin
reviews_detailed.text: 5 stars for the money. It's solid quality and affordable. Not fine dining, just delicious eating. Small spot, large portions.

name: GumGum Not Only Beer & Wings 雞翅啤酒吧-內科店
formatted_address: 11492台灣臺北市內湖區基湖路3巷68號
reviews:
室內充滿綠意跟餐酒館的慵懶感
有十五種雞翅料理口味
這次點的義麵很特別
用烤草蝦搭配經典零食鱈魚香絲
海味與酥脆結合的樂趣口感
鮮蝦醬汁收乾沾附滿麵條

菜單設計跟新鮮感有不同的用餐體驗

在公司吃了蠻多次這家的外燴（可能是信義店），一直印象都不錯，第一次到店裡面來。
金沙蛋黃雞翅 - 不愧是招牌，吃起來非常棒。雞翅是微微炸過的，不算很酥脆，但是完全不油膩。外面的金沙做的非常棒，口感綿密濃郁，很有熱炒店的感覺。整體搭配起來很好吃很涮嘴。
干貝中卷鮮蝦炒蔬菜 - 海鮮都很新鮮實在，搭配爽脆的蔬菜，還不錯。
番茄墨魚蟹黃披薩 - 個人覺得相對比較普通的一道。蟹黃和蕃茄的味道都不明顯，墨魚有稍微帶一點鮮味，料不算特別多。餅皮是我比較不喜歡的類型，中間稍微有點太軟爛，比較沒有口感。
麻油雞香蔥燉飯 - 飯粒的口感是比較軟爛的，幾乎就是稀飯了，比較喜歡米心口感的人應該不適合。但吃起來很不錯，調味很剛好，濃濃的麻油味，但又不會太油膩，雞腿肉特別的多，大推。
整體來說用餐體驗很不錯，食物味道都很好，店內的環境也很棒。

🔸番茄墨魚蟹黃披薩：
麵皮很香，墨魚QQ，起司的量也很多，拿起來會牽絲～但沒有什麼感受到番茄的元素，蟹黃應該也只是披薩上面黃黃一小點一小點的點綴而已。下次有機會應該會想嘗試其他的口味
🔸鹹蛋黃雞翅腿：
鹹蛋黃好香好搶眼，存在感很高。招牌不愧是招牌，名不虛傳
🔸麻油雞香蔥燉飯：
麻油雞跟油蔥的香氣非常非常明顯，雞肉也不少塊，肉質又嫩，不過燉飯是走沒有米心的路線，吃起來很像稀飯，我覺得是美中不足，不過這個就看大家的喜好
🔸干貝中卷鮮蝦炒蔬菜：
兩顆大干貝搭配中卷蝦子炒一些時蔬，雖然海鮮是美味的，不過就不算太有亮點的料理，想吃一點蔬菜可以點

餐廳的氛圍很好，聚餐或是約會都很適合，口味也都有在水準上。美好的一餐謝謝男朋朋請我吃飯☺️

reviews_detailed.author: I CHEN CHEN
reviews_detailed.text: Good place to hangout after work, food portion was not small at all. Beer on tap are fresh, it was good and enjoyable dining experience overall. Appreciate their complementary sweet potato fries on the day.

reviews_detailed.author: Rick Pennington
reviews_detailed.text: Enjoyed some pretty good Thai chili wings and lemon pepper wings and fries with a seasonal Japanese lager. The calamari and onion rings were pretty good also.  Recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Wendy Bear
reviews_detailed.text:
The overly experience was fairly good.
Loved the vibe of the roof floor, relaxing and chilling! You were not squeezed in a table where one table was close to another one but you could see open space.
The service was nice. They were friendly but not too much.
The truffle fries were ok.
Chicken wings were not bad. Had flavor of salted eggs at its chain and liked it best. Si-chuan pepper would be my favorite so far.

reviews_detailed.author: Janine
reviews_detailed.text: One of our go-to places! Serving sometimes takes time, so we try to order in advance, especially if we’re coming as a bigger group. Food is always great.

reviews_detailed.author: Michelle
reviews_detailed.text: Having a good dinner here. Must try salted egg fried chicken, 麻油雞risotto. Mojito also nice to try. The service is also really care of each table. Recommended to visit with friend.

name: 義沐 Eat MU 台北內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區瑞光路583巷29號1F
reviews:
從前菜到甜點，每道都滿好吃的！餐點選擇很多元，也有2人/4人套餐可以選擇，店員服務也很好～會想回訪嘗試其他餐點！

前菜首推泰式酸辣小卷，酸酸甜甜的很開胃，小卷也很嫩

主餐選了蒜辣牛肉義大利麵，可以選擇細麵和寬麵（照片中是寬麵），蒜味超級世界霹靂濃郁，比預期的辣一點大概有小辣的程度，牛肉七分熟吃起來也不會太老，有種油香味

唯一不是那麼推薦的餐點是薄餅，餅皮有點乾硬

雙人饗宴，餐點水準以上，上菜速度很快，雖然價位稍高但算值得探訪！

-核桃麵包/主廚濃湯：麵包的香蒜醬很好吃，玉米馬鈴薯濃湯普通。
-干貝佐松露：松露味道不太明顯，但現煎干貝鮮香味很棒。
-蒜辣牛小排義大利麵：小辣偏中辣的蒜醬，牛排選五分熟但覺得稍韌。
-墨香中卷義大利麵：海鮮料豐富，中卷蝦子干貝新鮮，墨魚醬濃郁，整體推推！
-紐約起士/香橙牛奶巧克力蛋糕：蛋糕都好吃，香味濃，香橙牛奶巧克力蛋糕酸甜味道搭配脆片口感很讚。

⭐️雙人饗宴套餐 $1780
》核桃麵包、玉米馬鈴薯濃湯
》鮮煎干貝佐松露
》青醬牛小排燉飯
》蒜香奶油鮮蝦義大利麵
》甜點：蒙布朗、香橙牛奶巧克力蛋糕
⭐️葡萄優格水果沙拉 $370
⭐️香蕉oreo巧克力冰淇淋麻糬鬆餅 $300

在內湖科技園區內的人氣餐廳，餐點主打義大利麵、燉飯、早午餐等

雙人套餐的份量非常足夠，三個人分也很剛好，加點的葡萄優格沙拉清爽，水果分量足夠，搭配腰果核桃等味道豐富，是大人小孩都喜歡的前菜。開胃菜的部分相對來說比較普通，新鮮的干貝搭配一點沙拉，但干貝和沙拉本身沒有合在一起，算是稍微可惜的一道

主餐的部分青醬牛小排燉飯米心軟硬適中，帶點嚼勁的牛小排搭配燉飯一起入口，慢慢咬會讓濃郁的青醬在口中散開，喜歡青醬的朋友很推薦。另一款蒜香奶油鮮蝦義大利麵名符其實，蒜香濃厚，伴著奶油醬汁和五隻去殼的大蝦，是重口味的朋友會喜歡的一道料理，小缺點是蒜味真的很重，要約會或是比較注重形象的朋友可能就不太推薦拉

最後的甜點選了蒙布朗和香橙牛奶巧克力蛋糕，兩個調味比起主餐略顯普通，口味上來說蒙布朗更甜，是不難吃但也不會驚豔的安全牌。額外加點麻糬鬆餅上的巧克力冰淇淋非常濃厚，鬆餅裡面夾著麻糬軟Q又不會過乾，胃口大的朋友推薦可以點著一起吃喔

reviews_detailed.author: Adi Rainbow
reviews_detailed.text: Strongly recommend! Amazing food, affordable and the service is great- they fixed my issues after ordering on QR code. English friendly. I’m a blogger and this is at the top of my list of lucky findings :)

reviews_detailed.author: JF Lee
reviews_detailed.text:
From appetizers to desserts, everything was delicious! The menu is diverse, with set meals for 2 or 4 people available. The service was excellent. I would definitely come back to try other dishes!

For appetizers, I highly recommend the Thai-style spicy and sour squid. The sweet and sour flavor was very appetizing, and the squid were very tender.

For the main course, I chose the garlic and spicy beef spaghetti. You can choose between thin or wide noodles (the photo shows wide noodles). The garlic flavor was incredibly rich and intense, and it was a little spicier than expected, about mildly spicy. The beef was medium-rare, not too tough, and had a nice oily flavor.

The only dish I wouldn't recommend is the tortilla; the crust was a bit dry and hard.

reviews_detailed.author: ChunER
reviews_detailed.text:
A two-person feast, the food was above average, and the service was fast. Although the price was a bit high, it was worth the visit!

- Walnut Bread/Chef's Soup: The garlic sauce on the bread was delicious, the corn and potato soup was just average.

- Scallops with Truffle: The truffle flavor wasn't very pronounced, but the freshly seared scallops were very flavorful.

- Garlic Spicy Short Ribs Spaghetti: The garlic sauce was mildly to medium spicy. The steak was ordered medium-rare but felt a bit tough.

- Squid Ink Squid Spaghetti: Rich in seafood, the squid, shrimp, and scallops were fresh, and the squid ink sauce was rich. Overall, highly recommended!

- New York Cheese/Orange Milk Chocolate Cake: Both cakes were delicious and fragrant. The orange milk chocolate cake had a great sweet and sour taste paired with the crispy texture.

reviews_detailed.author: Wang Jessie
reviews_detailed.text:
⭐️Double Feast Set Menu $1780

>Walnut Bread, Corn and Potato Chowder

>Seared Scallops with Truffle

>Pesto Short Risotto Risotto

>Garlic Creamy Shrimp Spaghetti

>Dessert: Mont Blanc, Orange Milk Chocolate Cake

⭐️Grape Yogurt Fruit Salad $370

⭐️Banana Oreo Chocolate Ice Cream Mochi Pancake $300


A popular restaurant in Neihu Science Park, specializing in pasta, risotto, brunch, etc.


The double set menu is very generous in portion size, perfect for three people. The added grape yogurt salad is refreshing, with ample fruit and a rich flavor from the cashews and walnuts, making it a delightful appetizer for both adults and children. The appetizers were relatively ordinary, featuring fresh scallops with a little salad, but the scallops and salad weren't combined well, which was a slight disappointment.

The main course, pesto short rib risotto, had a perfect balance of soft and chewy rice. The slightly chewy short ribs paired well with the risotto, and as you slowly chew, the rich pesto sauce unfolds in your mouth. Highly recommended for pesto lovers. The other dish, garlic cream shrimp pasta, lived up to its name, with a strong garlic flavor, accompanied by creamy sauce and five peeled shrimp. It's a dish that those who enjoy strong flavors will appreciate. The only downside is that the garlic flavor is very strong; it might not be recommended for dates or those who are more concerned about their image.

For dessert, we chose Mont Blanc and orange milk chocolate cake. Both were slightly less elaborate than the main courses. The Mont Blanc was sweeter, a safe choice that wasn't bad but not particularly amazing either. The extra chocolate ice cream on the mochi pancake was very rich, and the mochi inside the pancake was soft and chewy without being too dry. Recommended for those with a large appetite!

reviews_detailed.author: KunBin Cheng
reviews_detailed.text: There are plenty of seats, and it seems to offer a variety of Western cuisine, including American brunch, pasta, thin-crust pizza, and Spanish paella. The food quality is good! Of course, the prices are also on the higher side, but you can save 100 yuan by registering as a member.

name: 四川龍府
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區民權東路六段286號
reviews:
說真的這店明明外觀環境很好
怎麼裡面這麼不行？地下室也更不用說
一到樓下一整個潮濕黴菌的味道
尤其如果你是第一組客人到地下室
餐具也是很不okay水杯浮一層油餐具也不乾淨
接待的阿姨態度也差距甚大
帶你下樓的時候還可以一到樓下像我們是他隔壁鄰居莫名其妙跑來蹭飯似的態度？幹嘛我欠你的喔
而且價格也沒在客氣的品質是不差但價格也不差啊兄弟一個人隨便點個沒幾道人均就會破千那我何必選擇在此吃飯？在這個內湖東湖這邊還可以成為大雷店不容易
對了還有，都要被4.8的評價騙了雖然我沒有證據是不是買的評價也永遠不得而知可是我只能說那麼高的評價跟不斷有頻繁的人寫評價這件事情跟和牛涮的操作是如出一徹各位眼睛還是要雪亮一點

被門口裝飾的船隻吸引，我們全家一起進來用餐~
剛開始擔心帶著小朋友，吃火鍋會很不方便，沒想到店員非常友善！
幫我們準備嬰兒座椅及兒童碗盤
小朋友一歲而已，吃的到處都是，我們覺得很不好意思，店員卻非常友善的協助，服務態度超好🥰

📍肉
我們點了板腱牛和雪花牛，板腱牛吃起來很扎實、雪花牛帶點油花，兩種都還不錯！

📍海鮮
魚滑是有帶魚皮的魚，煮起來Q彈軟嫩，因為帶皮的關係，不會煮一煮就不見
文蛤一送來就驚艷到我們，用閃閃發光的寶藏箱裝著的文蛤！！吃起來非常新鮮

📍熟食
口水雞本身是好吃的，不過有一點鹹，適合極重口味愛好者
流沙岩蝦球口感外脆內軟，個人很喜歡
有提供熟食超讚的，肚子餓的時候不用慢慢等火鍋滾，直接開吃！

喜歡爆漿的，我很推薦牛肉起司爆漿丸~
肉質緊實，起司牽絲，豪好吃啊

店內還有生日活動，幾歲就送幾隻蝦‼️
擺飾完全不馬乎，看起來超氣派的！
非常推薦想聚餐或是慶生的時候，可以來吃～

四川龍府主打各式火鍋與川味料理，這次選在這裡慶生，有幾道特別值得推薦的料理，像是柳州螺螄粉鍋，湯底微酸微辣很開胃，味道濃郁卻不刺激，鴨血豆腐好吃還能無限續；喜歡火鍋料的話更不能錯過他們的手工丸餃與手工漿，尤其是真材實料的蝦滑，口感Q彈紮實，完整保留鮮蝦海味，絕對是必點招牌。
另外川味料理表現也出色，四川晾肉是直接食用的川式冷盤，豬五花片肉質紮實，搭配鮮嫩黃瓜片口感清爽，香氣十足的油潑蘸醬更是畫龍點睛；流沙熔岩蝦球一份共五顆，外層酥脆帶香，一口咬開，溫熱的流沙餡隨之化開，蝦肉與鹹香內餡交織，口感相當討喜。四川燃麵麵條Q彈，拌勻後油香與麻香交織，入口麻香飽滿卻不辛辣，尾韻迷人。餐後附贈的四川冰粉也很好吃唷～
必須說四川龍府的壽星優惠很有誠意，當月壽星只要當次消費滿1300元，即可獲贈與壽星同齡的等量蝦與干貝（需提前預約），還用心擺成蛋糕的樣子上桌，儀式感十足，拍照也好看。

reviews_detailed.author: Chengkang Lee (Ethan)
reviews_detailed.text: Plenty selection of food. Some are good and some don’t. However the service we got today from the lady was great and she made recommendations and checked on us quite often without bothering us too much. Good interaction.

reviews_detailed.author: A KU
reviews_detailed.text: Good vibe, lot of decorations.

reviews_detailed.author: Viola’s Wonderland
reviews_detailed.text: I like the lobster the most, because it’s very chewy inside.Your other dishes are delicious too!

reviews_detailed.author: Shelly Yeh
reviews_detailed.text:
The food is good but the Chuan Chuan is really artificial and doesnt taste good also not coming with stick. It looks cheap.

Also the service is really bad. Even it’s not busy but I could tell they don’t really care. They don’t even explain to you what are the self service and so on. You just need to figure it out by yourself. All I would say the price isn’t worth it at all.

reviews_detailed.author: Emily Yu
reviews_detailed.text: A super nice hot pot restaurant to have spicy pot, they also sell Sichuan cuisine on their meal. If you are someone who like spicy pot, then here is somewhere you can’t miss. Their beef is served with unfrozen beef, thus the texture is very tender once you blanching them. Price is reasonable and staff is friendly. Tofu can be added without limitation as long as your stomach have room. Dessert is prepared after you finished without charge you a penny. MRT (Huzhou station) is around the restaurant about 3-5 min walking distance. Paying with cash only at this moment.

name: Home Garden餐廳-昇恆昌旗艦店
formatted_address: 11469台灣臺北市內湖區金莊路129號5F
reviews: 全場最好吃的應該是熱乎乎的豆花！其它的菜色普通，份量算足夠，空間裝潢很簡單，本以為會有Garden，結果失望，菜色口味與價格並不匹配，去一次就可以。

座落內湖的角落
儘管位置略顯劣勢
Home Garden 附設停車場直接省去了上班族及客人的交通麻煩
由於全館屬於昇恆昌所有
餐廳的桌距是完全沒在客氣的寬敞
一入桌，服務人員便親切的詢問本日飲品需求
方便大家在上菜前解解渴
這次點的普洱茶之濃厚
持續小火加熱不至讓口感失衡超加分
餐點部分亦是可圈可點
烤鴨不走華麗切片演出路線
一口酥脆外皮隨即與入味醬汁共同打動味蕾
蝦球、老皮也都不失特色
最後，豆花除復古的用木製小桶上桌
格外具有儀式感外
竟然嫩如茶碗蒸
親自淋下適量的黑糖醬
叫人怎麼能不喜愛？！
整體來說，本店絕不是CP值最高或最驚奇的餐廳
卻是帶家人、朋友、客戶來訪可以開心吃飯而不失體面的選擇
期待下次再訪

記錄2026.2.16除夕中午的團圓飯，包廂容納三桌。地下室停車方便，大廳寬敞，佈置充滿新春紅通通的喜氣。餐點精緻美味。
今年最吸睛的是甜點，平安蘋果流沙包，真的以爲是一顆顆的蘋果，超級粉嫩可愛。

reviews_detailed.author: Jay
reviews_detailed.text: Great food, service and atmosphere. While not authentic Sichuan cuisine, but the fusion spin tasted great. The Sichuan style Mapo Tofu was not too spicy but had a good numbing sensation and the tofu was so soft and the sauce was good. The fried calamari was fried well, nice and need crunchy and not too oily. The Fried Rice with Salty Fish and Chicken Strips was incredible, would recommend, the crispy rice on the bottom was so good! Would also recommend the Seafood with thick noodles in Hakka style, the noodles were just the right thickness and the chew was perfect (could use more seafood though). Not pictured, I also had the Sichuan style spicy beef in pot, which was good but the beef was too fatty for my liking, and the braised fried tofu (which I liked a lot, would recommend).

reviews_detailed.author: Korius
reviews_detailed.text:
for this price, i expected much better food. the cherry duck salad is good, but everything else ranged from acceptable to subpar. the beef was terribly tough and sinewy, the salmon fried rice was disappointingly bland, and the seared fish (not in the photo because it came much later) was dry and tough.

i appreciate that the environment is spacious and the servers friendly, but they really need to work on the food.

reviews_detailed.author: Mickey Pietrzak
reviews_detailed.text: Everything about this place is great.  The atmosphere is very upscale and quiet.  Excellent for special events or gatherings.  The wait staff were very fast and efficient.  The food was all beautifully presented and perfectly cooked.  Every dish was delicious.  Highly recommended!

reviews_detailed.author: Ph Vu Dinh
reviews_detailed.text: Clean, tidy and good restaurant

reviews_detailed.author: Michelle Cheung
reviews_detailed.text: The Lunar New Year Eve dinner is excellent—especially the seafood dishes and chicken soup! And service is so friendly.

name: 漫時生活
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區內湖路一段372號
reviews:
餐飲體驗對應價格～
價格偏高，東西好吃、一成服務費。一個人大約$1000

服務人員訓練需加強，越南店員聽不太懂中文，台灣店員重複不同人上來問問題。原本訂位說沙發，另一位堅持帶我們到椅子，本來打算不吃了，剛好原接電話人員帶我們到沙發區

初次到訪，餐點普遍不錯吃，環境也可以，但服務人員態度令人無法恭維。一是口頭點餐一直略為不耐煩叫我等一下，因為一個套餐含的選項必須要一個一個輸入，重點我也是慢慢一個一個告知要的品項，速度也不快，這口氣與態度確實令人不舒服。再來是久違的同學聚餐難免分享些小禮物，就是分發在坐的同學如此而已，並未拆開食用，因為我們知道店家禁止外食.但自此之後每拿出個什麼東西，服務員就一直看過來或走來假意收盤子，防止客人吃東西到這個地步，感覺被監視是很糟糕的體驗，是不是太矯枉過正？最後最誇張的事，我吃完的義大利麵放旁邊桌子一直視若無睹不收掉，我的同學盤裡還有一口食物，叉子也還拿在手上，居然走來問我同學：“這盤不用那我收走了喔”手同步過來準備收走🙄這是很不禮貌的行為欸！非常震驚.
第一次用餐，滿驚豔的 空間舒適寬敞，服務人員態度良好，餐點CP值高，份量超大，兒童餐夠一大一小（3歲）吃

reviews_detailed.author: Anna Chen
reviews_detailed.text: DON'T order the squid!!! 🦑 I never give bad reviews but I was truly insulted by the quality of food and service here. I ordered the squid lunch set. Upon first bite, I tasted a weird flavor. I thought maybe I just wasn't familiar with the sauce. After the third bite, I could not handle the taste anymore and spit it out. I asked the server what kind of sauce they use and they said just a sauce for the grilled squid. They seemed annoyed that I even asked. Then they took it to the kitchen to "taste" and said there was nothing wrong. I asked if they tried it and they seemed irritated that they had to repeat themselves. They tried to gaslight me by saying nobody else had a problem with this dish, but when I walked around the restaurant to go to the bathroom, I saw that nobody else ordered it so of course nobody else had a problem. I asked the other guests at my table to smell the squid and they all stated that there was a strong stinky smell protruding from the squid. Clearly spoiled. Even the "spine" in the squid shrunk beyond recognition, a sign of being frozen for too long. The squid had a nasty taste and smell. Nobody else dared to try it. They offered me another main meal and I chose the chicken, which is $40 less than the squid. However, they charged me for the squid meal that I barely ate and said the chicken was "on the house." So I paid $300 for a $260 meal plus a stomachache. Not to mention the 10% service fee. It would have been a different story if they took responsibility for their spoiled food, but they didn't and instead gaslighted me. I'm not a chef but I know when food has gone bad, especially seafood. To serve that to customers without remorse is unforgiveable. I will not be returning here again.

reviews_detailed.author: Sheryl Lee
reviews_detailed.text: They let you sit and talk as long as you want and this is why we come here often.  The food is actually pretty good as well. I’ve tried many different dishes and they are not superb but they are not too bad.   The vibe is chill and they don’t rush you so this is a good place to chat and relax with good friends.

reviews_detailed.author: Rocky Lau
reviews_detailed.text: Spacious and cozy, not too crowded. But the food is terrible, my dish was absolute burnt. I've to bite out most of the portion to avoid to chew at the burnt food

reviews_detailed.author: Ismael B
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent place to just relax. A relaxing vibe and nice selection of drinks and food

reviews_detailed.author: Robert Marquez (Q-Tex)
reviews_detailed.text: I went to this pizza place with my wife and some friends. Ultimately, we had a great experience and the food was healthy-ish and delicious for the most part and not too expensive. The servers were also fast and helpful with showing us how to order using the QR code system they have. I recommend the Caesar salad and quesadilla. The craft-soda they had available was very tasty and not too acidic and I’m a big fan of sodas 😺

name: 永宝餐廳
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區瑞光路106號
reviews:
20260204 接近11點在店外等待，大概快11:10才開門營業，需人員到齊才能入座。
上菜速度頗快，因為附近員工還沒休息，人潮大約11:30-40會湧現。

這次一共三人（2男1女）用餐，一共點了1炒飯、1大碗湯、40顆水餃和5道菜。以下為食後心得，純分享，僅供參考。

環境：有類似包廂的座位，蠻舒服。
廁所要去旁邊的大樓內側使用。
醬料要自取。

服務：店員會收空盤，不錯。
會提醒去裝醬料配小菜，棒棒。
似乎只收現金，沒特別問還有哪些方式。

菜餚：

山東燒雞（半隻）：調味不過甜，以鹹味為主，蠻耐吃的，推推。
（有香菜和小黃瓜🥒點綴，要小心）

四喜湯：料很足，俗又大碗，換作在別的餐廳，這一碗賣180-200差不多。

韭菜+高麗菜水餃：皮偏厚，我蠻喜歡，但友人不喜。餡料不算多，但大顆就是爽。

蝦仁烘🥚：不油，沒啥蛋香，份量一般。

糖醋里脊：調味不會過甜，皮微酥肉不多，是今天最愛的一道。

什錦炒飯：有粒粒分明，調味清淡，沒啥鑊氣。

醋溜高麗菜：酸味偏重，冷掉更重，很普通的一道。

滷味：甜不辣片頗厚，魚漿味重。
杏鮑菇，嗯，就這樣。

CP值極高的一間店，吃完這些飽到天靈蓋，晚餐也吃不下。

喔對了，醬料說辣椒很辣，其實一點也不辣🌶️。

推薦山東燒雞、嗆鍋麵、水餃、滷味。
山東燒雞酸酸鹹鹹，佐料有很多蒜泥、香菜、小黃瓜，爽口好吃，連湯汁都好喝。
嗆鍋麵的麵條Q彈、料多、湯美味，CP值高。
韭菜水餃的韭菜不會嗆，一咬下去有滿滿的肉汁流出來，也沒有肉腥味，連不愛吃韭菜的我，都覺得好吃。
滷味有入味，可以點一些。
至於蔥燒肉絲，頗鹹，需配白飯，無法單吃。

慕名前來,果然名不虛傳
便宜Cp值很高！
每道菜都是白飯殺手

第一次來的話星星菜單都可以點一下
但有些重樣性質的菜要看一下！
無法定位，一定是要現場排，大約都會等30-1小時，要注意一下！

reviews_detailed.author: Ed T
reviews_detailed.text:
Traditional no frills but very nice.

My first time experience such local cuisine.

Definitely not your typical tourist type restaurant,

Every one is local here.

reviews_detailed.author: Tammy Liu
reviews_detailed.text: Established and moved to this location about 18 months ago.  The most popular item is chicken salad, huge portion, high CP, average flavor and texture.  The 2nd most popular item is their boiled dumplings, liked the flavors, but prefer a different type of dumpling skin.  The squid sausage was pretty good, but somewhat expensive.  The restaurant seatings were very closely together, at a time like this, not comfortable dining environment.

reviews_detailed.author: Chi-Hsuan Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Price is cheap and food are great. Come early for your seat. Waiting is worth to enjoy delicious foods.

reviews_detailed.author: Kimo Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Food is delicious but the service and logistics for take away certainly needs improvement from order to payment process

reviews_detailed.author: Henry Wright
reviews_detailed.text:
Pros - the food is cheap.
Cons - the food is mediocre at best (the rice balls at 7-11 are more delicious). Salty, over spicy, or too sour are the norm. The service is slowwwwww. Also, people who come way after you will be served the same dish you ordered 15 min before you.

Not worth the cheap price if you have to wait forever for food that you don't want to eat.

name: 布納咖啡館 內湖館
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區民權東路六段137號
reviews:
整個裝潢很漂亮，空間寬敞明亮舒服，菜單選擇很多目不暇給！讓人猶豫了好一陣子！

🍝卡波娜拉蛋黃醬雞腿義大利麵：覺得雞腿的味道完全蓋過麵，導致蛋黃麵就只是普通的義大利麵，只是顏色偏黃而已，有點可惜…

🍗酥炸嫩雞翅：菜單寫雞翅，其實給足了四隻雞翅四隻雞腿，炸的又香又酥，好吃！

🍮提拉米蘇：一般好吃

裡面很漂亮，座位也很多，服務很好，每道料理都會介紹說明。晚上很漂亮氣氛很好。料理都不錯，義大利麵很推，披薩口感也很好。唯獨豬肋排做法是濕的，我們外帶回家用氣炸鍋就口感不錯。
鮭魚很厚實沒味道，我們自己灑上黑胡椒搭配還不錯。

牛排太熟⋯不能決定熟度，只是全熟或半熟，但是半熟也超熟
雖然很常想不到要吃什麼就來吃這家
但是這幾年覺得餐點品質有些微下降
而且品項現在超多看得很亂

reviews_detailed.author: J
reviews_detailed.text: They try to get you to use a digital menu which degrades the whole experience. Excellent food. I like the cheese sticks especially

reviews_detailed.author: Jackson Huang
reviews_detailed.text: First visit. Service was fast, courteous and efficient. One of the few places where they ask if you like your drinks first! Seating was comfortable and private unlike many other local places. Our dishes didn’t take too long and all tasty and distinct. CP higher than others despite modest prices. Portions were just a tad larger than we could finish but so satisfying! Recommend and will revisit.

reviews_detailed.author: Joe Schoeman
reviews_detailed.text: One of the best restaurants in the area with a rather affordable menu. There is something for young and old on the menu. They cater for romantic meals for two and big groups up to 70 people. The food is always delicious and the excellent table service is done with a smile. They just updated the menu and added a wider variety of drinks.

reviews_detailed.author: Elle Travel
reviews_detailed.text: Food was average, however service was friendly and ambience is nice. An overall comfortable dining experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Kevin Lee
reviews_detailed.text: Fantastic new cafe. Spacious, indoor seating with outdoor garden seating available. Offers specialty coffee which really stands out from other cafes. Italian cuisine that really hits the spot in my opinion. Highly recommend the beef bourguignon. The vibe of the cafe is much like one you'd find overseas, not like a typical cafe in Taiwan, which is quite refreshing. Great service, all very courteous. Will be back.

name: 陳三Chen*3 Bistro
formatted_address: 11494台灣臺北市內湖區民權東路六段123巷34弄21-1號
reviews:
調酒都好喝。
熱食滷味都好吃無雷。有機會遇到麻油腰子建議要吃！
調酒師弟弟酷酷的、調酒師妹妹很熱情、老闆娘外型酷實際熱情，氛圍很舒服的酒吧。

舒適輕鬆的餐酒館，餐點很好吃，酒也很好喝，喝完都變得挑嘴了。😏
來聽聽八卦也不錯😎

每個月都有活動，吃喝玩樂，有時還會有品酒課，好讚！🥂
非常有氣氛的小酒館，一杯調酒🍹搭配美味小食，推薦下班小酌的好去處

reviews_detailed.author: Jeffrey
reviews_detailed.text: A warm neighborhood bar with a refined and quiet atmosphere — the perfect little spot to unwind. The wine selection includes carefully chosen red and white wines from various regions, including bottles directly from wineries. The owner thoughtfully introduces different varieties or simply chats with guests. You’ll also find a curated selection of beers, Japanese whisky, and even peated options, making it easy for everyone to discover their own favorite drink.

reviews_detailed.author: Storm Avalanche
reviews_detailed.text: Spectacular delicious Beef Noodle Soup..Very cool vibe..small cozy..It's a hidden Gem with great service and Delicious food...The local beer is good too

reviews_detailed.author: Peter Waldkirch
reviews_detailed.text: Whenever my wife and I visit her family in Taipei we stay in Neihu, and I always look forward to spending time at Chen 3. It has very good drinks and food, but the friendly owner (hi Angela!) and welcoming regulars are what gives it cozy neighbourhood bar vibes. It’s always nice ending a day seeing the city with a drink here.

reviews_detailed.author: Dru Lu
reviews_detailed.text:
Lovely little neighbourhood bar that’s pretty much the only option near by. It gets pretty wild with all the regulars over the weekend :)

The menu is simple with many Taiwanese favourites. The braised beef three treasures are perfect drinking food. In hindsight, should’ve ordered some braised pork’s instead of mid squid.

reviews_detailed.author: Angel H.
reviews_detailed.text: Food was great, the vibe was nice, and the service was AMAZING 👏🤩🙀 Definitely coming back if I visited Taiwan again!

name: 擁灣晨食所 台北內湖店 |團購早餐會議|下午茶點心|早午餐|
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區內湖路一段437巷4弄4號
reviews:
又來吃了一次漢堡，這次加好加滿，變更巨大美味了🤣
（雖然比較不健康）

只能外帶😭
漢堡麵包體不是一般早餐那種，比較像麥當勞，較細緻結實！

生菜給的不少，鮪魚料普通，蛋特別好吃。

手打漢堡排出格的美味又巨大！
明顯比漢堡麵包還要厚又多汁，
(即使我要求不加美乃滋、沒點花生醬跟培根)
109就能吃到真的很不賴。

希望晚上也能吃到它🤣好吃程度及大小，能跟附近的 認識一下漢堡 對坑了
每個餐點都很好吃！還點了薯條跟熱狗也都很好吃

之前在三峽創始店吃過
回味無窮
現在內湖開了分店
品質一樣讚! 讚! 讚!

首推"手打牛肉起司堡"
聽老闆說 是認真手打的
難怪鮮嫩多汁

貼心提醒
請趁熱吃 咬的時候會爆汁
請小心食用 =)

reviews_detailed.author: H. Yuan (阿谷)
reviews_detailed.text:
I had a burger again, this time with a full refill, making it even bigger and tastier! 🤣

(Although less healthy)

Takeout only 😭 The burger bun isn't your typical breakfast kind; it's more like McDonald's, finer and firmer!

The lettuce was generous, the tuna topping was average, but the egg was exceptionally delicious.

The handmade burger platter was exceptionally delicious and huge!

It was noticeably thicker and juicier than a regular burger bun,

(even though I asked for no mayonnaise, no peanut butter, and no bacon).

It's really good for NT$109.

I hope I can have it again tonight 🤣 I hope it's as delicious and big as it is, and that I can compare it with other burgers in the area.

reviews_detailed.author: 吳佳頤
reviews_detailed.text: Every dish was delicious! The fries and hot dogs were also very good.

reviews_detailed.author: Bonifacio Chu
reviews_detailed.text:
I had it at the original location in the Three Gorges area before, and the taste was unforgettable. Now they've opened a branch in Neihu, and the quality is just as amazing!

I highly recommend the "Handmade Beef Cheese Burger." The owner said it's truly handmade, no wonder it's so tender and juicy!

Friendly reminder: Please eat it while it's hot, as it bursts with juice when you bite into it.

Please eat with care =)

reviews_detailed.author: 曹語諾
reviews_detailed.text: The burgers were super delicious, affordable, and made with great ingredients! 👍🏼👍🏼👍🏼

reviews_detailed.author: 韓天
reviews_detailed.text: It's quite delicious, especially the handmade beef burger! Highly recommended!

name: Joyfull台灣珍有福 台北內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區民善街88號1樓
reviews: 2025/9/29去吃的，第一次吃這家，點了這些，因為沒有實際吃過九州的店面，所以沒有辦法做比較，但我覺得吃起來就是中規中矩，還可以，因為也是家庭用餐，環境就是在一樓賣場裡，舒適度也是可以，不會不好吃，也不會難吃，但如果有機會我還是想去九州實際吃看看，才能比較來台灣展店的究竟差別在哪

餐點種類多元，而且是非常多元的那種。

重點是餐點味道不錯，還有飲料吧可以喝到飽。

白飯跟味噌湯也是自助吃到飽。

非常適合全家人或小朋友一起來吃。

他的漢堡排我蠻推薦的，比很多挽肉都好吃。
第一次吃到可以用筷子整片夾起來的”歐姆蛋”….餐點跟服務品質（20:20進來時沒介紹餐點、環境，且發現味增湯已見底）有待加強

reviews_detailed.author: Chen Aini
reviews_detailed.text:
it's good,It's up to you what menu you choose
they have much,beverage for free
can refill soft drink,rice and soup

reviews_detailed.author: Jabroni Anthony (Basic Gamer)
reviews_detailed.text: Ordered the curry rice dish plus a drink. My goodness was it terrible. Half the plate came cold/room temperature. The rest was luke-warm. Biggest waste of 400NTD. You can find better food at a 7-11. My biggest regret was not checking the reviews prior to eating here. Never again!

reviews_detailed.author: Ben Johnson
reviews_detailed.text: My family and I are big fan of Joyfull! The food is served quickly and seats are always available!

reviews_detailed.author: Anthony
reviews_detailed.text: Very bland flavor on all the dishes we ordered. They also forgot one of our main dishes. Maybe it’s good to come with kids since the drinks/rice/soup are unlimited. Other than that, skip this place.

reviews_detailed.author: Chinwen Hsiao
reviews_detailed.text: Great for after shopping, nothing else.

name: 圓安宴粵菜料理
formatted_address: 11467台灣臺北市內湖區成功路二段322號
reviews: 有老闆請客跟同事來吃桌菜，中規中矩吧，裝潢環境比較老舊一點，菜是都還不錯吃，旁邊有立體停車塔，停車方便

「招牌蒸龍虎斑一上桌，立刻吸引全場目光。魚身晶瑩剔透，澆上熱油後香氣四溢。魚肉鮮嫩細滑，口感緊實又帶著絲絲甜味，配合清香的蔥薑與醬油，完全展現粵菜『清而不淡、鮮而不膩』的精髓。這道菜既是味蕾享受，也是宴席上寓意吉祥的必點佳餚。」「蝦餃晶瑩剔透、鮮蝦彈牙；燒賣飽滿紮實、肉香蝦鮮；蘿蔔糕外酥內嫩、鹹香回味。三款經典粵式點心，每一口都道地又滿足！」以這樣的食材水準和環境，價格超值很適合家庭聚餐或宴請朋友！

reviews_detailed.author: He Andy
reviews_detailed.text: It’s really good restaurant. The vibe is great. I think that could be celebration or YEP place. The dish is tasty. There is a parking lot for customer.
not bad

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel Hsu
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious food

reviews_detailed.author: Shang-Wei Kuo (KSW)
reviews_detailed.text: My boss treated me and my colleagues to a meal here. It was decent, nothing special. The decor was a bit dated, but the food was pretty good. There's a multi-level parking garage nearby, so parking is convenient.

reviews_detailed.author: 謝玉枝
reviews_detailed.text: "The signature steamed grouper immediately caught everyone's attention as soon as it was served. The fish body was crystal clear, and the aroma was overflowing after being poured with hot oil. The fish meat was tender and smooth, with a firm texture and a hint of sweetness. Combined with the fragrant scallions, ginger and soy sauce, it fully demonstrates the essence of Cantonese cuisine: "clear but not bland, fresh but not greasy." This dish is not only a feast for the taste buds, but also a must-order dish at the banquet, which symbolizes good luck." "The shrimp dumplings are crystal clear and the shrimp are chewy; the siu mai are plump and solid, with fragrant meat and fresh shrimp; the radish cake is crispy on the outside and tender on the inside, with a savory and fragrant aftertaste. These three classic Cantonese dim sum, every bite is authentic and satisfying!" With such a high level of ingredients and environment, the price is super value and it is very suitable for family gatherings or entertaining friends!

name: IKEA瑞典餐廳 內湖店
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區舊宗路一段128號
reviews:
————-肋眼牛排佐奶油芥末醬—————
牛排滿嫩的，原本吃牛排都只撒鹽不習慣沾醬的我，這個醬意外的蠻搭的（因為發現時醬已經在牛排上了🤣🤣）
————-蜂蜜醬烤豬肋排佐雙色地瓜—————
中規中矩，不柴好吃，有碎骨，吃的時候要注意⚠️
————-雞翅—————
每次來必點🥴😍
————-鱈魚條—————
每次來地點🥴😍

兩個大菜是因為生日優惠主餐第二份半價才點點看（優惠最大化嘛😆）
心中第一名是「雞肉丸」😆😆😍😍😍😍😍😍

樓下的自助外帶美食小站，冰淇淋$20的雪花鹽巴冰可以，那個雞肉丸超級垃圾

那個肉桂捲，越難吃吃起來很像保麗龍
真的是小人國吃了瑞典人真的吃這麼小的嗎？
逛得很累，想直接選的直接衝到後階段，自然有燈具區，各種區，前面有擺設的都在後面…

reviews_detailed.author: N Z
reviews_detailed.text: For the New Year, IKEA Restaurant offered two discounted combo sets. We chose the combo that included a beef steak, half a chicken, and Swedish meatballs. In my opinion, it tasted good!

reviews_detailed.author: Doreen Leong
reviews_detailed.text: I often go to Ikea Xingchuang for food and shopping. Today I decided to visit Ikea Neihu. Roast beef was the weekend specialty so we ordered - NT$269 for 150gm. Unfortunately almost half the portion was dried and not edible. It was disappointing.

reviews_detailed.author: LINN HTUN ONE
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious food worth savoring — no need to rush your mealtime. Just be prepared for line up during public holidays.

reviews_detailed.author: Ben Johnson
reviews_detailed.text: I usually go there to get furniture and home appliances! They offer variety of stuff which cost you less compared to other malls! The food was pretty average and to be honest, the chicken tastes like tyre! I like the meatballs and gravy 😋! Wish they could rearrange the menu to something far better than the current menu! Staff look emotionless and working like robots! No smile, a serious face with permanent frown something like this ---> 😐

reviews_detailed.author: Ana Calderon Solis
reviews_detailed.text:
IKEA’s food is always a safe option when you don’t know what else to eat. I used to order the plant based balls but now they changed the mash potatoes for pasta (only for the vegetarian option) and that’s something is a NO for me (I want mashed potatoes).
I recommend to go around 2pm, otherwise the place will be totally packed.

name: 巷上食璞川菜客家菜
formatted_address: 114台灣臺北市內湖區瑞光路513巷22弄15號
reviews: 菜色好吃，服務親切，環境舒適！豆苗好好吃！豆腐軟嫩香味夠
2025年08月 要不是有人熟門熟路，我還不知道瑞光路有這麼好吃的餐廳，各種菜色都有一定的水准，直的是好吃，值得推薦前來品嚐。
感受的到主廚用心創新的料理，美味可口。

reviews_detailed.author: Paul T
reviews_detailed.text: Great food shared with everyone. A banquet with Hakka and Sichuan flavors, dish after dish , they were very tasty! We enjoyed it very much!

reviews_detailed.author: Sacha Holland
reviews_detailed.text: Been here a couple of times and it's really very good. Not a fan of the cold hors d'oeurves at any restaurant, but the small fish and cucumbers with fish (apparently flying fish eggs) are ok. They had strange, tiny bread bowl with chicken filling. You can leave the "bread". Everything else is pretty much amazing. Soft shell crab, fish in lemon grass sauce, chicken soup. The broths were soooo tasty. Not as spicy as I've heard for this region, but just about right for me.

reviews_detailed.author: Jimmy Jih
reviews_detailed.text: Strongly recommend this unique twist of Haka and Sishuan food! The service was solid and the staff pleasant to speak with.  Would recommend getting the tofu. It goes amazingly well with rice. Their blanched chicken with tangy citrus dipping sauce I'd also recommend.  Take a look at the pictures I've posted! You can't go wrong with the selection.  Go with a small family to try more dishes.

reviews_detailed.author: Leroy Chen
reviews_detailed.text: I have been visited this restaurant since year 2009 and keep coming back. This place is definitely a highly recommended restaurant to whom like spicy and hot meals.

reviews_detailed.author: DANNY LIN
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent Hakka style food especially love the vermicelli with taro soup. Best ever and free refills too.

name: 大嗑西式餐館
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區濟南路二段18-3號
reviews:
服務的夥伴非常的用心又real
沒有跌倒真的是太好了！

因為我不是一個味蕾很纖細的人，所以非常欣賞這家店的調味搭配，帶去吃飯的朋友本來不愛吃沙拉的都開開心心的吃了一大半，鴨胸跟牛排都烹調的恰到好處，醬汁搭配更是解膩且爽口，每一個料理都讓大家讚不絕口！

有幸跟朋友一起來吃，大家點不一樣的東西來讓我今天可以品嚐到不同的料理～

今日有品嚐到的餐點：

鴨胸：軟嫩好吃，搭配的醬料十分爽口

牛排：五分熟 熟度剛剛好，吃了一小塊很快樂

培根奶油義大利麵：培根是煙燻的厚培根，香氣有出來整個吃起來很快樂（但不是我點的）

墨魚飯：鮮味十足，整體調味非常的融合，雖然我吃不出來有什麼但是吃的很快樂，搭配的兩個干貝也是外脆內甜

反正超推，超喜歡，未來有機會會再帶朋友去吃

🔸炸雞翅：
外皮薄且酥，吃下去才發現是包餡雞翅！從來沒吃過，超級特別🤩而且可以單支單支點餐，我覺得很友善，這樣就可以點多一點菜了。
🔸油封鴨腿：
這是今天的特別開胃菜。那個皮超級恰，有夠讚，配上甜甜的醬汁實在很搭，配菜的馬鈴薯也很好吃。
🔸墨魚干貝燉飯：
干貝透抽好吃，調味適中，份量不多兩個人分食我覺得很剛好。是帶點硬度的米粒，但又跟我過往吃的有米芯的燉飯不太一樣，不知道是不是用的米品種不同，但我覺得整體不驚艷。
🔸威靈頓牛排 8oz：
這次有先提前預訂一份8oz的牛排，這是我第一次嘗試威靈頓牛排。外層的酥皮烤到非常酥，再往內一層抹了滿滿的蕈菇醬，味道十分濃厚（個人覺得太濃了），牛排的部分是很漂亮的粉紅色，不過威靈頓牛排不知道是不是本來就不使用太多油脂的部位？我自己吃起來覺得雖然軟嫩卻較沒有油脂香氣，可能比較不適合我。

店家有一樓跟地下室，這次被安排到的位置是一樓，氣氛的部分就普普通通。服務人員都很積極。餐點部分感覺就是餐酒館的水準，主角的威靈頓牛排在台北感覺沒有很好找，所以很開心這次能夠在大嗑擁有第一次的體驗，非常新奇！
但要更講究氣氛的話，我覺得應該能找到更有情調的類似餐廳。

招牌炸雞翅 - 點之前還以為醬汁是裹在外面或是另外裝的，結果令人意外的是包餡雞翅。雞翅外皮炸的比較酥脆，裡面很嫩還保有肉汁，中翅的部分已經去骨了。包著滿滿的蒜味卡士達醬，吃起來非常滿足非常罪惡，搭配起來十分恰當，但又不會太膩，不愧為招牌。
薯泥 - 算是非常綿密帶有奶香的薯泥，很好吃。
墨魚燉飯佐干貝 - 干貝又大又新鮮，吃起來很棒。燉飯的米粒口感很特別，米粒比較大，有點像是米心沒煮透的嚼勁，但是卻沒有生硬的感覺，應該是比較特別的米。醬汁調配的比較稀一些，不過味道很充足也有帶著滿滿的鮮味，不過個人更偏好濃稠一些的醬汁。
油封鴨腿 - 店員有強調這道份量比較少，算是開胃菜，不過實際上蠻大的。鴨腿本身非常好吃，外皮酥脆，吃起來很油很爽，鴨肉本身卻很嫩而且多汁，完全不會乾柴，處理的非常棒。搭配應該是洋蔥 + 巴薩米克的醬汁很解膩。
威靈頓牛排 - 今晚的重頭戲，切開之前會很貼心的上來給我們拍照，視覺上已經覺得很滿足了。第一次吃威靈頓牛排，吃起來算是接近自己想象中的味道。菲力牛排本身油脂不算多，但嫩度跟肉汁烤的剛剛好不會乾柴。中間的菌菇味道很明顯，不過和整體的味道是很搭配的。外層的酥皮比較薄，存在感不算高，但口感和香味還是對整道菜加分不少。算是很神奇的一道菜，每個部分看似各司其職，但是搭配起來還是很巧妙。
餐廳的氛圍還有服務也都很不錯，是一家很棒的餐廳。感謝店家細心的提供蛋糕擺盤，還協助拍照。也謝謝女友招待令人難忘的生日大餐。

reviews_detailed.author: Charles L
reviews_detailed.text:
Perhaps one of the best cooked duck I've ever had!
This place is a hidden gem.
I appreciate when dishes take 30mins to cook, it really shows that they aren't cutting any corners by pre-cooking anything.

reviews_detailed.author: Mark Ong
reviews_detailed.text: I am very glad I found this diamond. One of the best meal I had for my trip. I kicked myself for ordering a 10USD pumpkin soup but I am very delighted from the end result. Multiple layer of goodness could be felt across each spoonful of goodness. You first felt the creaminess then the sweetness of the pumpkin. Aroma oil of shallots kicks in following the savoury crisp of croutons accompanied with almonds slices favour. All in one go. As if your taste buds took the elevator. Sea urchin risotto is not my favourite as it's not full of favours. Although the scallops are very fresh. Everything was great. The chef is of skill.  Definitely on my return list.

reviews_detailed.author: Giovanni
reviews_detailed.text: Incredible french cuisine, the chef's work is so close to a French cooking chef. Everything was delicious, we got mushrooms salad that was perfectly dressed, a tasteful rib-eye and a wellington cooked to perfection. The staff is super prepared and kind, very efficient. Wellington has to be ordered in advance.

reviews_detailed.author: iris y
reviews_detailed.text: Been eyeing this place for a while now but never found the time to make reservations. Came with my parents and they both were extremely satisfied with the food. All the meats were cooked to perfection. Though I regret not getting my moms beef cheeks cuz they were so tender and the mash tasted like butter! Lamb risotto was pretty good and the lamb to my surprise wasn’t dry at all. The salads were definitely their must tries. Loved the warm salad!!!! Definitely my favourite dish of all I tasted. Will be back to try out the desserts next! P.s. there’s a max 1.5 hr dining time. Might not be ideal for dates

reviews_detailed.author: Jonathan Niu
reviews_detailed.text: Ambience and food presentation were quite good.  Expected a bit more from the truffle dish as it looked amazing but the truffle shavings were quite light in aroma and flavor.  The risotto itself was quite nice as the rice still maintained a bite, which I've found to be more rare in Taipei. Uni risotto with scallops was quite good, although it's quite strong in flavor.  I've seen a lot of people recommending the chicken wings, but tbh didn't really enjoy them that well, couldn't quite place what kind of sauce it was but didn't enjoy it. Fries were OK.  Quiche salad was not bad but would probably not order without the +appetizer meal option.

name: 晴天廚房
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區寧波東街11-2號
reviews:
餐點現做很美味！點了唐揚雞咖哩，4大塊的唐揚雞非常飽足、咖哩中含豐富蔬菜；老闆說定食配菜可免費加，但初次附上的配菜份量十足很夠了～炸干貝讚！加購壽星餐有千層蛋糕和茶凍，餐點好吃，用餐愉快～

平日中午用餐時間二樓滿座，慶幸有提早訂位！
看展後來覓食，無意間搜尋到的溫馨小店！唐揚雞咖哩份量非常多，第一次看到這麼大塊的唐揚雞，咖喱是蔬菜咖喱，口感溫潤非常有飽足感！豬排蠻軟嫩多汁。

氛圍溫馨，店面不大但位置寬敞舒適
本來進店前想吃個甜點就好，結果點了大全餐😂
甜點套餐：鮮奶的茶香與奶香平衡得剛剛好；巧克力千層的內餡濃郁又不甜膩，非常推薦！
正餐選了馬告豬排與現烤花魚，豬排對牙口不好的人來說要花點力氣咬，但馬告特別的類胡椒香氣和微微的酸香非常開胃，也讓豬排不容易吃膩；花魚肉質軟嫩，可以趁熱配白飯與小菜，讓肉汁與油香和飯菜完美融合👍
小菜也很美味，不會過鹹，十分下飯
味噌湯鹹中有微微的甜味，入口醇厚
有糖紅茶有茶香但不會回苦
整體而言很推薦，下次會回訪來試試隔壁桌推薦的咖哩與章魚燒！

reviews_detailed.author: C Cc
reviews_detailed.text: ​This is easily a top 5 curry in Taipei (in my opinion)! If you're near the Chiang Kai-shek Memorial Hall, you absolutely must try it! The beef is incredibly tender—it melts in your mouth with every bite. Just thinking about it makes me hungry! 🤤😍

reviews_detailed.author: gloria djap
reviews_detailed.text: Found this place near Chiang Kai Shek that has a good rating. The food was okay, but for the price, I don’t think it was really worth it. The waiting time was also a bit long. I ordered the curry set with soup and a drink. My food arrived after quite a while, but the soup only came when I was almost finished eating, and the drink never arrived until I checked out.

reviews_detailed.author: Kyle Rice
reviews_detailed.text: Great curry, very unique flavor (different from most curry places in Taipei, with a lot of customization options), and good portion size for the price. I got the lunch special for 250 NTD; it was definitely worth the price.

reviews_detailed.author: Jin Jun
reviews_detailed.text: Cozy place with pretty good food. Staff is very friendly. I already mixed the curry before taking the photo so it looks messy but presentation had no problems.

reviews_detailed.author: Florence Tay
reviews_detailed.text: Came here for lunch after visiting 中正纪念堂.  We have three kids age 5, 8, 10. There’s a minimum spend of $100 per person but as long as three kids combine $300 is good enough. So we order curry pork rice, curry prawn rice, kids set tomato pasta, fries - it’s sufficient for us. Recommend to make reservation because it’s full after 12pm.

name: 蘇杭餐廳 濟南店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區濟南路一段2-1號
reviews:
總結一句，好喜歡！！
有時候吃江浙菜、上海菜時，會讓我覺得比較膩，但這次蘇杭餐廳給我的體驗沒有上述問題，讓我們吃得很開心✨️

📍店內環境
店內環境不算非常大，但位置不少，也有包廂。整體乾淨舒適，體驗感很好～

📍餐點
菜太多了，先來說說讓我印象深刻的幾道好了。第一個是醃篤鮮，上回吃了台北到一家上海菜，那是我吃過最死鹹、油膩的版本了。正好這次來洗洗口味，蘇杭餐廳的醃篤鮮，味道足，但又不會膩，讓我連喝了好幾碗。再者，紅油羊肚絲我也很愛，不辣，但有點麻。它的味道有點像口水雞，酸味明顯，很順口✨️
東坡肉這次我們點了瘦的版本（應家中長輩要求），所以沒那麼軟，但整體味道非常好，好愛❤️
肴肉也不錯，很好吃～
我們還點了上海菜飯、酒釀湯圓（偏甜）……（其餘我忘了）

每一道都好吃，有機會會再來拜訪✨️

好吃的店，
今天除了烏蔘吃起來很像微波加熱的口味，其他點的菜色都很不錯。
推薦東坡肉，蝦鬆，蒸餃。

自1984年超過40年，2018年起連續三年獲得《台北米其林指南》推薦，《蘇杭餐廳》
蔥油餅、東坡肉、醃篤鮮等經典上海點心一網打盡。
餐廳裝潢走中式典雅風格，想要安靜的也有獨立包廂可提前預約。很適合慶生聚會。

外皮煎得金黃酥脆的蔥油餅，焦香與麵香交錯，餅皮層次分明。

招牌必點菜色東坡肉，醬色十足，肥瘦交錯的五花肉燉得入味又軟爛，甜鹹比例拿捏得宜沒有過分的油膩感。

看似清淡的娃娃菜吸飽雞湯與火腿鹹香，整體味道非常細膩，鮮甜有層次。

帶有奶白色澤由火腿與雞骨熬出來的醃篤鮮喝得到淡淡鹹香與筍片的爽脆，是經典的江浙菜色。

菜色精緻、份量足、用料實在，好吃又經濟。

一樓是小桌適合三五好友，二樓有大圓桌及包廂的空間。

隔壁有付費停車場，半小時#50

reviews_detailed.author: Gustavo Orellana
reviews_detailed.text:
Su Hung is a Taiwanese restaurant with multiple Michelin stars, and you can definitely taste the quality in their dishes. Everything we tried was very flavorful and well executed.
That said, two dishes completely stole the show: the Taiwanese burger and the sweet and sour fish. Both were absolutely amazing, perfectly balanced, rich in flavor, and truly memorable. Honestly, I would come back just for those two.
A fantastic place for high-quality Taiwanese cuisine and definitely worth visiting.

reviews_detailed.author: Bernie
reviews_detailed.text: A close friend, James Hsu took us to an incredible dinner at Su Hung Restaurant, which has been recognized as a Michelin Restaurant for three years. The quality and presentation of the food were impressive, and the flavors truly delighted us. However, the portion sizes were a bit smaller than what the price suggested, making it feel a bit pricey for the quality. This place is quite popular in Taipei, and securing a reservation can take several months. They offer two dining options: a casual setting on the ground floor and a more elegant fine dining experience upstairs. Keep in mind, there’s no free parking available, so finding a spot can be a bit challenging.

reviews_detailed.author: A.P. Li
reviews_detailed.text: Its said they send their chef's back to Shanghai every year to learn and train more, so the menu is always changing and developing. They do every dish properly and right. It may not be "an abundance" of food, but every bite left me satisfied and content. Just make sure you have a reservation, because you might not otherwise be able to partake.

reviews_detailed.author: F1 Racer
reviews_detailed.text: they have some good dishes, overall taste is okay,  but if you factor in prices, it's just average. This restaurant was Michelin guide listed, not to be confused with Michelin one star, but are charging Michelin 1 star inflated prices. The taste for the sweet and sour ribs is excellent, however the portion of the ribs were poor compare to what they charged.  I counted about a total of 10 pieces, because ribs are mostly just bone, You're not getting much meat. The steam buns were good, nothing to complain about, but not wow.  The Sichuan dish has good taste, but lacked peppercorn which is traditional and customary in authentic Sichuan cuisine, giving it the numbing spiciness but otherwise it's fine. Again good enough but lacks a wow factor. The Daikon pastry stuffing did not impress, it was too little, and too bland, it was wrapped mostly by flour dough. Customer service was also not up to not only the price they charge but the fact that they're Michelin guide listed. they simply lack training, and the understanding of customer orientation, some of the staff seem to not want to be there, but only are because they have to be there. The staff lacked knowledge of their own dishes, and when questions were asked, the answer was a I don't know, leaving the customer not knowing what to do with that, what or how to continue to order. None of the staff was new, which says they don't have excuses not knowing their own menu, which is the primary job of a wait staff.  My dining experience could have been better by more attentive and knowledgeable staff.

reviews_detailed.author: 70times 7
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious Shanghai style food!  Service was terrible!  There were three attendances, one male and two female ones.  The younger waitress was extremely attentive and diligent.  The other two were very lazy.

name: 翡冷翠義式餐廳
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區漢口街一段15號1樓
reviews:
上菜速度蠻快. 收餐盤、加水速度也很好.
今日：
嫩煎沙朗青醬燉飯：口味與一般義式料理的青醬口味差不多. 未到很驚艷，沙朗稍微有一點點柴，如果再生一點也許會比較嫩. 但燉飯很不錯～是好吃的.
鮭魚親子奶香燉飯：頓飯奶味很香，很好吃.
鮮鱸魚雙蛋琴風馬鈴薯：海鮮部分-鱸魚還行，松露醬超重味. 如果會怕口味太強烈的，可能要思考一下.
阿瑪菲海岸香鮭親子爆魚卵：蠻好吃的，吃一口才發現會辣（不過…菜單上沒有寫😅）

整體上還不錯. 氛圍很熱鬧. 用餐年齡層也很廣.  可以當作一個用餐小聚的選擇.
義大利麵香氣十足  必點！附餐的沙拉很新鮮 蘑菇濃湯好喝不膩 餐廳環境氣氛、服務都超棒。路過多年終於進來品嚐 真的很滿意！

五顆星是因為可免費升級飲料！！因為是帶女友來約會，特別看評價才來的，但可能是自己做功課還是不夠仔細，所以感受上還滿失望的🥲女友對於味道都不太滿意，幸好那個升級的飲料是好喝的🥹

服務：有收服務費，所以基本的服務是可以的，收桌速度也滿快的（對我來說是好事），補水也都很快。

餐點：當天點的是雙人套餐，沙拉是蕃茄乳酪，吃起來滿普通的，前菜是蕈菇節瓜鮮蝦那個，整體來說偏油，炒起來的味道很台菜，感覺去熱炒店能以更便宜的價格吃到的程度。

主餐麵點了番茄培根乳酪筆管、明太子奶油干貝麵，主餐的味道都偏重鹹，剛開始的確會覺得很好吃，但到後面會需要配水吃，番茄的味道很新鮮，但真的油到很嚇人，女朋友到後面吃不完，因為真的太油了，值得誇獎的可能是培根滿大塊的；明太子那款相較下比較不油，但干貝的份量算滿少的，味道不錯，如果不介意干貝少量可以點這款。

甜點應該是檸檬磅蛋糕，甜到會糖尿病的程度，幸好甜點不大，不然真的吃不完⋯

氣氛：整體氣氛很不錯，可是廚房內場在播放台語歌，會讓人滿出戲的，畢竟菜已非義式。

reviews_detailed.author: Benjamin Shim (derpbenji)
reviews_detailed.text:
I’ve been here every single time I’m in taipei and I must say I have NEVER been disappointed. A criminally underrated Italian restaurant tucked away in a corner near Taipei Main Station lies one of the best experiences I have ever had.

To start off, the 2 person dinner set for TWD1480 is extremely worth it. It comes with two soups, one appetizer, one salad, two mains, two desserts and two drinks. I could never find value like this especially from where I’m from, where this would EASILY cost upwards of TWD3000.

Special mention to the Pesto Risotto which literally changed my life. I have never eaten risotto this good and I am seriously contemplating moving to Taiwan just to eat this more regularly.

Also, wonderful and excellent service from the staff here who are very attentive and extremely friendly.

Would I come again? I think the correct question to ask is how many more times am I coming back before I leave.

reviews_detailed.author: Lily Wang
reviews_detailed.text: The food was not so great for the price, we didn't finish our venetian style cauliflower ham. The taste of batter left something to be desired. The service was friendly and fast but they didn't provide knife for our steak. The ambiance of the place was nice. Over all it was a disappointing experience as  the food was a let down.

reviews_detailed.author: Ý Nguyễn
reviews_detailed.text: The food here is brillant. We would recommend everyone to try once for who want to try really Italian style foods. It’s super close to Taipei Main Station.

reviews_detailed.author: yingkai kong
reviews_detailed.text: Had a really pleasant dinner here! The food was flavorful and well-presented, and the portions were satisfying. Service was attentive without being intrusive. The ambience made it a great spot to chill and catch up with friends. Would definitely come back.

reviews_detailed.author: zlingyen
reviews_detailed.text: The dining experience was absolutely amazing.The service was excellent.The meals are delicious and fresh.It was a great value for money.In conclusion,I hope the restaurant keep their warm service and tasty dishes forever.

name: 龍門客棧餃子館 (林森店)
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區林森南路61巷19號
reviews:
這家是滷味店！！不是水餃店！是滷味店！！不是牛肉麵店！這家真的是滷味店！！其他品項真的不用點！（重要的事情先說三次☺）
這家龍門客棧也是很傳奇了，幾十年如一日的鐵皮屋+無招牌廢墟風外觀，連兩屆500碗推薦，平日晚上排了10多分鐘，有人說是「被水餃耽誤的滷味店」，這個說法真的想太多了，因為以水餃這種悲劇的水準，是如何耽誤滷味？？
水餃從外皮到內餡都是完全軟爛、糊成一團，這次點牛肉湯餃，泡在牛肉湯裡還破了好幾顆，說好聽一點是入口即化，難聽一點就是毫無口感、化成一鍋肉湯，只能給2顆星評價。
不過滷味是真的強，外帶切了牛肚、豆皮、豆干、米血糕、滷蛋一顆，這樣240元滿滿一大盒，除了豆干和豆皮鹹了點外，其他調味都很棒，尤其牛肚必點，沾店家附的辣渣也很好吃，我給4星評分，與水餃平均後綜合評分3顆星不能再多了！

大名鼎鼎的店，人聲鼎沸，所以用餐時間需要等一下
牛肉麵湯頭是重口的但不會過鹹，牛肉量很多也很大塊，以這個價位170元來說很超值，美中不足的是使用的是粗圓拉麵，感覺吸附湯汁的能力不足，麵體沒有很Q。

小菜切的很豪邁，只是好像沒有明顯的價位標示，所以點餐時要注意一下。

店家的辣椒油不會太辣且很香，值得推薦

再訪指數：84

入內用餐需要現在外面點餐
點完會有人安排座位

牛肉麵大碗很多麵條，牛肉是涼的
湯沒有很燙，看起來很像很辣但不會辣
小孩也可以吃
小菜豬頭皮有膠質、雞翅肉軟嫩好吃
配上她們辣椒醬很香
是傳統牛肉麵味
店內建築古色古香
有一番風味

reviews_detailed.author: Nikireview
reviews_detailed.text:
Ordered the dumplings and the luwei, both were amazing! The luwei was especially good and definitely worth the wait (we queued for around 20 minutes).

For the luwei, I recommend getting the 豆皮,豆干, and their meat selection. The ayi can portion it out for you, just let her know how many people are in your group.

As for the dumplings, they were served piping hot and incredibly juicy inside! If you order them, I suggest eating them first before moving on to the other dishes, so the soup inside doesn’t get absorbed by the skin.

reviews_detailed.author: Justin Kan
reviews_detailed.text:
This unassuming place serves one of the best dumplings that I have ever had in Taiwan. The dumpling skin was thick, chewy and moist… and the meat in it was delicious. I would definitely come back here again for the dumplings.

There also seem to be many braised items available. I didn’t get to try them but I saw many customers ordering them. Will definitely want to come back here again to try them. But expect a long wait… but it’s really worth the wait.

reviews_detailed.author: Jiehan Chuang
reviews_detailed.text: I would give them five stars, it’s no.1 dumpling restaurant in my heart at Taipei. Their dishes and soup all tasted well and beef noodle also sweet and smooth, most impressive is that dumpling’s dough is thick and with chewy, stuffing still very juicy. If you come to Taiwan suggest you should come here to try it.

reviews_detailed.author: Lindaaa
reviews_detailed.text: This is family restaurant but look clean the taste is so good of the noodle and dumplings as well with the Taiwan beer. Recommended

reviews_detailed.author: Neil Yeh
reviews_detailed.text:
Best spots: Beef Noodles, $300 Lu-way, Pork Dumplings 10 pcs, Taiwan Beer 1 bottle

This is the best way to enjoy Provincial Taiwanese cuisine here.

name: 雙月食品社 濟南店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區濟南路一段7號1樓
reviews: 十一點半到，排了半個小時。排隊指示清晰，人多也不怕。愛恨椒芝麵真的很好吃，麻椒和芝麻香氣十足，麵條口感也很棒。干貝雞湯湯頭非常鮮甜，干貝超多。湯裡頭有三大塊雞肉，也有很多高麗菜，脆甜。吻仔魚飯超濃郁，滷肉飯的豬皮入口即化。兩個飯都是滿滿的油蔥香氣。沒有一樣不好吃，一定會再回來！

規矩很多。愛恨椒之麵還可，喜歡麻醬麵的人可考慮。雞湯還不錯。滷味很鹹，海帶很軟，菜市場麵攤的都還比較好吃。蚵仔不錯。松露麵蠻膩的。孩子吃了一直找水，店家沒提供水也沒賣水。這家店的口味真的鹹又重，建議至少可賣礦泉水，不然孩子快崩潰。
規矩超多，首先抽號碼牌，可理解。然後人要到才能進場，也理解。但人到了才讓我點餐，然後也不能先坐進去再點，還得現在外面機器點，然後陽光那麼大一直反光站在機台前根本無法好好閱讀菜單，一開始整個用餐心情就很煩躁了。用餐的氛圍跟process能否顧及一下。。。到底是為了要吃到什麼得帶著一家老小過那麼多關才能坐到位子上。以後不會再來了。

稍微排了一下隊伍，大約20分鐘
干貝燉雞腿湯$250
很多干貝，雞肉是Q的肉質很讚
湯超級好喝，滿滿的料和青菜
超愛!
紅燒金鮮鱸魚(少刺)$130
真的沒有什麼刺，很好入口，一下子就吃完了
雙月乾蚵$150
蚵仔大部分都很肥美，吃下去塞滿嘴巴
100%的滿足感
愛恨椒芝麵(請拌開)$80
這個麵是會讓我想要，現場買調理包回家煮的那種
我喜歡!
油飯$35
比較普通一點，配一下甜辣醬好吃一點

下一次我會想要點阿甘剝皮辣椒雞腿湯試試看
滷味，不知道為什麼看起來比較不吸引我
位子比較擁擠，但料理很實在!

reviews_detailed.author: Christopher Lee
reviews_detailed.text:
We threewent to the famous Xiaolongbao restaurant “G,” only to be turned away at the door.
They said they accept Google reservations only. Oh well…

There seemed to be a few empty tables inside, yet they were firm about seating reservation guests only. Perhaps it was for smoother operations, or simply out of fairness to those who had booked in advance. As travelers, we couldn’t know the full story — but the disappointment lingered.

With closing time approaching, we didn’t have the luxury of hesitation. I quickly checked the map and found another well-known spot not too far away. We naturally picked up our pace.

That’s how we ended up at Shuang Yue (雙月), a Michelin Bib Gourmand restaurant known for its excellent value.

The clam and chicken drumstick soup was clear yet deeply flavorful.
The chili chicken drumstick soup had a gentle heat that kept us reaching for another spoonful.
The braised sea bass was tender and delicate.
And the spicy sesame noodles struck the perfect balance between nuttiness and heat.
👍👍👍👍👍

Highly recommended — every single dish.

Looking back, not getting into “G” turned out to be a blessing in disguise.
We ended up having a truly wonderful meal at Shuang Yue.

Travel often rewards you in the most unexpected ways.

reviews_detailed.author: Joey Lu
reviews_detailed.text:
If you are looking for soul-warming Taiwanese comfort food, Moon Moon Food (Jinan Branch) is the place to be. We ordered a massive spread to try their signature items, and everything lived up to the hype.

The Highlights:
* Signature Clam & Chicken Leg Soup (蛤蜊燉雞腿湯): This is the star of the show for a reason. As you can see in the photos, they don't skimp on the portion size—the bowl is overflowing! The chicken leg meat was incredibly tender and chunky, and the addition of crisp mountain cabbage makes the broth naturally sweet and refreshing. The clams added a nice hit of umami without being overpowering.
* Fresh Oysters with Garlic Paste (蒜泥鮮蚵): These were impressive. The oysters were plump, huge, and tasted very fresh with zero fishiness. The simple dressing of soy paste, garlic, and green onions was all they needed. A must-order for seafood lovers.
* Braised Milkfish Belly (紅燒/滷虱目魚肚): The fish belly was cooked perfectly—silky fat that melts in your mouth and tender meat. It was savory and paired beautifully with the rice.
* Spicy Sesame Noodles (椒芝麵): These noodles had a great chew to them. The sauce was a rich, fragrant blend of sesame and a kick of spice (Sichuan pepper numbing sensation) that coated every strand.

The Sides & Staples:
* Braised Pork Rice (滷肉飯): A solid bowl of Lu Rou Fan. The pork was fatty and gelatinous (in the good way), creating that sticky, savory coating on the rice that defines a good version of this dish.
* Braised Assortment (Lu Wei): We tried the Braised Radish & Carrots which were stewed until soft and flavorful, soaking up all the braising liquid. The mixed platter with tofu skins, kelp, and braised egg was a great palate cleanser between the heavier meat dishes.

Verdict:
Despite the frequent queues, the turnover is fast and the food is consistently excellent. It feels like a home-cooked meal but elevated with high-quality ingredients and precision. Highly recommended for the chicken soup and fresh oysters alone!

reviews_detailed.author: Super Fragrance
reviews_detailed.text:
Ordered spicy sesame noodle, clam and chicken soup, braised tofu and tia pu la plus dou ge. All of $400.

Braised item and tofu was so so. Clam and chicken soup was a lot. Although some of the clam was empty. Chicken was tough not suprising but soup came with so much cabbage. It was mildly sweet and refreshing.

Spicy sesame noodle has the most unique taste. Very tasty and numbing. Addicitive. But it is kinda like a guilty pleasure because i feel that the texture is too dry. Even when coated with oil it is still too dry but the taste is too good.

reviews_detailed.author: Sharon Yap
reviews_detailed.text: Came here 2 nights in a row. Conveniently located a stone throw away from our hotel. The food here is really tasty and very well priced. My DD loves it and wants to come back again tomorrow! I highly recommend the pepper chilli chicken and pork soups, their flavour is simply unmatched.

reviews_detailed.author: Htway Htway Htut
reviews_detailed.text: Overall experience is nice. My fav must be their sea bass fish and oysters. Recommended 👍 dining time is limited and if you’re almost spending 50mins then they will come and remind you 😅 but their foods is nice and people are very crowded so…can understand about their limited dining time. If you want to taste good food,you can try this shop but if you want to chill and relax and not recommended because of their limited dining time 😊

name: 黃龍莊
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區牯嶺街43號
reviews:
已經是二訪黃龍莊了
第一次吃就覺得很驚艷
炒飯非常好吃👍
小籠包類也是很讚

雖然牛肉麵也是好吃
但是炒飯小籠包更好吃😋

今天點了雞湯 骨肉分離 湯頭好喝
有機會會三訪～～

菜色豐富、份量對女生來說很足夠(各點了一籠小籠湯包+湯+小菜，吃很飽)。
點了絲瓜蝦仁和鮮肉小籠湯包，喜歡口味重的推薦鮮肉。湯的份量意料外的豐富量多，青菜蛋花湯還加了番茄很喜歡，酸辣湯是偏酸的不辣。
整體調味都不會過重，覺得很不錯！
也會提醒小籠湯包要先吃不然會涼(真的涼很快！)
好吃的黃龍莊，小籠包跟燒賣都吃得出優雅鮮甜的內餡，元盅雞湯油而不膩，鹹鮮濃醇👍，炒波菜跟小菜也十分可口，炒飯粒粒分明，鍋氣添香😋。兩個人吃剛好1000左右，十分實惠。

reviews_detailed.author: C T
reviews_detailed.text:
We arrived just before 11am on a Saturday and it was pretty quiet, plenty of seats to choose from. Although after awhile it starts to get busy, so best to come here before 12.
We ordered their original soup dumplings (小籠湯包 $180NTD)and also their prawn and loofah dumplings (蝦仁絲瓜湯包 $260 NTD).
In general, I found the top part of the dumpling skin a bit too thick, and also the filling especially the meat from the original one breaks up really easily and not too smooth. The fillings are well seasoned. It's not the most expensive but also not the cheapest, $180 for 10 dumplings, I expect the quality to be a bit better.
The restaurant and toilet is clean, staff is friendly too.

reviews_detailed.author: Ameily
reviews_detailed.text: Had to wait in line for a bit on a Sunday early afternoon to get seated - the dumplings were great, NOT a big fan of the shrimp shumai - but the fried rice definitely beats DTF

reviews_detailed.author: Giang Tran
reviews_detailed.text:
We finally made it to this famous xiao long bao spot, and it was absolutely packed with customers! Despite the major crowd, the auntie working there was super helpful and managed to get us seated quickly, which we really appreciated. However, the food itself was a bit hit-or-miss for us. We tried both the crab meat and the pork xiao long bao.

Honestly, we found the overall flavor profile a bit lacking. The biggest disappointment was the crab meat xiao long bao; the filling had a strange, slightly sand-like texture that wasn't pleasant. The standard pork xiao long bao were just okay. Ultimately, while the service was fantastic, we concluded that perhaps the flavor here is a bit too local for our personal taste preferences.

reviews_detailed.author: akira yabe
reviews_detailed.text:
It’s good 小籠包and炒飯 casual shop
Taste is fantastic, staff are very friendly and price is reasonable.

If you want to enjoy nice 小籠包 in Taipei, we can come here

reviews_detailed.author: CR H
reviews_detailed.text: If you’re looking for authentic xiaolongbao and dumplings in Taipei, this place is a must-visit! The xiaolongbao have thin, delicate skin with rich, flavorful broth inside, and the dumplings are perfectly juicy. The quality is top-notch, making it a great spot for those who appreciate traditional flavors. Definitely worth a visit for an authentic local experience!

name: Petit France 小法國餐館
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區青島東路21-4號1樓
reviews:
隔壁桌的人問：「這是一家法國菜餐廳嗎？」
二訪心得：應可歸類為無菜單餐酒館，店內好多酒，大家喝很嗨。
也很適合慶生，訂位時先聲明，壽星會有畫盤蛋糕。
吃素或是不吃牛肉，都可以在訂餐的時候告知，都會有適切的安排。

入座由服務人員倒水，之後自取。
櫃檯有冷「玉米鬚茶」和溫「鮮果水」。空杯、餐巾紙、溼紙巾，也自取。

無菜單套餐870元，共11品，可以吃飽。服務費隨意。
入座先看茶單5選1，再先掃QR code決定主菜，由服務人員桌邊點餐。
接著服務人員在小盤子裡面注入熱水，紙毛巾蓬起來，讓客人擦手。

以下依照出餐順序：
（1）迎賓小點：1杯米果巧克力。（初訪遇到「香草冰淇淋+炭燒咖啡」，以小木匙進食，頗具風情）。

（2）烤的熱熱酥酥的「黑麥核桃起司歐包」，可沾榛果油。（初訪遇到的沾醬是優格起司醬）。

（3）松露洋菇派沙拉，現刨黑松露，爆「薏仁花」和爆「玉米花」增添口感。相當別緻，將薏仁爆開較少見。

（4）店家招待：焗烤田螺，可以麻油海苔包著吃。我覺得田螺的酒味好重。不知道為什麼招待，放眼望去似乎每桌都有。

（5）炙燒鴨肉鴨肝最中，底層有米飯。炙燒過程滿屋香氣四溢，太香了～～讓人好期待。整組真的相當別緻，調味均衡。唯一美中不足是「最中」不夠脆。（初訪遇到法式豬肉凍佐青醬，素食友人的是人參山藥番茄盅）

（6）炙燒大蝦搭配魚子醬菠菜，佐龍蝦醬汁。好大的蝦，很過癮的一道海味。（初訪遇到干貝酪梨塔搭魚子醬，素食友人則是香菇酪梨塔）

（7）湯品，預設為「牛肉湯」，湯底像羅宋，牛肉量不少。
友人不吃牛，更換為「牛肝菌菇濃湯」，像是牛肝菌打成小碎片，保有口感的濃稠湯品，香氣十足！（初訪遇到牛肝菌菇清湯）

（8）水蜜桃冰沙，轉換味蕾。（初訪遇到芭樂冰沙）

（9）主菜：我們選的是「香煎鬼頭刀」，份量約2至3片，檸檬口味的醬。佐烤紅蘿蔔、烤四季豆、烤櫛瓜、烤青龍椒。
（初訪時素食主菜是猴頭菇，佐烤紅蘿蔔、烤金針花、烤櫛瓜、烤青龍椒）

（10）入座時我們選的是「牛蒡茶」，服務人員說等沙漏的沙漏完再喝茶，實測沙漏1回合的時間不太夠、大約要兩個回合比較有牛蒡味。隨茶附的茶點是「各種豆」和「咖啡餅乾」。（初訪遇到的茶點是兩種餅乾）
（11）甜點是藍莓蛋糕，服務人員詢問是否噴點蘭姆酒？建議可噴，我這個不喝酒的沒感覺酒味，只有增添香氣。盤內佐寒天、麻糬、草莓粉、巧克力碎等。（初訪遇到的藍莓蛋糕有椰絲）

桌距窄，店內滿席有點吵。
店內有洗手間，但很難等，很急的話到隔壁善導寺站的洗手間。
需事先訂位，透過臉書粉專傳訊息或打電話。

😃付款方式：付現或數位支付Pi錢包。
營業時間：11：00-14：00 。18：00-21：00。
聊著聊著，不知不覺就從18:00坐到20:50，渾然不覺。

提供手寫紙本收據。

捷運善導寺站4號出口，走出站看向對面，就是「小法國」。

🍽 推薦菜色：脆皮豬腳（每日限量三份）、勃根地焗烤田螺與手捲、黑松露沙拉

📌 用餐體驗
小法國餐廳整體料理精緻且充滿創意，從前菜到主餐都能感受到主廚的巧思。這次點的無菜單料理套餐中最喜歡脆皮豬腳與黑松露沙拉，加點了焗烤田螺佐麻油海苔，表現非常出色。不過用餐的小空間中座位卻可坐滿近三十人，稍顯壓迫。

🔹 環境氛圍：
店內以歐風鄉村風為主調，燈光柔和、桌椅以木質為主，搭配巴黎照片與小擺飾，氣氛溫馨浪漫，但桌距過近、略顯吵雜。

🔹 服務品質：
服務人員態度親切，介紹餐點仔細，上菜節奏穩定，結帳櫃檯佈置也有濃濃法式可愛風格。

🔹 餐點風味：
烤脆皮豬腳外皮超脆、焦香、內裡軟嫩，油脂豐厚卻不膩。
焗烤田螺佐麻油海苔是台法融合的創意料理，以麻油香氣提味、海苔包裹焗烤田螺與起司，入口層次豐富、香氣濃郁。
黑松露沙拉層次感極佳，由多種不同食材組成，包含生菜、番茄、葡萄、米香與可食花點綴，並以現磨松露薄片與輕盈油醋提味，不但視覺上有美感又清新解膩。

🔹 性價比：
單點加價價位200～250元、套餐870元起，餐點水準與擺盤都很值得。

🚗 停車方便性：
周邊有停車格與停車場，但餐廳就位於捷運善導寺站出口，交通很方便。

三道前菜，蕃茄牛肉湯及，牛排五分熟，羊小排七分熟都不錯。
德國豬腳的皮太硬，我比較喜歡天母莎諾的豬腳。
洗手間只有一間，是蹲式馬桶及小便斗。對長輩不方便。

reviews_detailed.author: Cassity Holly
reviews_detailed.text: Full house even on a Wed night. Must have a reservation. For this price and no service charge, I cannot say any thing about food quality. They are decent, more homy style. Some food are like a quick pull together of outside snacks… like the chips, popcorns in the salad… cookies in the dessert…

reviews_detailed.author: K Chang
reviews_detailed.text:
Food is very tasty and portions are big, compared to the usual French cuisine. The style is not exactly French to me. More like mixed of western style since it used many local ingredients. For example, the tea served in the end is very Chinese. I’m surprised that no coffee and French dessert were served.
Btw, salmon Wellington was fantastic.

reviews_detailed.author: Michael Lee
reviews_detailed.text: Small shop with quality food served with passion. Little crowded space but big windows bring in outside neighborhood resembles relaxing French countryside atmosphere. Staffs are very dedicated and service with heart. Advanced reservation is recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Kelvin Lau
reviews_detailed.text: This is the restaurant that serves good quality of French dishes..Without menu provided on Sunday I came for lunch, I was asked to choose one of the  main course selections on a little menu sheet...The  ambience was great and cozy.  It costed me 800 dollars...Very enjoyable lunch.  Don't ever eat too much breads at the beginning...Leave your stomach a room for your main course. Duck breast was so tender, juicy and tastes great...Strongly recommend it.

reviews_detailed.author: Jonathan Wang
reviews_detailed.text: First time to this hard to book restaurant. The presentation is Michelin style, and food is good, I would call it a lower cost version of RAW or Logy. For 800 NT per set, you get way more than what you pay for.

name: 台北美味小館
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區林森南路61巷17號
reviews:
台北美味小館
真的是很美味
每一道菜都很好吃
是很厲害的小館子
消費也不高

獅子頭跟拳頭一樣大
而且內餡鮮嫩好吃
女生吃一顆就飽了
苦盡甘來是甜的苦瓜
一吃就很想配稀飯
金沙中卷像鹹酥雞
味道很高級的鹹酥雞
真的很適合聚餐
尤其喜歡中菜的
這間店必吃

#台北美味小館
#中正區美食

台大醫院附近

在龍門客棧旁邊的台北美味小館

招牌菜色 上海菜飯 、獅子頭砂鍋4顆 （巨無霸）

今天也是跟朋朋的一支會

日本福岡氣泡（Pinor 巨峰葡萄🍇混釀）
義大利米蘭氣泡
喬治亞橘酒（MyLOVE)（我的入坑之作）
西班牙#tempranillo
北義#barbera

葡萄酒友善餐廳 一桌$250 自備杯子
食物CP值很高！獅子頭真的很特別，週末人流不少，建議提早訂位！

reviews_detailed.author: StiMania
reviews_detailed.text: If, only if you don't care about service but simply wanted to have delicious "sand pot", It's IT. The hot pot like "Sand Pot" were so delicious and warm, especially there's only 10°- outside. We had meat ball and fish head one. So great to go with rice or Shanghai style veggie rice. Also had some stir fry dishes which were also good. Most of all, the price was so right which worthy of every penny. Guess will come back more to enjoy great "sand pot"

reviews_detailed.author: K Chang
reviews_detailed.text:
Both food and services are great. Casserole dishes are the specialty in this restaurant. House made sour Napa cabbages are used in the stews, instead of regular cabbages.
Kung-pao dishes are great. Fried tofu dishes are ordinary.

reviews_detailed.author: E
reviews_detailed.text: We came for the infamous gigantic meatball. It was great! The rice clay pot was good. Veggies were fresh. But the oysters were not fresh unfortunately.

reviews_detailed.author: お小賴
reviews_detailed.text: Not the same as it used to be, disappointed with most of the dishes, especially the lion head ( Taiwanese meat ball) hotpot. No complaint to the meat ball itself but I disliked the soup.

reviews_detailed.author: Jonathan Viatgé

name: Nola Kitchen 台北林森店(二號巷子口內、喜來登飯店後方)
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區林森南路2號
reviews: 一般食物普通，沒什麼驚艷點。扣分的是生蠔，6顆900元，上桌時一顆直接滑出來，先生用手接住，不然就直接落地了，店家當作啥事也沒有，拿了紙巾濕紙巾過來，好吧，我們真的自認倒楣就吃了，結果另外有一顆入口又有怪味，真是夠了...價格偏高，用餐體驗不佳、不符預期。

來登飯店後方巷子真是臥虎藏龍
走進去像是穿越到另一個味蕾的平行時空
這裡不只有必比登推薦的蔬食餐廳
還有一家風格迴異的紐奧良美式廚房
彷彿一秒把你從東方的巷弄
送到爵士樂與熱辣香料交織的美國南方
第一道端上來的是焦黑魚
魚香如夜海深沉 魚肉浸泡 cajun spices
Q彈帶著微微炭香 像海浪打在舌尖上
第二道是楓糖鬆餅炸雞
金黃外皮酥到輕咬 就會掉下小片
香脆楓糖的甜與炸雞的鹹
在口中跳著熱情探戈
中場蒜味番茄登場
濃郁蒜香中和炸物的油膩感
最後甜點是貝涅餅beignets
炸到蓬鬆的方形甜甜圈
撒滿糖粉 咬下一口像冬天的雪花瞬間融化嘴角
這一餐像是一趟跨越國界的味蕾旅行
原來在繁忙城市的縫隙間
隨時都可能藏著一場美味的冒險

炸雞鬆餅，淋醬是焦糖花生，很甜。炸雞皮很厚，太油
炸魚薯條，炸魚的裹粉很厚，所以也很油。薯條帶皮好吃
勒眼牛排，肥肉太多，1/4都是肥肉，無法入口
貝涅甜點，感覺是美式雙胞胎口感，沒有很愛
檸檬冰沙，很道地，酸度夠
服務人員很積極，開放式廚房油煙味太重
整體沒有很愛，可能點到太油膩的東西，外加油煙味真的是重中之重，無法再訪
生意很好，建議預約，喜歡高熱量的可以前往

reviews_detailed.author: Anna
reviews_detailed.text: Their food was absolutely delicious. I had chicken and waffles and tried their orange sunrise drink. It was a meal that I definitely enjoyed. The staff was very kind to assist me in getting my order.

reviews_detailed.author: Joyce Lim
reviews_detailed.text: Love this place. Great food and vibe. Not the cheapest - ntd1940 for 2 mains, 2 add-ons, 2 drinks, 1 dessert. Flat iron steak risotto -- tasted like rice in Chinese broth but so good. Steak was tasty and reasonably juicy too. Fish and chips was not bad, fried on the spot, love the thick and evenly cooked potato wedges. Add on salad and pork chop weren't big portions, but were well executed. Loved that the salad dressing was put on the side. Tie guan yin cocktail was creamy, sweet, floral, and had enough alcohol. Wheat ale was smooth. Tiramisu didn't taste authentic but was enjoyable, not a huge portion but just nice as an after dinner dessert. Restaurant played Jay Chou songs, familiar 2000s tunes. Service was adequate. Loved the vibe. We were seated near the door, couple of flying insects around us. Overall a pretty decent eatery for those who miss western food in Taiwan.

reviews_detailed.author: Sihan Goi
reviews_detailed.text:
Had dinner here with wife after a disappointing yet expensive lunch at Jiufen. Wanted more meat and some beer near our hotel, so decided on this. It claims to be a Louisiana restaurant, but I'd say it's Louisiana inspired. It's like saying Olive Garden is an authentic Italian restaurant. It's enjoyable, but probably not authentic.

Had a Flatiron steak on risotto, a fish and chips with a side of pork chop and garden salad, I had a wheat ale which is 1 for 1 all day, and my wife had a tieguanyin cocktail. We enjoyed everything. The steak was tender, dinner medium rare, and the risotto was tasty as well, but let's not kid ourselves - it's more like mui fan than risotto. We enjoyed it though. Fish and chips was standard, can't really get that wrong. Pork chop and garden salad was also pretty good. I liked my wheat ale, which was kinda like Blue Moon. My wife loved her cocktail too. Service was OK, but they close quite early and had to send my 2nd beer before I finished my first.

reviews_detailed.author: Daren Chin
reviews_detailed.text: This was my first time checking out Nola's Kitchen, and the food did not disappoint. The fried chicken and waffles were a delight, and the gumbo was creamy and flavorful. I will come back and check out the rest of the menu.

reviews_detailed.author: JM
reviews_detailed.text: One of my favourite meals in Taipei! The chicken and waffles & jambalaya are really tasty. Particularly loved the fried chicken. Staff was really friendly and helpful as well

name: 台北東一排骨總店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區延平南路61號2樓
reviews:
下次點油豆腐跟滷蛋看看

排骨飯 雞腿飯各190（2026/3月）
幸運的話，現炸出爐給五顆星
1. 滷肉飯超好吃，偏鹹的口味
2. 排骨醃漬入味，雞腿是外皮調味而已
雞腿肉比較多
3. 例湯有料好喝
4. 環境漂亮、冷氣很強
5. 座位很多
吃了N年的老店，不變的味道，不變的裝潢，不變的氛圍，不變的服務，始終如一的親切。今天午餐時刻剛好走到中山堂附近，遂毫不猶豫地就來到東一尋找懷念的味道。中午時刻店裡已經客滿9成，點完餐付了錢找好位子，不到2分鐘服務人員就將餐點送達速度真是飛快。今天吃的是炸雞腿和炸魚排（皆190元），味道依舊讓人讚賞。櫃檯接待客人點餐及收費的女士（老闆？）待客親切，見到老客人立刻打招呼問候，讓人足甘心。

裝潢主打一個懷舊，算夜總會風。然而這不是噱頭，餐點本身並不含糊。

我點了招牌的排骨飯加滷蛋，排骨不錯吃，但我不太喜歡他麵皮就是了，配菜燉的夠軟，飯上還有淋肉燥，超讚。湯還ok。

算是值得推薦的名店了。

reviews_detailed.author: Tita Pizza
reviews_detailed.text:
The pork chop tasted authentic and flavorful — just note that it’s on the oily side, which is typical of traditional Taiwanese-style pork chops. If you’re not used to that, it might feel a bit heavy, but it’s true to how it’s meant to be cooked

We got the pork chop noodles and chicken leg rice -- total of NTD 360 for 2 dishes

The place itself is very charming. It feels like stepping into a restaurant from a 1980s movie, with that nostalgic, old-school atmosphere.

It was also packed with locals, and we seemed to be the only tourists. When we asked for an English menu, the staff were warm and accommodating; they even had a server walk us through it at our table. Really appreciated the hospitality :)

reviews_detailed.author: Vee Tom
reviews_detailed.text: 10/10 this was amazing. will be back whenever i’m in Taipei. pork is perfectly crispy and peppery. the dry noodles with pork chop is my favourite. super casual atmosphere that adds to the beautiful flavour of the food

reviews_detailed.author: Amanda Li
reviews_detailed.text: Made it there for dinner 10 min before their closing time, the old lady took my order at the entrance and went to kitchen to prepare the food before I even had the chance to pay. Not surprised that the hot plate of food arrived at my table within minutes of me sitting down. She showed me where the utensils were under the table, and politely smiled and wished me to enjoy my meal. I really love the courteousness I've experienced in Taiwan, such a contrast to the attitudes we get in America.  I ordered their famed pork chop rice combo, and it certainly met my expectations of what Taiwanese pork chop should taste like. The meat was still on the bone, thick slaved, fried in a crispy batter and flavored.
