The accompanying braised pork rice, veggies, pickles and ginger slices all created a wonderful flavor combination along with the pork chop. Even the bowl of bamboo shoots soup was well prepared. I had to finish eating my meal quickly since everyone was packing up for closing time. But I enjoyed every rushed bite and savored it as long as I reasonably could. May try to come back for another meal before heading back to USA later this week, because I certainly won't get a meal like this back in Seattle !!

reviews_detailed.author: Benedict Isles
reviews_detailed.text:
Dong Yi Porkchop is your authentic Taiwanese pork chop. The facade and interiors look like a scene straight from a Chinese martial arts action film, with an old Auntie manning the front desk.

Overall, super love the food! They were very affordable too. The crew was helpful, even though we were kinda lost in translation, they made extra effort to serve.

reviews_detailed.author: John Lim
reviews_detailed.text: Old school Taiwanese food with retro vibes. Food and drink are great, nostalgic food like banana boat is great. Although advanced in age, the servers are fast and accurate. Will return again 👍

name: 孫立人將軍官邸（陸軍聯誼廳）
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區南昌路一段136號
reviews:
在台北市算是老餐廳，以前的陸軍聯誼活動廳，孫立人將軍的官邸目前餐廳除了合菜也有套餐。

本身餐廳內部也有大概20個左右的車位，用餐可以直接開進去停車，室內還有留下以前的孫立人將軍的個人資料，餐廳空間可以平常家庭聚餐或者是結婚宴客。

本次點了合菜，基本上沒有太大問題，招牌菜（東坡肉燒餅）真的不錯，尤其是燒餅乾吃還有奶香味，前菜冷盤滷牛肉也非常道地，最後甜點（蘋果豆沙包）外觀如同蘋果一樣內餡豆沙甜而不膩更是特別，其餘菜色部分算是普通。

桌邊外場服務人員，沒話說親切，隨時都會注意送餐時間及桌邊整理服務。

餐點（清蒸鮮魚）送上來，結果發現一整隻魚肉內部沒有蒸熟裡面完全沒有熟，跟小姐反應結果是今天料理的廚師是臨時過來幫忙的所以沒有注意到，對於一間老字號餐廳，這真的有點誇張，最後把魚拿回去回蒸，再回頭送上，另外補償兩道小盤的宮保雞丁跟蜜汁排骨。

不在乎有沒有補償但是發生這種情況，也未見餐廳主管過來說明，僅請服務小姐告知，只能說有即時發現，不然清蒸變成生魚片吃到拉肚子就好笑了。

建議日後各位上菜後還是再檢查一下吧！

過年初二來吃，菜品與平日不同，故僅作為過年菜色之參考。
整體來說唯一有亮點的就是官邸東坡肉，其他菜色都偏普通，其中海鮮不太及格，有一道菜全是冷凍蝦肉和蟹管肉和冷凍干貝，蒸魚的部分不能說不新鮮，但也不能說新鮮，用偏重的米酒醃過。
不過環境不錯，服務非常迅速態度也很好！
雖然沒有平日來過，但看過一些網路評價以及朋友推薦，所以可能還是平日來吃比較適合
他們家的紹興東坡肉是過去將軍桌宴上的經典菜色，燉煮入味且軟而不膩的東坡肉是搭配燒餅一起夾著吃，香酥燒餅和軟嫩東坡肉一起吃真的Amazing! 大推👍👍👍其他菜色也很精緻好吃。

reviews_detailed.author: Johnny Hsu
reviews_detailed.text: Honestly, it’s so lucky that we have a chance to have lunch in this such historic place, and it maintains very well. On the other hand, foods are average level.

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel
reviews_detailed.text:
Food was ok 👌 location is beautiful and very difficult to book a table. I found this place a little bit overpriced hence for the food only 4 stars.

Overall: 4.5 stars

reviews_detailed.author: Families LC
reviews_detailed.text: I thought I was at a southern cozy home with families, not hustling Tpe city. Be sure to enjoy its garden for guests.

reviews_detailed.author: Kate Shao
reviews_detailed.text: Good and unique place for wedding in Taipei! It's convenient (near to MRT 中正紀念堂 station). Japanese style house was beautiful. Staffs and service were friendly. Chinese cuisine was nice, especially the chicken soup and pudding. Had a awesome and wonderful wedding experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Vivian S.
reviews_detailed.text: It's a tranquil restored japanese house that used to be the place for soldiers to meet their future wives back in the day. The japanese garden is nicely maintained (probably not to japanese standards but still pretty). The koi pond is filled with beautiful large and small koi fish. The green house houses a Chinese restaurant with slightly higher end prices where you can dine with greenery all around you. We opted for the bookstore tea house where there's a minimum order of 2 drinks. For lunch there's a sashimi set and japanese steak set that includes dessert and a drink for 780. For the afternoon tea you have a light meal of udon soup or creamy Japanese style udon and some other dishes with a coffee/black tea for 350. An espresso is 120 and coffee is normally 150. Food is alright but it's quite nice to dine next to the japanese doors next to all the greenery. You can reserve a tatami room if you have a larger groupm Credit cards accepted.

name: 雙月食品社 青島店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區青島東路6之2號
reviews:
我今天特地和老公從桃園而來，中午11:50抵達，店內已客滿，門口有10多位客人在候位！我們大約等了25分鐘，就入座。（突然想到，如果下雨天 在外面排隊就辛苦了🤣🤣🤣）。

今天點了愛恨椒芝麵、油飯、阿甘剝皮辣椒雞腿湯、狠切豆干、月亮骨肉。合計內用 消費420元。外帶富士吻仔山拌飯、黑松露扮麵，合計164元。

今天點的餐每項我都很喜歡很滿足，用餐座位雖然很窄，可是座位下有置物籃 是很貼心周全。服務人員很厲害英文很強，國際化管理很不錯。

建議：客人還在用餐時，不宜急著收餐具，那給人有「趕客人的感覺」。我相信在店內用餐的客人，不會留在那聊天的，因為場地本身就不是聊天好場所。客人水準很高，用完餐，定會快閃的。

🍜 台北必比登的家常滋味｜雙月食品社
。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。
2018 年至 2025 年連續獲得 #米其林指南必比登推薦，
讓 雙月食品社 成為台北雞湯系美食中極具代表性的存在。
雖然現在已有多家分店，我仍選擇來到 #青島創始店。
營業前，店門口已聚集數十位等待的食客，
店員在門口忙著招呼、疏導排隊動線，
並協助客人使用 QR Code 點餐，還有當日活動的免費麵條登記。
時間一到開門，隊伍很快向前流動，
不到十分鐘，我便已入座點餐。
這樣的節奏，其實很像台北人的日常——
忙碌，但總能為一碗湯停下腳步。

🌶️ 阿甘剝皮辣椒雞腿湯
。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。
湯一端上桌，
整條剝皮辣椒沉在湯中。
咬下去時略帶脆度，
醃漬後的甘甜與青辣椒本身的辛辣同時釋放。
雞肉使用仿土雞腿，
肉質比一般肉雞緊實，
卻不像老土雞那樣纖維粗硬。
那種彈牙而不柴的口感，
正是許多人愛上這碗湯的原因。
雞皮略厚，帶著膠質，
長時間燉煮後讓湯頭浮出一層清亮油脂香。
高麗菜在湯底釋放甜味，
枸杞則像點點紅色星子漂浮其間。
喝下去時，
辣、甜、雞油香彼此交織。
忽然想起一句古詩：
「人間至味是清歡。」
—— 蘇軾
有時候最讓人記住的味道，
其實只是這樣一碗溫熱的湯。

🐚 蛤蜊燉雞腿湯
。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。
這碗湯更像是海與山的對話。
蛤蜊選用當日新鮮食材，
本身含有豐富的 琥珀酸，
這也是海鮮鮮味的重要來源。
當蛤蜊與雞腿一起燉煮時，
海的鹹鮮與雞湯的甘甜慢慢融合。
高麗菜依然是湯底的靈魂，
讓整體味道多了一層蔬菜的柔甜。
這碗湯的味道很乾淨。
像冬天晚餐桌上母親端出的第一碗湯。
沒有複雜調味，
卻讓人一口接一口。

🌶️ 愛恨椒芝麵
。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。
這道名字就很有戲。
愛與恨，辣與麻。
麵條選用較厚實的寬版麵條，
上桌時灑著細緻辣椒粉與蔥花。
攪拌後，
花椒的麻感先輕輕碰觸舌尖，
辣度慢慢浮現。
最後留下的，是濃郁的芝麻香氣。
那種層層疊疊的味道，
像城市生活的情緒。
辛辣、忙碌、疲憊，
最後仍被一點溫暖的香氣包覆。

🐟 富士吻仔山拌飯
。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。
對我來說，
它其實有點像一碗升級版貓飯。
最上層鋪滿細緻的吻仔魚，
魚身細小卻鮮甜，沒有腥味。
第二層是金黃油蔥酥。
酥香一碰熱飯就散發香氣。
最底層是粒粒分明的白米飯，
米粒之間已悄悄滲入蔥油香。
把整碗拌開後，
魚鮮、油蔥、米香一起湧出。
簡單，卻非常療癒。
就像小時候
把白飯、醬油、魚鬆拌在一起的那種幸福。

🦪 台北老店雙月乾蚵
。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。
蚵仔選用當日新鮮食材，
店內可依喜好選擇熟成度。
擺盤後淋上蒜泥醬，
底下鋪著清脆豆芽菜。
一口入口：
蚵仔的海味
蒜香的刺激
豆芽的爽脆
三種口感同時出現。
是很台灣、很家常的味道。

🍲 一碗湯的城市記憶
。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。。
像 雙月食品社 這樣的店，
其實很接近台灣飲食的核心。
不是華麗料理，
而是日常裡最耐吃的味道。
雞湯、拌飯、麵食、蚵仔。
每一道都像某段生活記憶——
加班後的一碗湯、
雨天的一碗麵、
或是旅行途中短暫的休息。
忽然想到 蘇軾 另一句話：
「且將新火試新茶，詩酒趁年華。」
有時候，
一頓飯不只是填飽肚子。
它其實是在提醒我們——
生活再忙，
也要記得坐下來，
好好喝一碗湯。

第一次來消費，排隊等待時外面服務員很細心看到我手拿著東西沒有地方可以放，還問我需不需要袋子可以拿給我裝，覺得貼心。儘管那時我尚未消費！
進去用餐時，位置有點小但服務員也貼心告知座位下有置物籃，服務讓人覺得滿意。

食物都很好吃、份量足夠、價格實惠，尤其湯品料多實在，會讓我再下次回訪！也讓我願意分享給別人～
是讓人愉快的吃飯體驗👍

reviews_detailed.author: Ariel
reviews_detailed.text: We arrived 10mins past it's opening time and waited for 30mins. The welcoming staff林韋樺was clear, efficient and helpful. The flow of ordering was fast. We ordered and paid before being seated so once we sat down, food arrived. Ms 葉宣岑was detail-minded in making sure our orders have completely arrived. Even though the wait was long, the fact that food was great bang for buck made it worthy. We enjoyed the dry noodles, chicken soup and oysters. The mesona and black fungus drink was surprisingly nice (not sweet). A little bonus is the pleasant fragrance in the washroom. The observed dining time is 20-30mins per table. Will come back but maybe arrive before it opens to minimize the waiting time in the queue.

reviews_detailed.author: Rachel Lee
reviews_detailed.text:
Good food and excellent service.
Brought my parents here for the signature chicken soup and the staff gave us some recommendations.
We didn't order the dried noodles and one of the staff asked us to try. She offer us the dish as a complimentary and it was really good! 10/10 would come back again!

reviews_detailed.author: 조영우
reviews_detailed.text:
Moon Moon Qingdao Branch.
I’m not exactly sure why, but although they seem to operate until 2 p.m., we were still accepted—so either they don’t really have a real break time, or they were just flexible. For reference, we arrived around 1:10 p.m. and entered after about 30 minutes of waiting.
While waiting, a young female staff member in front of the restaurant was incredibly kind and attentive, which immediately put us in a great mood.
The space is a bit small, but that’s pretty typical for Taiwanese restaurants, so we didn’t mind at all.
As for the food—everything was absolutely amazing. We ordered eight dishes, and the total came to around 600 TWD. Every single dollar was worth it.
Highly recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Pineko
reviews_detailed.text:
Moon Moon Food was such a lovely Michelin-recommended spot in Taiwan and definitely worth a visit 🌟🇹🇼 Expect to queue outside on the sidewalk according to time slots — we waited around 30 minutes to an hour ⏱️ Before entering, you place your order and pay, and once it’s your turn they call you inside. The shop is small, cute, and cozy, and they were playing Jay Chou songs the whole time which I absolutely loved 🎶💕

We ordered the signature set which includes all their popular dishes ⭐
The spicy and sesame noodles were a highlight — the texture was unique, super chewy and fun to eat 🍜✨ The sauce was rich and flavorful. The bowl is a bit small so I’d recommend getting one per person.
The chicken soup with clam was fragrant with a slight ocean aroma that helped balance everything out 🥣🌊
The boiled oyster was tasty though the oysters were a bit small for my taste 🦪
The fish was soft, mild, and nicely cooked 🐟

Overall, great flavors, memorable noodles, cute vibe, and worth the wait if you’re in the area ✔️😊

reviews_detailed.author: Minze Chien
reviews_detailed.text: A great gem that is well known! We came first time in August with my whole family. Everyone loves their foods. We also tried Uber Eats ordering from them in August. Absolutely love everything they have. This time is the second time we dine in. We ordered the herb chicken soup, oyster and dry noodles along with small dishes. Great service. People are super nice here. They even serve herbal tea while you are waiting. Expect to have some waiting time as it is very popular. Highly recommended.

name: Second Floor 貳樓微風台北車站店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區北平西路3號2樓
reviews:
每次去雖然遇到的服務生都不同 但不變的是服務態度都一樣很好 給人很棒的用餐體驗 每次吃完都會讓人很愉悅還想再多去幾次
有次點墨魚麵因個人因素有點吃不慣 剩半盤請她收走 服務生說餐點有需要做加強的地方嗎？還是需要調整的？我表示不是餐點問題單純是我自己吃不慣而已 服務生說怕我這樣沒吃飽 要不要幫我改製作別的餐點給我吃 急忙拒絕 太不好意思了 後來她直接拿一杯飲料作為招待 還是很感謝他 只能說服務人員真的很站在客人立場著想讓人很暖心 也很不好意思
服務態度好 感受好 勝過任何掛名或知名度高 曝光率高的店家

在台北車站二樓的微風美食區，位置好找，空間寬廣，適合聊天聚會。

因我們的用餐時間是2:30，因此，選擇早午餐加價項目。

第一道：「橙香法式丹麥Sunny舒肥雞」，雞胸肉+兩片法式吐司
+兩顆全熟蛋。意外驚喜是：口味清淡、重視食物原味，沒有亂加配料的主角：舒肥雞，百分之百的雞胸肉，只撒上綠色配料，香嫩可口，既不乾也不柴，讚👍！

法式吐司是人人都愛的配角，而且不會很甜。至於兩顆全熟蛋，只能說我選錯了，建議應選半熟蛋較佳，否則整盤覺得過於乾澀，難怪需要搭配兩杯飲料。

第二道是：「燻鮭魚炒菇班尼蛋」；煙燻鮭魚新鮮，搭配半熟蛋流出的汁液，流到最底層的法式吐司，讓吐司較為濕潤，這種搭配很好，味道適中而整體口感平衡。

綜合果汁是多種新鮮水果現打現做，小小一杯，喝出了它的香氣與美味，猜猜看到底放了哪些水果？桑椹、芭樂、木瓜..朋友們不妨問問服務員。

在冬天，最後一定要以熱奶茶收場，可以續杯。

氛圍不錯，服務態度良好，我們吃出了餐廳的出發點是兼顧消費者的健康與口味，份量也很足，性價比蠻高的餐廳，列入我們的再訪名單。

吃過好幾次貳樓，這是第一次在微風店用餐，也是第一次選擇早午餐系列。以往在中山店和板橋店的用餐經驗都還不錯，然而這次的體驗實在讓人訝異，所以來留言。

先說結論，貳樓真的需要好好加油，在早午餐店林立的雙北，這樣的口味和相對應的價格，應該很難立足，也相對減少顧客二訪的意願。

1.套餐90元加購的洋釀炸雞，口味蠻不錯，但只有6個極度小塊的洋釀炸雞，餐點上來，整體份量還不到7-11微波食品韓式炸雞的一半，這樣的份量讓人詫異。
2.套餐的法式吐司既不鬆軟濕潤，味道也不好，糖漿藥水味實在是很重。是整份餐點最讓人無奈的品項。
3.舒肥雞胸的口感乾柴不細緻，遠不如7-11的舒肥雞胸。
4.炸地瓜薯片中規中矩，但脫油技術有待加強，食用時感到相當油膩。
5.餐點送上來時，熱紅茶撒了一桌還潑到顧客身上，店員也沒注意到就這樣離開了，我知道人潮多導致作業量大，即便能體諒服務業的辛苦，但希望你們還是能多加小心。

整個套餐這樣下來570的價格..真的還有很多進步的空間。

reviews_detailed.author: J T
reviews_detailed.text:
Absolute 5 Star experience.

We arrived late with only 10 minutes to order before the kitchen closes.

We were served by the very professional and helpful Miss Rachel. Fantastic service and recommendation. Order done and we were seated to a wonderful window seat all on under 8 minutes.

All the dishes recommended were fantastic.

The breakfast set comes with 2 drinks with the coffee being refillable AND choice of a different hot beverage upon refill. This is almost unheard of.

Both Pasta We ordered were cooked to perfection. The mushrooms were prepared in a crispy manner and infused thoroughly with truffle favors.

The sausage pasta was cooked with a wonderfully balanced cream sauce , rich without being overwhelming halfway through the meal.

As it was the Winter Solstice , 冬至， the restaurant offered free Tang Yuan for all of us what a pleasant end to a fabulous dining experience.

The crown jewel experience is the view of Taipei 101 from the window seats. This only is worth the meal price and more.

This restaurant is A must visit for anyone coming around the 101 area.

reviews_detailed.author: Shelley Lee
reviews_detailed.text: I seldom hand out 5-star ratings to restaurants, but this second-floor restaurant truly deserves top marks! Even though it can get quite crowded during dinner, the staff is consistently polite and cheerful. As you can see from my meal photos, the dishes looked exactly like they did on the menu—what a pleasant surprise! The portions were generous and the food was absolutely delicious. I have to give a special shout-out to Leo, the server who attended our table. His big smile and passionate, upbeat attitude made our dining experience even more enjoyable! This was definitely one of the best services we’ve had in recent memory!

reviews_detailed.author: Vortrox92LG
reviews_detailed.text:
Truffle Fries ($250):
They were nicely fried and tasted so amazing with the truffle and the cheese shreds.

Crispy Calamari Rings ($290):
The rings were so chewy and crunchy but a lot tastier with the special tangy ketchup. These were definitely the best calamari I’ve ever had from the bottom of my heart.

Kale Juice ($200):
This was my first time drinking kale juice which was not as thick as it seemed and tasted kinda sweet.

In conclusion, the restaurant has always been crowded whether on weekends or weekdays noons and nights so reservation
in advance is highly suggested. Despite the high prices, the foods were just perfect and got large portions.
Overall, it’s a 10 out of 10!

FYI, you scan the QR code (English available) to the place order and 10% service charge is included.

reviews_detailed.author: Simon T Bramley
reviews_detailed.text: Very convenient if you’re in Taipei Main Station, and need decent vegetarian options - of which there are quite a few. The food was better than I anticipated, so that’s a plus. The ordering process was a bit of a nightmare, however. You get full colour menus, with a supplement in English, but you then have to scan a QR code on a receipt that takes you to an online menu that is very hard to navigate, especially if your first language isn’t Chinese. Even the waitress needed time to help us order, which seems counterproductive. Adding to your order after the fact made it even more complicated. It also didn’t help that alongside the noise of other customers, the music was a bit too loud. It really put us off a bit, but was saved by the very decent food.

reviews_detailed.author: Scott Ng
reviews_detailed.text:
Nice cafe with good ambience and food. More importantly the service is great. Especially their service staff called Cindy. Very professional and friendly too. I ordered their pasta and egg Benedict with beef. Pasta is just right and the sauce flavorful and savory. The egg Benedict with beef is the highlight. Egg is soft and moist in the center as you cut it open. Beef is moist and tender too. The homemade bread is also excellently done. Crusty on the outside and soft in the inside.
Overall it is an excellent dining experience. However, the cafe can be very popular and lunch is packed with people hence can be noisy. This is the only minus I find. Too bad I didn't try their signature drinks but it should be of a good standard too.

name: 珍品小館
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區青島東路7之5號號
reviews:
吃了好幾次 每次都忘記紀錄 每次都很好吃
新年第一天上班紀錄一下
2025/01/02
10人份 都點中份 一人約436元
1.老皮嫩肉
2.鳳梨蝦球
3.酸菜白肉鍋👍
4.豆干肉絲
5.炒水蓮
6.蔥油餅
7.炒臭豆腐👍
8.大餅捲牛肉👍
9.脆皮肥腸

1. 好吃：蔥油餅、三杯雞、香干肉絲都，蝦仁蛋餅(稍鹹)。
2. 中規中矩：炒絲瓜、開陽白菜、小籠湯包。3. 尚可：麻婆豆腐。

立法院旁的老店
真心覺得每一道都好吃
人多還可以點酸菜白肉鍋
酸酸的湯頭很暖胃
蔥油餅放了不少的蔥夠味
黃金雞也鮮甜必點
招牌元蹄炸過不油膩我都多吃了好幾塊
還有好吃的咖哩蟹
有附上麵包可以沾醬汁一起吃

有些菜需要預訂哦
星期五都是客滿的記得要訂位

reviews_detailed.author: Jingwei He
reviews_detailed.text: It was a very nice dinner when I visited Taiwan. The three cups chicken and sweet sour porks are so good. The restaurant is just crossed street from Sheraton where I stayed, so convenient!

reviews_detailed.author: Jenny Liu
reviews_detailed.text: Food was a bit too salty for me!!! Best dish was the Fried Tofu!! Soooooo good!!!

reviews_detailed.author: S Ong
reviews_detailed.text: Found this restaurant from Google map. It was not located at the main road and you really need to use Google map to guide you. The serving portion was right, the price was reasonable and we enjoyed the food.

reviews_detailed.author: Kanna Ogurie
reviews_detailed.text: Interior is very clean and the servers are fun and nice, but not always attentive. The food is not the cheapest, but the quality is good. I recommend the Kung Pao Chicken.

reviews_detailed.author: charlene cabioch
reviews_detailed.text: Amazing food and service!! Thank you so much for the good recommendations of the meals : tofu, lotus, rice and soupe 🍲❤️✨

name: MIXTIO 秘地餐廳
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區仁愛路一段1號
reviews:
⭐ 台大醫學院圖書館裡竟然藏了一家神級祕密餐廳 😂📚✨

不是來讀書，是被美食吸進來的。

肉醬千層佐蔬菜 香到離譜、
鷹嘴豆沙拉 清爽得像在做健康業配、
咖哩 香料乖乖的不亂跳、
青醬海鮮燉飯 很好吃
莓果鬆餅 更是直接收服甜點控 ❤️🫐
鬆餅外脆內軟，堆滿莓果、酸甜剛好，加上冰淇淋根本完勝，吃一口心情直接 +200%。

環境安靜又舒服，不趕人，超級chill，完完全全是圖書館裡的隱藏補給站。

✨ 結論：來這不是為了書，是為了吃。推爆！🔥🍽️🧇

隱身在圖書館內的餐廳，還蠻難找的
紙包海鮮三重奏，第二口之後會覺得很鹹
焦糖脆片奶蓋茶賣相不錯，但喝起來比較平淡⋯

看到臺灣大學醫學院那棟直接走進去問警衛就對了。
點了香煎牛排佐泰式沙拉 $390，牛肉軟嫩，搭配蔬菜不油不膩，泰式醬吃的出來不是市售罐裝醬，酸甜帶點辣非常喜歡。
用餐環境安靜沒有壓力。
另外有提供會議包廂還附設投影機，非常便利。

reviews_detailed.author: Ni Cheng (Rina)
reviews_detailed.text: The spaghetti with garlic shrimp was absolutely delicious, with perfectly cooked pasta and juicy shrimp. If you are looking for a cozy place with excellent cuisine and friendly staff, this is highly recommended!

reviews_detailed.author: Wei Jen Huang
reviews_detailed.text: For below reply, you mistaken me to someone else. I only order one ice coffee. I never had any verbal disputes with anyone in the restaurant in anytime.

reviews_detailed.author: Chi-Chuan Yeh
reviews_detailed.text: Very delicious food！ Nice place for meeting friends！

reviews_detailed.author: Tracy
reviews_detailed.text:
⭐ A hidden gem restaurant is tucked away inside the National Taiwan University College of Medicine Library! 😂📚✨

I wasn't there to study, I was drawn in by the food.

The meat sauce crepe with vegetables was insanely fragrant.

The chickpea salad was so refreshing it felt like a healthy advertisement.

The curry had perfectly balanced spices.

The pesto seafood risotto was delicious.

The berry pancakes were a total dessert lover's dream! ❤️🫐 The pancakes were crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, piled high with berries—the sweet and sour flavor was just right. Add ice cream and it was a total win; one bite and my mood increased by 200%.

The environment was quiet and comfortable, not rushed at all, super chill—a true hidden gem in the library.

✨ Conclusion: I didn't come for the books, I came for the food. Highly recommended! 🔥🍽️🧇

reviews_detailed.author: Chen Angela
reviews_detailed.text: The restaurant, hidden inside the library, was quite hard to find. The paper-wrapped seafood trio became too salty after the second bite. The caramel crispy milk tea looked good, but tasted rather bland.

name: 大樹義麵坊-2026平價排隊美食 台北中正義大利麵 焗烤 商業午餐 外送推薦 熱門義式料理餐廳 訂位推薦 團體學校安親班訂餐外送 聚餐包場 臺大醫院 中正紀念堂附近美食 PTT Dcard
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區林森南路45-1號
reviews: 意外發現的4.5顆星意麵坊，果然在水準之內。 價格合理、口味不錯，中規中矩。 如果想簡單吃完意麵，沒有多餘時間跟太多預算，這是不錯的選擇。唯獨可惜的是餐廳的空間稍微狹隘了一些。

1、2樓都有座位，
中午用餐時間很快就客滿了，
店家有免費提供汽水及開水，
這次吃的是焗烤白醬燉飯，
味道著實不錯，
至於麵包跟濃湯部分，
不是很合我的口味，
如果要省點錢的話，
可以跳過...

初訪，肉醬麵還可，麵量夠，一般食量不用增量。

湯品更換成酥皮海鮮，內有兩顆蛤蜊、一隻去殼蝦仁、一塊小卷圈跟一小塊魚肉。

麵價格合理，海鮮湯覺得價格稍高。

reviews_detailed.author: Paul Yang
reviews_detailed.text:
5/5 — Vegetable pasta with green sauce
3/5 — corn soup
5/5 — clam pasta with green sauce and cheese (got this twice) —
4/5 — scallop and shrimp pasta with white sauce.  The scallops and shrimp were good, but the white sauce wasn’t that flavorful, and the pasta was pasty.  Maybe I would have liked it with green sauce.
Best pasta I’ve had in Taiwan.  Green sauce and cheese on top were great.  Got clam for meat.  Corn soup with bread on top was ok.  Bread slices with pesto sauce was pretty good.

Update 7-13-23

rigatoni with tomato meat sauce is ok.  4/5
The menu said beef in chinese which usually means beef slices, but it was ground beef which makes sense as a pasta sauce.  Cheese on top is good

reviews_detailed.author: Achmad Rizal
reviews_detailed.text:
I really like the baked rice. I ordered  6C雞肉焗飯. The green sauce tastes very good.
For the bread, it is just like normal bread.

reviews_detailed.author: Tina Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
Tastes great.
You can choose any type of sauce and noodles.
Cash only. No service fee.

reviews_detailed.author: Marcus CYL
reviews_detailed.text: Good food, good vibe, good people.

reviews_detailed.author: Mac B
reviews_detailed.text: Decent, but nothing amazing. A very affordable price point for a set meal, complete with drinks and soup.

name: 蘇杭點心店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區羅斯福路二段14號
reviews:
絲瓜小籠包
清甜爽口好吃 推推 可點
蟹黃小籠包
清幽蟹黃味 看個人預算評估是否要點
一般小籠包
基礎入門版 可點可不點 看你當天想怎吃
排骨炒飯
排骨有醃過味道還不錯 炒飯過關
韭黃春捲
我個人頗喜歡 建議可點
魚蝦什麼餃
我覺得可以pass
酸辣湯
不酸也不辣 可以自己加老闆娘自己炒的辣椒 味道好些 豬肉條微微豬味
小菜茄子🍆
我喜歡 建議可拿
滷牛腱
我喜歡 建議可拿 搭蔥 老闆娘自製辣醬 好吃
感覺是豆瓣魚乾醬虎皮蛋
外型吸睛 可以嚐鮮即可
文藝青年覺得整體不錯
雖然客人大部分都長輩，但我們喜歡👍

本次消費 3人 共$1930

醉雞是在冰箱裡的小菜，一份290元，蘿蔔絲餅很好吃不油膩，菜肉蒸餃也很扎實皮很Q，最好吃的是絲瓜蝦仁湯包，蝦肉和絲瓜都很清爽好吃，價錢稍微比較高一點，不過口味很不錯
115.03.07
小菜太鹹，害我晚餐後，一直感覺口渴。小籠湯包還行，蝦仁蒸餃很普通，炒飯鍋氣不夠，沒有提供洗手間這一點會讓我不再二訪。

reviews_detailed.author: le ca
reviews_detailed.text: First meal in Taipei and it made a very good start.   It is a very small local place and semi self service, ever dishes we ordered tasted good and would love to go back to try more dishes.  Highly recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Wez360
reviews_detailed.text: I enjoyed the food. The hot and sour soup was really good. All the food was tasty, thought I prefer Din Tai Fung’a xiaolongbao. These weren’t far behind as the soup dumpling skins were quite thin and QQ.

reviews_detailed.author: Joann Bee
reviews_detailed.text: 11.4.24: Amazing! Food was amazing. I've been here twice, and I love their 小笼包 (160 NTD) and 白菜年糕 (180 NTD). I tried their shao mai, but it was so dry. These two dishes made up for it. There is also an English menu for foreigners.

reviews_detailed.author: Lily Tsai
reviews_detailed.text: The xiao long bao and the pork chop fried rice here are excellent. Actually, all the food here is tasty and quick. Utensils and sauces are self-serve. No restrooms, but you can ask for a key to a bathroom next door. It’s close to Mandarin Daily News, which is convenient either before or after kids get out of class there. The staff are friendly and easy going. It gets busy during lunch. Highly recommend getting a pastry (bing) as those come out immediately (or get it from the window for on the go). Cash only. We’ve eaten here many times!

reviews_detailed.author: 彭TJPeng
reviews_detailed.text: Omg what the heck how have I been living in Taipei for the last 15. Years and never been to this joint. Forget about Ding Tai Feng   This place is the real deal like Holyfield.  The quality of the ingredients and the craftsmanship of the food and flavor profiles is superb. The best fried rice I’ve ever had. And the best sweet dumplings as well as veggie dumplings as well. Also the soup dumplings is the shizzz YO. We got there around eight and a lot of the dishes were already sold out

name: 台北喜來登大飯店-請客樓
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區忠孝東路一段12號17樓
reviews:
推薦

·紅豆煎鍋餅，薄脆適中味道很平衡不甜膩
·小炒肉應該是相對鹹菜最好吃！

·悄悄話是其中最有特色的，豬耳朵脆香開胃但不驚艷
·川味蒜泥鮮蝦正常發揮，我喜歡醬料的搭配
·羊排用很特別的方式料理，比較像燉煮鮮嫩口感

筍殼魚很正常、醃篤鮮不好喝太膩、田雞腿可以略過

吃完這一頓飯後，心裡仍然回味不已。從一踏進餐廳的那一刻起，就能感受到與一般中式餐廳不同的氛圍：空間寬敞雅致、燈光柔和舒適，讓人一坐下就覺得放鬆愜意。餐廳的環境不僅優雅，而且安排得很有層次感，每一張桌子之間保有一定距離，不會感覺擁擠，很適合談心敘舊或正式聚餐。 ￼

上菜的過程很有節奏感，每道菜都像是精心演繹的一部分。首先上桌的是幾款小菜，味道細緻，香氣十足，讓人一開始就充滿期待。之後的主菜每一道色香味俱全，不論是川揚風味的料理，還是帶有傳統精緻工夫的佳餚，都能從口感和層次中感受到料理的用心。尤其是那道香氣濃郁卻不油膩的湯品，讓人喝了還想再喝，簡直是這頓飯的一大亮點。 ￼

不僅菜色具有水準，服務的細節也讓人印象深刻。服務人員不只是簡單送菜，而是真的會主動介紹每道菜的特色，並貼心關照每一位客人的需要，讓用餐過程既專業又不失親切感。整體節奏掌控得很好，不會等太久也不會過快。 ￼

吃飽走出餐廳時，心裡是一種很滿足的感覺——不只是肚子被餵飽，更像是享受了一場精心安排的美食饗宴。這種愜意的感覺會讓人想再找時間再回訪，而且一定會推薦給朋友一起來體驗。

公司尾牙宴，份量吃得飽，價格不清楚。
最後一道鍋餅忘記拍照，就是正常發揮的鍋餅。
好吃但對於平常沒吃辣的我來說，有些菜色辣了一些，有好幾道都有用花椒，很好吃。

reviews_detailed.author: Wayland
reviews_detailed.text:
Excellent Taiwanese food, especially the soups. The hand pulled chicken with crab was very innovative. There was only one dish I thought was exited poorly, the sesame chicken rice wasn't very different from what I've had before and the chicken was dry.

I almost gave 5 stars but the service could be improved. Nothing terrible about it but if the server is going to prepare and dish every course on the side and serve to us (instead of communal sharing), they need more than one server because it was very slow.

The room offers good privacy.

reviews_detailed.author: jcl
reviews_detailed.text: Taipei's Guest House (請客樓) offers a refined dining experience perfect for sharing. We successfully split a set menu and added a la carte dishes. The signature "Whispered" appetizer and the fragrant Sesame Oil Chicken Rice are absolute, must-order highlights. This distinctive, high-quality Sichuan and Huaiyang cuisine provides a truly memorable and sophisticated meal.

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel Wang
reviews_detailed.text: Very nice place and food is delicious and display is nice. As one of us knows the place very well so we got several complimental food, almost can't finish all dishes. This place really have its level and keep it well. I like spicy and they do have many dishes with right spicy and taste wonderful

reviews_detailed.author: Ashley Hung
reviews_detailed.text:
This was glorious. I totally get why people rave about guest house. Some highlights:

The thin beef jerky was so crispy and flavorful. Beef stir was surprisingly so spicy and so good. 水煮魚 is always a fav and this one did not disappoint with the 嘛. Mapo tofu oh my god. I’m not one for tofu, not even mapo tofu, but I could eat endless amounts of this one. Rice noodles just kept ending up in my mouth… I was so full at this point and yet I couldn’t stop. They also perfected the 麻油雞飯 flavor wow

reviews_detailed.author: Be Present
reviews_detailed.text:
As per its name, a presentable place to indulge guests.

Food is good.  Our favorite (must ordered) is the sea cucumber, flavorful, bouncy and chewy.  The highly recommended applewood infused short ribs is well prepared though the meat could be better selected so it won’t have too much tendon/tough part.   The hawthorn juice is delicious.

Amazing service - helpful in highlighting special dishes; apportion soups and juice on the side and serve to each guest.

Overall great service, good food.  Pricing is on the high end.  Averages NTD 2090 per head for lunch.

name: 點水樓 懷寧店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區懷寧街64號
reviews: 第二次回訪，食物好吃。餐廳穿西裝外套的女性服務人員主動招待桂圓發糕，吃完後才知道要推銷。她建議我們外帶一條蘿蔔糕就可以滿萬元可九折，去結帳時又說還要再加點、要湊到11000。因為出遊不方便攜帶而決定不要湊滿額後，這位服務人員馬上翻臉，不幫我們結帳，叫我們去一樓結帳。同時詢問加點的餅皮還要多久，大姐當著我們的面打電話跟廚房說客人說等太久要取消（傻眼🙄）可能老闆給的年菜業績壓力太大了，大姐爆氣。以後不打算再去了，雖然食物與其他服務人員都好，但不想要再消費又受氣了。
清蒸牛腩超級好吃，是有點貴沒錯但值得一試，小籠包也好吃，蒸蛋普普通通可以不用嘗試，蘿蔔糕太好吃了來不及拍就吃了一半哈哈哈🤣，我甚至覺得可以一人點一份蘿蔔糕，減少吃糖中所以沒點心太軟跟鍋餅殘念，下次再來吃喔～

台北精緻江南料理+ 點心
必食招牌小籠包

2026/1/1 第一飛去咗台北，搭早機8:30 落機去酒店放低行李後就去食Lunch ，今次住台北車站，去咗附近以小籠包聞名的
「點水樓」，主打精緻江南料理、點心同季節限定菜式，以小籠包聞名，曾獲米芝蓮推介。

🥢 翡翠小籠包
餡料用了鮮蝦同鮮瓜的翡翠小籠包，皮薄餡多，入口爆湯汁，口感爽口。

🥢 小籠包
必叫招牌小籠包，用了19摺的湯包皮薄餡多，餡料黑毛豬肉，點埋醋同薑絲一齊食，口感好豐富又爆湯汁。

🥢 蝦仁燒賣
有驚喜蝦仁燒賣有幾正，滿滿蝦仁同黑毛豬肉餡料，又鮮又好食😋。

🥢 蘿蔔絲酥餅
外層酥脆又勁香芝麻味，鮮甜蘿蔔絲餡料好正。

🥢 雪菜百頁
百頁非常軟滑又有豆香味配鹹鹹地雪菜一齊食又幾夾。

埋單台幣1375 唔算抵食，不過小籠包真係幾好食😋。

🔸點水樓 懷寧店 🔸
📍臺北市中正區懷寧街64號

#台北美食 #江南料理 #台北小籠包
#點水樓

reviews_detailed.author: Stefanie Gu
reviews_detailed.text:
We stumbled upon this place during a night walk in April and finally decided to give it a try since it’s super close to our hotel. We were immediately greeted upon entering and seated quickly. The ambience was pleasant, and the place felt very clean.
The menu was impressive—probably the biggest and heaviest we’ve ever seen! I appreciated the pictures inside, which made choosing easier (though it still took us a while). Our eyes were definitely bigger than our stomachs at this point.
We ordered the following:

1.  Roasted Peking duck ( 2 ways - wrap and porridge)
2. Oyster omelet
3. Stuff melon with meat
4. Fried Tofu Chicken Wings
5. Radish/Turnip Cake
6. Braised Pork Belly

Everything taste delicious especially perking duck wrap. Service was attentive throughout, and overall, it was a great experience.
Would recommend if you’re nearby and want a comfortable spot with a wide variety of options.

reviews_detailed.author: Ueda Etona
reviews_detailed.text: You can enjoy elegant seasoning that allows the natural flavours of the ingredients to be appreciated. Some people describe their taste as weak, but I suspect they have been poisoned by cheap, salty flavours masked with excessive salt. The various types of xiaolongbao are, of course, delicious, but do try the soups and seasonal specials too. The service was a little slow, and we sometimes struggled to place our order, but the service itself was friendly and attentive.

reviews_detailed.author: Jirapat Mos
reviews_detailed.text:
Food: Everything tasted ‘Okay’. Nothing is memorable enough for coming back. The pork belly dish was quite a turn down for us because the meat had no taste. If they did a better job at seasoning the meat, it’d come out quite perfect. The bun was really good though.

Service: The staffs were very nice but due to lack of staffing or attention?, sometimes it was very hard to call them for ordering

reviews_detailed.author: Shaine Serrano
reviews_detailed.text: Absolutely loved this place! It's truly worth visiting for the delicious Taiwanese food. The service was kind and attentive, making the experience even more enjoyable. Every dish tasted wonderful, and the flavorful Xiao Long Bao was particularly memorable. I highly recommend it—you won't be disappointed!

reviews_detailed.author: Jora Dimayuga
reviews_detailed.text: The dumplings are perfectly steamed, with a deliciously rich broth inside. I also tried other dim sum options, and they were just as impressive—fresh, flavorful, and expertly made. The atmosphere is cozy and inviting, perfect for enjoying a meal with the family. The service is friendly, and the overall experience is top-notch. It’s definitely one of the best spots for dim sum in Taipei. Highly recommend trying their signature dishes and sharing the feast with your loved ones!

name: 天然臺湘菜館
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區羅斯福路一段61號
reviews: 這個是臺北市60年的老店了，當然裝潢略微遜色；雖然是屬於湘菜，但是味道並不重；蔥油餅，蛤蜊絲瓜湯，烤鴨，雞肉等等，味道不錯
從讀大學年代吃到現在的老一輩餐廳，以前沒智慧型手機和谷狗大神的年代，大家只能靠口耳相傳＜吃好到相報＞。今天同學餐敘再度來到＜天然臺湘菜館＞，訂了三樓包廂10人一桌但沒點桌菜隨各人喜好點，大菜點了豬腳.羊肉爐.清蒸鱸魚，其他點了店裡的招牌菜色共10道菜，每道料理皆烹調得宜甚是可口，大家吃的不亦樂乎。天然臺湘菜館雖然是老店了，但經營的與時俱進頗有聲色，是大宴小酌朋友聚會的好所在。
菜的口味不錯，不過今天蔥油餅實在漏氣！店家非常阿莎力，反應之後就不收費了！

reviews_detailed.author: George Chiao
reviews_detailed.text: Definitely not a fine dining Definitely a delicious local homie gathering place. The pork knuckle is so good, crispy outside, tender & juicy inside and very flavorful. I think they might brine the meat to add flavor and remove the meaty smell before roast it. The rest of dishes are also flavorful but not super impressed. I think this restaurant might have been here for more than 40 years. We ordered more dishes after pounding pour after pour of high-proof spirits. The alcohol might burn out my palate for tasting food. I think you can have pretty decent food here for $500 per person if you plan your orders well.

reviews_detailed.author: Andy Hsia
reviews_detailed.text:
Restaurant has been around for decades and showing some age. The food is still good but no longer what it was. This taste is still familiar to what I remember and for those who have been here you will get a sense of nostalgia. Most customers definitely have been coming for most of their life.

Good Hunan cuisine, not many options is Taipei so this is worth a visit if you are looking to try some spicy food. Not sure there is an English menu so probably need some help ordering.

reviews_detailed.author: Wayne Cheng
reviews_detailed.text:
The restaurant is open at 11:00.  We arrived at around 11:40am on a Wednesday morning,  and it was already packed.
Anyway,  food is tasty, and the price is reasonable.

reviews_detailed.author: helen Liao
reviews_detailed.text: We ordered vip room.  It's quite in the room but It is very loud outside.  Waitress didn't replace clean plates often.

reviews_detailed.author: Mike
reviews_detailed.text: Antique.  Come and have a taste of the classic 60’s

name: 真北平
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區寧波東街1號
reviews:
很久沒吃到每樣菜都不太好吃的和菜店
北平烤鴨的一鴨兩吃$2080
但真的比享鴨、宋廚、龍都酒樓、櫥窗港點吃的飽的烤鴨都還普通……
完全無法覺得好吃
炒的鴨架是真的不好吃了，台中美村路炒的北平烤鴨大勝。就算不跟任何餐廳比，也不會覺得好吃的那種。

炒青菜的芥蘭菜竟然超級老，老的令人真的很失望也訝異……
炒酸菜白肉也不好吃……豆乾肉絲也是失望到不行…….
完全不知道今天點的有什麼菜是正常的（可能是餅皮吧、餅皮是正常的）

之前看評分低還想可能大家口味不一，恩、但真的，就是評分那樣的口味吧
久未至真北平，重新裝修煥然一新。預訂北平烤鴨加酸白菜火鍋再加點羊肚絲、鍋塌豆腐和涼拌白菜心，六人就吃得很满足了。希望老味道不要消失。

現場用餐的人不少
今天餐點的不多
炒菜部分味道較鹹
若吃的較清淡
可問問不那麼鹹
服務也還行

reviews_detailed.author: KTLL
reviews_detailed.text:
The Peking roast duck is costly but delicious!
Since it’s super popular, I recommend calling ahead to make a reservation and pre-order the roast duck (it takes one hour to cook).

Hope the owner will hire more wait-staff. The two waitresses were swarmed with serving a full house during lunch time.

reviews_detailed.author: michael rabinowitz
reviews_detailed.text: Remember when  it was on ChungHua Lu in the 80's and 90's. Reliable.  now still mighty fine.   Staff helped us get a lunch with crispy duck.

reviews_detailed.author: Matt L
reviews_detailed.text:
This restaurant is just OK. If you want Beijing flavours - then this will be fine if you're in the area and are really hungry (and so can't make it anywhere else). The staff appear to speak no English, and the menus (pictures attached) are only in Chinese.

The restaurant itself almost transports you to the mainland (the decoration and even the clothes the waitresses wear). The food is fine but not superb (I noticed that many westerners give the place high ratings, but having lived in Beijing for quite a while, I can only give this place three stars). Most of the clients seemed to be locals. Prices are strange - some things out expect to be cheap and really expensive and vice versa. A meal for two came to 900ntd (quite expensive for what you get, considering what else is around).

The guotie 锅贴 (fried dumplings) were good, as was the huiguorou 回锅肉. Other things so so.

reviews_detailed.author: C C
reviews_detailed.text: Pity its taste has far lost the genuine Peking style. It had been good when I was a child and we went often as living in the neighborhood. The attitude was not as patient. Oh well.. hope everything could improve to remain its name

reviews_detailed.author: Arthur Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Good place for a old fashioned hotpot in a cold overcast windy day, great food, and warm service.

name: 詩篇咖啡餐廳Psalms Cafe & Restaurant
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區中山南路20號B1
reviews:
我們點了水果冰淇淋鬆餅、清燉牛肉麵、雞肉腐乳義大利麵，以及青醬雞腿義大利麵。

餐點擺盤相當用心，視覺上精緻漂亮，很適合拍照。整體口味則偏普通。網路上特別推薦的清燉牛肉麵，實際品嚐後覺得湯頭略顯稀薄，風味不夠濃郁；牛肉份量不少，但油脂香氣不足，少了入口後慢慢化開的層次感。

另外點的 Lilly 咖啡，表現似乎也不如過往印象。風味層次較為單薄，香氣與厚度不足，少了現煮咖啡應有的深度與細緻感，整體喝起來的感受偏平淡。

其他餐點表現穩定，但沒有留下特別深刻的印象。以整體價格來說，感受上偏高。

整體而言，是一家環境與擺盤勝於風味的餐廳，適合重視空間氛圍與聚會感的人。

可以在圖書館吃到這種簡餐 我覺得餐點比家常餐廳好吃 但如果以跟其他餐廳比 就稍嫌平凡

豆芽菜松板豬 口味清爽不會膩口 豆芽菜炒的很好吃

好吃度☀️☀️☀️
再訪度☀️🌤️
從台中北上看舞台劇順便先解決晚餐，原本只是圖方便，牛肉麵真的頂👍，麵Q肉嫩湯頭也好喝，印象裡台中真的沒有勝過這裡的。

reviews_detailed.author: Becket Hui
reviews_detailed.text:
The restaurant is tucked underneath the Central Library and serves a range of Taiwanese dishes. We went during late lunch and ordered the beef noodle soup along with some tea. The place seems pretty popular as all the side dishes and desserts were already sold out by then.
The beef noodle soup was quite good. The beef was tender, and the noodles had a nice bite. The flavour, though, felt a bit underwhelming. Overall, it’s a decent spot for a casual lunch.

reviews_detailed.author: Bernie
reviews_detailed.text: Our good friend James Hsu took us to Psalms Cafe & Restaurant, nestled inside the National Central Library in Taipei. The cafe is well-loved for its fresh, delicious food, serving breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a variety of refreshments, especially coffee. The coffee is rich, creamy, and absolutely tasty, all enjoyed in a warm and cozy atmosphere.

reviews_detailed.author: Doris Chin
reviews_detailed.text: Psalms Cafe is such a peaceful and comforting place. The atmosphere is calm and welcoming, and you can really feel the love and intention behind the space! The food and drinks are delicious, and it’s the perfect spot to relax. Definitely a place I’ll keep coming back to.

reviews_detailed.author: t l
reviews_detailed.text:
Very popular place!  Excellent food and nice and efficient staff.  Menu in Chinese as well as English.
Ordered beef noodle soup, tomato flavor.  Also deep fried fish.

reviews_detailed.author: Dave Mariani
reviews_detailed.text: Food was very good, service was ok, brought our drinks after we were done eating.

name: 春水堂 中正店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區中山南路21之1號
reviews:
國家音樂廳 春水堂
來聽過很多次音樂會了，但這還是第一次在春水堂用餐。因為以往到場都比較遲一些，而春水堂又往往是座無虛席，應該都是來聽音樂會的人們，服務員也會適時地在排隊的地方提醒，如果還沒有點餐的來賓，如果是要看表演聽音樂會的，可能來不及了，這時就只好去摩斯漢堡看看了....
春水堂的佈置簡約素雅，座位不顯侷促；又離性別友善廁所很近。
其實這裡上菜非常快，只是如果不熟悉手機線上點餐結帳的話，時間上會拖延。
想當然爾，所有的熱食幾乎都是預製菜，但說真的從金菇豆皮、牛肉麵、到紅油抄手，味道真的不錯，但意外地在招牌滷味豆干米血嚐到了化學味道....這餐吃完兩人都覺得肚子脹脹的，不知是否有關聯.....
.飲料的部分，雖說是全球珍珠奶茶的創始店但老實說沒有很驚豔啦！冰梅凍飲8分糖喝起來味道也很淡，自己熬的酸梅湯也可以很濃郁，跟化學調味沒有絕對的關係，飲料的利潤果然還是很高啊！
都是一些小吃竟然吃除了人均500元！有點出乎我意料之外！

晚上要去聽音樂會前，先和朋友來春水堂用餐。先在自助機台領取號碼牌，再掃描上面的 QR Code 點餐，入座後直接到櫃檯結帳，整個流程蠻順的，也省下不少等待時間 👍
餐點部分點了功夫麵，可以選擇不要韭菜，對不愛韭菜的人來說很貼心，完全不用再自己挑。辣度也能另外選擇特調辣醬，會用小碟子附上，喜歡吃辣的人可以試試，個人覺得味道還不錯 🌶️
飲料方面，珍珠口感依舊表現不錯 🧋，不過兩碗麵加上兩杯飲料，再加服務費共 484 元，價格上稍微偏高一點，但整體用餐體驗還算不錯。

肉排蓋飯很好吃 珍珠燒賣也很棒
季節限定的老薑奶茶和薑汁焙茶拿鐵
都是這個季節必喝的品項
薑味濃郁 辣辣的風味 可以治療一下感冒🤧

reviews_detailed.author: Brandon C
reviews_detailed.text:
Can only really comment on the drinks because that was what we came for. My taiwanese friend recommended this place as it's the og bubble tea and it really didn't disappoint. What separates it from other bubble tea places are the size of the tapioca balls. They're much smaller here which I thought was really cool.

Also recommend the side order of radish cake. They're like lor Bach go at dim sum, and they are really well made with a tasty sauce. There is a minimum spend here and there was a queue as soon as it opened at 1130... We showed up just before it opened and we were 10th in the queue just to give you a sense of it.

When you arrive, enter the queue and you'll be given a number. You can wait outside the restaurant in the hallway where you'll hear your number called. Sit down and scan the QR code at your table, and place your order. Go pay for your order, and that's when your order will go through. They do accept card. Also there is a minimum spend per person.

reviews_detailed.author: Uyen Bui
reviews_detailed.text: I felt not too sure when walking int this restaurant because I just thought it was a boba shop but it was indeed a restaurant. I felt weird when just ordering boba only but seemed like other customers were doing the same things. Overall it’s a great place to visit but in my opinion the drinks didn’t impress me. Good to give it a try but probably won’t come back!

reviews_detailed.author: Stuart Gibson
reviews_detailed.text: Went here for our xxth anniversary. Was recommended for its traditional Taiwanese food. Didn't disappoint was very enjoyable.. a little touristy but that didn't reflect in the cost

reviews_detailed.author: G
reviews_detailed.text:
A pint of bubble tea what is there not to love!

Even though this was classed as the originator of bubble tea it tasted great but nothing special that sets it apart with competitors. I did appreciate the huge portion that we got which was something different but I definitely hit my bubble tea quota for the week..

Way to order was pretty confusing especially for tourists like myself, the place was pretty peaceful however.

reviews_detailed.author: Layar Jaring
reviews_detailed.text:
Most bubble tea places have a generic sterile decor. But not here. Here, they have an excellent environment. I like the way it's designed to be inviting, comfortable, relaxing  place for you to sit and rest.

Staffs can be brusque though but maybe because we don't follow their 'booking' / waiting for tables rules. You need to first take a number at the entrance. Then wait patiently for the staff to come assign you a table. Don't walk straight to a table and plonk yourself at the table and expect your drinks and food. Once you get your assigned table, use the qr to order, then go to the payment counter and pay. Then only will your food and drinks be sent to you.

Being a branch / franchise of the creators of the bubble tea does create some expectations and I must say I enjoyed their concoction. The fact that you can adjust the sweetness of your drinks is an added bonus. You can't go wrong no matter what you order. Their drinks are excellent. I can't comment on their food as I didn't order any, but visually, (observed my neighboring tables) they look delicious.

name: 揪鬪本家
formatted_address: 10641台灣台北市大安区信义路二段16號1樓
reviews: 與揪鬪老闆已結緣十餘年，當年剛開始營業時，他家小朋友還是小學生吧，如今已是大學生了，今天恰巧進城先電話預約，剛好有位子，點了鹽鞠五仔魚B套餐、鮭魚炸泡飯，等餐過程中老闆又送上兩塊烤魚，一解飢餓之感，享用新鮮美味的餐點，與當年的口味一樣，都是帶著認真的態度去面對每位客人，忽然抬頭一看有石狗公，要安排下次來朝聖的行程了。
雖然很拍謝但是蛋糕超好吃，很難形容是什麼味道但是真的好好吃⋯⋯等等就去問店員有沒有單賣（不是波蘭）（不好笑） 丼飯也好吃推推下次還來
很小的一家小店，氣氛跟味道都很好。甜點是意外的彩蛋。整體的品質並沒有因為疫情而改變，值得一再拜訪。位置很少，最好先打電話訂位！師傅最厲害的是，每次去吃的菜色都不重複😋

reviews_detailed.author: Charley Yip
reviews_detailed.text: This place lives in an alley facing a school. We have been to the restaurant for a couple of times already. The food is delicious, highly recommend the salmon rice ball, the waiters and chefs are really nice! When you enter the restaurant, there are two tables that you can sit. Then you take 2 steps up to the bar table. There in the bar table you can see how the chefs cook which it’s really cool! Really like to come here again soon!

reviews_detailed.author: Jimmy Lee
reviews_detailed.text:
I visited during a weekend lunch hour (around 12:30). Although I didn't make any reservations, I still managed to get a table without any waiting (a table for 2). The restaurant is pretty small (but still comfortable), so don't expect it to be the best dining atmosphere ever. I ordered the most expensive combo (around 1500NTD/person), which came with: a salad, sashimi, grilled shrimp, four sushi, pork, a small portion of eel on top of rice, miso soup, and a home-made dessert. The service was phenomenal and the food was fresh and well prepared. The meal was NOT served all at once, which allowed me to enjoy and experience. There's only one thing I would complain: the air conditioning was blowing straight to my head, but that didn't bother me that much.

I would definitely recommend this restaurant and I will suggest you make a reservation since it is pretty popular during lunch/dinner hours. This store takes cash only and it is not very suitable for party over four (unless if you make a reservation for the entire bar side of the restaurant with then it will work perfectly). I'll definitely revisit some days and try their 1500/2000 chef's menu (with dish varies daily).

reviews_detailed.author: Karen Wang
reviews_detailed.text:
Omakase sushi was delicious!

Love the little details of this shop: the different ceramic sets for each customer, the tea-lights underneath each teapot, the homemade pickles including some non-Japanese but delicious flavors like basil tomato. Also the two turtles hanging out in an aquarium in the corner lol.

Set menu also comes with chawanmushi, a grilled course, a main course, soup, and dessert.

reviews_detailed.author: Meag F
reviews_detailed.text:
This restaurant is down an alley off the main road, right across from the NTNU building that dominates the end of that block.

I called the restaurant 30 minutes before closing to see if I could squeeze a last minute reservation in, and they were so kind to let us come so late. We didn't feel rushed at all 🙂.

Sushi and donburi were beautifully made and very delicious. I got their recommended cheesy mentaiko salmon donburi and was very impressed with how they were able to pack so much umami into the dish. Would definitely go back!

reviews_detailed.author: Michael J Del Toro
reviews_detailed.text:
This is a very traditional Japanese restaurant. There are both cooked dishes and sushi/sashimi. They have grilled meat & seafood and some traditional Japanese cooked dishes.

Going early we found ample seating and took place at the sushi bar. We were greeted courteously. Only downside is they don’t speak English but there are photos for the non sushi/sashimi dishes so you can just point.

We ordered a pork donburi and sushi and sashimi with a halibut hand roll. The sushi offered is limited (Cobia, salmon, scallop, sweet shrimp, snow crab, etc) but very fresh. They will also sear it if you don’t want it “sushi raw”. Teas is served and you can buy soda, beer and saki.

Salmon & salmon belly Sashimi came first and was excellent. Very fresh and well prepared. Next up was the pork donburi. Never had it before but it was very good and I am told by my Japanese friends it reminded them of Japan.

The next dish were the sushi seared and normal style. Again the first was very fresh and prepared in traditional sushi manner.

Cobia and hand roll were last. The Cobia sashimi is served on a bed of onions with a delicious dressing and scallions with traditional Japanese fish flakes. It is a great combo. EDIT: 2nd time portion smaller and no dressing. FAIL

The salad palette cleanser that comes with the sushi plates are excellent and consist of pickled radish and cucumber with tomatoes dipped in an Italian inspired dressing. One of my favorite parts.

I don’t normally order the hand rolls but I am glad I did. It was wonderful. dessert was a green tea mocha  and a great way to round off the meal. EDIT: hand roll was half size 2nd time. FAIL

Overall the food, service and atmosphere was good and I rate this a good Japanese restaurant in Taipei. In Taiwanese it is OVERALL: 還好

EDIT: Order salmon rice ball 2nd time: all rice & no salmon. Chef pointed out tiny piece smaller than baby fingernail. Only piece in rice ball as photographed.

Maybe don’t go again. If they recognize you they might not give you as good food.

name: 陶板屋 台北重慶南店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區重慶南路一段58號2樓
reviews:
第一次吃陶板屋
1.餐點口味是好吃的（牛排味道滿大眾的）
2.點餐的部分，男店員沒有詢問飲料先上還是後上（不確定是個例還是陶板屋統一不問）
3.店員陳*惠很體貼也很關心顧客用餐狀況
4.現在的活動送了一些菜單外的餐點（麵包、炸物拼盤）平常老婆已經吃比較少我會幫她吃她的份，但吃完陶板屋沒有像西堤、原燒、夏慕尼那種很飽很滿足的感覺
5.我的炸飯糰沒有其他評論照片上的海苔粉，整個口味油膩感較重，另外一個釜飯個人口味覺得比較好吃
6.後續有朋友跟我說店員會問有沒有吃飽，但當天用餐沒被問
餐食算精緻，蔬食餐點份量偏少，雖有贈一份蕎麥麵，還是沒吃飽可能個人食量較大？加入google評論有送開味菜？沒送餐食...蔬時會改豆腐類替代，最後也沒消息...？可能生意好消費者多忙中有誤遺漏登記...。

20260210
好久沒吃陶板屋
整體用餐體驗蠻失望的⋯⋯
現場真的偏吵雜

蕈菇沙拉的菇臭味很明顯
（不是當天的？）
烤杏鮑菇就比較好吃一點，有juicy
玉米濃湯很明顯就是即食包的味道
然後雞胸肉就是切塊後面才丟進去的
味道完全沒合在一起…

鴨胸還不錯，但有一些筋（可能是正常的？）
炊飯味道還不錯，裡面的芥菜有幾根老到直接變渣吐出來
布丁🍮是我覺得最好吃的！
珍珠冰淇淋的珍珠也煮得不好吃⋯⋯

整體用餐體驗，真的挺失望的…

name: 御景日本料理
formatted_address: 2之4號, No. 2之4號林森南路中正區臺北市台灣 100
reviews:
去過御景日本料理很多次，每一次都是安心吃、穩穩好吃。

但這次第一次點無菜單料理，只能說——
我真的低估它了。

那種「原來你還藏這麼深」的驚艷，是會讓人坐在位置上默默點頭的那種層次。

整體節奏從前菜一路鋪陳到收尾，非常完整，但有幾道，我一定要特別拉出來說。

⸻

海膽松露豆腐

這道一上桌，氣場就不一樣。

松露香氣低調鋪陳，海膽的濃郁鮮甜滑進口中，與豆腐的細緻融合得毫無違和。

鹹、鮮、香的比例抓得極準。

不是浮誇型好吃，而是會讓人停三秒、閉眼感受的那種層次。

這道，是宣告今天不簡單的開場白。

⸻

烏魚子鮭魚白玉捲

這道真的滿分。

鮭魚油脂在舌面化開，烏魚子的鹹香慢慢堆疊，白玉的Q彈拉出節奏。

每一口都乾淨俐落，卻又層次分明。

沒有過度調味，但食材全部站在對的位置上發光。

這就是日料該有的浪漫。

⸻

手工胡麻豆腐與炸蝦

這道原本看似低調，結果成為今晚最有記憶點的一筆。

手工豆腐吃下去那瞬間，我愣住。
它不是嫩，而是帶有麻糬般的Q彈感，微微回彈卻又保留豆香。

在別處真的從沒吃過這種口感。

胡麻醬只是襯托，沒有搶戲。

炸蝦則外酥內彈，薄脆乾淨，與那塊Q彈豆腐形成強烈對比——一酥一彈，節奏非常漂亮。

這道，是低調卻難忘的存在。

⸻

明太子烤白帶魚

這道是當晚的爆點。

白帶魚外層微焦酥香，裡面卻細嫩得不可思議。明太子的鹹香在炙燒後帶出焦香味，但完全沒有壓過魚本身的鮮甜。

那種油脂與鹹香在口中擴散的速度，會讓人默默再多夾一口。

⸻

握壽司—海膽干貝

這顆握壽司我會記很久。

干貝甜度極高，柔軟得幾乎像奶油，海膽濃郁海味堆疊其上，底下醋飯溫度恰到好處。

不是冰冷的壽司，而是有溫度的。

一口吃下去，是奢華，但不浮誇。

⸻

最後的蒜頭蛤仔湯，蒜頭煮得透而回甘，蛤仔鮮味自然釋放，湯頭清澈卻濃郁。

喝完那一口，整場無菜單的節奏完美收束。

是句點，也是擁抱。

⸻

當天完整菜色：

海膽松露豆腐
鮑魚與明太子小黃瓜捲
烏魚子鮭魚白玉捲
生魚片—紅甘、白甘、鮭魚、甜蝦、生蠔
手工胡麻豆腐與炸蝦
明太子烤白帶魚
握壽司—比目魚、海膽干貝、草莓蛋皮、鮪魚
蒜頭蛤仔湯
甜點—橘子、茶凍

⸻

以前來御景是「來吃飯」。
這次，是「來體驗一場完整的料理節奏」。

如果問我下次還會不會點無菜單？

小孩子才選固定菜單。

懂吃的，直接無菜單走起。🍣😌
好吃！海膽、生蠔、鮑魚、鮪魚腹、紅喉魚等食材都是吃得出的非常非新鮮、鮮甜，調味和料理也都非常美味、有特色！老闆和老闆娘都非常親切，也有很多豐富的日本酒種類可以選擇，非常推薦！

服務親切

蛤蜊茶碗蒸有五顆大蛤蜊，味道佳～可惜配料只有蟳味棒稍嫌單調

定食套餐份量足，建議白飯可以等主餐來了一起上，太早端上桌，等主餐來時已冷掉，稍嫌可惜（但也可能是要搭配前菜吃？）調味對我來說較偏清淡

前菜的香菇很入味，有小驚豔到👍

reviews_detailed.author: annie chen
reviews_detailed.text: We came here couple years ago and have always wanted to visit again. This time my husband was feeling well, the server offered to him some modified dishes. We ordered two sets of the food. The presentation and the taste of each dish were great. Again, we loved it and enjoyed the atmosphere in the restaurant. Servers were attentive.

reviews_detailed.author: Dave Ong
reviews_detailed.text: Recommend to take the omakase it is value for money and very excellent chief

reviews_detailed.author: Jack Chou
reviews_detailed.text:
Have been to the restaurant many times. The sea food was terrific, great sushi and difference set meal. The shef is really good at cooking for amazing food. most important !! The prices are reasonable. Recommend to enjoy.^^

Coming again and feeling as usual, so good of the delicious food , grateful service.

so wonderful food

perfect Restaurant！！！

reviews_detailed.author: G H
reviews_detailed.text: 3rd visit, and we found that it's not good for value. Sukiyaki set as you see in the photo is $610 after tax, with about 5 pieces of beef.

reviews_detailed.author: CD
reviews_detailed.text:
I expected a bit more for the price.  The Japanese salad was 280 NTD and it was pretty basic and not too big.

The tuna sushi was excellent as was the squid and shrimp.

The avocado roll was just below average.  The roe on the rice was smashed into the rice and disappeared.   The avocado had no flavor.  Perhaps the fruit wasnt ripe or in season - if that is the case it shouldn't be available on the menu.

Service was good and the sake was nice.

I probably won't come back as there are many other choices for this type of cuisine in Taipei.

name: 姥姥酸菜魚 微風北車店
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區北平西路3號2樓
reviews:
前陣子因為出差回到台北，下火車的那一刻突然很想念酸菜魚的味道。朋友之前推薦過台北車站二樓的「荖荖酸菜魚」，於是就順著直覺走上去試試。這次點了有微辣的個人獨享鍋（還特別請店員減辣），湯頭酸香舒服，不會刺激到失控那種，入口後的辣感是在舌尖慢慢展開的，很有節奏。一人份量剛剛好，暖胃又剛好填滿一天的空檔心情。我另外加了皮蛋麵，Q 度跟香氣很加分，配上魚片的鮮嫩挺合拍；鍋裡再放一點金針菇，味道更圓潤。

店內有提供熱茶，旁邊放著陳皮、洛神、梅子，可以自己調配味道，這小細節真的很貼心，也讓等餐的時間多了點儀式感。

套餐的小菜有小黃瓜、醃漬蕃茄和豆干，清爽的酸甜剛好能平衡主鍋的酸辣，吃起來不會膩。餐後附的仙草凍也很解味，下次我想換試看看粉粿，感覺滿有潛力。

服務人員不多，但負責帶位的黑框眼鏡店員態度很好，詢問菜色時回應清楚又有耐心，讓人感覺被妥善照顧。非尖峰時段來用餐，環境安靜、座位間不壓迫，一個人吃鍋也能很放鬆。

一鍋酸菜魚，把疲憊感沖淡不少；若你剛好在台北車站附近，想找一份暖胃又暖心的小確幸，這裡真的可以列入清單。

來這家第三次了，我在大陸常吃酸菜魚，所以吃的出正不正統這一家味道跟大陸有名的太2酸菜魚差不多，雖然我有吃過別家比太2更好吃的水煮魚片，但是太2的程度已經算很不錯了，而且在大陸很有名😆之前久仰刁民已久，最近跟朋友嘗試過了🥺刁民姥姥都吃過的朋友跟我的想法一樣，另外一個朋友吃過澳門的太2也跟我想法一樣覺得姥姥比較好吃，勝過刁民。這家味道夠正宗夠好吃，刁民味道不夠重不正宗沒有椒麻味不知道為什麼這麼有名？強烈推薦姥姥包括飲料也是，洛神花茶陳皮跟酸梅自己拿調配，喝得好過癮😆

這真是被酸辣魚耽誤的飲料店！
酸菜魚湯頭中規中矩，還是比較喜歡刁民的刺激感，不過食材還是新鮮的，魚肉也沒有甚麼土味
他們家的無糖高山茶和奶茶巨好喝！！
完全勝過90％的飲料店
Brew得剛剛好，更是香氣十足
奶茶也不遑多讓，點了微微，perfect!
油條也是另一個值得推的
口感比較像金門的油條，較紮實，點一點砂糖真的很對味

不誇張，最後我們又外帶了一杯高山茶，呵呵，開心！

reviews_detailed.author: Lau Guan Zhen (Sean)
reviews_detailed.text:
If you’re a fan of sour fish stew (酸菜魚), Laolao SuanCaiYu is a must-visit! The broth is deliciously tangy and full of flavors, with just the right balance of sourness and spice. The fish is tender and fresh, perfectly complementing the pickled cabbage.

The restaurant offers a comfortable, modern atmosphere with quick and friendly service. Portions are generous, and the prices are reasonable for the quality and taste. They also have a variety of side dishes and appetizers to pair with the main dish.

A great spot for anyone craving a hearty, flavorful meal in the heart of Taipei. Highly recommend giving it a try!

reviews_detailed.author: EightNine (EightNine)
reviews_detailed.text:
The sour fish soup and side dishes (especially the fried pork) were all delicious. We preferred the non-spicy version to the spicy version.

You can help yourself to dry ingredients like hibiscus flowers, orange peels and dried plums to steep your own hot tea, which was very special.

reviews_detailed.author: Vortrox92LG
reviews_detailed.text:
I had a Suan Cai Yu individual set meal (Boiled Fish with Pickled Cabbage and Chilli) that typically included a bowl of rice, 3 side dishes, and a dessert which was grass jelly. However, you could replace something with another thing in the digital menu. For instance, I substitute the side dishes with an extra dessert, so the set meal became with a bowl of rice and 2 grass jelly. Besides, you were also able to adjust the spiciness or add extra sourness to your Suai Cai Yu. The broth with extra sourness was even more sour than the lemonade in my opinion.

The boiled fish had amazing texture and the portion was greater than others. The rice went so well with the fish and the broth in a bite.
The meat ball and the pork slice in the soup were tender and delicious. Furthermore, the wide bean noodles in the broth had always been my favourite things in Suai Cai Yu. The smooth and flexible texture with spicy taste was the best.

The delectable Grass Jelly was definitely a great calm after the sour and spicy meal.

The Winter Melon Punch with Chrysanthemum wasn’t as sweet as it usually was, but the taste was still good.

Last but not least, the service and the food were excellent, and the price was moderate.
Overall I would give it a 9.5 out of 10!

FYI, you self serve the water near the kitchen and place your order with the QR code.

reviews_detailed.author: Percy Cheung
reviews_detailed.text: Been here a couple times, the service is sometimes good sometimes so so. We usually have to order extra spicy sauce with the sauerkraut fish. Food quality is pretty consistent. I like the make your own drink station they have.

reviews_detailed.author: J.David Hwang
reviews_detailed.text: It’s a restaurant soecialising the  popular sour pickle fish soup.  It’s quite tasty but a little too sour for me to fully enjoy the soup itself.  It’s delicious to go with with rice.   The price is above average but business is great!

name: 忠青商行
formatted_address: 100台灣臺北市中正區青島東路6-1號
reviews:
經過我們爆點一波
我給你幾個必吃推薦
👍🏻花甘：軟又多汁，驚艷
👍🏻排骨：酒糟香氣，酥脆又嫩
👍🏻手切威士忌牛肉燥乾麵：熱吃很爽口，麵稍有硬度，牛油香撲鼻，但千萬不要冷的吃
👍🏻濃厚雞白湯+蛋：這個是真爽，蛋絲多，雞湯好喝，沒毛病。

蝦仁飯個人覺得稍微無聊，可能其他東西太順口了。
桌上基本上都沒有毛病，就是吃太飽而已。

當天前面六組，但輪的很快一下就到我們了。
好吃會再來喔！

😀位於捷運善導寺站附近的忠青商行，早已是台北中正區名聲響亮的眷村味名店。雖然許多人是衝著那碗滿滿蝦仁的「極品好蝦炊飯」而來，但真正懂吃的饕客，絕對不會錯過店內的隱藏實力派——家傳爛肉麵。

​🍜 靈魂主角：家傳爛肉麵
​這碗麵完美詮釋了「爛」字的最高境界。這裡的「爛」並非口感軟爛無神，而是指燉煮到化骨綿掌般酥軟的豬肉。

●​肉質口感：精選的豬肉部位經過長時間文火慢燉，輕輕用筷子一撥即散，入口即化，油脂的部分更是軟糯而不膩口，充滿老派眷村家庭的溫暖感。

●​湯頭與麵條：湯頭醇厚卻不鹹口，帶著淡淡的肉香與甘甜，搭配上吸飽湯汁、帶有Q度的麵條，每一口都能感受到濃郁的古早味。

​🥢 延伸推薦：不容錯過的靈魂配角
​來到忠青商行，除了爛肉麵，桌上建議再補上幾道經典小菜，才算完整：
●​極品好蝦炊飯：鋪滿蝦仁的視覺饗宴，蝦湯精華滲透進米飯。
●​威士忌牛肉燥飯：創新的風味讓傳統肉燥多了層次感。
●​雞汁燙青菜：雖然是配角，但鮮美的雞油香氣讓人驚豔。

​✨ 總結評價
​忠青商行的空間環境乾淨明亮，將傳統眷村美食包裝得精緻且有質感。家傳爛肉麵不僅僅是一碗麵，它更像是一種對「時間」與「火候」的致敬。對於不愛剝蝦、追求扎實飽足感與深沉肉香味的食客來說，這碗麵才是真正能代表忠青商行「功夫」的靈魂之作。

中午11:30左右抵達，店內尚有許多空位（反而是隔壁的雙月已大排長龍）
店內裝潢很有臺灣味，紅的喜氣
門口有提供熱的養生茶（其實就是黑糖枸杞紅棗茶）以及醬料區，其中非常推薦椒麻辣椒油，麻感與辣香兼具。旁邊亦有付費飲料區可自行選購
極品好蝦炊飯由白飯、蝦仁、蝦油組成，蝦味雖濃但單吃起來其實只有一般水準。不過加上半熟的香煎土雞蛋和椒麻辣椒油後風味整個升級，麻香、蛋液、蝦醬充分融合後讓整碗飯更有記憶點
高麗菜滷就是常見白菜滷的翻版，高麗菜滷的軟爛，十分入味
而最最最驚奇的是忠青炸排骨，完全是滿分的一道料理。炸皮使用傳統地瓜乾粉，酥脆且緊實扒在肉上。裡頭的排骨也有事先醃過，吃來肥瘦適中、軟嫩夠味。外頭撒上的胡椒粉更是突顯了台味經典
整體而言，食物皆有一定水準，不過價格偏高。最推薦必點的絕對是炸排骨，要說忠青是被蝦仁飯耽誤的排骨飯店也不為過…

reviews_detailed.author: Ally Virlynn
reviews_detailed.text:
The shrimp rice bowls (both with and without the soft shell crabs) were absolutely delicious! There was no fishy smell. The sauce was perfect! All the sunny side up eggs were cooked to perfection as well. The vegetables were a tad bland but it was still acceptable to me. The free brown sugar red date wolfberry hot tea tasted so good.

The lady serving us was friendly and accommodating. All the food items were served pretty fast too although it is stated in the menu that the soft shell crab shrimp bowl might take some time as the crabs are deep fried after order is taken. The soft shell crabs were very crispy as well. Basically, everyone in my family loves the food so much.

Recommended to try out! We will definitely visit again the next time we are in Taipei.

reviews_detailed.author: Juztin Png
reviews_detailed.text:
was recommended by a local friend to check out 忠青商行 in Taipei, so I went with a group of friends. When we arrived, we were told there would be a wait, which was fine, but I must say, their table management needs improvement. We waited around 40 minutes for a table of four, and despite the restaurant being full, they kept calling in tables for two from the queue, rather than combining tables to seat slightly larger groups.

The staff seemed overwhelmed, with three or four people on the floor managing mobile orders, yet they still couldn’t keep up with food delivery and table turnover. This led to longer waiting times and showed a clear need for better organization.

Payment was another issue. Their app lets you select cash or credit card, but we found that not all credit cards, especially foreign ones, are accepted. Additionally, they only offer local Taiwan payment apps, which tourists can’t use, and they don’t have a POS machine for physical credit cards. This made payment frustratingly inconvenient for us as tourists.

The food itself was good, but we were disappointed to find that many of their signature dishes were sold out by 12:30 pm, even though they open at 11 am. If these dishes are popular, it would make sense to prepare more.

Overall, while I’d recommend trying their food, be prepared with cash if you're a tourist, expect a wait if you’re in a larger group, and have alternative dishes in mind just in case they run out.

reviews_detailed.author: Darren
reviews_detailed.text:
Went to the branch store located at Taipei HSR Station, where you have to order as a set. Got the Shrimp Rice w/ sausage and egg, as well as the Dry Noodles w/ Chilli Peppers and Minced Pork. The shrimp, sausage, and egg yolk made for an intense flavour bomb, but it quickly became too saucy and surfeiting at the end. the portion was just decent, but this was a good thing as my partner lost her appetite for the bowl about three-quarters in. The noodles faired better, but while it was tasty in all honesty it's just noodles with minced meat. The sides included in the set were alright - the worse were the tasteless veges and the best was the soup that had a very strong shellfish taste.

Overall, our meal came up to 631NTD. A good option if you wanted to try the Michelin Bib Gourmand Shrimp Rice dish but do not fancy joining the long queue at the main store. Personally, go for it if you want to try, but the meal wasn't that great that I would return (to neither this branch or the main).

reviews_detailed.author: Art Yuji
reviews_detailed.text: This was my first experience at a traditional Taiwanese restaurant. The dish was topped with smoked pork, rice, and braised cabbage. I ordered a rich chicken soup, and side dishes of braised cabbage and braised radish. Payment was possible with Line Pay, so ordering and payment could be completed from the table. It was smooth. The service was good. There's also no lunch break, so it's easy to just drop in. There's seating in the middle that can accommodate 24 people, and takeaway and delivery

reviews_detailed.author: Natalie Betricia
reviews_detailed.text: The food was nice, but the shrimp rice was a bit on the sweet side.  The chicken was yum! The staff were great. However, it is really crowded.

name: JUNTO 同
formatted_address: Floor 2, No. 22館前路中正區臺北市台灣 100
reviews:
今次午餐的菜色：

輕盈小紫瓶
山海奇緣
千千牛肝葷雞肉酥
星夜芥麼厲害
不能說的秘密
陳皮Gin水蛋海鮮餃
木薑油千錘百鍊黑叉燒
懷舊街邊碗仔翅
椒鹽 8/888 蝦
大紅袍碧綠炒鳳片
鮑汁薑蔥肉絲撈粗
焦糖脆脆薑汁撞奶

感覺很創新，很獨特！
把經典的香港街頭茶記食品重新包裝，眼前和味覺一亮！

接著就是要說說要改進的地方

1）服務員上枱有兩個小失誤，一是放低不能說的秘密時發現唔對路收番個箱😂，另外前一道菜還未食完下一道菜就來了（可能是我們吃得慢😂）

2）整個吃的過程就像廚師像導遊般帶著我們遊覽他的世界，感覺很溫和，但去到大紅袍碧綠炒鳳片時，味覺太刺激了！太辣，而且雞胸肉就是麻煩，略柴，結果這碟是唯一吃剩的，因為太辣，我們五人也沒辦法吃完

3）我到好後期先發現石頭內有濕手巾，但那外觀上。。。我初時以為是哪裡用過的甚麼😅

以下是希望將來能有機會在Junto的創新下重新演繹的港式菜色
1）粟米斑塊
2） 椒鹽九肚
3） 避風塘炒（？）
4） 咖哩魚蛋
5） 沙爹（？）
6） 潮式菜色（牛雜，魚蛋粉，滷味等）

最後，香港人，加油！

已訂了位會再來～😃

非常附有創意的粵菜料理！每一道上菜都仔細閱讀Menu上的菜色說明，可能因為是港式口味的關係口味偏重，但每一道味道都很美味，喜歡新奇創意料理的會喜歡，15道主菜湯品前菜甜點的組合，保證吃的超飽超撐！
唯一美中不足的是服務人員介紹菜色看得出來略顯生澀，介紹的不是太流暢，上菜速度有點過快，建議改善這兩點會大大加分！

其餘無論是用餐環境亦或是菜色美味度都很優質！
這是一次噱頭十足的用餐經驗，加點的炒牛河鑊氣十足，炒得香噴噴，套餐菜色雖有創意，卻非每一道菜都讓人覺得驚豔。服務態度不差，只是顯得生疏。整體的消費感受，相比其價位，有一點不划算。

reviews_detailed.author: Hannah Chiang
reviews_detailed.text:
Had an amazing lunch at Junto. Service was impeccable. Food was delicious and thoughtfully prepared. Each dish comes with a theme/story and combines fresh ingredients, chef’s creativity, and artful presentation.

The staff takes great care to make sure you are comfortable and explains the ingredients and stories behind each dish. It makes for a very enjoyable dining experience and we cannot wait to return to try the dinner menu which will showcase more entrees vs dim sum bites and therefore a whole different set of cooking skills according to the exceptional maître d’ Terry who warmly welcomes each guest.

We really feel like we were treated so well during our visit. See you soon!

reviews_detailed.author: Kamlesh Chhetty
reviews_detailed.text:
​We visited Junto on December 1st, 2025, and overall had a very pleasant experience. The culinary creativity on display was definitely the highlight. The restaurant offers a set menu with truly great creativity, presenting a sophisticated and modern take on Cantonese cuisine. The servers were consistently attentive throughout the meal, which contributed to a comfortable dining atmosphere.
​It is worth noting that the restaurant offers a smaller selection of dishes for lunch compared to dinner. More notably, there were a few minor service points that kept it from being a perfect experience. The staff did not proactively inquire about our beverage preferences; we had to ask to see the wine/drinks menu ourselves. Similarly, we were not informed about the additional options or possibilities to upgrade certain dishes on the menu, which felt like a missed opportunity to enhance the meal.
​While I highly recommend booking in advance and experiencing the cuisine, I would advise keeping your expectations slightly below the highest tier you might have for a Michelin-recommended establishment. The food is excellent, but the service details could be refined to match the quality of the kitchen.

reviews_detailed.author: Michael Choi
reviews_detailed.text:
Visit Junto today for lunch with 3 of my friends. We ordered the lunch tasting menu and added the extra  Lava Sesame Ball for dessert and ordered the Gin with dried Tangerine peel. (The drink is very tasty.)

In general, it is a solid meal for the price. However personally I think there are room for improvement, especially as a recognised Michelin mentionee restaurant.

Today's Lunch:

Radiant Blend Juice - refreshing and a good start for the meal.

Crispy Sweet Potato and Taro Seafood bites - for serving, the waitress poured sauce lightly onto the crisps, it provided an acidity and sweet flavour to lighten the fried potato and taro, however maybe the strips are too thin and short, the sauce struggles to cling into the fries, and lots of the sauce landed on the plate.

Untold Secret Jelly Cube - This is a pork dish and is one of their signature dish, the seasoning is very nice on the surface if the meat, but didn't fully penatrate into the middle, so the middle of the meat is a little blend.

Seafood Dumpling and Steamed Egg with aged Tangerine Peel Gin - a very light and nice dish. Before serving the Tangerine Gin is lightly sprayed on to the dish, the steamed egg is smooth and silky, the dumpling skin in tender and filling is complex, but I failed to feel the connection between the gin spray and the overall dish.

Crispy Roll stuffed with Porcini Chicken - I felt the roll mimicking the 蘿蔔絲酥餅, the taste of the stuffing is good, however within the 4 pieces, 2 of the pieces are slight burnt at the bottom.

Mustard Cheese Glutinous Rice Dumpling - mimicking the 鹹水角 it is presented with a Van Gogh painting, but the dumpling is not rested enough and it's burning to the lips. However the subtle cheese is beautiful.

Chef's signature Char-Siu with Mountain Pepper Oil -  this is another signature dish, and the same as the Jelly Cube, the sauce have different layer of taste but is not too sweet, but like the Jelly Cube, the middle of the meat lacks penetration and it depends on the sauce to give it taste. Personally the Char-Siu can slice a little thicker like traditional Char-Siu.

Imitation Shark Fin Soup - This is one of the best 碗仔翅 I have tried, the ingredients are slices thinly and the soup temperature is just right.

Salt and Pepper Fried Shrimp - the shrimp is fried just right, but seasoning is a little on the soft side.

This is the forth deep fried dish already and at this point we felt it's one too many deep fried dishes.

Stir Fried Chicken with Dahingpoa Pepper - This is the only dish that I can say I don't fully understand. The chicken is blend (I can taste pepper oil and chilli) but then the taste is not strong (or is it suppose to be so subtle?) The deep fried green garish on our plate is like 川椒雞 but are not consistent and not crispy enough and it soft on presentation.

Thick noodles in Abalone Ginger and Scallion Sauce - The noddles are tender and nicely cooked, the sauce is coated evenly on the noodles. Simple and nice dish.

Ginger Milk Pudding with Caramel Crunch - After the heavy meal (10 courses), this is very refreshing, smooth and tasty. With the caramel it's already very nice, adding the caramel added an extra layer of taste.

Lava Sesame Ball - when it arrives and we open it, lava already solidified, however it taste beautiful.

Just a couple of points on presentation (1) Suggest all use table cloth because the wood table cloth is all scratched, (2) provide more sharing chopsticks, there is only 1 pair for us to start with to share among us 4.

The waiter and waitress are friendly and explained the dish well.

Just some personal feeling and comments, as I said solid menu and I will definitely go again and try the dinner menu, which looks appealing also.

reviews_detailed.author: chloe dennis
reviews_detailed.text: Worth the travel for miles! The tasting menu shows meticulous thought in its design across each course, with every dish expertly crafted to highlight both flavors and presentation. The crew displays an amiable attitude, adding to the overall enjoyment of the dining experience. Each table is illuminated by a spotlight directed at its center, enhancing the atmosphere and highlighting the meticulous care with which guests can capture their dining experiences, or, capture the food. My personal favorites are watercress soup, crispy taro and egg white dumplings. Highly recommended! Do remember to make reservation.

reviews_detailed.author: Chi Pham
reviews_detailed.text: Had my birthday dinner here and it definitely didn’t disappoint! We went for the 15-course tasting menu, which took about 2.5 hours and was full of creativity and surprises. Every dish was beautifully presented, and the staff explained each course with care. I especially loved the jelly cube - I still remember how the flavors burst in my mouth - and the crispy sweet potato and taro seafood bites, which was fried but not oily at all, just perfectly crispy and fun to eat. Thank you also for the birthday cake ^^

name: 擂銗餐廳
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區長安西路57號
reviews:
港式點心尚可，走穩定路線。
不花巧，不賣情懷，
味道在，份量對，
讓人可以安心把一餐吃完。

翻著餐牌，
法式烤魚排、西西里番茄牛肉飯、
日式拉麵，
還有養生甜點與幾樣素食。
看得出來，是在照顧不同人的胃口，
也是生活慢慢調整後留下的選擇。

溝通很直接。
沒有浮誇的「歡迎光臨」，
但需要的時候，人都在。
服務人員把事情做好，
盡力、不囉嗦，
那是一種熟練後的體貼。

裝潢看得出來是上一手頂讓的，
沒有特別翻新，
但乾淨、可用。
在偏西式的空間裡吃著港式點心，
不突兀，
反而像很多移民的日常 -
先撐住，再慢慢來。

務實、取捨、把日子過下去，
這些細節，都很香港。

老闆，加油。

鄰近捷運站的港點店，蠻受外國人歡迎的。
第一次來到先點了綜合燒賣、蝦餃、叉燒包和日式拉麵試試，燒賣每種味道都很足夠，內餡飽滿，個人覺得比多數連鎖店好吃，日式拉麵是有點類似乾拌麵的感覺，吃辣的人推薦加點辣，整個味道會提升很多，點套餐附的蝦捲和高麗菜也好吃。
附近有停車場，但蠻容易客滿，推薦搭乘大眾運輸前來，1樓座位較少，聽說還有地下室座位但還沒機會參觀。有機會會再訪。

入座後店員快速帶位入座，地下室還有很多位子。有多種語言的菜單可以看還有照片。
餐具與水杯自取，廁所有兩間還滿加分的。生意還滿好的，入座後一直有客人入入續續地進來。

鮮蝦腐皮卷100
皮有一點油，附上了一盤醬料，比較帶酸感。我沒有很愛，腐皮卷很好吃

五小福燒賣
黃色皮的蝦子滿多，口味很棒。
松露口味的調味很適宜。
綠色皮的像海鮮的口味，有玉米很清甜。
紅色麻辣口味也很香，辣度台灣人可以接受。

咖哩豬
咖哩的口味很清新，滿好吃

番茄西西里牛肉飯
醬料跟飯是分開的，醬料看起來很像羅宋湯。吃起來真的很像醬料版的羅宋湯

整體來說是都還滿不錯的，沒有太地雷的東西。最滿意是五小福燒賣，會願意為了這個餐點特地回來吃。

reviews_detailed.author: Valerie Adams
reviews_detailed.text: Absolutely delicious! I ordered the hot and sour noodles and the shrimp tempura. Everything was cooked perfectly and came out quickly! The staff are extremely friendly as well. I’ll definitely be back!

reviews_detailed.author: Real honest reviews
reviews_detailed.text: We came around 1:40 p.m. for lunch and waited about 5–10 minutes. The place was packed with tourists, which made sense given how close it is to the main train station. We ordered four different kinds of shumai along with a wonton soup. The wonton soup was a miss. The classic/original shumai, though, was really good, especially with the chili sauce. While it seemed like the shumai were pre-made or frozen rather than made in-house, they were still quite tasty. Our second favorites were the black truffle shumai and the shrimp dumplings (although the wrapper was too soft and not the right texture). I wouldn’t order the spicy shumai again, as it wasn’t my favorite.

reviews_detailed.author: Swee Ping Lim
reviews_detailed.text: I had a wonderful experience at Lei Hou Restaurant! 🤩 The food, especially those delicious dumplings, was simply amazing. 🥟 The service was top-notch, always attentive and friendly. 🥰 While the atmosphere was good, the incredible food and service truly made my visit memorable! ✨

reviews_detailed.author: Sean Seah
reviews_detailed.text: The Siu Mai rocks. Glutinous rice was good but the Har Kow was a little dry. The skin is just a tad thick. Service and great with a quiet env.

reviews_detailed.author: Lebao Yaj
reviews_detailed.text: It was great, the best I've had outside of America so far. There shrimp rolls were good too. Definitely try it out. I wish they had regular pork dumplings though

name: 漁陶屋 日式料理
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區承德路三段206之1號
reviews: 踩雷了！沒有仔細看評論，只看到有4.4 分就進去吃，點了商業午餐的鰻魚飯$580，吃到的內容和菜單有很大的出入，海鮮沙拉變成綠花菜，魚骨味增湯沒有魚的味道，非常淡又沒味道，手卷普通，主要是鰻魚飯應該是調理包加熱，非常小非常腥，旁邊放很多薑片和醃菜來充場面，吃到一半我就不想吃了，很雷很後悔，家人點的生魚片尚可，但份量也是很少，甜點選了蕨餅，但說沒有，用紫米紅豆湯代替。很無奈的踩雷經驗，商業午餐兩人付了1040，我覺得只有大約6、700 的價值。
點了不可能的商業套餐，內容有：花椰菜、洋蔥鮭魚捲、蘆筍手捲、味增湯、鯖魚、飯、紅豆紫米湯。價位只要360元，CP值很高！留評論還送生魚片，讚！🐟

來花博逛市集、順便跟朋友約吃飯、看到這家日式料理感覺很不錯就來吃看看、店面空間精緻小巧、座位不多、建議打電話預約一下比較好！
這次吃商業午餐「紅酒蕈菇牛肋」調理的非常好吃、龍蝦手捲也很讚、還有燻鮭魚🤤打卡還有送生魚片😋只是闕餅沒有我想像符合我的口感跟味道😂

畢竟主要是吃日式料理、整體來說還是非常好吃的！是我喜歡的味道😍

reviews_detailed.author: M. Eren Akbıyık
reviews_detailed.text:
I cannot overstate how fantastic of a lunch this was.

Flavorful and fantastic lobster roll, smoked salmon, as well as a deeply enjoyable clam soup. Great idea with the tahini/katsuyobushi broccoli salad.

However, the fish (threadfin) was truly exceptional, and one of the best fish cookery I have ever seen, well executed ichiyaboshi combined with a perfect cooking and a blowtorch finish that made the whole fish basically into creme brulee.

Worth changing your way to drop by here, have a lunch with some sake.

reviews_detailed.author: TST
reviews_detailed.text: We ate here in 2020 and really enjoyed the food. We came on this trip for the fish which was grilled perfectly and was really fresh. It was the service that didn't sit right with us. The lady was unfriendly when we asked about the fish we wanted. Maybe they were having a bad day. Hopefully when we come by the next time they can be more personable.

reviews_detailed.author: Jessica Kan
reviews_detailed.text: The restaurant is a very japanese style bistro. There are many fried things you can choose, but we are in a rush, so we ordered a Hokkaido pork bone ramen and a sashimi rice bowl. The soup of the ramen was really fresh and flavorful and the sashimi was really good 👍, hopefully we can have more time to enjoy the meals next time.

reviews_detailed.author: Kane
reviews_detailed.text:
The sushi is underwhelming and the prices are higher than in other, much better Japanese restaurants. We tried a few other dishes including the prawn sushi, which was mostly rice. We also tried the egg tofu which was tasteless. The salmon sushi was okay.

The staff weren’t so friendly, however, I think I would struggle to be friendly if I was serving subpar food all day.

reviews_detailed.author: Big Ben
reviews_detailed.text: average and overrated. A place for filling up your hunger, ok. An awesome one… not quite so, in my opinion. Especially, their roll is kinda disappointed.

name: 稻舍食館 迪化店
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區迪化街一段329號
reviews: 環境整個氛圍舒適乾淨，上菜速度也令人滿意，小菜與主食的口味都很不錯，份量也足夠。三樓還能參觀，廁所也十分乾淨。唯獨本來很期待的豬油拌飯，因為米粒過乾影響口感，由於本身已經是喜歡偏乾的口感，但還是覺得有點不適應，希望能稍作調整，期待下次再訪。

稻舍最厲害的就是香蔥豬油拌飯（提供熱豬油+冰醬油自己拌熱蔥飯）和懷舊紅燒肉，搭配小菜四季豆炒菇、芥末海帶芽泡菜和刈菜排骨湯$420，另外也點了香烤午仔魚客飯$360，雙棗燉牛板腱客飯$450，酥嫰豆乳雞客飯$360，外加10%服務費。
趁上菜前逛了一下百年老宅，走到後面看天井，爬上二樓古老木樓梯，古色古香，味口大開。

「稻舍食館」一直躺在我的收藏夾裡好久，今天走過去剛好看到開門、剛好有空的座位、剛好我還沒吃飯，這三個剛好直接把我推進門。

主餐完全沒讓我失望。烤雞腿鮮嫩不柴、外皮微焦香到剛剛好，是那種一切開就知道廚師功力的熟度。而午仔魚更是驚喜，烤得外皮恰恰、魚肉細緻多汁，不誇張，連魚皮都香到讓人捨不得放過。紅燒肉也超級強，滷得非常入味，肥瘦比例漂亮，湯汁一淋在飯上，白飯瞬間蒸發得比綠咖哩還快。

小菜雖然是涼菜，但搭起來意外非常順口，海帶絲酸爽清新、油豆腐和豆干也都很耐吃。豬油拌飯是整套裡最有儀式感的地方，自己動手拌才好吃。豬油繞兩圈、醬油繞一圈，攪開後香氣直接衝腦門，每一口都是樸實卻幸福的味道。

附湯濃郁到不像「附湯」，喝得出用心。而餐後熱茶更是整個下午的完美句點。我們三個人點了兩壺，被店家熱情回沖到第三次，結果一坐就是整個下午，彷彿不小心把這裡當成自家客廳。

總結：稻舍食館是一間會讓人想再訪、再回味的店。雞腿、午仔魚、紅燒肉各有亮點，涼菜爽口、豬油拌飯好玩又好吃，熱茶更讓整餐變完整。是一家吃完會想默默說「還好今天路過」的療癒系餐館。

reviews_detailed.author: Joyce Wong
reviews_detailed.text:
Reply to owner's reply: Level 2 was almost empty but staff didn't use it. I was next in queue and more than 15pax left the restaurant from Level 2.

Don't come without online reservation. Got queue number at 2.30pm and we are next in queue. At 2.50pm, there were many empty tables but realised shortly 6 tables were setup for the staff lunch and other tables were meant for 3.30pm lunch appointment. When I asked if we have a chance to get a table soon, staff informed that it's already indicated that the tables will only be available soonest at 3.30pm when we get our queue number at 2.30pm, so we just have to wait till 3.30pm. Upon my pushing again, staff said 1 reservation was cancelled so we got seated at 3.15pm. I also observed that the tables of 4pax were all reserved by 2pax each. I cannot reasonate with their reservation system so I won't recommend anyone to walk in.

reviews_detailed.author: Shirleen Tan
reviews_detailed.text:
I would say this is a fanciful Taiwanese food. The restaurant is located in a very pretty alley.

The presentation of the food is really eye pleasing. It makes me happy just by looking at it. The food is amazingly delicious and the atmosphere of the restaurant is fantastic too. Very nostalgic vibe.

reviews_detailed.author: Emilia Liu
reviews_detailed.text: Very traditional Taiwanese style cuisine. I love the retro decor, full of history and very well preserve. The food was delicious too. Definitely will come back again

reviews_detailed.author: Michael Wu PhD
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious traditional Taiwan restaurant with a spin. They are famous for their rice.

reviews_detailed.author: Sam W
reviews_detailed.text:
The foods were excellent. We enjoyed every dish we ordered. Though I particularly liked the Sea Bass with Loofah and Mushrooms, Fermented Tofu Fried Chicken and the Braised Pork. I love that they give you a jar of soy sauce and lard for the rice. I have not had that since I was a little kid.

The service was very friendly, they gave us a private room for party of 5 instead of make us wait for a table. They did tell us the time limit is 90 minutes. Maybe a thing in Taiwan as another place had told us the same. Plenty of time because of the quick service and we didn't plan to linger.

A friend back home recommended this place. I felt compelled to buy them a souvenir because of the recommendation.

name: waku waku pasta 赤峰店
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區赤峰街8巷4號
reviews:
在赤峰街散步時走進【Waku Waku Pasta 赤峰店】，整體空間帶著日系清新感。木質桌椅搭配柔和燈光與簡約設計，氛圍輕鬆又舒服，很適合午後坐下來休息一下。

點了一杯美式咖啡，風味乾淨順口，苦韻不重、尾韻清爽；甜點選了芒果椰奶巴斯克乳酪蛋糕，外層微焦、內裡濕潤綿密，芒果的果香與椰奶的柔和甜味搭配得很剛好，整體清爽不膩。

店裡氣氛不吵雜，偶爾傳來輕聲聊天與餐具碰撞聲，節奏很舒服。不論是逛街途中來杯咖啡，或和朋友小聚聊天，都很適合停留一段悠閒的午後時光。 ☕🥭🍰

回訪第五次～每次來都非常喜歡！價格來說CP值很好，女生加套餐會吃很飽！（每次都打包）。
餐點份量夠、調味偏重口味，味道很好、偶爾有限定口味，這次剛好遇到聯名活動，聯名餐點都有可愛的小立牌插在上面，是一間好拍照、好聊天，也能好好品嚐美食的日式義麵館！
只能現場掃碼候位～目前最久等候不超過30分鐘，等待的時間附近店家隨便逛，時間很快，還會覺得逛不夠XD，內用100分鐘限制，但翻桌率蠻快的～
那些說好吃的人，平常到底是吃多糟🤔我沒吃過這麼難吃的義大利麵，現煮的比100元等級還難吃，比外帶悶爛的義大利麵還慘，麵整個糊糊的、中卷吃起來也軟爛爛的，如果餐點好吃我才不管服務人員態度好不好，但問題是餐點就很難吃！如果對義大利麵有要求的人，千萬三思，然後剝皮辣椒炸雞點正常醬了還是很少醬，有跟沒有一樣，無法想像如果點少醬是不是幾乎要沒醬。

reviews_detailed.author: Dan Loy
reviews_detailed.text:
First time here, accept walk-in only and you will need to scan their QR code when you reached.
Food ordered:
Truffle Mushroom Spaghetti - The smell of truffle , taste wise was average ok. I have taste better ones

Service - Good and attentive. No doubt.

reviews_detailed.author: rachel
reviews_detailed.text: 🌟8/10🌟 The environment is welcoming and the staff are friendly. We visited at tea time and luckily we got direct to sit immediately. The dishes presented very decent and nice, the taste is good but not as good as it look like. My personal favourite will be the pancake, the taste of the cream is rich and creamy. Every corner and the vibes are amazing decorated for pictures. (ˊᵒ̴̶̷̤ ꇴ ᵒ̴̶̷̤ˋ)

reviews_detailed.author: H
reviews_detailed.text:
Ordered the Sicily coffee and a garlic oyster pasta.

The Sicily coffee was surprising as it was refreshing. I had some sweet lemon juice in the coffee. This went well with my window seat as it was very therapeutic.

Can't say the same for the garlic oyster pasta. It was lacking strong garlic flavours for an aglio olio. For the oysters, there were quite a few so the portions are decent.

However, I kept biting into "sand" or the black dirt that exists in shellfish. That ruined my experience.

reviews_detailed.author: serena chin
reviews_detailed.text:
They only take cash and have a QR code queuing system. Recommend to get a number before exploring the area.

Visited on a Sunday night at around 630; 15 groups ahead of me but I got my table by 715.

Will recommend the Neapolitan pasta! Did not get to try their pancakes because it was OOS.

Cute little space

reviews_detailed.author: Joe D
reviews_detailed.text: I'm so glad I came back to Waku Waku after failing to get a table on a very busy Saturday with a very long wait. We were able to walk in and be seated immediately for lunch at 2pm. Ordering via QR code was very easy (thx to Google Translate) and our food was brought out very quickly. For our mains we had the fried chicken pasta and the salmon mentaiko pasta. Both dishes were generously portioned with perfectly cooked al dente pasta, and we found ourselves scraping up every bit of sauce off of the plates. Aside from pasta, I REALLY enjoyed the fresh baked bread (crusty yet chewy, with a  fire mentaiko spread) and the chicken wings (roasted instead of fried, fall off the bone, lightly sauced and topped with pine nuts). A couple of delicious refreshing summer drinks completed our meal: an iced Sicilian coffee and an iced daffodil tea. Looking forward to trying their other locations!

name: 閣樓哩
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區歸綏街157號
reviews:
△ 空間寧靜舒適
▲ 限時用餐兩小時
△ 部分位置有插座
▲ 不收服務費
△ 提供 Wi - Fi
▲ 純現金（先點後結）
△ 餐具、水、紙巾等自取
▲ 低消 1杯飲品 或  200元
△ 提供洗手間
▲ 看書或電腦工作皆宜
△ 週一、週二 公休日
▲ 附近自找停車格／場
△ 提供甜點、提供鹹食
▲ 禁止帶外食
△ 限時 兩小時

這次第一次用餐，就直接點招牌的豬排飯「黑豚里肌」，本身味道還不錯，肉也軟嫩，但是有點薄，乍看有點像是炸排骨。烤蔬菜不知道為何有點水味..  咖哩雖然也不錯，但是飯比較少，其實搭起來，會有點不夠吃...整體來說，不是 CP值 相當高的餐點，但就是來這邊用餐、用電腦工作或是聊事情比較方便，也能順便吃飯，可能不是那種會讓人非常期待的餐點。

美式咖啡，味道也還可以，我覺得算可以的，香味比較淡，但是喝起來也算是可以的。

閣樓以前好像有開放，現在看起來是已經沒有，可能擔心危險吧，就已經封起來，不能上去。

店裡風格有點老宅加上一點文青風格的氛圍，其實挺適合用餐、喝下午茶、電腦工作等等。

這裡空間算是舒適寧靜，如跟朋友聊天或用個電腦做事情，其實都可以。不過限制兩小時，不曉得如果人少時能不能長一點時間，如果可以就更方便。

避開用餐時段，我覺得整體內用空間適合看書、聊天、處理事情等，讓人可以心靈沉澱，集中精神，也能夠好好寫一篇文章，而且這邊不收服務費，不過離捷運站比較有遠一點，騎車開車也是可以，只是比較不好停車，不然就是要停車在家樂福裡面，離開再去買東西抵停車費，好像也是可以。上述的內容，提供給大家參考，店家服務態度也很好，推薦給大家。

點了咖哩、松露燉飯跟布丁
餐點都好好吃
完全不會失望
布丁上面點綴的燕麥讓口感更好了

服務很好
店裡環境也很舒適
值得二訪
很棒的早午餐，來過幾次，試過骰子牛及雞胸肉的早午餐，份量多樣式也多，很不錯吃。他的義大利麵也非常好吃，因為我喜歡吃辣，要求加點辣椒也會配合，很棒的服務。假日人很多，最好事先訂位。

reviews_detailed.author: 家安
reviews_detailed.text:
We ordered curry with pork chops, bolognese, Bailey’s latte and a seasoned mixed fruit juice. Food is tasty, but a bit pricey, especially the juice considering the portion. My daughter loves their pudding. The price of the pudding is good for the quality. Not many seat but the atmosphere is good, retro fashion style. Only accept cash.

Anyway, it’s a nice place for a quiet afternoon with friends and family.

reviews_detailed.author: G Reyes
