reviews_detailed.text: I think they’ve perfected the grilled chicken special brunch. Comes with all the sides. Asked for fried egg instead of scrambled and it came perfectly done sunny side up. It was quiet when we came but not complaining- very relaxing atmosphere to enjoy lunch.

reviews_detailed.author: Alice Chiu
reviews_detailed.text: Very friendly staff. Cozy place. Busy during dinner hours. Reservation is recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Dan P
reviews_detailed.text: Had a very good meal. Chicken pine nut pesto pasta. Well prepared and tasty. And creme caramel for dessert.

reviews_detailed.author: Kevin L
reviews_detailed.text: Very friendly staff that makes me want to come back again.

name: 御珍軒
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區重慶北路一段62號2樓
reviews:
熱炒都行，蝦仁粉絲煲有入味，高麗菜的櫻花蝦多到爆，牛小排都嫩嫩~
嗯…點心部份…上菜很快。
所以是蒸了很久？一直在蒸籠上？

鳳爪不是我愛的口感，也不是我想像的口味。如果可以的話，我會希望不要那麼像冷凍食品的口感就太好了。
已經來訪多次，服務人員以及櫃檯小姐親切，包廂隔音還需加強，否則用餐時感覺難免有點吵

北車京站附近的老字號港式餐廳
料理每一道都超級美味
鮮蝦腸粉蝦子彈牙皮薄軟嫩
醬料道地
腐皮捲酥脆外皮內餡紮實好吃
鹹水餃第一次吃有點像大顆的水晶餃
XO醬炒蘿蔔糕極推
微微辣味又不會太鹹
蘿蔔糕炒蛋及豆芽菜炒得入味🤤
珍珠丸有點沒印象但是好吃的記憶
干炒豬河肉不少
河粉口感不會太軟爛
醬料鹹淡適中帶一點點甜味
讓人一口接一口
鳳爪蒸到非常軟很好啃
櫻花蝦高麗菜炒得脆脆的
標準臺灣好吃的高麗菜
奶黃流沙包內餡會爆汁而且很燙要小心燙口
奶黃香氣十足
海鮮豆腐煲料多
大部分是魷魚及豆腐
餐廳一入座服務生就馬上送茶
座位是婚禮場地的圓桌
裝潢有年代感又舒適明亮
適合約4～8人聚餐
人多可以吃到多種類的港點
均分下來便宜
唯一可惜的是沒有港式飲料如凍檸茶等
但料理真的非常好吃道地有回到香港的感覺

reviews_detailed.author: em emmm
reviews_detailed.text:
Updated: 04/2025
The quality dropped again, and went around dinner time, many dimsum dishes are sold out, so you have to book in advance. If they can maintain the quality consistently, it would be even better. 🙏🏻

I first tried this place in 2020, and it was insanely good—like really good. The 腸粉 (Steamed Vermicelli Roll) was next level, with that perfectly soft, slightly chewy rice roll wrapping around crispy bouncy shrimp. The 叉燒 (Red BBQ puff) was another standout—the pastry was beautifully layered and flaky, and the red BBQ pork filling was generous and flavorful. The 蝦餃 (shrimp dumplings) had that perfect juicy, snappy shrimp texture, and even the 牛肉球 (meatballs) were huge and well-seasoned.

That being said, the quality here can be a bit inconsistent. I’ve been back many times, and I have to admit I was disappointed a few times—especially after the pandemic, when the place seemed to go downhill for a while. It even closed temporarily for renovations, so I decided to give it another shot.

Good news—it’s back on track! Not quite at the peak level of my first visit, but way better than during that slump. The 蝦餃 (shrimp dumplings) wrapper was a little too soft and soaky this time, and some of the fried items were a bit greasy.

One thing that has never changed, though, is the service—absolutely top-tier. The staff is incredibly friendly and attentive every single time. I’ve been here more than ten times now, so I really hope they can keep maintain their standards as before.

Reasonable price for great dim sum in town! CP 很高 👏🏻

reviews_detailed.author: Real honest reviews
reviews_detailed.text: We arrived around 1:30 pm, and the restaurant wasn’t full. However, a middle-aged woman refused to serve us. Extremely unfriendly attitude.

reviews_detailed.author: stephane dao
reviews_detailed.text:
I didn’t upload a photo because there’s really nothing to show. I recently moved to Taiwan and am delighted to explore the culinary culture of this “island of treasures” (its nickname in Chinese). However, this so-called Cantonese restaurant is Cantonese only in name.

I’m Cantonese myself and have lived in Hong Kong, Shanghai, and Paris — I’m a big fan of Cantonese cuisine whenever I can find it. To put it briefly, this restaurant is on the same level as the Cantonese restaurants in Paris: not very authentic and overpriced. For a Chinese restaurant in Taiwan, that’s quite astonishing. True food lovers should book a ticket and go taste genuine Cantonese cuisine in mainland China.

reviews_detailed.author: Karen Lim
reviews_detailed.text:
好好吃！
Food was really good, staff are nice and attentive
Ordered
- Steamed Grouper
- Cantonese shrimp fried rice
- Har gow
- shrimp rice roll with chives
- chicken feet
- char siu Pao (wasn’t a fan, a little buttery for me personally- like a croissant)
- jasmine tea
- cola

reviews_detailed.author: Luke Walker
reviews_detailed.text: Decent food, but time between ordering and the food arriving was way too long. (>30 minutes). Spent two hours here and received 6 total dishes.

name: 牧山丘
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區迪化街一段173號
reviews: 牧山丘餐廳以溫潤木質空間與細膩料理，營造出舒適而有質感的用餐氛圍。餐點橫跨義式與創意西餐，從披薩、燉飯到主餐皆展現紮實功力。披薩餅皮外酥內軟，配料新鮮不厚重；牛排熟度掌握精準，肉質柔嫩多汁，搭配濃郁卻不膩口的醬汁，層次分明。海鮮料理表現同樣亮眼，蝦肉彈牙、燉飯米心保有口感，香氣自然。整體調味偏向清爽，能吃出食材本身的風味。無論是朋友聚餐或輕鬆約會，牧山丘都能以穩定品質與舒服節奏，留下令人回味的一餐。壽星還享有一份蛋糕，真的挺貼心的。
為了玻璃屋來到牧山丘，完全被這裡的空間設計給驚艷！老宅改建的空間保留了迪化街的古樸，室內的綠色牆面、藝術畫作與復古花磚交織出很獨特的藝術感。最美的是後院的玻璃屋包廂，滿滿的綠意與原木吊燈，真的很有城市綠洲的感覺。雖然吃飯時聊得太開心忘記拍照留念，但整體的用餐氛圍非常放鬆，是個適合與重要的人聚會、享受靜謐時光的絕佳地點。

第一次來吃這間店，因沒訂位所以坐在一樓高腳椅的地方，好處是可以看師傅料理食物秀（小朋友很喜歡）

餐點（3/5）：
義大利麵：口味符合大眾，份量一般，海鮮鮮味十足，醬偏酸（可能是蕃茄醬的關係）。

Pizza ：薄皮餡多，只是火侯可能稍微大了點，邊邊烤到焦苦味出來，撇除邊邊我覺得不錯吃。

烘蛋：可惜了，因為靠碗壁的地方焦黑，所以吃的時侯有苦味；內容物是培根塊居多，馬鈴薯反而比較少，我覺得應該要更名為西班牙培根烘蛋，這道我個人不怎麼喜歡

沙拉部分，份量蠻多的，醬料也是清爽，只是此道沙拉內的水果有用酒煮過（雖然都已揮發），但還是大人分食掉。

地點（4/5）：附近有汽車室內停車場

整體分數6（滿分10）
生意不錯，真的要訂位才有位子，整體覺得cp值沒有到很高，但如果逛迪化街累了，其實可以到這邊坐著吃個輕食休息一下，最後個人覺得烹調方式跟調味調整一下覺得會蠻合，地理位置也不錯，所以給此分數

reviews_detailed.author: Clinton Yew
reviews_detailed.text: Nice cozy place with private room at the back and more space on the second floor. The clams pasta is al dente. The steak is great. But the steak with the pasta was a bit tough. The kitchen is however not primed for large groups. We happen to meet a full capacity crowd and our steak took an hour to arrive.

reviews_detailed.author: Hsiaoping Wu
reviews_detailed.text: It was a friends’ gathering night, and the place is pleasant to talk  and nice decor for photo taking. We have ordered seafood platter, pasta, pizza, French fries and three different desserts. The food taste’s authentic and nice portion during our visit. it is a great place in a famous historical street.  The restaurant has been really successful for 10 years with high quality ingredients and consistent food quality! No issue to visit soon!

reviews_detailed.author: Teresa Liao
reviews_detailed.text: We had a most wonderful dining experience here! The food was amazing! I loved every bite and I truly believed it was my favorite meal during our stay in Taipei!

reviews_detailed.author: Benjamin Ehrenberg
reviews_detailed.text: It’s food but it has nothing to do with Italian cuisine. It’s bland and tasteless and the pizza is buried in cheap cheese but lacks any taste. The noodles are slightly better, handmade but too thick and undercooked.

reviews_detailed.author: 陳建榮
reviews_detailed.text:
My friends and I came in in the Saturday afternoon and looked for a quite place to relax. Unfortunately that day there was a huge group up on the 1st floor talking really really loudly in regardless of other people’s feeling. We really appreciated the staff re-arranged our table to the ground floor, however, I think the oder and smoke leaking from the kitchen was as well annoying😵

Drinks and cakes are ok but I think the environment doesn’t meet my expectation…

name: 渣男 中山店
formatted_address: 10353台灣臺北市大同區承德路二段14號
reviews:
480的滷味拼盤很一般   沒什麼特色
牛肉也一般   湯麵就是麵+湯
餐點選擇不多   調酒感覺就是在亂搞
調酒名字自以為的風趣
非常不推薦   巷口賣的陽春麵+滷味   可能加起來300有找

低消一杯飲料，現金結帳。
滷味和調酒的店，調酒ㄧ杯320起，滷味ㄧ小盤80起。
特製乾麵很好吃，這個必點，豬血糕也不錯，滷味拼盤就比較普通，口味偏死鹹。
中場還有贈一小杯shot給每人一杯。
整體來說氣氛很熱鬧，有點吵但是聽的到同桌的人說話，但價位不便宜下次會再考慮

整間店的定價完全不太懂 貴的好離譜
低消是兩杯飲料

菜單標示不清 滷味拼盤有什麼 攪和攪和又是什麼 想問店員 店員好像也沒注意到 一直在廚房聊天 晃來晃去

滷味拼盤 480沒什麼東西 （豬腱肉/雞胗/豆乾/貢丸/海帶）貴到荒謬了⋯而且就很普通的東西

烤餃子好吃 醬料很讚

reviews_detailed.author: Elena Fasolo
reviews_detailed.text:
​I rarely write reviews this negative, but my experience here was genuinely dangerous. I suffered severe food poisoning that resulted in a high fever, vomiting, and severe gastrointestinal distress with very debilitating symptoms. It was nearly an ER-level emergency and completely ruined my vacation, as it took me one week to recover.
​Beyond this, the "fine dining" atmosphere felt pretentious. They enforce a strict "one drink per person" rule, even if you only want water or tea. While the ordering method -using a separate sheet to mark items from a priceless menu with pictures -is common in parts of Asia, here it is frustrating, especially for international tourists. The names on the sheet often do not match the picture menu, making the process confusing.
​Ultimately, the food was unremarkable and extremely pricey - aside from the fact that I couldn't eat anything else for a week after dining here. I cannot recommend this place.

reviews_detailed.author: Teedee Hong
reviews_detailed.text:
My first time hopping and I love the vibes here!🥰

Lucky enough that our random walk-in ended up with last table left, so better should call for make a reservation!

I didn’t expect much about foods as we just wanna find places to drink after our dinner. But then those cold dishes serve us with over expectations taste.

So delicious with some fusion in it that make them really different when compare to another Taiwanese beer places.

The sprout dish is what surprised us most. I am not a big fan of sprouts but this is no any foul smelling at all.

Another dish I like is sweet potatoes in porridge. This bowl just need to be double orders!!! 😍

The drinks are all great, especially cocktails!!!

reviews_detailed.author: Konstantin Sevryukov
reviews_detailed.text:
As their other branches - food is great - superb Taiwan fusion cuisine.
Better to book seats in advance.
Main issue - cards not accepted, so prepare cash.

reviews_detailed.author: TungChen Wu
reviews_detailed.text: Environment and atmosphere are awesome, no doubt!! Food is great also, happy to have such Taiwanese side dish restaurant to spend drinking session. However, it's too pricey, the cost is too crazy.

reviews_detailed.author: Huang Sophia
reviews_detailed.text: Nice restaurant with traditional Taiwanese cusine. I am absolutely delighted by the pig-blood-cake. I am very happy with the food. The price is reasonable. The drinks are a bit pricey, but it doesn't bother me that much! The atmosphere is chill. It's great for friendly get togethers!

name: 真珠-台灣佳味 京站店
formatted_address: 10351台灣臺北市大同區承德路一段1號B3
reviews:
饗賓集團的「真珠台灣佳味」，本次是點春節四人套餐，配置相當完整，從冷盤、熱食到湯品，涵蓋了許多台式手路菜的精髓。
【春節四人套餐 $3,368 】
如意小菜：開胃菜，通常包含清爽的醃製時蔬（如黃金泡菜或醃蘿蔔），酸甜開胃。

蒜蓉鮮蝦板條：蝦子新鮮度佳，蒜蓉醬汁調得濃厚而不嗆。底部的板條，吸滿了蝦鮮與蒜香，口感軟 Q 。

化口梅干肉：真珠的招牌，五花肉滷得「化口」，油脂部分入口即化，梅干菜的鹹香，適合配白飯。

蔥油鹽焗雞：雞肉質地紮實且皮 Q，淋上蔥油後香氣提昇了一個檔次，鹹度適中。

麻油蛋松阪豬：麻油味厚實卻不苦澀。松阪豬脆口有彈性，麻油煎蛋吸飽湯汁精華，口感濕潤溫潤，是很有誠意的補氣料理。

金湯海鮮豆腐煲：色澤金黃，湯底濃郁。豆腐滑嫩，內含多種海鮮配料，口感綿密，大人小孩都會喜歡。

蛋酥白菜魯：充滿古早味的代表作。白菜燉得軟爛吸汁，上層撒上的蛋酥增加了香氣與層次感，很有古早風道。

清甜白玉排骨湯：作為結尾的湯品非常稱職。白蘿蔔燉出清甜，與排骨的清肉香交織成清爽的湯頭。

【加點】
金旺鳳梨蝦球盅 ($480)：整顆鳳梨上桌視覺感極強！蝦球個頭很大，外皮乾爽酥脆，配上果肉酸甜，比一般餐廳的鳳梨蝦球更有層次。

鮮菇炒水蓮 ($280)：水蓮炒得翠綠清脆，沒有過多的油感，鮮菇的加入增添了多層次的蔬食香氣。

這一大桌菜算下來平均一人約 $1,000 出頭（含服務費），四個人吃實在吃不完。

年初家庭聚餐，包廂有低消，八位大人一位小孩（友善提供兒童座椅及餐具），點了十人份的套餐，共十二道菜一湯，兩樣招待小菜，十份茶水及甜點。
最後剩下一些湯及滷肉，其餘餐點清空，份量適中，飯可無限續加，鹹淡調味中規中矩，沒有特別驚艷的菜色，僅有玉米蘿蔔排骨湯十分清甜解膩，是吃完後腦海中唯一留香的菜餚。椒鹽排骨肉非常少，幾乎是外層裹粉的口感而已。
每一位服務人員的態度都十分親切熱情，會觀察客人進食進度調控上菜速度，但滷肉壓在最後才上來，大家都快要沒有肚子可容納，近乎是一上桌就可以整鍋打包的節奏，建議調整一下順序。

到真珠聚餐，點了8道菜，不過一開始上菜因為太餓只顧吃沒有拍照，最後只拍了三道菜。
塔香茄子大腸很下飯，胡椒蝦很辣也很下飯，櫻花蝦高麗菜雖然很家常，但是炒得很好吃。蜜棗炸排骨鹹甜入味，要預約的砂鍋魚很大一鍋，人多的時候很值得點。炸鱸魚也是酸甜口味，大家都很喜歡。金沙中卷和炸湯圓每樣都好吃😋
除了砂鍋魚分量比較大之外，其他的菜色分量還可以，不過8個人還是可以靠砂鍋魚吃飽。
服務人員態度非常親切，給👍
Ps,我們坐的圓桌低消3600元。

reviews_detailed.author: Andrew L.
reviews_detailed.text:
While window shopping, we stumbled into this incredible restaurant and were seated immediately—no waiting required! The service was exceptional. We were personally met by the supervisor, Alison, who took our order and offered fantastic dish recommendations. Every plate was absolutely delicious.
The total came to roughly $60US, which was incredibly well worth the price. This delightful meal easily stands out as the most pleasant experience we had during our visit to Taipei. I highly recommend this restaurant; you are guaranteed a joyful and satisfying dining experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Liau Yuan Wei
reviews_detailed.text:
Came here on our last day in Taipei to have lunch before taking the Purple MRT line to Taoyuan Airport. We had these dishes (Minimum spend of 400 NTW per person):
1. Garlic Peanuts: Got this as my mum loves to munch on peanuts
2. Chicken with Classic Scallion Oil: Best cold chicken ever it was so juicy!
3. Steamed Halibut with Taiwan Pickled Seeds: Very fresh fish but this halibut has a lot of fish bones so be careful
4. Claypot Tofu with Seafood: Pumpkin based sauce tofu, got this as my brother can eat tofu every meal
5. Stir-fried Seasonal Vegetable
6. Steamed Garlic Shrimps with Rice Noodles: Not bad, reminds me of my mum’s cooking

Overall not bad food quality and taste! Recommended for any tourists around the area.

reviews_detailed.author: Greggy Chua
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious food with exceptional service, always attentive to giving water. Recommended dish salted egg squid, 3 cup chicken. The abalone chicken soup is not that tasty. Minimum 400 TWD per person required to spend.

reviews_detailed.author: Edward Cheson Sy
reviews_detailed.text:
Jin Zhu serves delicious Taiwanese food with outstanding and speedy service.

Stir-Fried Oysters with Douchi - 4/5, these oyster are cooked in a black bean sauce then served with youtiao bits for extra texture. The server warned us about the dish having a salty flavor but the dish itself isn’t salty. It’s just that fresh oysters have a sea-like salty flavor which was natural.

Sweet and Sour Chicken - 5/5, their version of the dish was certainly different from the deep red colored dishes from other restaurants, but the dish was still prepared very well. Crispy chicken nuggets coated in a slightly sweet brown sauce. My kid loved eating this!

Three cup Tofu - 5/5, delicious tofu in a subtle ginger sauce. This might not be enjoyable for everyone because of the heavy ginger flavor. Nevertheless, I loved it.

The service here was very excellent. They gave my kid color markers to play with and the food was served quite fast.

The white rice was also refillable, which was perfect because it compliments every flavorful dish we ordered.

reviews_detailed.author: Karina Adianto
reviews_detailed.text:
We had our last dinner in Taiwan at Jin Zhu. The interior of the restaurant was beautifully decorated.

We ordered:
Pork fried rice
Stir fried seasonal veggies
Scallion on chicken
Crispy fried pork
Braised pork combo: pork belly & knuckle

The food was great, properly cooked and seasoned. I could tell, all the ingredients & meat were high quality & 'without flaws' products.
It was served beautifully, too. The service was also flawless.

name: 九月茶餐廳
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區承德路二段213號
reviews: 餐點非常好吃，很適合想要嚐異國風味的美食，可以來試試
星洲炒米粉偏乾，感覺是咖哩粉下去炒，餐肉蛋飯真的就是餐肉，蛋，和白飯，以價格來說偏高

店內用餐空間偏窄但不擁擠，入座會送上熱茶。主食選擇多，比較可惜的是點心類品項選擇較少⋯⋯

滑蛋牛肉飯$160
鹹甜醬汁超下飯，炒蛋給的很大方。牛肉很嫩。會讓人忍不住一口接一口吃完！

糖醋魚片飯$140
魚片很嫩很軟，糖醋醬酸酸甜甜的配飯吃很讚～～旁邊的高麗菜偏清淡，感覺很健康。

鮮蝦腐皮卷$145
外皮酥脆，裡面有滿滿蝦仁、韭黃、香菜、筍絲、馬蹄粒。意外的驚豔！！！好吃到眼睛會為之一亮✨

reviews_detailed.author: Jason Johnson
reviews_detailed.text:
Friday 11th April 2025

On our travels to Taipei Taiwan we came across this wonderful Hong Kong 🇭🇰 restaurant, which is only a 10 minute walk from the Ningxia Night Market, or 6 minutes from the MRT Minquan West Rd station “red line”.

If your craving some authentic Kong style food this is the place to visit, we ordered Silky Egg with Char Siu on rice, Crab Meat Siu Mai, Black Sesame Steamed bun, Phoenix claw, Beef with stir Fried noodles, Raddish cake and Tempeh Pineapple 🍍 Rolls.

Ordering is easy via the QR code enabled Menu system which provides photos and english option. Food is great and we really loved all the items. My favourite items where the Pineapple Rolls, Black Sesame Bun, Silky Egg with Char Siu on rice and beef with stir Fried noodles.

I almost forgot to mention that we were served a delicious chicken soup to start the meal and it was super refreshing 😋. Great food flavours, plenty of options, friendly staff and good vibes! We really enjoyed it and I hope you do to.

reviews_detailed.author: martin de geus
reviews_detailed.text:
I had been wanting to go to this restaurant for a while, but kept on forgetting about it.
I'm glad I finally paid it a visit. We had one of the silky egg dishes (beef on rice), and a couple of dim sum dishes as well.
Before we had even made our order we were already served with complimentary soup and tea. After we made our selection via QR code (menu in English and with photos available), the dishes soon started arriving on our table. The silky egg dish was divine (maybe on of the best eggs I've ever tasted), the dim sum were some classics and some new (for me) dishes. The crab yolk siu mai and steamed bbq pork buns were great, the fresh shrimp bean curd rolls were good too, and the tempeh pineapple rolls were a surprising yet tasty choice.
I will come back here to sample more dishes and I would urge you to give this restaurant a chance as well.
Prices were very reasonable and the service was good and fast.

reviews_detailed.author: Elsa
reviews_detailed.text: Way too sweet for my taste but maybe that's how all dim sums are. The smooth eggs dish was covered in oil and too salty, it was too heavy. Blanched vegetables are good though.

reviews_detailed.author: Herman Lam
reviews_detailed.text: Authentic Hong Kong taste in Taipei run by Hongkongers. We tried shrimp dumpling, iced lemon tea, Singapore fried rice noodle,  BBQ pork with fried egg rice. All are up to our expectation. Will come again for other dishes.

reviews_detailed.author: 黃國書
reviews_detailed.text:
The restaurant reminds me of my trips to Hong Kong! They serve authentic dishes such as french toast, pork with scrambled eggs. Their service is also nice and prompt.

More than that, I support Hong Kong! I hope one day they can resume their democratic political status!

name: 大烹小饌
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區民生西路146-1號
reviews:
這次造訪 大烹小饌｜精緻台客中式料理，整體用餐體驗還不錯。餐廳地理位置相當便利，距離雙連捷運站步行大約三到五分鐘就能抵達。也因為人氣相當高，現場幾乎座無虛席，真心建議一定要事先訂位，否則很容易撲空。

餐點部分表現非常亮眼，幾乎可以說是「每一道都好吃」。料理走的是精緻台客路線，在熟悉的中式風味中加入細膩的調味，吃得出廚房在細節上的用心，不會過於油膩，卻依然保有台菜該有的香氣與層次，讓人一口接一口。

這次我們六人用餐，被安排在包廂區，不過和我原本想像中的包廂不太一樣，是由兩張方桌拼在一起的空間，而且包廂是沒有門的，私密性稍微弱了一點，但整體用餐舒適度還算可以接受。

服務方面，上菜速度非常快，點完餐後幾乎不用等太久，節奏掌握得很好；不過服務人員的表情與態度偏嚴肅，雖然專業度沒問題，但想請他們幫忙時，心理上還真的會有點小緊張，忍不住想說一句：「怎麼有點怕怕的🤣」。整體而言，大烹小饌在料理實力上相當值得肯定，是會讓人想再訪、也願意推薦給朋友的中式餐廳。
這是第二次到大烹小饌，第一次是我選擇去嚐鮮，3個人去吃午餐。第二次仍然是吃午餐，朋友總共10人揪聚餐，食材料理還行，就是口味比較偏重，餐點的份量可以，不會太少，但是唯一比較大的缺點是：櫃檯的服務人員比較缺乏熱誠，感覺稍嫌冷酷了一些，2次的感受都是如此。

菜品選擇很豐富，味道很地道，一吃就能感覺出是認真做臺灣味的。調味不會過重，吃起來很舒服，份量也剛剛好，性價比不錯。
環境乾淨、氣氛輕鬆，很適合和朋友一起來吃飯聊天。店員態度也很友善，上菜速度也快。
如果想吃臺式料理的話，這家真的值得來試試，下次還會再來

reviews_detailed.author: K G
reviews_detailed.text: The boss is very kind, and the foods here are absolutely delicious for us. It’s a great place to enjoy a meal, and I’m grateful for the warm hospitality. Highly recommend!

reviews_detailed.author: Davide Scimia
reviews_detailed.text: good tasty food .really well cooked . a Taiwanese flavor and kind of home cooking .

reviews_detailed.author: Stewart Wan
reviews_detailed.text: It’s very delicious. We enjoyed a nice lunch here, ordered not many dishes because the portion is not small and only two ppl. The chicken roll was well made with wine fragrance and crispy skin texture. The chicken thighs were so tasty with crispy non greasy skin. Must order the 炒水蓮, the best of the best! 臭豆腐was really memorable, garnished with garlic and chilli… highly recommended but need to reserve in advance at dinner window, good luck for lunch window to get a table nar!

reviews_detailed.author: Hortensia 夏凌悅
reviews_detailed.text: I had a nice evening at Great Huda. The food was decent, but the next morning I woke up with stomach pain and ended up having some pretty rough digestive issues. I’m not sure if it was due to the spices or the preparation, especially since my stomach can usually handle a lot. Since this was my first time eating here, I’m willing to give it another try to see if I run into the same problem again.

reviews_detailed.author: Pieter Jacobsz
reviews_detailed.text: Honestly that is the best stir fried liver I have ever had. Not over cooked and rubbery. It really could hold its own to wagyu beef. Melts in your mouth. Delicious. Order it even if you don’t like liver. There is no “ organ taste” at all.

name: Les tables
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區貴德街75-2號1樓
reviews:
店家大稻埕的一條神秘小巷內。
外場雖然只有一個人，但很細心，會主動介紹菜品，巡視桌面及做整理。
在每道菜與菜之間，等待時間較長，風格果然很法式，但剛好我們可以邊聊邊喝，所以怡然自得。

每道菜都很好吃，偏像法國鄉村家常菜，似乎在法國街邊，隨意走進任何一間餐館，都會能在菜單上，出現與「Les tables」一樣的料理。所以整體吃起來，美味又輕鬆。

《前菜》 選3樣（前菜佐酒，邊聊邊吃）

1.法式冷肉派：
肉派份量不小，感覺有加入肥肝，口感紮實，不會像傳統肉凍是濕軟口感。佐料芥末籽、自製番茄做的醬（自然的酸甜，配沙拉或麵包，超級好吃）、醃黃瓜、小洋蔥及小辣椒。

2.紅酒蛋盅
簡單來說，滋味就是熟度剛好的水波蛋，搭配法國勃艮第「紅酒燉牛肉」的醬汁。
傳統的「紅酒燉牛肉」，是搭配胡蘿蔔、洋蔥、蘑菇、大蒜，加入足量的濃郁紅酒，長時間燉煮，最後以珍珠洋蔥，上桌時以蘑菇和培根作點綴。
這邊就是將「牛肉」換成「水波蛋」。有點微酸，然後醬汁沒那麼濃稠。

3.蜂蜜百里香烤聖馬瑟琳乳酪吐司
這道料理非常下「吐司」，直接光盤行動，吃不夠，立刻再加點吐司。沾一點微甜牽絲的香烤起司，拿顆核桃與吐司一同入口，非常美味。

《主菜》
1.黑醋栗香煎鴨胸襯脆薯（Magret de Canard）
這道也是法國常見的名菜，廚師掌握的熟度很剛好，皮脆肉嫩又多汁。
其實鴨胸很難料理，熟度拿捏不容易，太生了韌又難咬，太熟了又柴又乾。
常見都是佐「佐紅酒醬 or威士忌橙醬 or 莓果醬」，比較少見佐黑醋栗醬再搭配薯條。
但感覺沒有隔壁桌點的「紅酒醋雞」那樣，香味四溢，光聞就覺得驚艷。

2.里昂梭魚丸（Pike Quenelles in a Creamy Shellfish Sauce and Mushrooms）
光看名稱，讓人完全無法想像這道菜的長相及味道。
服務人員是這樣介紹這道菜，它是在里昂任何一間街邊小店，都會有此道菜，只是每位廚師料理的味道，各有不同。魚丸不同於台式魚丸，口感是鬆軟細滑，沾醬類似濃縮版的「馬賽魚湯」。
上桌後一嚐，就像白肉魚製成的舒芙蕾佐上龍蝦濃湯。
份量維持法國當地特色，一顆就有巴掌大，胃口小的人光看就飽了，魚丸的外層烤到微脆，吃起來很香。店家還附上薑黃飯，可搭配濃郁醬汁品嚐。

《甜點》-生命之泉
就是自製的黑醋栗冰淇淋佐上白蘭地，簡單的搭配，但無敵合拍，完全不會感覺到烈酒的刺激，酸味及冰度，剛好將其中和，只剩下酒香。

店家看到line的訂位資訊，發現我倆是12月壽星，主動贈送插上蠟燭的壽桃，很可愛。

以法式餐酒館而言，這邊的主餐份量十足，男生也能吃飽。加上用餐地緩慢的步調，享受美食之於，能悠哉地聚聚聊聊。
平日中午來吃，氣氛vibe不錯，服務生友善介紹餐點也很親切！餐點整體有歐陸小店感，推薦！下次想來試試別的主菜
第一次去，沒想到在窩在冷清的小巷子裏，ㄧ人主廚但出菜有條有序，毫不拖延；手做冷肉派非常好吃，是我心中的第一，醬汁的功力非常深厚，不管是燉雞或牛排的胡椒醬汁都忍不住想拿麵包抹盤，值得給主廚拍拍手，鼓勵一下！

reviews_detailed.author: Luca bigler
reviews_detailed.text:
I was curious to try this restaurant suggested by a friend and was a nice experience.
Food was delicious ( unfortunately this month can’t drink alcohol, so didn’t test the many wine in the list)
The chef running alone the kitchen was impressive, so we don’t care of the waiting time.
Was just too noisy and windy from the AC and kitchen area.

reviews_detailed.author: Junze Zheng
reviews_detailed.text: Experience on bar top  is very chill & interesting. The lamb dish is one of the best I've tasted! That said, I might choose to skip the ice cream . Melts a bit too fast

reviews_detailed.author: György Adler
reviews_detailed.text:
We had high hopes with this establishment but eventually it turned out as a slight disappointment, maybe because I "ranked" the restaurant merely on its prices.

Upon our arrival we have been introduced to a blackboard, where the menu can be read. I guess the menu changes too frequently so this solution must be for the sake of environment protection.

The staff's attitude seemed promising in the beginning, however later some flaws came to the surface, including:
- As I came from work, I had two big bags with me. It would have been pleasant if the staff offers me the boxes to hold luggage instead of just indifferently watch my struggle with the bags and umbrellas.
- Since it's a French restaurant, the wine selection is sizeable. However, the staff didn't bother to introduce or recommend us some wines and we specifically had to ask for the wine menu.
- My wife asked for the empty bottle for "professional purposes" at the end of our dinner. Although we got a paperbag for the bottle, it remained unwashed.

However the dirty dishes has been taken away almost immediately after we finished a course, so it wouldn't be fair to judge the staff's attention solely on the aforementioned glitches.

Part of the dishes were a let-down as well, especially the rum soaked sponge cake. The rum flavor was extremely dominant, suppressing nearly every other flavor, so after a few bites it seemed like one's eating a bottle of rum spoon by spoon. In light of the amazing lava cake, this dessert was indeed disappointing.

The main dishes, cattle belly and roast duck, on the other hand were amazing, however this former wasn't really outstanding. The duck tasted amazing, it was seasoned and cooked perfectly, whereas the garnish was also magnificent. The home-made sausages were also on the spot.

Overall, due to the flaws I mentioned, I can not be fully satisfied and would expect a bit more "care" for this price.

reviews_detailed.author: 周澄融
reviews_detailed.text: Incredible restaurant. Excellent cuisine crafted with amazing ingredients and impressive skills. It’s not as expensive as other bougie French restaurant in Taipei city, yet it has perhaps more refined, delicate taste and better portion. The environment is also well organized: clean, cozy, stylish and calm. Worth going for special occasions.

reviews_detailed.author: Maximilian Pleyer
reviews_detailed.text:
Its a small and narrow corridor like Restaurant and I brought some friends to entertain them.
Overall we were rather disappointed.
One bottle of white burgundy was fine but served after appetizers were served.
Appetizer portions were tiny & poor value:
1. Asparagus ~ 1 Single Stick cut in 4 pieces 🤐
2. Esgarcots Bourgignon ~ lack of Herbbutter & Bread 🤐
3. Caramelized Brussel Sprouts tasty but tiny
Then we waited for 45 minutes for our Maincourses and after complaining we decided to order another Salad Nicoise to help us over the very long waiting without explanations or apologies.
Finally the maincourse arrived:
1 Salmon & 1 Whole Fish ~ good taste and fair portion.
Right away, while finally being able to enjoy our maincourses, the female server was pushing us for desserts and after my reply to let us finally enjoy our maincourse she replied thatcwe have to decide now because the kitchen will close.....🤬🤬 real nice and considerate service.
When paying NT$ 7700.- / Euro 230 - you should certainly expect more especially in a city where service quality is normally very good.
I will surely NEVER AGAIN bring my friends there to be disappointed and to lose face on top of it.

name: 濤濤鮮魚舖
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區錦西街82號1樓
reviews: 基本是個餐敘放鬆的好地方，位置不多，但也不會有壓力，生魚片偶爾有筋，其他味道偏鹹點，

好吃，餐點味道都好鮮美，份量比較多很適合我，前一天晚上第一次來吃之後，隔天中午又再來吃。
牛丼的肉和醬不會很油，我平常沒有特別喜歡牛丼，但好喜歡這家的牛丼！
生魚片好吃，這間店有很多彈性的吃法，跟其他日本料理店不太一樣，每天會公告有季節限定和當天的魚種、生魚片，價格公開透明，可以額外加點醋飯。平常生魚片寫一斤對於我來說很容易沒概念可以看得出來老闆有儘量文字呈現讓客人對生魚片的份量有概念。
老闆年輕有活力，人很親切客氣，因為人手不多，有時人多可能會需要稍微等待一下子，周四晚上和中午中午來都有人流，很不錯的店，希望老闆生意興隆。

座位很寬敞，只是環境燈光有點暗。
前面的照明是沒問題，
後面自助吧的區域真的太暗。

會讓客人不易分清楚飲用的杯子，
和裝味噌湯的碗，因為兩個都長有點像，
只能從底部的紋路判斷出來🥹
建議自助吧區再補一個燈光就很完美了✨

餐點的份量給得很多，醋飯也很足夠。
可以吃飽喝飽，
是個適合休息吃飯的好地方👍

reviews_detailed.author: J L
reviews_detailed.text: Got the pork katsu. Tasted too sweet, soggy, and undercooked batter that tastes like pancake mix. The rice was not fragrant and undercooked. Salmon rolls was alright but sushi rice too sour.

reviews_detailed.author: CK Visionpartner
reviews_detailed.text: Good taste, both of the raw fish rish bowl and the seared salmon roll, and not to miss the steamed egg

reviews_detailed.author: Natasha Morla Tanuputri
reviews_detailed.text: Food tastes amazing

reviews_detailed.author: Hang On Arvo (2boys_brunch)
reviews_detailed.text: Nothing fancy.

reviews_detailed.author: ㄚ鴻遊趣
reviews_detailed.text: It's basically a good place for a relaxing meal. There aren't many seats, but it's not stressful either. The sashimi occasionally has some gristle, and the other dishes are a bit salty.

name: 大叔食事unclefoodday
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區哈密街89號
reviews: 2026/03/01 點了豬排咖喱200元。朋友點唐揚雞咖喱。咖喱有附半顆溏心蛋、一小碟泡菜。QR code 點餐，只收現金。室內座位還算可以，無廁所。不用服務費。可以加飯、加醬。以這價位感覺算很親民。不過口味我覺得十巷咖喱更濃郁好吃，同樣價格肉也更大塊。

一直被朋友推薦的咖哩店，終於來試試，這間由3位大叔一起創立，主打各種主菜的咖哩飯，特別的是還有飯盒跟咖哩麵，不定時也會推出季節商品！

招牌漢堡排咖哩，漢堡排超大片，外層煎到微微酥脆，切開直接爆汁，肉本身的鮮甜完全被鎖住，口感紮實卻不乾柴，一吃就愛上，咖哩醬也很有記憶點，使用大量洋蔥慢火熬煮，清甜中帶微辣，濃度剛剛好，非常順口。內用竟然還能免費續咖哩醬和白飯，真的很加分。

炸物也很有水準，套餐我們加點唐揚雞皮薄酥脆、肉嫩又多汁，份量大塊，沾上咖哩醬超級邪惡。單點推薦炸蝦與蝦排，麵衣厚度控制得剛好酥脆不油。尤其是蝦排最特別——完全不加蝦漿，而是使用十幾隻白蝦製成，吃起來脆中帶彈，滿滿真材實料。

近期還推出韓式辣湯麵，大醬湯底結合雞湯，喝起來溫順不過鹹，裡面還有肉片和泡菜，喝起來超暖。吃完還能加一碗飯變成湯泡飯，一碗兩吃超滿足。

整體價格親民、份量感人，難怪會成為很多人日常的午晚餐愛店。

漢堡排咖哩（250元）漢堡排超級多汁，切開以後肉汁會像打開水龍頭一樣流個不停，強烈推薦一定要點。但咖哩的部分，我就覺得稍微沒特色...可能我還是喜歡有料的咖哩，不然都沒啥口感。
套餐加購唐揚雞與可樂餅（120），可樂餅大優很好吃，但唐揚雞非常一般，感覺沒日式炸雞的風味，且應該不是現炸的？吃起來溫溫....
這間咖哩與飯都可以續...吃不夠的記得追加

reviews_detailed.author: Duke Chu
reviews_detailed.text:
This curry rice is insane—
it’s incredibly delicious!
I highly recommend the curry rice, meat, and shrimp cake.
The croquette and cabbage are just average.
You can even get extra rice and curry sauce!
The curry sauce is authentically Japanese and super tasty.
I totally recommend everyone to come try it.
I ate two bowls of rice in one go!

reviews_detailed.author: Carolina Day
reviews_detailed.text: Very clean and bright place. They went and pushed 3 tables together for us which was very nice. We ordered sukiyaki - egg, meat, broccoli, cabbage and kimchi on rice. 120NT each bowl. The tea is only pre packaged poppers.

reviews_detailed.author: Peter Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Good value for the nicely portioned meal. NT100-120 for most dishes with most expensive at NT200 for the steak which looked pretty good (haven’t tried it yet though). Plenty of veggies which seems and tastes fresh. Rice is cooked well and chewy. Meat portions also pretty generous for the price. Not many tables so better to do take out. Not much space inside so better to order ahead for the take out. Would be fun to do take out and eat at nearby parks.

reviews_detailed.author: DIVA Yang
reviews_detailed.text: Simple food and yet healthy and delicious. Ideal for portion control. The shop is small with 15 seats and has no restrooms. No reservations needed. Accept walk-in and cash only.

reviews_detailed.author: Chen Aini
reviews_detailed.text:
Very comfortable and clean environment for people enjoying tasty food.
it's nice can refill rice and curry

name: 築地良味食事處
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區塔城街33號
reviews:
四年前吃過覺得好吃，這次跟女友去古著店回程經過再來吃一次，大概下午5:00左右剛好有空的兩人座位，點完餐就已經變成很多人排隊了。店面空間不大，把外面的座位加進去也不是很多，大概跟一般小間拉麵店差不多大而已。

點了烤午仔魚跟鮭魚刺身，附兩碗飯跟兩碗味噌湯。味噌湯裡面有鮭魚塊非常好喝，鮭魚刺身蠻大塊的，但只有幾塊而已會吃的不過癮，要吃過癮的話兩個人也需點兩份；午仔魚非常好吃，烤得皮酥肉香，非常好下飯，附的白飯上面還有小塊玉子燒，好棒的。

很喜歡的店家，會再回訪，但要記得提早來不然要排蠻久的。

築地良味食事處位在台北大同區塔城街、北門一帶，走的是巷弄裡的小型日式食堂／居酒屋路線。店面不大，以 L 型吧台為主，座位之間距離近一點，但也因此有種「看師傅現做、吃得很專心」的緊密感。平日午餐來也可能遇到需要等候的情況，想吃建議避開尖峰或提早到。

餐點整體我覺得味道還行、海鮮算新鮮，不會有腥味，丼飯的配料和生魚片、握壽司吃起來都算穩定，烤物也有基本水準，是那種不太容易踩大雷、想吃日料時可以安心選的店。不過老實說，吃完會覺得價格偏高一些，以份量和精緻度來看，沒有到「超值」的程度，比較像是用地段、氛圍和新鮮度來撐起整體體驗。若你剛好在北門附近想快速吃一頓日式海鮮料理，這裡是舒服順口的選擇；但如果追求高 CP 值，可能就會覺得小貴。

明太子烤馬鈴薯真的很好吃，去了兩次都有點
奶油蛤蜊口味偏鹹,喜歡重口味的人可以試試看
其他餐點也都不錯吃~
位子不多建議可以提前先去訂位！
麥茶跟味噌湯都可以續，湯裡魚肉都蠻大塊的
寵物友善！😍

reviews_detailed.author: Radu Acsinia
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent place for sushi with a great location next to Dunsin street. The staff is friey and the place has a cozy atmosphere, which means you can see all the action of the preparation. The fish is so fresh and also plentiful, makes for a fantastic meal.

reviews_detailed.author: lee yongqing
reviews_detailed.text: I'm so full! The salmon fish head was amazing, oil just oozing out, flesh so firm, so fresh. Then vegetables was amazing too. Cooked to perfection, not too stringy, firm and easily eaten.

reviews_detailed.author: HC
reviews_detailed.text: Nestled in a quiet corner, this Japanese eatery offers a cosy ambience. The dishes are crafted with fresh, high-quality ingredients, and the generous portions make it a delight for both the eyes and the palate. The friendly and attentive staff add to the welcoming experience. For an extra treat, try to snag a counter seat and watch the chef's masterful techniques in action—it’s like dinner and a show! With its excellent food and reasonable prices, this spot is truly great value for money and a must-visit for lovers of Japanese cuisine.

reviews_detailed.author: Seabass Sterel
reviews_detailed.text:
The deep fried chicken was excellent, the salmon in the 3-piece sashimi combo was to die for and the eel was awesome too.
Did not expect that for a place on a busy street!

reviews_detailed.author: Ed Fung
reviews_detailed.text: I swear... this is one of the best Japanese restaurants I've ever been to.  It's small and cozy with very fresh seafood.  Tonight, I had the donburi with fish roe, fresh crab meat, scallops & crab tamale, veggies with sesame sauce and deep fried oysters.  Everything was to die for!  I felt like I was tasting the ocean.  The seafood was THAT fresh and tasty.  Pretty sure I'll return before I leave Taipei.  Just an amazing family run restaurant!

name: 太春小館海鮮餐廳
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區寧夏路81號
reviews: 同事生日，請吃飯，第一光臨，老闆娘親切的服務並招待私房菜炒臭豆腐，這道太特別了，沒多久一掃而空。毛毛蟲壽司也很有特色，龍蝦蒜蓉清蒸很好吃，四季豆牛肉很搭，透抽芋頭米粉湯頭很鮮，吃不完打包回家，隔天還要非常好吃😋。價格中等，不錯的用餐體驗。

太春 一直是家族聚餐的選擇之一
但這次的聚餐 感覺上是有差異了

或許 是上菜的速度太快了 來不及好好品嚐美食

所以 對食材的記憶 才幾天 卻如失憶般

建議 速度可以放緩些 而不是被迫要趕進度

服務人員的態度依舊很好
建議訂位再去吃，我們晚上沒訂位去，店員說因為訂位很滿，所以只能點迷你版菜單上的菜，很多招牌菜沒得點，餐點的話，毛毛蟲壽司，椒麻臭豆腐不錯，有開傳統發票，可刷卡

reviews_detailed.author: KT
reviews_detailed.text: This place is just alright. I had better sushi in the past before so I couldn’t say it will be the best sushi for me.

reviews_detailed.author: Alice Chiu
reviews_detailed.text: Very friendly staff. Nice Taiwanese-Japanese style dishes.

reviews_detailed.author: Po-kai Chang
reviews_detailed.text:
Awesome Japanese food in Taipei.
Fresh sashimi, raw beef, sushi.

reviews_detailed.author: Tina Yang
reviews_detailed.text: Great food, fresh ingredients, perfect portion. We accidentally broke a bowl, the server didn’t frown, instead, he immediately told our kid to be careful. Then swept the floor. We really appreciate him.

reviews_detailed.author: A Ye
reviews_detailed.text:
I loved the Seafood, Beef also served very well. All dishes are really prepared with much of beautiful decor so its not only food but also ART thats what we like.
We were having dinner at seperate room but you may use main Hall where there are many tables. COZY.

name: 鯉魚 The Carp
formatted_address: 10347台灣臺北市大同區迪化街一段177號
reviews:
這次點的是「烏金九品饗宴」套餐，因為是下午茶時間，另外加點了一份XO乾麵。沒有訂位但還有位子，不過被安排在外面，裡面幾乎都已訂滿。

九宮格整體擺盤真的很精緻，每一道都小巧細緻，看得出來有設計感，視覺上很加分。冷盤類像海蜇皮、小黃瓜、黑木耳這些都屬於清爽開胃型，口感脆度不錯，但味道偏細緻路線，沒有到特別驚艷。雞肉冷盤肉質嫩，搭配油蔥酥提香，算穩定好吃。整體給我的感覺是精緻、有特色，但沒有哪一道真的讓我特別記住。

套餐裡的湯我選的是膠原花膠雞湯。這碗湯反而是當天讓我印象比較深的一道。湯頭非常濃郁，而且質地偏黏稠，有明顯的膠質感，但味道是清甜的，不會油膩，喝起來很溫潤順口。雞肉也燉得軟嫩，整體很舒服，是我覺得套餐裡表現最亮眼的部分。

主食炒飯沒有達到我預期的鍋氣，稍微可惜。

另外加點的XO乾麵就略顯普通，味道沒有特別突出，也因此會讓人覺得價格有一點偏高。

國賓茶真的值得一提，清香好喝，回甘明顯。我加了好幾回熱水，味道還是一樣甘甜，沒有一下就淡掉，這點很加分。

整體來說，是一家可以體驗一次的餐廳。食物精緻、有特色，但味道沒有完全超出期待。不過花膠雞湯跟國賓茶確實讓人留下不錯的印象。

有單點
最便宜的套餐是720元+1成
份量絕對是天靈蓋程度

開胃菜-洛神冬瓜，一般般，口感不錯算開胃
前菜-九品小菜，視覺上蠻驚艷的，木耳和烏魚子相關的都不錯，其他的就是一般熱炒店程度

烏魚子炒飯很好吃
火候、飯的乾度、調味都剛好
建議飲料點清爽類，因為烏魚子蠻多的，有一點小膩

湯的部分 - 一般是味噌湯（友人說好喝）
我加300元（如果沒記錯？）升級花膠雞燉湯
一整隻雞腿很有誠意
味道的濃郁和火候十足

甜點三品- 烏魚子牛軋餅（類似）非常優秀，喜歡鹹甜的一定愛，而且他們家還有賣
其他的甜點就不必吃了，非常一般

整體來說
720加一，算是很划算
烏魚子真的沒有在省的
推薦：烏魚子料理+炒飯+燉湯
省略：其他菜色

點了干貝XO拌麵套餐，另外副餐為精選小菜三品。比較特別的是烏魚子堅果起司，但因為師父刀工特好，切的如蟬翼般薄片，所以入口即化，還沒品出味道就入胃了。
一個麵食，加3個幾乎是涼拌菜的小菜，和加購的酸梅湯。金額要6百多，cp值因人而異囉

reviews_detailed.author: Gabriel Lazarus
reviews_detailed.text: Feeling overwhelmed with the street around, I ducked in “The Carp” and was so happy I did. I kept it simple and had the medium spiced pork noodles, which were amaaaazing. I topped it off with the chicken and abalone soup, which has a lovely light flavor. Sat outside, which was serene and particularly welcome due to the frenetic neighborhood surrounding the restaurant.

reviews_detailed.author: Shirleen Tan
reviews_detailed.text:
I ordered the premium set meal and it was a great dining experience in The Carp.

The mullet roe fried rice was so flavourful and not to mention that the appetiser, mullet roe candy bar is really a bomb.

Overall a fabulous dining experience and i have enjoyed soaking myself in the fragrance of the wonderful meal and environment.

reviews_detailed.author: E Shyong Tai
reviews_detailed.text: Lovely meal by a chef who uses dried mullet roe in most dishes.  Restaurant is in a street that is famed for dried goods.  Both her father and grandfather ran their business selling preserved seafood.  Fantastic shelter from the sweltering heat outside

reviews_detailed.author: Christian Larsen
reviews_detailed.text:
As others have pointed out, the nine sampler set is super delicious and varied. And the fried rice is just so delicious. A must try in my book. The accompanying miso soup was ok. The three piece dessert was really well made, although not my taste preference.

The place is super cozy; I really enjoyed the atmosphere. And the staff is friendly and helpful!

On service, one comment is that I was asked to pay when the dessert was served - not in advance of the meal and not after. This ruins the experience somewhat.

In summary, I’m flagging The carp as a favorite place to eat in Taipei and hope to visit again! With a wish that maybe next time payment can be handled a bit more elegantly.

reviews_detailed.author: YuuJinn
reviews_detailed.text:
Reunion with friends here when everyone's going back to Taiwan for lunar new year.

The cuisines are creative and amazing good, we love every dish that we ordered.

Also take away some karasumi snacks to enjoy with family, that's tasty also.

name: 叼饞重慶麻辣炸物-台北大同店
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區蘭州街107號
reviews:
這家我已經回訪三次，
以後也是我的愛店，魷魚超級好吃！
雞肉也好吃，他的辣椒很讚！
每次來都要等40分鐘～
這次購買潑辣雞、魷魚圈、百頁，真心推薦魷魚圈（無敵爆炸好吃），超新鮮且肉質Q彈，像剛從海裏現撈的一樣！潑辣雞也超好吃！跟一般鹹酥雞不一樣，近期最愛的炸物就是這家了！

看到gomaji上有
來試試看
要等30分鐘蠻久的
店裡面可以等一下 不然外面風很大
我選孜然口味 超好吃
我覺得甜不辣最讚
蔬菜偏還好
啊豆皮也超酥很讚
鹹酥雞很多隻！
不過包裝蠻多簡體字是稍微不是那麼喜歡的

reviews_detailed.author: Claudia 961018
reviews_detailed.text: So good~

reviews_detailed.author: JL
reviews_detailed.text:
I've been back to this place three times already, and it'll definitely be one of my favorites from now on. The squid is super delicious!

The chicken is good too, and their chili is amazing!

Every time I come, I have to wait 40 minutes.

reviews_detailed.author: 愛吃勾勾
reviews_detailed.text: This time I bought spicy chicken, squid rings, and tofu skin. I highly recommend the squid rings (they're incredibly delicious!), super fresh and with a bouncy texture, like they were just caught from the sea! The spicy chicken is also amazing! It's different from regular fried chicken; this is my favorite fried food lately!

reviews_detailed.author: CC C
reviews_detailed.text:
I saw it on Gomaji, so I decided to try it. The wait was 30 minutes, which is quite long. You can wait inside, otherwise it's very windy outside.

I chose the cumin flavor, and it was super delicious!

I think the tempura was the best.

The vegetables were okay.

The tofu skin was also super crispy and great! There were a lot of fried chicken pieces!

However, I didn't really like the simplified Chinese characters on the packaging.

reviews_detailed.author: Mann
reviews_detailed.text:
Reservations via Line are very convenient.

You can specify your preferred taste in the notes.
The food is really delicious; I recommend trying it.
The owner is also very nice.

name: 川畝園麵食館
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區承德路二段120號1樓
reviews:
假日剛開店11點零幾分到，店內近乎滿座，之後到的只能在店外等，30分離開時店外已經有10幾至20人在後位，所以如果不想等太久，建議11點前來第一波入座。
如果是單人前來，並桌是不可避免的。店內沒有提供免費的茶飲，所以最好點個湯或是冰箱拿個飲料配餐。冰箱旁有各式醬料與小碟子小盤子供自取，小盤子是因為怕有些人不習慣小菜直接袋裝食用。
牛肉捲餅，必點，各種食材搭配的都剛剛好，醬香餅香蔥香牛肉香都恰到好處。三鮮鍋貼，不會很油，咬下去也有些許肉汁，不沾醬就頗有味道。牛蛋湯，想嚐嚐牛肉麵卻沒有多餘的胃的好選擇，稍微帶點辣味的牛油帶出整體的香，還不錯。

🔅木須炒麵 $120
料很多，刀削麵的口感也很棒，比較可惜的是少了鍋氣。推薦加一點店家自製的辣椒醬，能讓整體風味層次更上一層樓。

🔅小魚捲餅 $120👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻
絕對是這間店的必點！小魚豆乾搭配抹了甜麵醬的蔥油餅真的超級好吃，份量也相當足夠。

🔅小籠湯包(6入) $100👍🏻
餡料味道不錯，還有很多湯汁，可惜收口處的皮過厚，一坨在上面很影響口感。

🔅三鮮鍋貼(6入) $100
外皮油膩，但餡料表現很出色，蝦漿比例高，口感很棒。

ℹ️中午11:20前到不會等很久。
ℹ️1～2人用餐需和其他人併桌。
ℹ️僅收現金。

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 公司請客愛店｜外帶也一樣強的麵食老字號

這次又從 川畝園麵食館 外帶，
而且是一口氣 滿滿三大袋，完全是公司等級的份量 😄

這家真的可以說是
👉 我們公司主管們請客的最愛名單之一。

原因很簡單——
✔ 價位合理
✔ 口味穩定
✔ 品項多、好分享
✔ 不管內用或外帶，都不失水準

這次大家照慣例「點一桌可以一起分的」，
小籠包、鍋貼、麵食輪流上桌（或輪流打開外帶盒），
每個人都能吃到不同口味，不會無聊，也很有聚餐感。

🥟 小籠包表現尤其穩定
皮薄不破、內餡紮實，外帶回公司或回家吃，
只要稍微回蒸一下，口感依舊在線，
完全不會有「外帶就退步」的失落感。

🍜 麵食份量足、調味不重口
是那種 每天吃也不膩、請客不踩雷 的路線，
同事口味南北不同，也都能被照顧到。

📦 外帶包裝也值得稱讚
分類清楚、湯湯水水不亂漏，
就算一次外帶很多袋，也不會手忙腳亂。

📍 地址：103 台北市大同區承德路二段 120 號 1 樓

如果你在找：
✔ 公司聚餐
✔ 主管請客
✔ 想點多樣、大家一起分的餐廳
✔ 或是「一定要安全牌」的選擇

那 川畝園麵食館 真的是可以放心交給它的一間店。
我們已經回訪很多次，
而且——下次請客，還是會選它。

reviews_detailed.author: Brandon C
reviews_detailed.text:
My favourite meal in Taiwan so far! The beef roll was incredible. Amazing texture and so much flavour. The dumplings were really well made and prepared and the spinach was a nice clean side to add to the meal.

The Xiao long bao reminded me of my childhood when my mom used to steam it for me. When food is able to elicit an emotional response like that you know it's good.

The people working here were so nice. They could tell we couldn't speak mandarin and were patient with us. They have a really solid number queue system which is displayed outside so you know when it's your turn to go inside. Definitely recommend!!

reviews_detailed.author: Annabelle Ambrose
reviews_detailed.text: The beef roll slaps hard! The scallion pancake was just okay. I think I needed some soy sauce and garlic. You have to get your own chopsticks from a drawer at the back. No one will tell you this though. The woman kept on telling my order was too big… who cares if I pay. I want to try different dishes. It was busy when I went at lunch time and I waited about 20 mins to be seated.

reviews_detailed.author: お小賴
reviews_detailed.text:
This famous restaurant used to be closer to the Nakayama MRT station, moved to this new location in 2024.

Always a line outside during the chow time, after tried this place for the first time, now I understand the reason.

Great value for money and all the dishes were amazing, the soup dumplings were a highlight for me, so juicy and sweet and seasoning was spot on. Knife sliced noodle made their noodle dishes tasted even better because of the chewy, Al dente texture. Lastly their spring onion pancake... Man I will say no more, you go try to find out.

This is the place where I will happily bring my overseas friends to have a taste of Taiwan.

reviews_detailed.author: Boo
reviews_detailed.text: Beef and fish roll were really good. Rest were average. Service was not great.

reviews_detailed.author: Victoria Huang
reviews_detailed.text: I love this place. My all time favorite place to get vegetable dumplings + beef roll. Their fish roll is also good. I’ve also tried their veggie roll but I think it’s too heavy on the sauce and a bit too sweet. I’ve also tried their noodles which was good but I probably wouldn’t get it again. I consistently go back despite long wait times because their beef roll hits the spot every time. Definitely get there as early as you can or prepare to wait a while.

name: 富春食堂 無菜單料理
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區太原路48巷7號
reviews: 餐點好吃價格合理，在北車後面這個價格蠻感動的，鮭魚握壽司印象中這6個是270元，簡直跟路邊攤差不多價格，而且鮭魚很厚。生魚片這邊是兩份一份綜合一份鮭魚都厚切的魚。另外大推他們的免費湯，雖然老闆說是用一堆魚的邊角下去熬的，但打撈技巧好會吃的話，其實可以獲得很多額外的海魚肉，非常讚
買定時送的魚湯用料非常豐富，裡面有許多多種魚跟蘿蔔喝起來相當淺甜。

附近的生魚片都賣完了，只好來這家試試，東西還ok而且看得到大稻埕煙火，價格稍高？ 不太確定
$290 雞腿丼
$350 生魚片丼

reviews_detailed.author: Kb -
reviews_detailed.text:
Absolutely the best sashimi I have ever had (believe it or not, including Japan!). The freshness and flavours of each individual slice shines through. Really well priced, much better than what you'd get in the restaurants. If you're lucky, you'll find the chef playing the piano whilst you're eating.

Can be a bit tricky to find the restaurant as its down a quiet lane.

reviews_detailed.author: Cassandra Chua
reviews_detailed.text: The kind of place that brings a tear to your eye - best chirashi-don I’ve ever had in my life. The sushi rice, the way the sashimi is sliced, the aburi, the perilla leaves - everything is unpretentious and prepared to the highest standards. I don’t think you’ll be able to get it such standards even in Japan. I had the 富春 deluxe / signature chirashi-don and it feels like an omakase in a bowl. Whenever I visit Taipei, I’ll come to this restaurant at least 4 times on a 7-day trip, and I’m not even exaggerating 😆 The chef owner is so modest about his top-notch culinary skills. So glad to have found an absolute gem in Taipei in this family-run restaurant. 真的太谢谢你了，老板老板娘！下次再见哦！🙏💯😋

reviews_detailed.author: S Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Thick slices sashimi with rice for lunch meal deal. Grilled salmon head with salt was delicious.

reviews_detailed.author: Nicole
reviews_detailed.text: Great lunch, fresh, the bowl may not look big but totally full for me, the fish cut very thick, will definitely go again! There's also nice free soup ! Yum!

reviews_detailed.author: Thomas Pong
reviews_detailed.text: We booked a table with omakase one day in advance, and it's totally worthwhile. Great seafood and friendly cook. A definite must try!

name: 太春小館
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區民生西路198-4號
reviews: 很在地的台灣日式料理餐廳 在市場裡面有很多座位區 走進來發現氣氛很好 生意不錯 不過過市場裡面還是有點市場的味道 握壽司新鮮不用說份量也剛好 烏龍麵炒的不錯很香 炸豆腐就可惜了 溫熱不均勻 還點了烤靖魚 忘記拍了 烤的很厲害 香又不過乾 用餐環境還算舒適 座位間隔還可以 可以很清楚聽到隔壁桌的聲音 只是市場的味道可能無法避免 稍稍有點可惜 價位屬於高價位 別用夜市小吃 思維來吃可能比較不會心疼荷包

-💖毛毛蟲壽司：表層的炙燒鮭魚加上明太子香氣很足！壽司米飯Q彈加上炸蝦脆脆口感很不錯
-鹹酥軟殼蟹：炸的酥脆又保有蟹肉的口感（不像外面有些根本就在吃炸粉）加上蒜酥跟辣椒超唰嘴很夠味，很想配個啤酒⋯！
-南瓜起司茶巾：送上來有嚇到因為超大一根，外皮像炸豆包脆中帶韌感，裡面是蟹肉棒+馬鈴薯泥+牽絲起士，裹著香甜的南瓜泥很加分，不過澱粉量偏高，建議分食🤣
-鮭魚味增湯：很大碗（兩人份以上）又有大塊魚肉（不過個人不太敢吃帶皮的），喝起來還有魚的鮮甜
-干貝握壽司：中規中矩，不用特別點

叫uber Eats 壽司很紮實 但鮭魚炒飯品質很不穩定 上面照片飯粒粒分明、有鍋氣香、料多、調味剛剛好👍 下面飯濕潤、沒鍋氣、飯炒不勻稱不好吃 很明顯不同師傅炒的 第二次想說碰碰運氣 再叫一次外送 又是下面照片師傅炒的😤😤😤如果電話指定師傅 店家一定覺得我是澳客 所以乾脆不叫了
😂😂😂

reviews_detailed.author: Brian Colvin
reviews_detailed.text: This was our last meal of our Taipei trip, and it did not let us down! We got quite an assortment of dishes and all of them were wonderful. I could not pick just one favorite item. It is probably good to go here with a group so you can try a bunch. The service was excellent, they kept our table full and made sure we had everything we needed. This was the perfect end to our short trip to Taiwan, Thanks! (also, thanks to Johnnie for taking us to this spot for our farewell meal!)

reviews_detailed.author: Anisah 思思
reviews_detailed.text:
There are two different restaurants operating , one for lunch and a different one for dinner.

This review is for lunch.
We went once at night, they don't have the same menu- no fried rice, the ones we craved, no adegashi toufoo.

Satisfies your cravings for Japanese cuisine.  Nothing fancy just good food at reasonable prices.

Get down at MRT Shuanglian Station, just a short walk.
Lots of restaurants all along the way.

Must order :
Fried rice
Salmon belly shashimi
Grilled eel
Tempura shrimp - this is very good, not many restaurants can do this well.
Agedashi towfoo

Kirin ichiban beer

Yummy , food coma after !!!

We went again , this time after 6pm to find that a different restaurant is operating in the same space. The menu was almost similar but the prices were much higher at night. Also they didn't have fried rice at night.
The shashimi portions were do much smaller and more expensive.
So best to go for lunch and not dinner.

reviews_detailed.author: Joel Yeo
reviews_detailed.text: We dropped by this place nearby Ningxia Night Market宁夏夜市, there is another wet market at the row of shop, where this shop can be found at the 1st entrance of the market, the order person was abit impatient and sounded restless while we take a look and ask if there were dine in options. Quite a number of customers,  we got our seats anyway, cleanliness moderately acceptable as it is in a market, wait quite a while for our salmon order to arrive, 9pcs for NTD240. The color was abit lighter than in the display glass, however still tasted good or above average. There were many order and customers waiting for their fish also. All in all, reasonable price for such fish, just abit unhappy with server.

reviews_detailed.author: Aline BDI
reviews_detailed.text:
Generous And Tasty food
English speaking

reviews_detailed.author: i . am . kenny
reviews_detailed.text: Salmon and Swordfish is fresh. Spotted a bone in my Salmon.

name: 江牛樓
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區民樂街6號
reviews:
假日早上10點半到，已經排了30幾個人，11點開始登記預約席，到我的時候雙人只剩下快3點到5點前的時間，當然人越多選擇性越少。11點50的時候看了一下現場後位表，大約已經有10組客人填表了。
預約席在一樓，一個時段有8個位置，預約時間前15分鐘左右再回餐廳即可。後位席在2樓，時間上很難抓，因為後位主要參考一樓出餐狀況再看可以接待多少客人，比方說這梯次1樓的客人都只點牛肉麵，沒有多點其他菜，廚師完成餐點時間較快，就可以多招待點現場後位客人，反之亦然。再加上也不知道前面會不會有登記不來的人，所以服務人員都會建議大約多久就要回來等，時間比較不準，等的時間可能會很長。入店時用點餐機點餐，只收現金。
小菜盒很有儀式感，充分利用煙燻來彌補香氣，並消磨一些等餐時間，其中芥末是拿來搭配牛肉，酸菜則是加到湯中的。
紅燒牛肉麵，上桌前會現磨胡椒在上面，湯頭微辣花椒味十足，不過像我不吃辣的一下吸太大口會有點嗆到。麵條可以續一次，個人覺得寬麵表現較好，除了吸附湯汁的能力外，嚼勁也較好，細麵的話稍微硬了點。牛肉軟嫩大塊，而且意外與芥末很搭。
下次有機會會想試試清燉的。

2026-02-28(六)
中午12:20左右到店，門口已經排滿人，候位登記預約席一路排到下午五點多，只好改登記候補(二樓座位區)。於是很隨性地先去附近逛逛、吃個午餐，約下午4點回來碰碰運氣，沒想到不到半小時就等到位子！

二樓座位其實不少：1桌大圓桌(約6-7人)、2桌四人座、3桌兩人座。候補沒有想像中困難，畢竟牛肉麵翻桌蠻快的。感覺比較是場控流程需要優化（也或許店家不想接太多單？），因為二樓一度有不少空位(至少我上樓到吃完期間大概有一半的座位是空的），但上樓的客人不多，門口卻始終擠滿人；候補叫號似乎也需要主動再向店家確認，整體流程安排略顯不順。

入店左側以機器點餐並付現金，之後上樓入座後，服務員送上配菜的小木盒，打開瞬間煙霧瀰漫，視覺效果十足，情緒價值滿滿。

牛肉麵湯是醬油紅燒風味，入口很清爽，不是黏膩濃稠的類型，吃到後來會有點偏鹹口。牛肉是最棒的部分，口感幾乎入口即化，非常的軟嫩；麵體我是點細麵大概就是一般拉麵的口感，普普通通。整體而言，算是好吃且有用心設計的一碗精緻牛肉麵。但如果要花很長時間排隊的話，我可能不會再訪😅

這輩子吃過過最好吃牛肉麵，其實牛肉麵我最擔心的是肉太大塊又沒有煮到軟，筋很硬很難吞嚥，但是江牛樓的完全不會，真的是餐具一碰就斷掉，非常厲害！湯不要看他是深色的，以為是重口味的醬油味，結果一吞不得了，是很清甜的洋蔥胡椒大骨湯味，整碗喝光光完全沒問題，細麵粗麵可都來一份各有各的風味，都非常有嚼勁好吃好咬。小菜像是加分提，我沒有覺得小菜有太多驚艷的地方但是就中規中矩，配菜鴨胸肉以及牛排非常軟嫩多汁，很推！
*平日早上10:30到，預約到12:40的位子。

reviews_detailed.author: Alexander Creed
reviews_detailed.text:
Food has an uncanny ability to make people happy - speaking from personal experience. I long for, look forward to, joy-making culinary experiences. In that spirit, 江牛樓 is a smile factory. A joy machine. Serving dishes of pure happiness.

I was grinning with ecstasy through every minute of my first, second and third consecutive daily visits to 江牛樓. Yes - I am obsessed with these beef noodles. And for good reason. These guys are THE beef noodle masters. From the unctuous, umami infused broth. To the beef that melts in your chopsticks as you try to gobble it down. To the dramatic, smoky side dish with a healthy chunk of wasabi. It is joy personified.

The smile on my face lasted long after I left - and so too did the mouth-watering taste of the broth. And somehow, the staff at 江牛樓, while serving Michelin star quality food, remain completely down-to-earth, welcoming and delightfully unpretentious. After my third (and sadly final - for now) visit I felt like I was leaving family behind. Until I return to Taipei, I will have a void in my heart where the staff at 江牛樓 and their beef noodles will always remain.

If I could only have one beef noodle for the rest of my life, it would be this one. In fact, if I could only have one dish for the rest of my life, it would also be this.

Try it - you will not be disappointed.

谢谢你. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you 🙏🙏🙏

reviews_detailed.author: Michael Henley
reviews_detailed.text: Every bit of our food was full of flavors. We had both beef noodles and A5 steak. Amazing beef flavor and texture that melts in your mouth. Noodles that gives a unique chew that's hard to find, broth that is delicious to the last drop, and the beef in the bowl just feel like the warmest hug from home.

reviews_detailed.author: Chi Pham
reviews_detailed.text:
Arrived at 3 p.m., got seated right away on the 2nd floor, and the food came out in about 10 minutes; so for a moment I wondered if I’d walked into the same place other reviews mentioned. Maybe it’s best to avoid peak meal times.

There are only two noodle options, and we weren’t offered the duck slices so I’m not sure how those are - but the beef in the noodles was plenty and incredibly tender. The noodles were nicely chewy, and the broth was deep with a bit of fatty richness floating on top. The wasabi boosted the flavor so much. The atmosphere felt rather westernized, with a US/UK playlist playing in the background.

NT$290/bowl.
CASH ONLY.

reviews_detailed.author: Kwan
reviews_detailed.text:
Deceitfully clear soup was packed with flavor, it was so good we came back for seconds ✌️

Clear soup is definitely the winner but the braised beef soup was good as well. Both types of noodles were good but the thick ones takes the 🍰

The smoked duck was tender and the skin was surprisingly crisp

reviews_detailed.author: Luke Low
reviews_detailed.text:
Worth the wait. Queued at 10.30am already got a queue. Since 1 person so able to get the 1.40pm slot.
Oh the soup is looks oily but it’s not. The chilli oil does not burn down the throat. The beef is super soft.best there is option to add in Wasbi to the meat, very interesting experience. Feels like eating sashimi… ordered thin noodles and they are firm yet can clip very easily. the experience is very personal, only 8 seats in front counter. Finish then will call in the next group. Very enjoyable eating experience.

Price wise is TWD400 (if I remember correctly) the beef ramen, duck breast TWD150.

name: Parko Parco 牛肚包義大利餐酒館
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區承德路三段80號1樓
reviews:
1. 這家店的位置真的超級優秀，搭捷運過來最方便，出站走路五分鐘內就到了，完全不用擔心迷路或找停車位。

2. 人均消費抓在 600 到 1000 塊左右，如果你點酒或比較多特殊料理，可能會再往上一點，但以那個餐點水準來說，我覺得 CP 值算很高了啦！

3. 空間雖然不算超大，但佈置得很溫馨放鬆，燈光也是暖黃色的，很適合下班跟好朋友一起來喝一杯、輕鬆聊天的氛圍。

4. 炒中卷（絕對是必點中的必點！新鮮度跟調味都厲害到爆）跟牛肚包這兩個是店裡的鎮店之寶，如果你沒點到，我真的會替你難過，其他義大利麵或燉飯也都在水準之上喔。

5. 這裡生意爆炸好，強烈建議你要早點訂位，不然現場候位真的會等到天荒地老。

服務人員蠻親切，而且付費很方便，支援行動支付跟刷卡。

不過，座位配置真的比較緊湊一點，然後用餐時間跟低消都有規定，去之前要先注意一下時間安排。

氣氛很好、食物也好吃的一家餐酒館，整體環境溫馨又帶點浪漫氛圍，很適合約會或是慶生來訪。
店員服務親切友善，態度非常好，只是介紹菜單的時候講話有點太小聲了，有點聽不太清楚😂。

餐點每一道都很有特色，也能吃出主廚的用心。當天最喜歡的是燉牛肚，牛肚燉得軟嫩入味，搭配兩種醬料能吃出不同風味，沾著麵包一起吃真的一級棒。
西西里鹹卡諾里也很特別，裡面的起司香濃但完全不膩口，外皮酥脆，整體口感很有層次。

當天還點了聖誕限定的餐點，可惜我忘了名字🥺，不過那道吐司搭配提魚、起司與淡淡蜂蜜香氣，鹹甜交錯非常驚喜。
主食也是聖誕限定的義大利麵，蟹肉份量豐富，肉質細膩鮮甜，只是整體稍微偏鹹。

紅酒的推薦也都很到位，與餐點搭配起來剛好平衡，是間會讓人想再訪的好店！

因為懷念義大利🇮🇹 所以查了這家有牛肚料理

但和網路文章味道上有滿大的落差。非常失望😞

價格 不但和網路文章不符 漲價很多 但味道更是讓人失望😞

又是一次店了

reviews_detailed.author: Jennifer Fu
reviews_detailed.text: I loved visiting Parko Parco’s new location! The old location was small and cozy, but the new location is so much more classy, and still very cozy! Everything tasted just as good as I remembered, and the seasonal crab squid ink pasta was phenomenal. Really really wish they’d serve their sister store’s cannoli and gelato here though 🥹 definitely felt like some desserts would’ve wrapped up the night even more perfectly.

reviews_detailed.author: Matt Masui
reviews_detailed.text: I was blown away by their panino. The dough was perfectly crispy, and the tripe with chili sauce was incredible. It was so good, I ended up ordering two more! The terrace seating is lovely, with a quiet view of the park. I’ll definitely be back next time I’m in Taipei.

reviews_detailed.author: Inès Zitouni
reviews_detailed.text: This place is so cute! Feels like Italy 😍 Every dish was so tasty and the wine pairing was perfect. We had the red wine of the day which was Circo Rosso and apart from the regular menu they also had daily specials 😋 The staff was very helpful and knowledgeable and took good care of us throughout the meal 🙏 The parts of meat that are cooked here cannot be found in many places in Taipei! Very special place ✨

reviews_detailed.author: Joseph Ahdoot
reviews_detailed.text: One of the best Italian restaurants in all of Taipei. It’s good to see a restaurant that is more bread based and does not change the original recipe. The bread is freshly made on the premises and the beef is wonderfully tender

reviews_detailed.author: Kayo Chang Black
reviews_detailed.text:
It's a cute and cozy Italian restaurant. The food is pretty good, the Bolognese sauce is fantastic. We were a little shocked about the coca powder on the Bolognese penne dish but it was okay (my husband didn't like it though). Maybe it would be nice to mention the coca powder on the menu.

The mango, serrano and arugula salad and burrata cheese salad were excellent. The only thing I didn't like as much was the roasted chicken leg. It was a bit dry,  like they cooked it and reheated it.

There's no bathroom in the restaurant so you have to go across the street to the public bathrooms.  Other than that, the place is delightful.

name: Moni .curry｜咖哩餐廳。擠花甜點。貓貓酥
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區西寧北路63號1樓2樓
reviews:
【個人體驗分享】
『服務：10分』
客氣、舒服、熱情。
『環境10分』
環境非常古典漂亮，非常適合拍照。
『口味10分』
漢堡起司咖喱飯：
咖喱香料味大於甜味，這樣會比較偏向印度咖喱，但又有甜味，非常的好吃，咖喱愛好者推推，

煙燻舒肥雞胸肉大菠蘿可頌：
份量非常足夠，且口感非常有層次、
可頌鬆軟菠蘿皮脆，中間千島醬帶酸甜口，很棒。
中間煙燻舒肥雞軟嫩可口。

『CP值5分』
漢堡起司咖喱飯380元
A餐廳+130元（咖喱或蛋糕）
B套餐+200元（咖啡+蛋糕）
大菠蘿可頌，單點180，套餐320元
中規中矩的價格不貴。
『平均消費：400元/人』
『總結8分推薦』
很好吃！不管蛋糕還是咖喱，吃看看你就知道！

咖哩飯與甜點蛋糕都好吃😋

從店裡用心佈置和乾淨程度，就知道東西一定好吃～

晚上七點多和朋友騎單車前來，為了要顧單車，還想著要坐室外（室外也有一顆美美的聖誕樹），老闆和老闆娘怕我們冷，剛好二樓包廂也有空位，因此主動問我們要不要到二樓的包廂用餐（到二樓也有電梯可以搭，建議單車整台立起來，才可以進電梯），真的是太貼心了，讓我們可以安心的用餐，不用一直擔心車子的安全。

期間還一直詢問我們有沒有吃飽，非常窩心的一家店 🧡

謝謝老闆娘的用心和美味的食物，為我們愉快的一天畫下完美的句點。
滷肉咖喱跟紅酒燉牛肉很好吃，配菜搭配的很特別，有自己的特色👍整體來說很驚艷。女友也很喜歡，下次還會想回訪。缺點大概就是當天起司漢堡排我覺得有一點腥味，需要搭配咖喱壓過去。

reviews_detailed.author: An Le
reviews_detailed.text: My friend had cheese and bacon croissant while I had cheese and egg. The portions are generous and also delicious. The owner and staff are really nice. They came to ask if I would like to sit inside because they were afraid it could be too hot outside. It's difficult to find a stop with quiet outdoor seating in Dihua Old Street, so I highly recommend this restaurant if you also enjoy sitting outside like me 😄

reviews_detailed.author: Nico Robles
reviews_detailed.text: 3 stars. Moni Curry in Taipei was just okay for me. The curry tasted oddly sweet, which threw me off, and the karaage didn’t hit the Japanese-style flavor I was expecting—it was a bit of a letdown. Still, the serving was big enough to fill me up after a long walk, so at least it did the job.

reviews_detailed.author: Jess
reviews_detailed.text: A quaint little spot for afternoon tea and the perfect place to rest your feet after exploring the nearby Dihua Street. The decor and tableware are absolutely adorable, and the service is impeccable — warm, attentive, and thoughtful. A lovely hidden gem for a slow, cozy afternoon.

reviews_detailed.author: Kylie Dugan
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious meal that is more than generous! The rice is well done, the egg and chicken are cooked perfectly, and the service is responsive. English menu is also available.

reviews_detailed.author: Uğur Pınaraltı
reviews_detailed.text: When you order a meal you get a complimentary souo before your meal, i enjoyed meal, as a Turkish person of course it was a bit strange for our dish taste, but still finished the whole plate.

name: 小小麥台北南西店
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區南京西路338號1樓
reviews: 今天帶妹妹出來吃飯，叫她訂位，結果誤打誤撞訂到一間可以帶狗狗的！還可以上椅子！不錯不錯！還可以水煮雞肉串給給狗子吃 讚讚

這次點了章魚燒 $99、明太子鮮貝烏龍拌麵 $179，還有黑烏龍茶 $59。
烏龍拌麵一如既往地好吃，明太子跟鮮貝搭配得很不錯，算是穩定發揮的一道。

不過有幾點比較可惜的地方：
現在有低消，一定要點飲料，個人不太喜歡這個規定。黑烏龍茶表現普通，沒有特別驚艷。章魚燒的部分偏小顆，口味對我來說還好，可能我比較偏好台式章魚燒。

另外以前有提供自助雞湯，現在已經沒有了，覺得有點可惜。
整體來說主餐還是不錯，但小細節和用餐體驗跟以前比有點退步。

來到居酒屋融合屋台風的「小小麥」，第一口就被招牌麻奶明太子鮮貝烏龍拌麵收服，濃郁的麻奶醬包覆著Q彈讚岐烏龍麵，明太子的鹹香和鮮貝的嫩甜做了完美平衡，越拌越香、越吃越上癮～

酒蒸鮮蛤蜊清爽帶海味，湯頭溫暖又不顯負擔；椒鹽炸豆腐酥得輕脆，咬開還保有滑嫩；烤手羽先雞翅外皮微脆、帶點焦香，柚子胡椒雞肉串香氣清爽帶微辣，吃起來特別開胃！

來這不用太猶豫，先點一盤招牌烏龍拌麵，再加幾串烤物，來杯酒，就對了🍶🍢✨

📷ig：followmeto_eat
📷FB粉絲頁：「走～我們一起去吃」

reviews_detailed.author: Lóránd Gyenge
reviews_detailed.text: The food is really-really delicious. I'm visiting first time in Taiwan and the food everywhere is really great and specia,l but here the components are in perfect harmony and each bite is a pleasure.

reviews_detailed.author: Adrick Loh
reviews_detailed.text:
I came here 3 times during my stay at the hotel beside this shop. We came here mainly to get a drink. Must recommend the Yuzu flavored beer and liquor. Less than NT$200.
Food wise it’s a bit of hits and misses. Overall I would visit it if I am staying nearby. Staffs are really helpful! Good job.

reviews_detailed.author: Emily NG
reviews_detailed.text:
Love the udon but the non alcoholic drink selection is quite limited as my daughter doesn’t take alcohol and sparkling drinks.
Minimum order is at least a drink and she doesn’t like any of those.

reviews_detailed.author: Adam H
reviews_detailed.text: The food here was good, and service was fine. They did not have any English menus, or signage, so we were caught off guard when it was cash only (servers didn’t tell us until we tried to pay). At least 1 drink per person is required also.

reviews_detailed.author: Tien Phong Pham
reviews_detailed.text: There is no grilled food at noon, but this noodle dish really suits me, the staff is enthusiastic.👍❤️

name: 無所洋食- 蔬食日式洋食--義大利麵、咖哩、中式米飯、拌麵 (Vegan Pasta & Curry Rice)
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區迪化街一段358之1號
reviews: 我的鹹蛋黃醬義大利麵升級套餐，其餘為單點，唐揚杏鮑菇是包豆皮下去炸，裡面杏鮑菇很鮮嫩多汁，豆皮炸得也非常好吃，三項餐點調味都很好，副餐是比較稀的味增蔬菜湯，茶凍沒吃出特色，水果也還好。布丁很不錯😌👍🏻上菜速度快哦👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

副餐是我吃過最用心不馬虎的～
湯非常好喝，是燕麥熬的蔬菜！茶凍軟嫩恰好，有濃濃的茶香。
我們的主餐豆腐、咖喱都很好吃，若咖喱醬能多一些就完美了🙏

PS：餐後我們去逛迪化街，走了不少路，後來老人家想上廁所，卻整條迪化街沒看到友善廁所。當時已逛回到餐館附近，只能硬著頭皮再到無所洋食借廁所，正值你們空班打烊，還是樂意給老人家方便。非常謝謝你們的佛心，祝福你們！

是個很有特色風格的素食料理店！
有好吃的炸杏鮑菇，真的有雞肉的感覺
有濃郁的炸豆包飯，柚子胡椒香氣貫穿整碗
有辛香料充滿的蓋飯，有可口的豆腐小菜（推）豆腐配醃製鳳梨醬、素鬆、帶點辣感
這是我個人最愛的風味呈現方式。

（冷氣偏強，室內外的溫差感很強烈）
入口處能看到十連棟的歷史故事
是個很有歷史意涵，百年價值的古蹟

補充，服務人員很熱情也很親切！

reviews_detailed.author: Cito Pilini
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious vegan food, nice place, friendly service, fair prices... I really enjoyed this place. You have a lot of choices!

reviews_detailed.author: Jacelyn
reviews_detailed.text:
I rarely leave negative reviews, but I feel this experience should be shared.

I first tried to make a reservation through LINE, but received no response. When I arrived, I was told the restaurant was fully booked. A simple reply to my message would have saved me and my family the trouble. I asked if we could dine in quickly since there were empty tables at least an hour before the next reservation, but they refused. I then requested takeout instead.

Unfortunately, from the moment I paid, the attitude shifted noticeably. When I asked politely if there were nearby places we could eat (as we’re not familiar with the area), the staff dismissed us, saying they were “too busy.” When I requested extra cutlery because we were sharing sets, the staff rolled her eyes and told me I’d have to pay extra, only giving the exact number of forks based on the sets ordered. Being met with eye-rolling and curt replies multiple times was really unpleasant.

On top of the service, the food itself was a disappointment. It was slimy, tasteless, and far from what I’d expect given the high praise this restaurant often receives. As someone who has been vegetarian since birth, I genuinely do not understand the hype.

Overall, I tried to approach the staff with patience and understanding, but the experience left us feeling unwelcome and disrespected. Both the service and food fell far below expectations.

reviews_detailed.author: KY Low
reviews_detailed.text: Nice food. I will rate higher if more variety available. Pudding is superb.

reviews_detailed.author: Greg
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious restaurant, ethical 💗 ( No animal were harmed!), noodle+veggies, tofu pineapple.

reviews_detailed.author: bo Bo
reviews_detailed.text:
There are some hits and misses, but the yuba rice keeps me coming back!

- **Overall Impression:** Enjoyable enough to return.
- **Favorites:** Yuba rice is a standout dish for you. Veggie curry also good!
- **Least Favorites:** Beef spaghetti has a heavy soy aftertaste that I didn’t like. Dry curry with high expectation but turns out disappointing.
- **Summer Menu:** Surprised by how good the salad was; desserts and drinks were just okay.

name: 大同海產商行
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區民權西路144巷19弄1號
reviews:
今晚跟著法哥的腳步吃海魚，來到大同海產店。
既然是吃海魚，索性看到什麼就點什麼，幾乎把當天的魚種都點了一輪 🐟

不同魚種、不同料理方式，各有各的鮮味與口感。
清蒸的細緻、燒煮的厚實、酥炸的香氣，一道一道上桌都讓人期待。

更精彩的是葉慈品酒大師帶來的紅白酒，依料理搭配不同酒款，
讓原本豪邁的海產桌，多了幾分餐酒搭配的層次與優雅 🍷

海味的鮮，酒香的深，
在這樣的夜晚交織得恰到好處。
老饕的幸福，其實也不過如此。

特別感謝 EG 平台美樂蒂主揪精心安排這場活動，
讓大家能一起享受這場海味與美酒交織的美好夜晚 🙏

※ 跟著法哥吃海魚
※ 大同海產店
※ 葉慈品酒大師餐酒搭配
※ 感謝EG平台美樂蒂主揪
※ 海魚盛宴
※ 美食美酒的夜晚

2025/10/03   內附菜單   現金支付💰   790
推薦：水餃、烤蝦、小卷、一夜干

大同海產商行是一家隱藏版的海鮮小店，位於民權西路的巷弄內，環境雖然不大但座位溫馨舒適🍽️。餐廳以新鮮當日直送的漁獲為主，料理手法簡單，以燙、煎、烤為主，給人最原始的海味體驗，沒有花俏的調味卻讓鮮甜海味完整呈現🐟。

最推薦的招牌水餃一定要嚐嚐！水餃餡料選用韭黃鮮肉鮮蝦，餃皮彈牙有嚼勁，多汁鮮美，成為這裡的必點之選🥟。其他像是燙鮮蚵口感鮮甜飽滿，烤透抽外酥內嫩，還有烤鹹豬肉帶有香氣且不油膩，都非常下酒且令人回味無窮🍤。

這裡少見炒飯炒麵，只有手工水餃和豐富的海鮮，適合喜歡輕食與高品質漁獲的饕客。整體氛圍樸實無華，適合安靜細細品味海味，價格合理且份量足，用餐時段常常客滿，建議先訂位。這家店完美詮釋了海鮮的鮮美之道，是隱藏在城市角落的海味寶藏✨。

週五去吃真的很驚艷，魚的種類好多又新鮮，點餐老闆會直接說某種魚適合蒸還是烤，有一堆沒聽過名字的魚種，我們今天點的三款都好好吃，尤其是沒吃過的黑毛，口感很細緻。
水餃真的好吃，吃完第一輪馬上加點。鹹豬肉跟香腸也不錯，完全沒有因為是水產行就馬虎，下次來也會點的程度。
-
蚵仔蛋：NT350
烤午仔魚：NT$350
清蒸黑毛魚：NT680
烤透抽：NT520
烤鳳螺：NT250
烤香腸: ：NT250
地瓜葉：NT100
炒牛肉：NT350
水餃：NT12/顆（40顆）
-
這次的遺珠是沒吃到清燙小卷

reviews_detailed.author: Pno Ens
reviews_detailed.text: What a surprising seafood restaurant! Fresh and delicious on all seafood served! On top of that, the dumplings were unusually tasty which was unusual for a seafood restaurant. It is located in an unassuming location where only local would know and enjoy! Adding a bottle of Taiwan beer puts the dining experience with friends to the next level.

reviews_detailed.author: G H
reviews_detailed.text: Good seafood with attentive and friendly  service. And their dumplings, OMG, big with full fillings and super tasty! I would come here just for dumplings!

reviews_detailed.author: Lu Zhang
reviews_detailed.text: Fresh ingredients , lightly seasoned and cooked to perfection. I loved everything we had, this meal made me so sorry about not living in Taipei. Hope I get to visit again before leaving Taiwan♥️

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel Wang
reviews_detailed.text: Price is very reasonable even the place is a little out dated, all fresh fishes with home cooking style plus dumpling, chicken nice gathering places forgot to take more photos on food before they were gone haha

reviews_detailed.author: Abbott Hsu
reviews_detailed.text: Pretty traditional Taiwanese seafood stall with super yummy and tasty flavors in lots of dishes. You can order the famous dumplings as the main course, then choose various vegetables, shrimps, fried eggs with oysters and Taiwanese sausage to fulfill your stomach. Beers, soda drinks, black or green teas are good to relieve your stomach as well. The staffs show the traditional hospitality to serve you all the time. A good place for friends or families enjoy lunch or dinner on weekends or holidays. Just come and give it a try.

name: 波麗路餐廳-創始本店
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區民生西路314號
reviews:
以價格來說，2650加一成服務費2915吃到這種牛排套餐讓人蠻生氣的
我點14oz美國菲力牛排
一開始麵包就正常，餐前酒喝起來像藥水，怪怪的
沙拉普通，黑橄欖跟葡萄乾點綴的凱撒沙拉
濃湯蠻好喝的，殊不知是整道最好吃的東西
再來就是主餐牛排，鐵板很燙可以保溫甚至讓有血色的牛排變熟，我不能接受的部分是這麼大塊牛排竟然中心溫度比舌頭的溫度還要低不少，鐵盤很燙是用來自己煎的嗎？吃到一半我甚至問AI一般5分熟的牛排裡面應該要是冷的嗎？他說應該要55～62度這種比體溫還高不少的溫度吧？
再來是那個牛排醬，那個怪味接受度很高是不是…？最後我確定鐵盤是用來自己煎的原因是上面的蔬菜不翻面就焦掉了
最後紅茶甜點跟柳丁就一般般，但是我細細品嚐甜點是杏仁豆腐跟鳳梨的組合，其實想不透為啥要這樣搭@@
我看餐廳裡面中老年人居多，可能是來吃個回憶的，我沒有回憶第一次來所以沒感覺吧…
強烈不推，2915吃這種東西20年後沒倒我再來看為什麼

2026/2/19（大年初三）中午內用
久仰大名，剛好趁著春節期間跟家人來吃看看傳說中台灣第一家西餐廳。
點了春季雙人餐、美國牛小排餐、美國肋眼沙朗餐。
不知道這麼說合不合適，但所有的副餐中我最喜歡的是一人兩顆的小麵包跟飯後紅茶😂
紅茶是古早味紅茶味道，麵包就是牛排館會給的小麵包，喜歡到還另外續點一份（兩個50元）
主餐本身好像就還好，尤其美國牛小排，我們點7分熟，但上來因為鐵板的溫度，讓他整體很像全熟⋯
但如果抱持著是來體驗以前的人難得來吃一次西餐廳的那種體驗的心情，會覺得蠻不錯的啦！
是說單獨點的套餐全部上完吃完了，春季雙人餐都還沒出到主餐，速度是有點慢。
可以刷卡，室內裝潢復古，總共7人來吃，各點單人套餐跟一份雙人套餐，平均一人吃了大約1900元，可能對我們來說，真的要吃好吃的料理有更多選擇，這就是吃個體驗感囉！

波麗路餐廳是台北歷史悠久的西餐廳，日式法餐路線，充滿懷舊感，店內設計也有滿滿的故事：直式的湯匙造型招牌用注音符號寫著ㄇㄛ ㄌㄟ ㄌㄡ；門前的大匾額霸氣地展現百年老店的架勢；進門的漂流木和右側的太陽、紫色的牆壁設計，以及化妝室前的大面牆，都展示著日治時期到白色恐怖到現代，歷屆老闆們的用心經營。推薦來到本店，體驗一場懷舊的日式饗宴～

牛霸王蛋包飯（僅限平日）
吃得出來食材上的用心，漢堡排非常多汁（叉子插進去就滿滿肉汁流出來），牛肉超級香，調味偏重口味，有黑胡椒的香氣，隱約蒜香，光是漢堡排就很滿足。
使用協興蛋業的雞蛋非常滑嫩，不需過多調味就很香濃，配上內裡淡淡的番茄炒飯，粒粒分明而不油，跟漢堡排相比之下清新許多🤣算是一濃一清的搭配。餐點因為本身就很夠味比較沒有沾旁邊的醬料～撇除食材真的很用心，也是吃一個情懷！
甜點昭和布丁就是樸實無華的美味，只有雞蛋牛奶和糖的味道，口感滑順帶些紮實，配上焦糖真的非常好吃
最後的紅茶也是很好喝，微甜劃下完美句點
很開心今天有幸能夠聽到老闆和李東明老師分享波麗路的故事～

reviews_detailed.author: Hsien-Chih Chang
reviews_detailed.text: Extremely long wait time, terrible steak (slimy, cold, and no tastes), and ridiculously high price.  The staff seems overwhelmed and was spitting out curse words.  It’s nice that the restaurant was part of the history, but as of now this is way below standard.  Will never come again.

reviews_detailed.author: Jean-Francois Larocque
reviews_detailed.text: Affordable Taiwanese food in a confortable setting. Nicely illustrated menu makes the selection easy for non-chinese speakers.

reviews_detailed.author: Stanley Su
reviews_detailed.text:
Steak was way undercooked to our orders. Medium came out rare, and medium well came out medium rare.

Soup had good flavor. The bread buns with butter inside was great. Childhood memories!

Salad has weird combination (with mayo and chicken wing), but I can understand it’s the traditional “Taiwanese western food” and it tastes okay.

Overall an interesting experience to visit a restaurant that was such an icon to those one generation above me. But I think Home Steak (紅屋牛排) is a better option if you want a better “traditional Taiwanese western food”.

reviews_detailed.author: han sarp
reviews_detailed.text: Ok

reviews_detailed.author: Mista Whocares
reviews_detailed.text: Good food + service little expensive but good value.

name: 幹嘛日式餐酒館
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區民樂街18號
reviews:
避開大稻埕最多人的區域，隱藏在安靜的巷內，結果偶然撞見的驚喜！東西超好吃！沒有一道雷～毛毛蟲壽司料多料好超大份，鮭魚肥美、而且裡面包的蝦非常新鮮，飽滿厚實（老闆說海鮮都是一早親自去挑選採買的）

連壽司旁邊放的哇沙米都不是那種色素化學的，是黃色現磨不死嗆的那種（都比較高級的壽司店才會看到）

今天胃跟味蕾都超滿足😋😋改天一定還要再來
串燒、炸物、炒烏龍麵、壽司及生魚片都很美味、用餐環境舒適、服務人員態度非常親切

「幹嘛」位在大稻程鬧區，是間日式餐酒館，裡面的裝潢很特別也很溫暖，尤其是老闆收藏的手術燈…太特別了！
食材有很新鮮好吃，刺身都是店家自己殺的，盬烤鮚下巴更是一絕，生啤酒🍻也一定要來一杯，服務人員也很好聊，最重要是不限時，很好聚會的地方！
✅訂位 ✅Line Pay

reviews_detailed.author: LD CM
reviews_detailed.text: Stopped in for a late lunch and was most pleasantly surprised. The sashimi was expertly sliced, a cut above the standard izakaya fare. Vegetables were delicately seasoned, each dish thoughtfully prepared. Cosy atmosphere and gracious service. Certainly a place to which I shall return.

reviews_detailed.author: Marc Chow
reviews_detailed.text:
The boss told me they had dry-aging meats, chicken, pork, beef, fish… all of them. Then I booked a table for two the next day with high expectancy.

Then it turned out only the fish was aged as advertised, all the other meats, which I ordered to do BBQ, were below par to other restaurants of similar pricing.

The other dishes: starter plate, the fish and a “fried” udon with soup-like white source tasted nice fairly saying. The staff were nice too.

reviews_detailed.author: John Sun
reviews_detailed.text: Private menu for 1300 or 1500/person. Fresh seafood and ingredients, and portions are generous. All in all the food was pretty good.  The place could have been a little more clean, but it was by no means dirty.  Would recommend to anyone looking for a specialized menu for Spanish cuisine.

reviews_detailed.author: Min L
reviews_detailed.text: This restaurant is on my list whenever I have a important appointment with my friends!!! They always brings great taste meal with Taiwanese local ingredients!!!

reviews_detailed.author: Robyn Smith
reviews_detailed.text: very pleasant quiet dinner after a hot afternoon shopping. A welcome cold draught beer accompanied by some salmon fried rice, a really excellent miso soup, a couple of oysters and Japanese fried chicken.

name: 炎炎大阪燒 大稻埕店
formatted_address: 103台灣臺北市大同區大稻埕碼頭貨櫃市集
reviews:
【炎炎大阪燒｜大稻埕碼頭】
在大稻埕貨櫃市集吃到美味的大阪炒麵！調味剛好、份量剛好，一份$170表現不錯。服務態度好，支援刷卡、Line Pay，吃得開心又方便～

＊不吃肉也可以事先告知老闆客製不加肉，貼心又友善！

現場氣氛輕鬆，有樓上座位區可用餐，也有販售酒類，適合朋友聚餐小酌。

📌台北

「平民食堂，台灣大稻埕篇 」

逛完西門町隔天的中午，平民食堂就來逛一下台北的傳統老街大稻埕，除了傳統乾貨以外，更多的是民生社區小店，一直逛到太陽快下山，就來到大稻埕碼頭，看夕陽吃小吃 一 炎炎大阪燒 @yanyanokonomiyaki

🐥唐揚炸雞 NT $180
說是炸雞，實際上比較像雞米花，炸的金黃酥脆，肉質嫩滑😋👍🏻

🇯🇵和風海鮮大阪燒 NT $250
大阪燒料給的滿足，高麗菜爽爽脆脆，整體味道都很不錯，就是有點高單價😋👍🏻👍🏻

📍炎炎大阪燒
地址：台灣台北市大同區大稻埕碼頭貨櫃市集

#台灣 #炎炎大阪燒 #台北 #  #大稻埕 #大同區 #大阪燒 #小店系列 #平民食堂 #平民美食 #台北美食 #自費食評 #唐揚炸雞 #台北景點 #大稻埕碼頭 #大稻埕美食 #平民食堂台灣篇 #和風海鮮大阪燒 #大稻埕碼頭貨櫃市集
#foodie #hkfood #hkfoodie #foodiehk

雙人套餐 $580，人多現做大概30分鐘
四個女生分食大概六七分飽，各種都吃一點感覺滿好的，這間是附近餐車評價最高的，果然名不虛傳，推推推薦！

是店員阿姨推薦我們四個人這樣點比較划算，覺得好吃再來買，佛心店家欸🥹

炸物拼盤的薯條是脆漿口感，很讚！雞塊含肉率不錯滿好吃的（不會像早餐店塑膠雞塊那種），花枝丸就是花枝丸

飲料有可樂/雪碧/紅茶/綠茶/可爾必思，雙人套餐可擇二，店員阿姨本來推薦我們可爾必思做少冰比較好喝，一聽說我們有人月經來，拿到飲料的時候，發現是特調涼冷的可爾必思～真的很貼心，非常感謝🥺✨

reviews_detailed.author: Chuckie Siow
reviews_detailed.text: Chicken karaage is not a typical Japanese chicken karaage. It was just frozen chicken popcorn. I wish the description would have been more accurate. Staff was nice though. Hence 3 stars

reviews_detailed.author: Cm Ng
reviews_detailed.text: Nice food

reviews_detailed.author: Luxe Mode
reviews_detailed.text: Great service. Delicious food. Love it so much.

reviews_detailed.author: Jessica Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
[Sizzling Okonomiyaki | Dadaocheng Wharf]
I had delicious Osaka yakisoba at the Dadaocheng Container Market! The seasoning was perfect, the portion size was just right, and at $170 per portion, it was a great deal. The service was friendly, and they accept credit cards and Line Pay, making it a pleasant and convenient meal.

*If you don't eat meat, you can request a meatless option in advance. Thoughtful and friendly!

The atmosphere is relaxed, with upstairs seating available for dining. They also sell alcohol, making it a great place for a drink with friends.

reviews_detailed.author: Louis_Foodie Wong
reviews_detailed.text:
📌Taipei

"Affordable Eats: Dadaocheng, Taiwan"

After exploring Ximending the next day, our affordable eatery took us to Dadaocheng, a traditional old street in Taipei. Besides traditional dried goods, there are many small, everyday shops. We strolled around until sunset, then headed to the Dadaocheng pier to enjoy the sunset and snacks. One of our favorites was Osaka-style okonomiyaki (@yanyanokonomiyaki)

🐥Karaage Chicken NT $180
It's called fried chicken, but it's more like popcorn chicken. It's fried to a golden brown and crispy, with tender meat. 😋👍🏻

🇯🇵Japanese-style Seafood Osaka-style Osaka-style NT $250 The okonomiyaki was generously filled with toppings, and the cabbage was crisp and crunchy. Overall, the taste was great, just a bit pricey 😋👍🏻👍🏻

📍Yan Yan Okonomiyaki
Address: Dadaocheng Wharf Container Market, Datong District, Taipei City, Taiwan

#Taiwan #YanYanOkonomiyaki #Taipei #Dadaocheng #DatongDistrict #Okonomiyaki #SmallShopSeries #AffordableFood #TaipeiFood #SelfPaidFoodReview #KaraageChicken #TaipeiAttractions #DadaochengWharf #DadaochengFood #AffordableFoodTaiwan #JapaneseSeafoodOkonomiyaki #DadaochengWharfContainerMarket #foodie #hkfood #hkfoodie #foodiehk

name: 村民食堂廚窗港點 士林官邸店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區福林路188號
reviews:
食材處理得很乾淨，每一隻蝦的腸線都去掉了，食材品質很好，燒賣、糖醋排骨也是瘦肉多、不會肥膩，各區的食物都很可口，我最喜歡的是鮮蝦腸粉、魚翅羹、雞湯、奶黃包、杏仁茶、初心蛋捲，搭配一壺現沖茶，好享受！這家餐廳深得我心，烹調的口味不會太重，連小蛋塔都甜得岡剛好，不像其他餐廳那麼死甜又膩，感覺每道菜品都很用心。
餐桌間距夠寬，不會吵嘈，用餐環境舒適，服務態度好，旁邊就有停車場，真的是很優的用餐選擇，推薦！
吃得太開心，忘記多拍照了😂

服務員態度很好，取餐的吧台師傅還會注意湯品不夠熱，主動幫顧客更換👍
餐廳後面有停車場，機車、汽車停車都很方便喔！
魚翅、烏骨篸湯、叉燒酥、粉蒸排骨、蛋塔、無骨鳳爪、馬來糕、叉燒包、燒賣、魚蛋、杏仁豆腐、紫米紅豆粥，還有哈根達斯的冰淇淋，全都好好吃！！

村民食堂 廚窗港點（士林官邸店） 位於士林官邸旁，是台北極具人氣的港式飲茶吃到飽餐廳。主打現場手工製作的蒸籠點心、粵式燒臘及熱炒料理，並提供哈根達斯冰淇淋無限享用。

🥢 菜色亮點與評價
經典港點： 必吃奶黃包（每日限量出爐）、原味蝦餃皇、五斤蘿蔔糕、鮮蝦腐皮捲。
熱食與燒臘： 提供燒鴨、油雞、叉燒、蛋白海鮮炒飯、以及現煮的鮑魚粥、香菇雞湯。
甜點飲料： 楊枝甘露、絲襪奶茶、杏仁茶及哈根達斯冰淇淋是許多網友推薦的亮點。
環境優點： 空間寬敞乾淨，後方即有大型公有停車場，停車非常方便，適合家庭聚餐或帶長輩前往。

reviews_detailed.author: L. L.
reviews_detailed.text: Good value buffet for dim sum and many other Chinese dishes for $720NT/person. We arrived 11:05 am for lunch, but it was already packed full. Fortunately, they gave us a table in the corner. There are many selection of dim sum and various meats (bbq pork, roast duck, Beijing beef, etc). We felt that dim sum and other dishes were good, but not the best. However, there's many appetizers, salads, main popular dishes, desserts, fruits, drinks, and even ice creams. They even have 5 different hot tea pots you can enjoy.  Overal, it's a great value for the variety and good quality of buffet!  Make sure to make reservations.

reviews_detailed.author: Rachel T
reviews_detailed.text:
Fantastic experience! Great value and quality. This became one the highlights of our trip to Taiwan! Food was great and I love the selection of tea, chicken soup was fantastic, the Fried Orh Ni ball, steamed Dimsum and the baked pastures as well as the traditional desert.  The starfruit was so sweet!
Around about 800 TWD per pax. But must make sure reservation is Made as this place is super popular!

We will be back when we come to Taipei again.

reviews_detailed.author: Rei Rei
reviews_detailed.text: The variety of food is really extensive! Especially like the fried rice, hor fun and the fried stuffs. The siew mai with abalone was so so. Desserts were good! U will be served a pot of tea once seated. The prawn inside the prawn rice noodle rolls didn't taste fresh. They don't allow photo and video taking of the food in display. It's beside a carpark so convenient for drivers.

reviews_detailed.author: Wisanu Tuntawiroon
reviews_detailed.text:
Dimsum Kitchen at the Shilin Official Residence location is a fantastic spot for dim sum lovers. One of the most impressive aspects of this restaurant is its extensive menu. From classic favorites like shrimp dumplings and BBQ pork buns to creative new dishes, there’s something to satisfy every craving.

The variety of dim sum is remarkable, making it easy to try a mix of traditional and unique options. The dishes are beautifully presented and freshly made, with flavors that balance authenticity and innovation. The crispy turnip cakes and xiao long bao are must-tries, and their dessert selections, such as mango pudding, provide a perfect sweet finish to the meal.

The restaurant is spacious, clean, and welcoming, with a cozy yet lively atmosphere. The service is attentive and efficient, even during busy hours. It’s an excellent spot for families, groups of friends, or even solo diners who want to indulge in a dim sum feast.

reviews_detailed.author: Felita Gutana
reviews_detailed.text:
Not as good as expected since the place is always busy. Long wait time, good ambience, front service was good, food was ok to not really. Big hands up for the ice cream served was haagendasz! And a lot of variation of haagendasz. Food wasn't consistent, I tried all the dumplings and there was this dumplings that has 2 pieces in a tray, it was supposed to had egg in it since my brother had came to eat here before but I didn't get the egg inside in one of the dumpling and I also got the egg inside in another dumpling. I tried their fried rolls too but mine wasn't taste like curry & had a lot of fillings but my brother's was really bad + tasted like curry with flours. The herbal soup was really weird & bad too. The most okay foods was their pao, siomay, egg tart & fried dish that has meat inside i dunno what's the name. And to get the salted egg pao, you need to queue fast and can only get 2 mini pao 🫠
Overall I won't come here again if they don't serve haagendasz for the icecream.

name: 金孫韓廚 義大利麵(士林店)
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段505巷20號
reviews:
記得先訂位如果要吃的話
我臨時起意現場等了六組客人
但我覺得不好吃 醬油雞腿義大利麵的雞腿有肉腥味
甜豆大概只有2根切三段
炸雞也普通偏上
不會回訪

今日二訪餐點如下
辣魷魚義大利麵很夠味蠻好吃的
海鮮煎餅今天運氣蠻好的
趁熱吃並不會感到太過油膩
表皮脆脆的口感還不錯
青醬菠菜義大利麵味道搭配素肉丁一起吃味道頗特別如果喜歡這種味道的人會蠻喜歡的
雪濃湯在冷冷的天氣喝還蠻好喝的
但可惜裡面肉片感覺比較碎
如果有完整的肉片口感可能會更好
附贈的兩塊米餅可以稍微泡一下湯
不要泡太久就可以吃囉
可以有點脆感但又可以有點湯汁的味道歐
雪濃湯是上次跟這次都有點的滿意推推👍
還有點一道許多網友推薦的蜂蜜炸雞沒拍到
可能甜味的韓式炸雞還是吃不大習慣
所以覺得以後還是吃原味就好
否則甜口味的感覺一下就吃膩了
但我相信愛甜口味炸雞的人應該會超愛😊
所以喜歡甜炸雞的人還是可以點點看

整體普普，沒有驚艷。
海鮮煎餅，海鮮餡料不多，麵粉很厚，且辣味真的很辣，要斟酌，另外義大利麵條偏硬。

reviews_detailed.author: James Yuan
reviews_detailed.text: Very good pasta with tasty Korean sauce, I also like their appetizers (Korean fried chicken, seafood pancake and soup).  It’s a creative Korean Italian fusion.

reviews_detailed.author: Christine Brynn Khalil
reviews_detailed.text: As a California girl that has been living in Taipei for almost 4 years, I can confidently say this place is above and beyond most of the competition. The textures and flavors are artfully combined, expertly prepared and present a really beautiful fusion of Korean and Italian style cuisine. This isn't just a pasta shop, which many places in the area will do an "ok" job at - the ingredients are fresh, and present crunchy, chewy, tender, spicy and umami in symphony. I've been here a handful of times and am consistently impressed.

reviews_detailed.author: Christina Wong
reviews_detailed.text:
Love the seafood pancakes - crispy and packed with ingredients. Can taste the seafood in every bite. Will try the pasta next time as those are the specialty.
Burger patty is tasty but the sauce is a bit too sweet to my likings.

reviews_detailed.author: Amber Tran
reviews_detailed.text:
Sure the food was not terrible but I don't get the hype.. We got the beef ball and chicken pasta, both were mediocre. The chicken pasta's sauce was bland and a bit on the watery side for pasta sauce in my opinion and the beef's one was basically gochujang, pretty boring and unnecessarily overpowering. I don't understand the tiny pieces of veggies either, pretty uncommon on a pasta dish (we ended up eating with a spoon since it was not very practical to eat with a fork).
For appetizer we got the seaweed roll, which was very disappointing since the tempura batter was hard, not crispy as expected.
