I guess the highlight of the meal was the cantaloupe soda, which was from a can (also unexpected).
To sum up, the experience felt almost like self-service. We ordered by checking off dishes on a paper menu, and we also helped ourselves to free water and napkins at a station. Additionally, we arrived before the restaurant's opening hour (5:30 p.m.), and waited outside with a few other groups. However, when it was 5:30, the staff remained inside, chatting, and we weren’t sure when it was okay to enter. It wasn’t until a delivery person arrived that my husband followed him in and asked the staff if we could come in. Only then did we realize that we could. Despite having a glass door, which allowed the staff to see us waiting outside, no one made an effort to welcome us in when it was finally time for the restaurant to open.

reviews_detailed.author: Ian Witkowski
reviews_detailed.text: tasty food, cozy atmosphere. Small menu, which means one thing - they know what they are doing, and they do it well

name: 日向洋食（不提供當日定位，可現場候位
formatted_address: 11143台灣臺北市士林區大西路35號
reviews:
加入會員可以兌換飲料～
天堂鳥冰茶味道比較特別，不像一般的水果茶或是純茶，喜不喜歡蠻看人的😌
google評論也能送咖喱可麗餅
送的蠻有誠意的，可麗餅不會太小塊，是好吃的打卡禮
1. 冷漬番茄鮮奶油 $109
如果只有兩個人只能點一樣前菜，這道絕對必點，有用梅粉醃過非常開胃，鮮奶油也不會膩！
2. 明太子焗洋芋 $169
喜歡明太子的人可以點，但有一點點辣，不吃辣的人可能要注意一下～
3. 明太子鮭魚義大利麵 $288
第一口吃到覺得非常驚豔，但友人覺得吃到後面還是有點膩，適合跟朋友一起分食
4. 紅酒牛肉咖哩飯（加購歐姆蛋） $328
牛肉嚼勁十足，醬汁微酸非常開胃，是四道主餐裡最喜歡的😻
5. 厚切豬排咖哩飯 $288
安全牌料理，正常發揮沒有特別驚豔但也能順順的吃完😆
6. 多蜜純牛漢堡排飯 $328
牛漢堡非常嫩非常多汁，而且薯泥可以稍微解膩，但牛的味道還是比較重，如果不喜歡肉味的感覺還是先pass

難吃到有令人嚇到
說不定調理包都更好吃
點了菜單上的一二名
都很驚艷的不好吃

燉菠菜還加了肉桂？奶油吃多了很膩
奶油味噌湯也不好吃湯上面浮一層類似油水分離
炸雞是咖喱口味也很微妙
漢堡排很軟吃一口就知道不合口味
章魚腥味也蠻重
飯偏乾硬

但餐具擺盤都很可愛、好看
哈蜜瓜蘇打真的很好看～

店內感覺不是很乾淨
吧檯裡面的飲料壺上面很髒
旁邊擺設的桌布上面也很髒
一進門看到女店員可愛的白圍裙
像是從沒洗過的灰黑色
真的觀感不是很好⋯
公司提供一下送洗吧⋯⋯

只能說可惜了裝潢跟餐具營造氛圍的用心⋯
想吃美食千萬不要來踩雷雖然單價並不高
服務也不錯～不過調理包可能都更好吃
大概就是一次性店家吧～

現場候位要等蠻久的，後來店內陸陸續續有空位但也沒有帶位進去不知道是有什麼特殊考量🧐
食物的部分唐揚雞塊很好吃！！醃料味道跟麵衣都很棒⋯
漢堡排普通，可能是因為全牛所以內部汁水不太多，多蜜醬有點膩（太鹹太甜🥵
柚子胡椒松阪豬義大利麵很不怎麼樣，不知道為什麼清炒的麵會那麼膩那麼油吃到最後盤子裡面都是油⋯麵的口感也很不怎麼樣
應該點三明治的💔

reviews_detailed.author: Albert Khor
reviews_detailed.text:
日向洋食 (Hinata) offers refined Japanese-style Western cuisine in an intimate, calm setting. Thoughtfully plated dishes balance comfort and elegance, making it ideal for a slow, special meal.

A minimum spending of NT$200 per person applies, and reservations are required due to limited seating and strong demand.

The only downside: they accept cash only, which feels a little old-school.

reviews_detailed.author: Theresa Tan
reviews_detailed.text:
I would like to provide feedback regarding our recent dining experience at your restaurant.

There were eight of us dining before a flight, and we were seated at different tables. We were informed that there was a minimum individual spend of TWD 200. We have order a 2 person set meal and additional main dish, our table’s total bill amounted to TWD 1,395. However, we were told this did not count as a shared meal and that each person was required to order a main dish. The waitress told me we need to order another dish of at least 139 to meet the 个人消费。

While we understand and are fine with a minimum individual spend requirement, we find it unreasonable to impose an additional requirement to order a main dish, especially when the minimum spend was already met. This led to excessive food being ordered that we could not finish, resulting in unnecessary food waste.

More importantly, we observed that this rule was not applied consistently, as other tables were not subjected to the same requirement. This inconsistency made the situation particularly frustrating and unacceptable.
Attached 2 photos of our bills at 2 different table

We hope you will review this policy and its enforcement to ensure fairness and a better dining experience for all customers.

reviews_detailed.author: Ron Okinawa
reviews_detailed.text:
I have the same feeling as many review. Yes, go read some 1-3 stars reviews.

First, food is kind of pre cook or microwave food. Terrible.

Second, no service from staff but charged 10% fee. The service is rude in a way the stuff chat loundly right next to us and others customers.
And give us the bill 30mins before the time they promised to us for the table
Atmosphere and music is very bad for a date.

Don’t come and not recommend for locals and foreigners

reviews_detailed.author: Hank Sung
reviews_detailed.text: The presentation of the food was nice, but unfortunately everything tasted like expired food—almost like it wasn’t fresh. Portions were very small for the price, and I honestly didn’t feel motivated to take more photos after that. Aside from the waitress pouring water (which we could have done ourselves), I don’t see the reason for a 10% service charge. Sorry for being harsh, but it was absolutely necessary to do this.

reviews_detailed.author: Momo Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Yummy pasta ， curry chicken , big selection of drinks and sweet desserts! Highly recommended!

name: 小倉庫食研所
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區福佳里美崙街86巷2號1樓
reviews:
收藏已久終於來了，這次點：
1. 番茄雞肉義大利麵 $300
2. 小朋友番茄麵（附飲料） $270
3. 迷迭香烤雞腿早午餐（附現打果汁+飲料） $440

番茄雞肉義大利麵
味道不錯

小朋友番茄麵
上桌讓我愣住，因為我沒有檢查菜單內容，所以讓小屁孩吃了澱粉+炸物，而且都是加工食品🥺🥺
番茄麵、薯條、雞塊，口感及口味吃不出與一般早餐店的差別，這樣餐點與價位有點對不上，餐費仿佛更像是繳場地費

迷迭香烤雞腿早午餐
• 雞腿有烤出脆皮，沒調味，可以自己撒些鹽比較提味
• 歐姆蛋也是沒調味，可以自己到廁所前的醬料區挑味道
• 生菜可選佐醬，巴薩米克醋不錯
• 麵包可選抹醬，榛果巧克力醬香濃，麵包就…
• 菇菇大、水分足
• 葡萄柚的苦味搭配焦糖脆片剛好

-
還沒開門前就有好幾組客人在門口等
在窄窄的門口大家有先來後到的排一下
門一開就有後面的人先衝進去報訂位電話
大家都有訂位，對於這樣爭先恐後不是很喜歡
服務生的控場力有點弱
-
點餐是服務生到桌邊點菜，不知道服務生是不是太內向，音量偏小而且講話蠻不清楚的
點餐後不到5分鐘，服務生來說餐點已經做了無法更換，我滿頭問號，我重複說了一次我們點的品項，表示我們沒有要求更換，她才發現跑錯桌

環境是乾淨的，空間是喧嘩的，可能在傳統市場+科教館附近，有這樣的店存在是難得的，所以備受盛譽

燉飯好吃，可再+100元升級成套餐（麵包+濃湯+飲料）。
另單點炸雞翅差點吃不完，因太飽了，但此炸物太乾，所以比較不推薦。
而店家在巷內，剛好隔壁施工路況偏窄，若開車會不方便找車位。

意外發現的一家店，餐點份量很多，很好吃，而且不收服務費，焦糖葡萄柚還幫你挖好切塊，只有在飯店會遇到這麼貼心的。

打包也很用心，已收入口袋名單

reviews_detailed.author: Patricia Cancio
reviews_detailed.text: I ordered the cheese bolognese, and the serving was big and filling. The taste itself was really good 😋 My companion got the meat lovers’ breakfast, and I was able to try the mushroom, which was soft and chewy. Everything we tried was well-prepared and tasty. I’d love to come back here the next time I’m in Taiwan!

reviews_detailed.author: TS
reviews_detailed.text:
Great foods. All the dish was superb. Value for money.

The staffs were lovely.

Highly reccomended !

reviews_detailed.author: Roselina Priscilla Stephanie Widjaja
reviews_detailed.text:
Came because of the cheese burger videos and it really exceeded my expectations 
- They also gift free birthday dessert. The picture is really cute. :3

Thank you so much.
It was a great dining experience.

The restaurant is very kid friendly.
So many family came with kids.

reviews_detailed.author: Tina Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
The dishes are delicate and delicious. I especially recommend the seafood soup risotto—slightly spicy, richly flavored, and absolutely delightful in every bite. Though the seafood portion isn’t abundant, you can taste the chef’s dedication in every spoonful.

Drinks are unlimited, and I highly recommend the unsweetened toffee black tea, which has a unique and fragrant aroma.

This seems to be a family-friendly restaurant, as they provide special seats for children. I also noticed quite a few kids dining there.

reviews_detailed.author: B&J Canon
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent lunch place near science and astronomy museums in Taipei. Ordered the double burger and chicken nuggets and they were both great. The service and atmosphere (pop music) was good. Within easy walking distance of the two museums and the kids park next to them.

name: 士林貳貳參丼飯
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中正路223巷11號
reviews:
第一次晚上約19.30來，結果已經完售了🥹
是一家好吃ㄉ丼飯店，送的麻吉也很好吃
靠近士林站用餐很方便～很適合學生來用餐，還有味增湯可以喝😋

鄰近士林捷運站的巷弄美食，由老宅整修改裝的樸實小店。
我們點雞肉和牛肉親子丼，是壽喜燒烹調的方式，醬汁調味得宜，滲入白飯後口感恰到好處；雞肉和牛肉的料理也頗到位，軟嫩可口、甜鹹適中。
小菜胡麻小黃瓜也清爽順口，胡麻醬汁濃淡恰當。
泡菜和海帶味噌湯雖是免費卻都在水準之上。
總體而言這是家頗具C/P值的小餐坊，下回再來嚐嚐他們的其他美味。
那麼多人的評論，原本在想是不是看在評論送麻糬的面子上？吃完後，迫不及待想上來評論。親子丼好吃耶！會讓人一口一口的想吃完！豬排飯也好吃😋

reviews_detailed.author: PACA C
reviews_detailed.text:
This is a restaurant that I would only come to once. 🤔

The restaurant is on the second floor. The main dishes are rice bowls. The meat is small for the price. 🥩The side dishes are just some very cheap side dishes.

💰The decoration costs a large proportion of the meal.

The store will receive a free side dish if it has five reviews🌟

reviews_detailed.author: Cindy Tong
reviews_detailed.text:
A quaint Japanese don restaurant nestled in a quiet street just beside the busy Shilin mrt station.
Must try their torched bacon don!! 💕
And also their Japanese fried mochi dough l is not to be missed

reviews_detailed.author: yueyi chua
reviews_detailed.text: Food taste good, however more on the sweet side.

reviews_detailed.author: Frangipani
reviews_detailed.text: A small restaurant in a narrow alley. Good food, fast service. The restaurant is a family run business. Highly recommend the green curry

reviews_detailed.author: 林俊諺
reviews_detailed.text: Fair price, decent food, nice vibe hidden in Taipei alley

name: 大俠請留步
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區文林路188號
reviews:
非常好吃😋
《酸木瓜燒雞》湯頭似酸菜魚，僅少了椒麻的麻，又比酸菜魚湯更清爽，無油膩感，份量3個體型適中女生剛剛好
《炸辣子雞》如同川菜館的口味一摸一樣，外皮酥脆，將汁牢牢鎖住，Q彈美味😋

大俠請留步，像是一個從老電影裡掉出來的場景——木門、燈籠、些微的歲月味道，彷彿輕輕一推門，就能走進自己的江湖。

店內的復古台式餐酒氛圍有種說不上來的安心感，像是認識已久的老朋友。坐下後，第一口料理便是問候。四川重慶的 「燒雞公」，麻辣的濃烈與酸爽的俐落，各自帶著不同的故事：前者是熱情的武林豪客，後者是帶點清風的遊俠，各有各的個性與餘韻。

如果你也想在城市裡找一處小小的江湖落腳處，不妨留步於此。點一鍋、飲一杯，讓味蕾和心情都慢慢安定下來。這裡的江湖不喧鬧，只悄悄等你入座。

花雕醉雞煲新登場，這次只有三個人吃不了那麼多，下次一定要試試看。
燒雞鍋好吃，拌麵也好吃，另外點了豆腐丶鴨血，感覺很適合煮成一鍋，皮蛋的口味和想像的不大一樣，整體風味很相似，吃完覺得略有空虛感，還可以再去士林夜市補點小食

reviews_detailed.author: Tina Hsu
reviews_detailed.text:
The Spicy Chicken Hot Pot was delicious, packed with ingredients, and full of bold flavors. It was incredibly fragrant and paired perfectly with rice. The chicken was exceptionally tender.

The Green Papaya Chicken Hot Pot also had plenty of ingredients, but it was a bit overly salty, which was different from what I had expected.

The restaurant’s interior had a strong ancient ambiance, which I really liked.

reviews_detailed.author: YiHsuan Tseng
reviews_detailed.text: The location is great and the opening hour is wonderful for night owls. The Taiwanese style foods are flavorful in acceptable prices. The staff are helpful and responsive. Its interior design and oriental ornaments are the highlights. Really enjoy the ambiance here.

reviews_detailed.author: Always Hungry
reviews_detailed.text: Had an event for 8 person there. The cocktails were great, we even had 3 bottles of sake. Food was a big disappointment, had a lot of leftovers. The service was very nice maybe because there were not alot of people on a weekday night.

reviews_detailed.author: Sharon Seow
reviews_detailed.text: I was recommended this place by a friend. The name already gave me good vibes due to its uniqueness. The interior design didn't disappoint. Foodwise, the szechuan spicy noodles and the szechuan popcorn chicken were right up my alley with the correct texture and right amount of spice that gives a kick but doesn't kill the tastebuds. The non-spicy truffle chicken rice was a hit with my tween who left me with just a spoonful to try. There are other interesting side dishes like the intestines, blood and fish cake that one can try alongside the mains. To top it off, the service staff were attentive and friendly which makes this visit an overall excellent experience! Located at Shihlin, it is very easy to get there. This bistro makes a great stopover while visiting the night market. A fun place to rest the body and reward the stomach before experiencing more of Taipei!

reviews_detailed.author: Jonas Schildermans
reviews_detailed.text:
🌱A vegetarian’s review🌱

I’m usually willing to spend more money in a nice looking interior and original atmosphere, but the traditional food you can eat here you can also find cheaper and more tasty at the night market just across the street. Vegetarian options are not many and the ones they have are a bit boring. They are aware towards producing as less trash as possible. Cozy place to gather with people.

name: 士林廚房
formatted_address: 11141台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段470巷8號1樓
reviews:
先說結論，第一次用餐，應該不會再來了。
是衝著有送龍蝦的活動才來用餐，沒想到送來的龍蝦不是呈現新鮮的紅橘色，而是已經變成詭異的暗咖啡色，肉質偏硬，令人失望，不管是任何理由造成龍蝦變成咖啡色，是不是都不應該送上桌給客人？
松葉蟹腳拿起來時輕輕的，果然，蟹腳裡面空空的，沒什麼肉，蟹腳內僅有的肉又乾又
柴，這種品質的松葉蟹腳還擺上餐台，餐廳是不知道還是裝傻，硬要湊數？
干貝是唯一的亮點，符合餐廳該有的水平。
其他的熱食、生菜、水果、冰品等種類不多，像是semi buffet的規格，很快就可以吃完一輪，剩下很多時間可以烤麵包吃。
餐廳的環境很好，空間挑高，採光明亮，因為用餐客人不多，也不會太吵雜，服務生妹妹很盡責。

旅展餐券約1100元，12月底前平日晚餐送一隻龍蝦，這個價格是划算的。菜色雖不多，但有幾項很不錯。

生食區干貝新鮮會甜；
龍蝦紮實Q彈；
披薩冷掉都好吃；
可頌甜度剛好又有層次；
現打果汁及熱水果茶好喝；

口味不錯有：藥膳蝦、炒河粉、生春捲、熱菜區牛肉、烤牛肉、麻辣鴨血、生魚片、麵包區及甜點等；

中規中矩：蟹腳：不太能一次完整抽出，會變成一絲一絲的，還需要用工具處理，口味跟口感普通。
握壽司種類不多，口味普通。
哈根達斯冰淇淋很難挖。

特別一提服務人員態度極佳，連餐檯的師傅們也都客氣有禮。
因桌數不多，整體環境舒適。
若是還是餐券價格會有意願再訪，但要是高於餐卷會斟酌。

20260126，吃午餐
士林廚房場地不算寬闊，但是佈置得高雅大方。
以飯店自助餐廳來說，這裡的菜色有夠少，很快就能吃過一輪，然後挑選鍾意的菜色重複吃。
餐廳目前的活動是每人一隻位上龍蝦。
蝦殼拉掉，整隻塞進嘴裡，十分過癮🤣
馬告香菇雞湯滋味不錯，生食級干貝口感很棒，這是最有記憶點的兩道菜。
一般餐廳的現沖牛肉湯是顧客自行動手，在這裡是由工作人員來服務，而且肉片是汆燙之後再裝碗加湯，適合怕吃太生的顧客。
這次是使用餐卷，花費的價錢與漢來海港或饗食天堂相當，這裡雖然菜色不多，但是工作人員的服務品質不錯，是滿意的用餐體驗。

reviews_detailed.author: LD CM
reviews_detailed.text:
Having arrived in the Shilin area early for official business at the nearby Shilin Residence, I thought it most fitting to begin the day with a hearty breakfast at a reputable establishment. Sadly, my visit to the Shilin Kitchen within the Renaissance Taipei proved to be far less agreeable than anticipated.

Upon entering, I was received by a male host whose demeanour could best be described as impatient and indifferent. One expects, at the very least, a modicum of courtesy and attentiveness in such establishments. Unfortunately, none was afforded. The interaction felt rushed and perfunctory, lacking even a semblance of hospitality.

The marble-top tables, though ostensibly luxurious, were presented bare, no placemats, no tablecloths, leaving every scratch, mark, and smear cruelly exposed under the morning light. It gave an impression less of minimalist chic and more of carelessness.

As for the breakfast itself, one could only describe it as entirely lacklustre. The scrambled eggs were a disappointment, texturally unappealing and lacking in seasoning. The pre-cooked fried eggs, sitting forlornly under a heat lamp, were equally uninspired. Fruits, which should bring freshness and colour to a morning plate, were limited to a paltry selection, perhaps two or three uninspired choices.

There was no sense of thought or culinary pride in the offerings. The entire affair felt as though it had been assembled out of obligation, not care. It was the kind of buffet one might expect at a lesser hotel chain, not from a property under the Marriott name.

Thankfully, I was in possession of a dining voucher, which slightly softened the blow. Had I paid full price for this uninspired experience, I dare say I would have regretted it most bitterly.

A deeply underwhelming breakfast marked by indifferent service, poor presentation, and a conspicuous absence of culinary inspiration. I would not return, nor recommend it, unless, of course, one is armed with a voucher and exceedingly modest expectations.

reviews_detailed.author: Eric Khun
reviews_detailed.text:
Semi-buffet style where you can get a main dish, and then access to the buffet. Only Buffet option is possible for 1080ntd + 10%.

We took the pork tomahawk and duck. It was below average. But the salad bar buffet is amazing. really high quality ingredient in all the buffet. Probably the best desserts for a buffet in Taipei. Couldn't stop eating the pastries.

I'd come here just for the salad bar buffet

reviews_detailed.author: Edward Lu
reviews_detailed.text: We went there for “main course” plus “semi buffet” dinner. The four main courses we ordered were all very delicious. The sashimi we got from the semi-buffet was very impressive. The only issue I wanna point out was the semi-buffet did not really offer proper items to match their western style main courses.

reviews_detailed.author: YiHsuan Tseng
reviews_detailed.text: Had a dinner gathering with my family. It’s my second time visit the restaurant, the location is quiet and spacious, not many people here. The overall ambiance is enjoyable. Food choices are okay with acceptable quality compared to its price. Quite a fine place to hang out in the neighborhood.

reviews_detailed.author: Yen-Chung Chen
reviews_detailed.text: We had a nice experience for the breakfast there. The decoration of the restaurant is fashion and makes us had happy mood. Besides, the staffs are active and very kind for us. The restaurant prepares many tasty food and drinks, and also prepares a number of traditional Chinese/Taiwanese breakfast which should bring interesting experience for foreigners.

name: 道樂屋台
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區基河路112號
reviews:
2026.02.08初訪
點了冬季限定的拉麵，湯頭濃郁，冷冷的天氣吃上一碗很溫暖。
唐揚雞和炸牡蠣蠻推薦點的，雞肉肉質鮮嫩多汁，牡蠣也很大顆。
這次沒有點到角煮，下次回訪有機會再碰碰運氣。

先在外面用點餐機點餐後店員會帶入座
裝潢擺設很有日本風
店內也有附冰水可以自行取用

這次點辛味增拉麵，個人覺得蠻好吃的
有些店的蔬菜是放豆芽菜，但我不喜歡
這間店是放高麗菜，吸了滿滿的湯汁，好吃

煎餃內餡沒到飽滿但多汁
叉燒飯的炙燒味很夠很香

📍道樂屋台｜雞白湯拉麵 2025.10

這碗雞白湯拉麵、湯頭呈現自然乳白色，入口順口，不厚重也不油膩，雞旨味清楚但不搶味。

麵條偏細，吸湯力不錯，口感帶點彈性，不會過軟，叉燒以雞肉為主，切片厚薄適中，肉質柔嫩、沒有腥味。

整體調味平衡度好，適合想吃一碗清爽拉麵的時候。

Alvin給星｜⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
喜歡雞白湯、偏清爽系拉麵的人，會喜歡。

reviews_detailed.author: Max Chang
reviews_detailed.text:
Nice dining experience! The decor at the restaurant is very fun, with lots of cute little novelties!

The food is nice too, I can say with certainly that the fried chicken here is something to look forward to! How they are able to make the skin crispy but still maintain very thin, so it doesn’t hurt our mouth when eating it, awesome!

The noodle though, I must say, is nice, but I d had better noodle in some other place, to be fair

But all in all I’d say it’s still a very interesting dining experience that I’ll be sure to score 5 star and I myself would look forward to coming here the next time I’m in the neighborhood!

reviews_detailed.author: David Lee
reviews_detailed.text: So good! The broth was different than all the other broths I have ever had. A bit thicker. The fried items were well done. Very light and fluffy.

reviews_detailed.author: Amy Nguyen
reviews_detailed.text: Chicken broth is a must-try! It was so rich and flavorful. The whole place was super cozy with Japanese decorations and style. And the prices are pretty reasonable too!

reviews_detailed.author: Mr Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Had the pork ramen, kimchi side and fried chicken.  The soup was flavorful but 3.5 stars. The fried chicken side was pretty good, a 4. The atmosphere was quaint, prices were reasonable about $340.

reviews_detailed.author: Jeff Tan
reviews_detailed.text:
Good ramen restaurant, the broth is made extremely well. Noodles were fair but slightly uneven, we ordered 2 different selections however one of the bowls the noodles was a bit hard.

Taste wise can't complain, and portion size was good in comparison to other ramen places in Taipei.

Definately a must try if you enjoy ramen!

name: 歐品鄉廚
formatted_address: 111台灣台北市士林区中正路235巷32號士林捷運1號出口旁
reviews: 餐廳位於捷運站旁，地點相當便利，對通勤族或臨時想簡單用餐的人來說十分友善。主打義大利麵料理，整體口味表現穩定，醬料比例與麵體熟度拿捏得不錯，以店內的價格帶來看，份量與味道都有一定水準，整體CP值算是偏高，屬於日常聚餐或快速用餐都合適的類型。環境部分較為特別，一樓只有一桌座位，大部分用餐區集中在二樓，動線相對單純，但也因此需要走樓梯才能上去用餐。需要注意的是店內沒有設置無障礙空間，對於行動不便者或推嬰兒車的客人可能會稍微不方便。整體而言，如果是重視交通便利、價格合理且想吃一份穩定表現義大利麵的人，這間店仍然是值得考慮的一個選擇。

想說這家開了很久從來沒吃過
就來試試看
老闆娘人很好餐廳也很乾淨

就是那個蛋包飯怎麼會有辦法這麼難吃？
哈哈哈哈哈哈 已經匪夷所思到引人發笑

有基本味覺跟邏輯的人
看到照片應該就知道不會好吃了
不想細說⋯我頭痛
（吃了飯之後已經失去嘗試豬排的勇氣了）

只能說當下已經覺得
好像我自己跑到他們廚房做蛋包飯
也有很高的機率會比他們端出來的好吃

老闆娘人真的很好
但是我已經好久沒有吃到這麼難吃的東西了
快瘋了
比他們便宜的蛋包飯也很好吃啊😧

（照片內有菜單） 餐點份量多、可免費加大。
一樓只有兩桌、其餘座位要上二樓。

調味一般、價格平價，Cp值蠻高的！

reviews_detailed.author: Chen Aini
reviews_detailed.text:
this romatic place at the night for a dinner
food good,service is good,clean place

reviews_detailed.author: Bill Franklin
reviews_detailed.text: Won't go back. Food was tasteless (I had chicken rice au gratin) and portions were small. The service was minimal. The dining room was cluttered and dirty. You have to go online to order and warning, it's only in Chinese. The only thing good was the kumquat lemonade. There are too many better options.

reviews_detailed.author: Deyna Chia
reviews_detailed.text:
Really good pasta. Good ingredients and pasta not overcooked.

Aircon nice and cool!

Recommended!

reviews_detailed.author: Shuffle Dance Sweet Art
reviews_detailed.text: 9/20/2025, Last lunch in Taiwan. At Shilin station I accidentally came across an Italian noodle shop. I went and ordered a bacon noodle, hmmm the meat was rich in flavor and when I ate the noodles it reminded me of the days I was still in Europe so the taste was great. I hope when I return to Taiwan I can visit this place again.

reviews_detailed.author: Sasa Wu
reviews_detailed.text: We were there this weekend and the experience is so not good. The staffs don’t even smile when we entered the restaurant. Then she gave us a table beside the toilet even though she saw we have a baby with us and there are lots of empty tables on the other side of the room.  Many people came later and all of them were placed on the other side while we are the only persons on the toilet side (i feel discriminated).Then to prevent my baby from crying and disturbing other people, i gave her my phone to watch youTube, then the waitress went to the back and turned the music so loud that my baby can no longer hear what she’s watching that made baby irritable. And when she serve the food, she didn’t even smile or atleast nod when we said ‘thank you’ to her ( friendly huh?) The food is fair but we will never come back and will never recommend this to other people. This place is worse!!!

name: 萬麗軒
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段470巷8號1樓
reviews:
這次到位於士林的萬麗軒用餐，整體感覺相當不錯，無論是環境、服務還是餐點品質，都讓人留下深刻印象。萬麗軒位在台北士林萬麗酒店內，餐廳裝潢走的是典雅高級的中式風格，整體空間寬敞舒適，燈光柔和不刺眼，給人一種沉穩又放鬆的氛圍，很適合家庭聚餐或朋友聚會。餐廳的位置也很方便，靠近士林官邸與捷運士林站，交通算是相當便利。 ￼

餐點方面主打粵菜與多種中華料理，菜色精緻且口味層次豐富，每一道菜的擺盤都很用心，看得出來廚師對細節的講究。尤其是餐廳相當有名的窯烤片皮鴨，外皮烤得金黃酥脆，入口香氣十足，搭配薄餅、蔥段與甜麵醬一起吃，口感層次非常豐富，讓人忍不住一口接一口。除了烤鴨之外，其他熱炒與海鮮料理也相當有水準，食材新鮮、調味恰到好處，不會過於油膩，整體吃起來相當順口。 ￼

服務方面也令人滿意，服務人員態度親切且專業，上菜速度掌握得很好，過程中也會適時協助介紹菜色或更換餐盤，讓整體用餐體驗更加舒適。整體來說，萬麗軒不只是餐點美味，環境與服務品質也達到五星級飯店餐廳的水準。這次的用餐經驗讓人感到十分滿足，如果想找一間氣氛好、料理精緻的中式餐廳聚餐或慶祝，萬麗軒會是一個很不錯的選擇。

平日午餐和家人前往，令人驚豔且印象深刻。從進門開始，服務人員展現出極高的專業與親切，尤其是在我們點了兩套招牌窯烤片皮鴨後，服務人員主動關心菜量是否足夠，並以專業判斷建議我們不需要再加點太多，這種為顧客著想的服務態度讓人備感溫馨。
招牌窯烤片皮鴨是絕對的主角。烤鴨需提前預訂，現場片皮後金黃酥脆的鴨皮與細嫩多汁的鴨肉讓人食指大動。搭配薄透的餅皮，每一口都充滿層次。兩吃選項中，鹹菜燉鴨湯味道濃郁且暖胃；京醬爆鴨架則醬香十足，是非常下飯的一道菜。
額外加點的水蓮也處理得恰到好處，清脆爽口，為豐盛的烤鴨大餐帶來了清新的平衡。餐廳環境融合了現代時尚與中式韻味，整體用餐氛圍安靜舒適，非常適合家庭聚餐。
萬麗軒的料理口味精緻，服務水準一流，是一次從菜色到服務都讓人心滿意足的用餐體驗。

因為有購買招牌窯烤片皮鴨二食餐券，所以第一次來萬利酒店的萬麗軒吃吃看，餐廳就在酒店的一樓，來這裡用餐車子可以停放在地下室；同時也可以折抵停車費非常方便！
所謂的二食當然主餐是片鴨的部分以及麵皮、葱段、小黃瓜薄切片及沾醬，第二食就是肉骨可以熱炒或是煮湯擇一！另外這次餐廳也提供威士忌淺酌，所以吃起來非常地完美！
現場服務員對每桌的服務都很好！會幫每桌餐客補茶、倒茶，對每道餐點都說得很清楚，餐具上每個人都是兩套筷子～公筷、母筷，感覺就很放心加分不少！唯一廳內的桌數不會很多，也因為這樣就不會覺得用餐會有壓迫感！
最後這次的烤鴨很好吃，所以忘了多拍點這次的菜色部分！就等下次再來時再補上來！

reviews_detailed.author: SH W
reviews_detailed.text:
If the ambiance and atmosphere matter to you, this is a beautiful restaurant with big space and friendly staffs, but nothing worth for the food and money (Taipei is a city full of delicious food, here is not one of them). The worst are: Taiwanese kimchi $280NTD - no, too sweet and tastes really not fresh, you could def get a plate way better than this in a local restaurant even for free. BBQ Combination 燒味三拼 $980NTD is the worst in my entire life!! (Not kidding) How could you make BBQ combination this bad taste and the oil they used makes me sick?! I love BBQ combination and I always try them in every restaurant I go where serve it. This is beyond words I’d describe. We couldn’t finish it at all. The dimsum thing, looks pretty, but where did you buy it? - Highlight was the kale, really fresh and delicious, thanks to the farmers!
Don’t pretend it’s a high-end restaurant just because you’re cooking in a 5 stars hotel. Please have some moral responsibility to your customers, who support you. Thank you.

reviews_detailed.author: 王浩禾
reviews_detailed.text: Beautiful restaurant, friendly service and good if not exceptional Cantonese basics (but no dim sum).  Cubed steaks, stir fried pork and chicken fried rice were very good, egg yolk fried shrimp less so.

reviews_detailed.author: Claya Chu
reviews_detailed.text: Nice pork stew and Shanghainese fried rice. The rest are mediocre. The facilities is brand new and staff are hospitable. Overall experience is good.

reviews_detailed.author: MY 3659 (MY)
reviews_detailed.text:
The food was so good. I had no time for the rest of the order. It’s definitely delicious!

This new chef is Taiwanese now,  no longer Hong Kong style menu. FYI

reviews_detailed.author: Ma Shun
reviews_detailed.text:
Cozy room, good location, warm staff.
This hotel is quite new as just been renovated.
Glad to stay here as it is within the walking distance to Shilin night market.

name: 荷麵亭 HASUMENTEI 士林店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段505巷42弄2號
reviews:
真正道地的濃厚豚骨拉麵（特別是博多系），核心精神是「覺得鹹是配冰開水，而不是把湯頭稀釋」。
​這裡面其實牽涉到拉麵湯頭結構的幾個關鍵
​1. 「替玉（加麵）」的物理原則
​道地的豚骨拉麵，第一碗的湯頭必須熬得極度厚實、鹹度夠高且油脂豐富。這是因為當你加入第二球麵時，麵條本身會帶入水分，如果原本的湯不夠濃，加麵後味道就會變淡。正宗的吃法是靠殘留的濃湯去「抓」住新加的麵條，而冰水的作用是為了重置味覺，絕不是用來破壞碗裡的濃郁平衡。
​2. 荷麵亭機制的結構性矛盾
​荷麵亭一開始給的湯量偏少（如圖），加上這壺「清高湯」，導致了一個對重口味愛好者來說很尷尬的局面：
​不加清湯： 吃到要加麵的時候，碗裡的湯根本不夠配，麵條會拌不開。
​加了清湯： 原本好不容易熬出來的豚骨厚度跟油脂香氣，瞬間被稀釋，它沒有顏色也沒有油脂，一倒下去，整碗麵的靈魂就被沖散了，變成一碗普通的湯麵。
​3. 錯置的「割湯」概念
​你們提供清湯的做法，其實比較像是日本「沾麵（つけ麺）」最後吃完麵條後，用來稀釋沾醬當作熱湯喝的「割湯（割りスープ）」概念。把這個概念硬套在標榜濃厚的拉麵上，為了迎合部分覺得太鹹的客人，反而犧牲了追求道地厚實口感的初衷

平日中午12點左右抵達
很幸運不用排隊
德島風味拉麵
很有特色、夠味、好吃
醬油濃厚豚骨不會太鹹
湯頭濃郁
會想喝光湯
可以免費加麵兩次超讚
很可惜中午沒有炸物
店員都很親切！謝謝招待！
有機會會再回訪

來這裡經過過了好幾次，常常看到大排長龍，但都沒進去吃。

這次一樣散步經過，週日的晚上看到沒什麼人排隊，就決定進去嚐鮮了。

我點的是辛豚骨拉麵，很神奇的他的湯頭並不是辣紅辣紅的顏色，喝起來卻有一股特殊的辣味口中，我反覆品嚐到底是什麼味道？後來發現他除了辣之外，那個辣應該是老薑的辣，非常特殊的辛拉麵口味。

紫蘇蝦餅非常好吃，很特殊，個人認為必點。

他的產品價格都不貴。

下次一定再回來嘗試其他的產品。

reviews_detailed.author: Peerawich Promjai
reviews_detailed.text: Ramen is more than perfect! It's super tasty! Fried oysters and lobster salad are great too. Chef and staff are very nice and friendly. Would love to re-visit and try other dishes.

reviews_detailed.author: Yu-Ting
reviews_detailed.text:
After you enter, you order and pay. If you want softer or harder noodles, this is the time to say it.

This is another good bowl of ramen. The soup has intense umami, salty and spicy flavoring. I asked for a clear soup to add to the existing soup and it turned out very good.

Spicy Ramen: 8/10
Fried Shrimp Cake: 7.5/10

reviews_detailed.author: Jeff L
reviews_detailed.text:
Amazing Japanese ramen shop right next to the metro stop.

The soup is filled with flavor, the meat is outta this world, and the egg is made to perfection.

You can order two more servings of noodles for free, just make sure to raise your hand before you do.

Highly recommend if you’re in the area.

reviews_detailed.author: Y L
reviews_detailed.text: The food is quite authentic. The crispy layer of oyster matches it so well. The ramen is pretty good and if you don’t like any ingredient, they offer customization. It’s kinda salty to me, but they have iced water and you can help yourself, so I’m fine with that. The only thing that kinda bothered me, which is very personal, is that they have signs literally everywhere to remind people not to immerse themselves in cellphones but to focus on food (which is good) and finish and go. That caused stress when eating and I couldn’t relax and enjoy the food. Other than that everything is good.

reviews_detailed.author: Linus Wong
reviews_detailed.text: Better than a Taiwanese-flavored ramen shop, with on point noodles and a strong thicker broth, but disappointed by the chashu and salt-flavored pork soup base. Thought the soup might be a lighter more delicate base, but instead it was just extra salty, far too much to finish on its own. The pork chashu was a little ham-like and on the drier side. Not sure if that was on purpose or just overcooked, but definitely not worth remembering. The tangxin egg was also not as tasty as many other ramen shops. Fried oyster was pretty good tho, and service was fine.

name: 雞老闆 桶仔雞 士林店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區文林路101巷2號
reviews: 這家桶仔雞真的非常值得一試，從外觀到口感都能感受到店家的用心。整隻雞採用傳統桶烤方式，長時間慢火悶烤，外皮呈現漂亮的金黃色澤，帶點微微焦香，撕開時還會聽到皮肉分離的聲音，視覺與嗅覺都相當誘人。雞肉本身完全不乾柴，肉汁被牢牢鎖在裡面，每一口都能感受到鮮甜原味，連平常容易偏乾的雞胸肉也意外地軟嫩。調味不會過重，吃得到雞肉本身的香氣，搭配店家附的胡椒鹽、蒜頭或簡單配菜都很加分。整體份量十足，適合多人一起分享，無論是家庭聚餐、朋友小酌或戶外聚會都很合適。價格以品質來說相當合理，是那種吃完會覺得滿足、下次還會想再回訪的桶仔雞。
有「當月壽星消費2800元就送桶仔雞一隻」、「沒有壽星消費4500元也送桶仔雞一隻」、「學生內用吃桶仔雞只要599元」三大優惠可以吃到他們招牌的桶仔雞，我覺得雞肉口感蠻嫩的，先沾雞油再沾胡椒鹽非常好吃，其他串烤燒口味水準之上，一份兩串，平均下來比很多其他台北居酒屋的串燒便宜～蠻划算的。

【2025.09.28(日) 雞老闆 桶仔雞 士林店】
登雞老闆 吃桶仔雞
聽客人曲 浸賓主醉( ͡ ͡° ͜ ʖ ͡ ͡°)
==========================
🔘 裝潢
有點日式的裝潢感
but又有點早期台灣熱炒店的風貌
如果有看過日劇或是走過一趟日本
都會對日本有條不紊的精神印象深刻
畢竟這裡是台灣
也挺好
挺接地氣
如果客人也會有賓至如歸感૮ ˆﻌˆ ა
🔘 服務
位居有點漠落的士林夜市
當年的此地
那可是一級戰區
那叫一個萬人空巷
飯點時間絕對高朋滿座
擠得大路水瀉不通(V●ᴥ●V)
小哥哥小姐姐們動作很是速
感覺得出來是經歷過大風大浪的人
態度也是客客氣氣的好꒰^ ⚆ᴥ⚆ ˆ꒱
🔘炒水蓮
卷卷很喜歡
只是一盤沒什麼的綠菜
但口口不過鹹
絲絲有入味
🔘冰鎮情人果
卷卷還真是不愛這料理
不管他再怎麼好吃
就是覺得
吃芒果不好嗎？
為什麼非得吃這麼甜的綠芒果
為了盡主人情
還是淺嚐一口
味道是不錯的
🔘桶仔雞
這料理可強大了
沒啥高、大、尚的看頭
純純純的就只是一隻雞
一隻熱騰騰的雞
店家會配給布手套、塑膠手套
自己動手真的很棒
要小心燙
記得預約(∂ω∂)
記得預約(∂ω∂)(∂ω∂)
記得預約(∂ω∂)(∂ω∂)(∂ω∂)
🔘炒鳳螺
卷卷這個人吧
生來就怕這類的生物
淺淺地嚐了一口
依舊不是卷卷的菜
🔘酥炸肥腸
這個好
外酥內肥香適中
味道細緻又不腥✧੯•́໒꒱
🔘蔥燒肉串
蔥香入味帶有嚼勁的小肉塊
搭配生啤酒
很是合適ヽ( ° ▽°)ノ
🔘比利時豪格登小麥生啤酒
卷卷向來很少喝啤酒
都是葡萄酒為主
不過大口吃肉就是好好暢飲啤酒的時刻
真的爽快⸜(*ˊᗜˋ*)⸝
===================================
✅ 公車 捷運
✅ 騎車 開車
✅ 內用 外帶
✅ 現金
✅ 附設KTV

明月幾時有？
把酒問青天。
不知天上宮闕，今夕是何年？
今夕是教師節
往年同學們都會在家裡打打牌
然後晚上留下來吃吃喝喝
今年就選在離家近近近的雞老闆
走路就可以守法地開喝了
有預約還是不錯不錯地
推給想要大口吃肉
又想大口喝酒的小浪花們
找個交通方便的酒肆吃吃喝喝又唱唱
真的很不錯喔◝(⁰▿⁰)◜

reviews_detailed.author: 李昇祐
reviews_detailed.text: Good

reviews_detailed.author: Neo Soon Kian
reviews_detailed.text: Food were amazing, service were good. Will definitely visit again!

reviews_detailed.author: 泰雅公主X雪怪Yetis
reviews_detailed.text: Yummy

reviews_detailed.author: Minh Anh Phan
reviews_detailed.text: Good place to go, also the chicken is good

reviews_detailed.text: Good atmosphere

name: 天母盛鑫-士林聚餐餐廳|歐式料理|歐式餐廳|特色餐廳|必吃異國料理|異國美食|異國料理推薦|在地推薦餐廳
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段729號
reviews:
台北老牌西餐廳，排餐表現一般，但自助吧跟現烤法式麵包表現非常亮眼，大推！

🔸威靈頓松露醬菌菇牛排 菲力三分
菲力表現不差，口感軟嫩鮮潤；酥皮完全沒有起酥的蜂巢狀層次，反而是像一層厚厚的濕麵皮，而且底部直接浸泡在醬汁中讓原本就已經不酥的皮變得更加軟爛；松露醬汁基底似乎是紅酒多蜜醬，味道表現類似咖哩混咖啡帶點迷迭香氣跟悶悶的松露韻味。整體來說，不談酥皮口感跟醬汁的話，個人覺得其實味道還不錯。

🔸紅酒燉帶骨牛大排
低溫燉煮的帶骨牛大排用叉子就可以輕鬆的將骨肉分離，牛肉入口軟潤，肉味不差，大骨周遭的結締組織筋膜富有膠質跟油脂，單以牛大排本體表現來說相當不錯，可惜燉煮的紅酒多蜜醬汁滋味厚重少鮮，不是個人喜好的味道。

🔸烤野生海大蝦
蒜香+奶油+蝦味，略乾了些，不難吃，但就那樣。

🔸海鮮清湯
料多，湯頭是海帶鮮帶水菜味。

🔸海鮮濃湯
奶油麵糊湯，料多，沒什麼高湯鮮鹹，適合沾麵包或者加點桌上的胡椒會比較有味道。

🔸現烤法式麵包
好吃！外皮咔滋酥脆，內裡柔軟綿韌，薄鹽鹹，麥香迷人，搭配上大蒜奶油相當棒！

🔸奶酪
鮮奶油味，口感像奶凍，非常Q彈。

🔸水果薄餅
非常酸，悶悶的、帶厚重感的濃縮水果茶酸。

🔻自助吧區
🔸千島醬
美乃滋+蕃茄醬，色橘，滋味濃醇微甜，好吃！

🔸凱薩醬
美乃滋+帕馬森起司+鯷魚泥+蒜末+黑胡椒。滋味鮮鹹帶一點黑胡椒辛香，好吃！

🔸蜜芋頭泥
萬年不敗的經典招牌！芋頭泥+芋頭塊，口感軟綿，芋頭帶有淡淡奶香，甜而不膩，好吃！

🔸義式焗烤茄子
焗烤起司+肉醬+茄子，油香薄鮮鹹，茄子軟爛入味，就算是不敢吃茄子的人也可以接受。

🔸醋酸花椰菜
味酸，非常清爽開胃；有種用醋、糖跟蒜製作而成的台式泡菜的即視感。

🔸凱薩蛋沙拉
就是加了水煮蛋的凱薩醬，好吃。

CP值非常高的一家餐廳～
東西好吃、沙拉吧口味有特色也很道地。
空間寬敞&廁所乾淨加分❤️

服務也很親切，阿姨們會主動收空盤、觀察客人需求，也很講究衛生，取用沙拉吧有提供大家使用口罩👌

來吃第二次了 還是非常好評！
家人來盛鑫很多年了，我是第二次來，整體印象還不錯。週末也可以點商業午餐，聽說豬腳蠻好吃的，我的羊排也還不錯。此外，洋蔥湯和沙拉吧都不錯，沙拉吧有酸酸的白花椰菜、芋泥和起司焗烤茄子，蠻特別的。

reviews_detailed.author: KN Ng
reviews_detailed.text: We went for bday celebration for my MIL. Food there was just beyond expectation, ambience and setting were slightly old school, but dont affect the whole dining experience. We had a great time the whole  evening. Highly recommended

reviews_detailed.author: L
reviews_detailed.text: Great service and atmosphere! Staff were extremely friendly and loving the freshness of the salad bar! We have been coming here for years, and never disappoint! Can’t wait for our next visit!

reviews_detailed.author: Helena
reviews_detailed.text: Been here more than 10 times! Perfect place for a family dine🥰

reviews_detailed.author: May Sun
reviews_detailed.text: Great place to have dinner/lunch with your loved one. Staffs are well trained and food is really tasty. The surprise might be found on the salad bar. Love it.

reviews_detailed.author: Melissa Tay
reviews_detailed.text:
Poor service. For the price, I expected the service to be better. Poor experience overall.
Roast chicken takes an hour to be served, after everyone at the table has finished their meal. We ordered pasta for kids and asked for it to be served first, was served second last.

name: 百八龍拉麵
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區大東路133號
reviews:
一家蠻溫馨的日式拉麵小店
他們家的拉麵（粗麵）很有嚼勁且Q彈，細麵也好吃，但個人更喜歡粗麵的口感～
豚骨湯頭偏台式不算濃厚但是是好喝順口的！
雞湯很清，喝起來沒負擔
雞肉感覺是舒肥雞，口感蠻嫩、滿細緻的
叉燒肉吃起來像南部口味，有淡淡的甜味
目前有活動拉麵均一價$180以北部來說這價錢實在蠻佛心～～
吃不夠可加麵加湯一次，加麵只能細麵
廚師很親切，看到我們要離開還跟我們道別👋🏻
路過感覺不錯就進去還真的很不錯餐點平價實惠口味比很多名店好吃多了很多店只給1，2片肉就要250元以上這間店有3片肉才200元還可以免費加麵加湯服務親切而且會主動問要不要加麵

粗麵很好吃，Q彈又不會難咬，雞湯拉麵湯頭比想像中淡，但好喝，雞肉普通。
激辛豚骨拉麵，湯頭好喝，肉片好吃。

可免費加細麵、加湯，用餐環境乾淨且寬敞，最近有十周年活動，拉麵不分品項一律180，整體來說，如果之後路過會想再訪的好店。

reviews_detailed.author: Lawrence
reviews_detailed.text: Good quality Japanese Ramen shop.  Scallop chicken Ramen is very good.  You can get extra noodles and soup for free.  (The only slight negative is that the soup does not seem to have much real chicken or pork soup stock.)  I will try the dipping soup noodles next time.  Looks yummy.  Also they give a free cooked egg for 5 star reviews nevertheless the restaurant is quite good.

reviews_detailed.author: John Lam
reviews_detailed.text:
I am from Canada and I live around this area for traveling.  I just tried their soup noodle for my lunch.
Service is excellent and the taste is excellent too.  They are very patient to explain to me the menu although I can’t speak Mandarin.  Add extra noodle is free.   I really enjoy the food.

reviews_detailed.author: Alex Lai
reviews_detailed.text: Japanese style ramen. You can choose thick or thin noodle as you wish. But when you order “free noodle” afterwards, the only option is the thin one. The price matches the quality. A nice choice nearby.

reviews_detailed.author: julian tadulan
reviews_detailed.text: Small place but their ramen will satisfy your palate. Fast service.Their Ramen was thick and rich in flavour that will satisfy your palate.

reviews_detailed.author: Thomi Kamilla
reviews_detailed.text:
Noodle, meat, and soup is good. Especially the spicy one. Worth to come when you are hungry and seeking for new taste.
A bit pricey, if only they give whole egg instead of half maybe it would be ok

name: 池先生Kopitiam (士林店)
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區福華路150號
reviews:
想嘗試馬來西亞餐點的可以試試看，口味蠻道地，風味也不錯，餐加飲料約350-400左右，價位有些偏高，跟印度菜的定價類似。有素食餐可選。低消是一杯飲料，不收服務費，支援手機付費及信用卡，有載具。平日午餐跟學生還有當月壽星有40元折扣，當日則半價優惠。

燈具很漂亮，燈光不刺眼。桌距比較近。先選坐位，填單櫃台點餐付款。我沒有看見洗手間，似乎也沒有提供水杯跟飲用水或香蘭葉水供自取。飲料除熱紅茶外大多無法選甜度，以台灣人的喜好來說都偏甜會想喝水。

我點的沙嗲雞跟咖喱牛調味都很不錯不會過鹹或太甜膩。雞肉不乾柴，不過其中有一個有骨頭。牛肉有咬感，其中有兩塊帶筋百嚼不爛，其他都還ok.炸的小魚干很酥脆不刮嘴，非常下飯好吃。蝦餅不油膩，椰漿飯也煮得不錯軟硬適中帶香氣。沾醬是甜味的辣椒醬，辣度不高，口味很東南亞風。

飲料附的桔子多汁美味，不過杯子破損還是要記得及時汰換。

如果想在台灣吃到真正的馬來西亞風味料理，池先生餐廳絕對是值得推薦的一家！🍛 一進門就能聞到濃濃的香料香氣，宛如走進吉隆坡的小食堂。

餐點的調味非常「道地」👍，像是叻沙湯頭香濃順口，椰香與香料融合得剛剛好，每一口都能喚起南洋的味覺記憶。海南雞飯的雞肉軟嫩多汁，搭配油飯粒粒分明，香氣十足，吃起來完全不像台式改良，而是真正保留了馬來西亞的原汁原味。🇲🇾

特別喜歡的是店家對香料比例的掌握，不會為了迎合本地口味而削弱味道，咖哩依舊帶著微辣與濃郁層次，連蝦醬空心菜都有在地的鹹香勁道，讓人一口接一口。🌶️🥬

整體來說，池先生餐廳不只是「異國料理餐廳」，更像是一趟南洋美食的旅行體驗。若你想在台灣感受馬來西亞的正宗風味，這裡絕對不會讓你失望！💯

炒粿條維持在當地檳城吃的一樣 鍋氣足 非常重要！好吃👍
河粉也喜歡！
至於我最愛吃的叻沙，要看個人喜好，我偏好椰汁重一點的，所以也不錯吃，但我個人希望再濃郁些。
飲料推 👉白咖啡

reviews_detailed.author: Anik Bibib
reviews_detailed.text: If you are craving authentic Malaysian food, you must visit Mr. Chee (Shilin Branch)! They hold a Halal-friendly certificate and use only Halal-certified meat sources, so you can dine with peace of mind. The location is very strategic, situated right near Zhishan Station. Their laksa soup is incredibly delicious, and you can really taste that all the condiments are freshly made. It is a highly recommended spot for any Muslim friend looking for a great meal in the area.

reviews_detailed.author: Chusnul Khotimah
reviews_detailed.text: All the menu are using Halal meat!! Also they don't sell menu with Pork and not using alcohol for all menu. So, for my Muslim friends, you can enjoy all the menu here~

reviews_detailed.author: Valeria Rios
reviews_detailed.text:
The food is amazing. Good spicy, good amount. The curry? Omg !!!!
They only have one vegetarian option as a main dish but is really good

reviews_detailed.author: Rama Rizana
reviews_detailed.text: We ordered some foods and beverages, especially the one that I had was Char Kway Teow. Very tasty. The staffs are very helpful and kind. Thank you.

reviews_detailed.author: A O
reviews_detailed.text:
Always ordered on Uber and love the sambal chilli as it is authentic to sambal in Singapore.

Food overall is good and fresh.

name: 隱家拉麵 士林店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段505巷22號
reviews:
對雞湯拉麵沒什麼興趣，本店的海老沾麵的湯聽聞又是冷的也排除了，此時剛好看到菜單中一個名稱貌似和拉麵無關的擔擔麵，就抱著好奇的心態點餐了，上桌後，一眼就能望到中心最突兀的辣絞肉，厚豬肉叉燒在旁都像配角一樣。味道意想不到的好吃，厚豬肉叉燒在表面被微微的炙烤下，油脂融化，香味四溢滑嫩可口，而湯頭由於浸泡了辣絞肉，充滿肉香且微微辛辣，相當符合個人口味，並且還有加了堅果、花生碎使風味更加濃郁，口感也有所變化，適量的青蔥恰好能緩解油膩，搭配得也很不錯。
當然，吃拉麵必點的叉燒飯也點了，不過在隱家好像是叫TKG飯來著的，TKG亦即Tamago Kake Gohan，意即生蛋拌飯的意思，想當然耳就是在原有的叉燒飯上再加了顆溫泉蛋。特製絞肉噴槍的炙燒下盡顯香氣，搭配上秘製醬汁和美乃滋，香甜口味相當下飯
再把溫泉蛋攪拌其中，蛋香的調和使整體風味變得更加細膩，滑嫩的口感也相當好吃，少許點綴的柴魚片更是點睛之筆，還真是不錯的餐點啊。

📍 黃金雞湯拉麵（豬）$240
📍 TKG飯$80

從士林捷運站走出來大約10分鐘內可以抵達，儘量錯開用餐時間，否則就要開始在外面排隊，但店家得出餐速度算是挺快的，所以等候的時間也不會太久。

先自主販賣機點餐結帳，然後等候入座等餐點。麵條有兩種可選擇粗麵及中捲麵條可選擇，雞湯拉麵口味偏重而且湯算是偏油，但是舒肥豬的口感味道很喜歡的，算是有入味，厚度也適中不會讓人咬很久還在吃肉！

但是TKG飯⋯炙燒過後的肉塊加上美乃滋與一顆半熟蛋，可能味道沒有中我的味，他像是介於台式跟日式中間，像是在吃溫泉蛋滷肉飯但是又有加上炙燒跟美乃滋的味道，整體來說，不給過⋯如果你是喜歡是吃完拉麵後來上一碗燒肉飯的人就可以吃看看味道就好了⋯⋯

吧台座位可以清楚看到拉麵的製作過程，工作檯面很乾淨，這一點很加分！店家門口的注意事項記得看過，排隊的時候記得要等人員到齊喔！然後不要解壓縮，不然要重新來過。

(限定）獅子丸白湯拉麵$340+名古屋味噌豬排飯$120

麺家獅子丸白湯ラーメンNT$340
名古屋味噌カツ丼NT$120

2025/10/24午

整體評分（4.6🌟）

（歡迎ig搜尋全麵啟動，探索更多拉麵和麵食！）

🍜【食記】麺家獅子丸X隱家拉麵｜名古屋人氣名店「麵家獅子丸」快閃登台！限定合作聯名活動🔥！

「麵家獅子丸」來台灣快閃啦！這次真的非常特別，不是台灣拉麵祭，也不是百貨的日本展，而是由 隱家拉麵 企劃聯名✨

創立於2019年的隱家拉麵集團，是台灣拉麵中常常大排長龍的名店代表之一，以「平價高品質」著稱。近期他們動作頻頻，剛宣布在台中開設第7間分店後，而不久更宣布邀請到來自名古屋的超人氣名店「麵家獅子丸」來台快閃，舉辦為期三天（10/24～10/26）的合作活動。

每一天都有不同限定拉麵登場，同時三天都能吃到「獅子丸白湯拉麵」與「名古屋味噌豬排飯」！兩間排隊名店聯手合作，是一定要造訪的吧！

🦁關於「麵家獅子丸」

創立於2016年的「麵家獅子丸」，位於名古屋車站步行約6分鐘距離，是當地超人氣拉麵名店。
自2019年至2024年連續榮登 Tabelog百名店，評分高達3.75分。

店家招牌「濃厚白湯拉麵（獅子丸ぱいたんらぁめん）」是人氣No.1，平假日都大排長龍，被譽為名古屋的必吃拉麵之一。這次台灣快閃也能吃到同款，讓人期待！

📍活動資訊

地點：隱家拉麵 士林店 地址：台北市士林區中山北路五段505巷22號

⏰營業時間： 中午 11:30～14:00 下午 16:30～21:30

🍜每日限定菜品（每日不同）

（中午30碗、晚上50碗，各時段售完為止，賣完會公告於IG）

* 10/24（五）：名古屋八丁味噌濃厚牡蠣沾麵 💰$450
* 10/25（六）：龍蝦濃厚沾麵 💰$580
* 10/26（日）：和牛白湯拉麵 💰$450

🍜每日皆有供應的定番菜

* 獅子丸白湯拉麵 💰$340
* 名古屋味噌豬排飯 💰$120（限量）

⏳排隊狀況

今日約10:45抵達，前面約30位排隊。輪到我時，牡蠣沾麵限定還剩6份，店內座位不少，等候時間比預期短，員工眾多又親切，上菜速度也相當快。
這次我和友人一起，一口氣把今日的菜單全制霸！

🍴獅子丸白湯拉麵 & 名古屋味噌豬排飯食後心得

🥣湯底

以豬骨、雞骨為基底，融合鰹魚、鯖魚、羅臼昆布、蔬菜等多種食材長時間熬煮。
湯頭呈乳白色，表層帶著淡淡的泡沫，不同於「旨燕」或「壹慶」的泡系那樣多泡沫。入口濃郁卻清爽、不鹹膩，餘味溫順。
濃厚白湯，順口、乾淨雅緻，是能順順喝到見底的那種。
（桌上有調料應該是柚子胡椒可供轉味。）

🌾麵條

使用全粒粉麵，約中粗，Q彈有嚼勁、不易軟化，雖不特別驚豔，但與白湯搭配協調，不拖後腿。

🍅🐔🐷配料

炸蓮藕、番茄、豬叉燒、雞叉燒、日本芹菜（不確定）、豆皮。

炸蓮藕＆番茄：讓人想到桃園名店「三冬麵舖」，蓮藕微炸酥香，番茄帶點微酸，提升層次感。

雞叉燒＆豬叉燒：顏色漂亮、肉香明顯，口感紮實。

日本芹菜？：帶著清香與微微清涼感，像薄荷般清新，是很少見的配菜！（個人不確定是不是日本芹菜，有誤歡迎大方指正👍）

豆皮：這次聯名的特色擺盤，吸附湯汁後還不錯。

🐷額外加點：名古屋味噌豬排飯 $120

名古屋以味噌料理聞名，這碗飯自然是重點之一。
但老實說——這碗「可點可不點」。
豬排稍微過熟，口感普通，像平價學生餐廳那種。但醬汁的味噌味挺特別，味噌鹹香重於甘口，不同於外面常見的那種豬排醬汁，算是有特色。

💬總結

整體來說，這次聯名活動讓人滿意！
不管是排隊動線、服務態度、餐點水準都相當流暢到位。
價格以快閃活動來說也算親民，能在台灣吃到日本百名店的拉麵真的是難得機會，感謝「麵家獅子丸」遠道而來，讓台灣拉麵迷有機會親嚐來自名古屋的滋味。
真心推薦給週末有空的朋友，一定要把握機會前往！

(限定）名古屋八丁味噌濃厚牡蠣沾麵$450

名古屋八丁味噌濃厚牡蠣つけ麺NT$450

2025/10/24午

整體評分（4.5🌟）

🍜【食記】麺家獅子丸 X 隱家拉麵｜名古屋人氣名店「麵家獅子丸」快閃登台！限定合作聯名活動🔥！八丁味噌碰上濃厚牡蠣😮！

「麵家獅子丸」來台灣快閃啦！這次真的非常特別，不是台灣拉麵祭，也不是百貨的日本展，而是由 隱家拉麵企劃聯名✨

創立於2019年的隱家拉麵集團，是台灣拉麵中常常大排長龍的名店代表之一，以「平價高品質」著稱。近期他們動作頻頻，剛宣布在台中開設第7間分店後，不久更宣布邀請到來自名古屋的超人氣名店「麵家獅子丸」來台快閃，舉辦為期三天（10/24～10/26）的合作活動。

每一天都有不同限定拉麵登場，同時三天都能吃到「獅子丸白湯拉麵」與「名古屋味噌豬排飯」！兩間排隊名店聯手合作，是一定要造訪的吧！🔥

🦁 關於「麵家獅子丸」

創立於2016年的「麵家獅子丸」，位於名古屋車站步行約6分鐘距離，是當地超人氣拉麵名店。
自2019年至2024年連續榮登 Tabelog百名店，評分高達3.75分，可說是名古屋拉麵代表之一。

其實這次隱家拉麵與麵家獅子丸的聯名活動對我來說有點可惜，原本想三天都造訪，但因時間關係只能參加第一天。因此雖然這次總共推出4款拉麵，最終只能試到2碗，稍嫌可惜。

但沒關係第一天的兩碗已足以令人難忘！當天我和友人試了定番款與限定款，既然名古屋是味噌料理之都，就一定得試試看這款融入名古屋當地特色的聯名沾麵——「名古屋八丁味噌牡蠣沾麵」！

🥣沾湯

「八丁味噌」是一種產自愛知縣岡崎市的日本傳統「豆味噌」，只使用大豆、鹽與水製成，不添加米麴，經過長時間天然發酵。
入口時能明顯感受到這碗沾湯以味噌為主導，接著牡蠣的風味在尾韻緩緩浮現。

八丁味噌因長時間發酵，帶有獨特的酸韻，讓整體湯頭非常突出！這種味噌+牡蠣的組合原本以為會「濃上加濃」容易膩口，但實際品嚐後完全不會。那股發酵感支撐了整體風味，從頭到尾都不顯單調無聊。

而且要特別誇讚——這次的沾湯份量超大方！可以盡情大口沾、最後再做湯割也綽綽有餘，非常過癮！

🍜 麵條

使用全粒粉寬扁麵，預設麵量180g。寬扁麵的體積較大，吃起來比一般沾麵少了點Q彈感，但口感更柔順滑溜。
因為寬扁麵能完美吸附湯汁，帶湯表現相當出色，整體非常協調，也讓味噌香與發酵酸韻更明顯地附著在每一口麵上。

🐮🐷🐔配料

牛叉燒、豬叉燒、雞叉燒、牡蠣、豆皮、日本芹菜（？）、檸檬。

叉燒：真的超強！三種肉的色澤都處理得非常漂亮，尤其是牛肉，粉嫩誘人，是三種中我最愛的一款。肉質保有肉汁、軟嫩入味，無論單吃或沾湯都相當出色。
比較可惜的是這次沒有提供加點叉燒的選項，不然我肯定會加點一份！

牡蠣：附上兩顆，雖不算大顆，但新鮮度不錯、無腥味，口感滑順。感覺有經過事先調味，海味較淡，更適合與味噌湯頭融合。

📝 總結

雖然這碗名為「名古屋八丁味噌牡蠣沾麵」，但實際品嚐時牡蠣風味較為隱晦，整體以八丁味噌為主角。
以味噌為核心、搭配牡蠣提鮮的沾湯，在市面上相當少見，更難得的是用沾麵形式呈現真的非常特別！

就個人口味而言，我會希望牡蠣的存在感再強一點，這樣會更符合品名，也能讓愛好牡蠣的饕客更滿意。

總體而言，這次「麵家獅子丸」遠道而來快閃台灣，無論拉麵還是沾麵都展現了高水準，令人印象深刻！
也期待未來能有更多日本拉麵名店來台聯名快閃，讓拉麵控們能近距離感受不同的日式風味和美味。

reviews_detailed.author: Lorraine Frederica
reviews_detailed.text:
Update: they changed to a nearby bigger place. Better one. More space for guests to eat, with same price and same excellent service.

One of the best ramen i have tasted, in my opinion. The place is small and cute, there was a line but i didn't wait too long. The food came very quickly and the employees were amazingly helpful.

The broth is really creamy so beware if you dislike thick broth. The texture of the noodle is unique and a great pair to the broth. The place itself is clean and comfortable.

Price wise is so-so, price range $190-$250 approximately.

reviews_detailed.author: Sascha Pallenberg
reviews_detailed.text:
Absolutely amazing Tonkatsu Ramen in an authentic atmosphere. Came for the look frome the outside and stayed for some of the best Ramen in Taipei.
Very accessible for foreigners. They even have an English menu and help you with the Ramen machine at the entrance.

I'll be back!

reviews_detailed.author: Y L
reviews_detailed.text:
Superb dining experience! Having ate ichiran For 2 days consecutively and facing with ridiculous queue there, I would recommend u guys to come here instead. Portion is bigger, soup is as nice if not, nicer and meat is definitely better here. Pro tip: remember to add the garlic in the soup for the full ichiran taste!

Service n environment is 💪🏻 would come here next time instead

reviews_detailed.author: YiHsuan Tseng
reviews_detailed.text:
Nice location, friendly staff, clean table, cheerful ambiance, fast and customized service, and reasonable price.

But the very soul to the store, ramen, is just okay and nothing special. The store attracts long queue every time I passed through the road, but I do think it is overrated.

It is still a good choice and nothing wrong with the store, but it’s definitely not worthy of long queue waiting.

I gave four stars instead of three because there is no time limit for customers despite their limited seats and a long queue outside. Perhaps that’s the reason that makes the store seem to be this popular?

reviews_detailed.author: Sokyoul
reviews_detailed.text:
Great Ramen!
I took the Tonkotsu with extra egg. You have the choice of thin and thick noodles, I personally prefer the thicker ones. It tastes just like in Japan.

The shop is conveniently located directly next to Shilin Stn.

The stuff were super friendly. The lady helped me order in English at the machine since I don't speak Mandarin.
I was asked if I want to add more clear soup to dillute the spicyness.

I ordered the "mild" version, which was normal spicy for my European tounge. So for someone who actually wants mild, I would recommend ordering "not spicy".

All in all would recommend!

name: 味擂家みらい家日式料理 士林店（無訂位服務）
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區福壽街1號1樓
reviews:
非常好吃😋
看了評論被燒到，跟著點了明太子烏龍麵，果然名不虛傳，非常好吃，用料實在，每條麵條都均勻沾滿明太子，啵啵的口感真的讓人欲罷不能。不會辣喔。
起司炸豬排定食也很厲害，有升級御膳，小菜換成章魚燒、玉子燒、蕨餅，很值得。
沙拉是芒果優格醬，蔬菜新鮮，搭上醬非常好吃！
新朋友招待的39元白身魚也很好吃。
總體來說份量非常大，一個人吃一份會有點吃不完，可惜的是內用沒有水可以配，餐點大多是炸物，加上口味都蠻重的，沒有水多少會有些口渴+解不了膩。

感謝有這次外帶經驗  發現內容物的菜色CP不高

主要是湯品+標榜日本米可以一直續
以及 緊緻盤子+類似懷石料理的 緊緻擺盤

用餐或有用餐時間壓力、氣氛趕與緊張
未來不再考慮用餐

有驚豔到，主菜好吃。旁邊小盤雖說是小菜，卻一點也不馬虎的精緻點。餐碗、盤也很特別。

第二次來，點 扁鱈玉京燒+御膳，鱈魚以味曾醃過，有點太鹹...。

reviews_detailed.author: chu kok wee
reviews_detailed.text:
Delicious Japanese bento-style set meals with a Taiwanese twist.
Taste is good and well-balanced, with generous portions.
Prices are slightly above average, but value is added with free miso soup and friendly service.
A satisfying and comforting meal overall.

reviews_detailed.author: Natthaphong Chongcha 李俊宇
reviews_detailed.text: A restaurant decorated with eye-catching Japanese design, very highly recommended for those who love Japanese food and expect its authentic taste once arrived. Plus, a service here is beyond awesome, they treat you really really well with optimistic attitude. And I’m looking forward to coming back here again despite the distance from my residence.🥹

reviews_detailed.author: Noel Lau
reviews_detailed.text: Amazingly good Japanese food with friendly services. You can sense that the food is lovingly prepared and with passion. The set meal comes with a free flow of rice and miso soup.

reviews_detailed.author: Nguyệt Ninh
reviews_detailed.text: The restaurant is my must-visit place everytime travel to Taiwan, my friends from countries love the dishes here. Their staffs are super nice and friendly, willing to serve all the customers carefully even though all the table are taken (very crowded). Food are fresh and tasty with no doubt. It would be better if they opened another larger branch for more convenience.

reviews_detailed.author: Sophie Chang
reviews_detailed.text: Every dish I’ve tried so far is super good!!! Personal favorite Japanese restaurant of the year🥰🥰

name: Skylark洋食‧芳鄰 士林中山北店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段565號
reviews:
115.03.05
1.十一點前的早餐，物美價廉，非常超值。最令人滿意的是空間寬敞，早餐時間客人不多，宜人的用餐空間。
2.商業午餐主餐有魚、豬、雞，湯品食材滿滿，飲料品項超多，還可以續杯，甜點也很讚。麵包有三種，口感紮實，可以續麵包，不過主餐吃完就很飽了。
3.午餐時間瞬間客滿，建議要預定座位。能夠屹立不搖多年，有其值得造訪的優點。

🥓 煙燻厚培根自家製奶酥軟法早餐
🍳 松露風鮮蔬歐姆蛋早餐
奶酥軟法外酥內軟，抹上自家製奶酥香氣十足、不甜膩；歐姆蛋滑嫩細緻，搭配松露香氣和鮮蔬，清爽又有層次。整體擺盤用心、份量剛好，吃得飽也不負擔。
小小建議是厚培根如果能再軟一點，口感會更完美～
環境舒適明亮，很適合朋友聚會聊天，服務也親切不打擾。
在士林想找一間能好好坐下來吃早午餐、慢慢聊天的地方，這裡會是安心的選擇。
五星推薦 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

點主餐就會送麵包無限續！重點是第二輪之後的麵包還可以選續哪種麵包👍👍👍
有沙拉、義大利麵、燉飯、排餐、兒童餐
餐點選項豐富！當天點燉飯都很好吃，排餐豬腳有點太肥！升級套餐的飲料可以無限續，還可以加價換酥皮濃湯👍👍
東西好吃、Cp值超高、餐廳氛圍不錯！

reviews_detailed.author: YiHsuan Tseng
reviews_detailed.text:
Convenient location near Shilin MRT Station. There’s outdoor seating where you can enjoy some sunshine. The portions aren’t big, but the food tastes good and the prices are quite affordable.

When it’s busy, there’s a time limit for indoor seating, but the outdoor seats don’t have a limit.

It’s a nice spot to meet friends who live nearby for a simple meal and a relaxed chat.

reviews_detailed.author: Carter Madura
reviews_detailed.text: The restaurant's aesthetic was comfortable, and I liked the way the food was presented. Gorgeous dishware, solid utensils, pretty appealing to the eyes. The food itself here was merely decent. For the price, I'd expect higher quality, but it wasn't bad. Due to this discrepancy, I likely won't be returning anytime soon. I didn't personally experience any of the horrible service stories I'm seeing in the other reviews; we were left alone throughout the duration of our meal. However, I too noticed that there was not any soap in the men's bathroom... 📮

reviews_detailed.author: Christine Brynn Khalil
reviews_detailed.text:
I really like this place for their family friendly seating and great menu options. The food is just ok though, and a lot of the quality of things like bread, salad, and sides are clearly very cheap + bland but designed to make it feel like you got a very deluxe set meal.
Their pasta dishes and baked rice dishes are best by far of anything on the menu. The service is weird too. They have bizarre rules about seating when arriving between meal seatings (e.g. between breakfast and lunch) and will force guests to wait at the entrance instead of helping them to a seat even when the whole place it's completely empty. They clearly don't prioritize customer comfort or service in this way, and it's rather confusing.

reviews_detailed.author: D G
reviews_detailed.text:
Ate here twice in one month. First time average. Second time horrible customer service. Bread is supposedly refillable and if you ask for refill they tell you to order via app so they don't need to refill. Menu has different picture vs reality. See the onion soup. No cheese soggy bread, no onions just sweet onion water. Didn't refill my water or give me my tea until everything was eaten despite repeatedly asking.

The bigger male manager with glasses is very nice but everyone else is very rude and condescending, especially to elderly I was with. They ignored her when she talked

Legitimately one of the worst experiences I have ever had in all of Taiwan

Also men's bathroom doesn't have soap. 🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮

reviews_detailed.author: Joe Tsao
reviews_detailed.text: The taste was average at it's best. The ambience is that of a typical family restaurant - energetic and loud at Monday night. Servers are friendly, so it wasn't too bad of an experience.

name: 食來運轉
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區小東街31號
reviews:
食來運轉位於士林夜市的巷子裡，很多銘傳大學學生來吃
價格比一般便當店貴一些，但是他可以無限加飯or滷肉飯還有免費續杯的飲料
飲料有紅茶、無糖綠茶、奶茶和奶綠。奶茶和奶綠是奶精那種奶，但是超好喝!
以前喝起來有少糖~全糖的甜度，近幾年來吃感覺有慢慢改甜度比較符合現代人的甜味，這次喝起來大約是微糖~半糖之間。旁邊有冰塊可以自己加。
有賣飯類也有麵類還有火鍋。
這次點香煎排骨飯(NT$140)和牛肉火鍋(NT$180)
排骨飯的配菜是蒸蛋、高麗菜和炒豆干，可以無限續飯，蒸蛋只有一小塊但小孩很喜歡，其他兩樣配菜就普通。排骨有入味不錯。
牛肉火鍋湯頭偏甜，我們選擇加烏龍麵，麵體還不錯有Q不爛，牛肉就是一般平價的牛肉片比較偏乾，裡面的菜很多也有些許火鍋料。喜歡吃菜的應該很滿足。
常常來士林夜市都會想來吃食來運轉，有時候人潮多需要排隊，推薦內用可以無限加飯和飲料!

位於士林夜市內能吃到飽的便當店，有綠奶茶、奶茶、無糖綠茶、紅茶共四種能不停續杯喝到飽的飲料，一旁好像還有冰塊可以自行取用。便當部分能續的就只有白飯而已，不過需要先等店員拿著大鐵盤裝著一碗碗白飯到內用區再舉手討要，而每碗續加的白飯也都有淋上滷肉，相當下飯，本人可以連續加三到四次，吃的也是相當滿足了。至於主菜的味道，本次是點了香酥雞腿飯，份量還行，肉嫩但外皮略厚影響了口感，還是挺普通的，更多的還是奔著午餐能吃飽才來的。

以前就知道的劍潭名店，
閒著沒事幹就跑來吃看看，

因為有點算是在夜市裡面，
所以附近停車位不太好找，
不過外面倒是有蠻多外帶外送或者沒在怕抓的在門口附近違停，

當天是下午一點左右去，
店內大約還有一半的空位，
但店員還是讓我跟人併桌，
也可能那幾桌是專門安排給單人來用餐併桌用的？

點了蔥爆牛肉飯，（130元）
口味上的話，
蔥爆牛肉是甜鹹口的，
可能為了下飯，
甜味跟鹹味都有點重，
這點不太符合我的口味，

配菜的話，
有豆腐、高麗菜、冬粉，
豆腐跟高麗菜還行，
冬粉不太行，

滷肉飯的話，
蠻油又沒什麼味道，

店內滷肉飯跟飲料可以無限續，

當天我有觀察了一下，
似乎是只要有人要加飯，
店員就會進內場裝飯，
拿著十幾個小碗出來幫你加飯，
會問要加幾碗，
加完之後會詢問現場其他客人是否要加飯，
要的話會從小碗倒進用餐的盤子裡，

但其實蠻想只要白飯不要滷肉飯的，
因為這家的滷肉飯不太合我口味，

另外一提，
有名的奶綠還是奶茶當天沒有提供，
不太清楚是當天沒提供，
又或者可能以後都不會提供了？

總結：
會推薦給想吃粗飽的來，
我的話，
大概是不會再來了，
餐點沒到雷，
但不合我口味，
給三星純粹是因為可以吃粗飽。

reviews_detailed.author: Earn Chanikan
reviews_detailed.text: Definitely need to try out their hotpot! I ordered beef hotpot and there are many ingredients added in both seafoods, vegetables and many meat balls! With only 190 TW dollar! They also offered free drink with unlimited refills and rice if you order fried chicken! Very popular among local!

reviews_detailed.author: お小賴
reviews_detailed.text:
A great student restaurant that serves big portion with a friendly price tag, you can up size your steamy white rice for free, the side dish lacks in green vegetables but still pretty decent and tastes great.

Main protein dish is amazing and the portion is massive.

reviews_detailed.author: Rae Zyon
reviews_detailed.text: Famous for their friend chicken chop rice, the chicken is crispy and breaded and seasoned perfectly, not too thick and the meat is tender and juicy. Comes with two sides of vegetables and pork braised rice. The rice is refillable, as the staff walks around with a tray of rice. Drinks are also free, just get a cup and dispense at the back of the restaurant.

reviews_detailed.author: Ethan Tan
reviews_detailed.text:
時來運轉 is a no-frills eatery serving local set lunches such as rice with deep fried prawns. Each set comes with free-flow drinks (green tea, red tea, with or without milk) and only costs around $130+.
The eatery was quite well-packed with locals at 2 pm even though it closes at 2.30 pm for a break before resuming dinner service.
Taste-wise, the food was decently delicious. Service was polite.

reviews_detailed.author: Richard Krahn
reviews_detailed.text: This is a must stop if you are hungry and are in need of visiting a night market.  Lots of university students frequent this place as they have large portions, quality food, and reasonable prices.   You can also get extra rice for free if your meal doesn’t fill you.

name: Boulevard Cafe 林蔭美式餐酒食(供餐至20:00)
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區至善路二段33號
reviews:
距離故宮不遠處，很適合先來用餐再到故宮逛逛。我點了排餐的鴨胸7分熟，鴨胸超多汁、肉質甜美，我很喜歡！朋友點牛排五分熟。

排餐送來時，店家會讓我們確認肉的熟度是否是自己理想的熟度，若覺得太生可以再請店家調整熟度。

因為遇到過年假期，所以現場人比較少，氣氛悠閒舒適~不小心坐了超久。

個人覺得鴨胸蠻值得點的，朋友也覺得好吃。

甜點布朗尼超濃郁，是巧克力比例高的版本，很有生巧克力的口感，不會太“蛋糕”，很好吃！

看到其他桌都有點義大利麵類，感覺有機會也可以再來試試看。

牛桿菌松露燉飯超好吃！是有一點點口感的燉飯，搭配的生菜也很特別，是在台灣吃過會讓人印象深刻的燉飯😭 可惜份量比較少一點

千層義大利麵也很好吃！口感很特別，QQ的，有一點像板條的口感，但沒板條那麼軟爛。

點了一杯午夜占卜的調酒，味道還不錯但酒感偏淡，適合給不喜歡太濃的女生喝。

當月壽星免費招待甜點，有布蕾和提拉米蘇可以選。布蕾很濃郁很好吃！！大推！

唯一稍微普通的餐點是披薩，我們點鱈魚口味。
一間餐點不馬虎的店～ 雖然離市區有點距離，有機會一定會再來吃！

0207初訪~
點了月見松阪豬義大利麵選擇寬麵，口感吃起來有較Q，醬汁味道濃郁不膩。鮮蝦干貝濃湯海鮮味很濃郁。椒麻雞翅喜歡麻辣的人必點！提拉米蘇不會太甜，整體口感也很好，不會太濕。

reviews_detailed.author: Jenny Hsu
reviews_detailed.text: A mediocre place with Western inspired dishes, but don’t expect anything authentic. The hamburger is tasty, although slightly too sweet and it came out   wet and soggy. The risotto is your typical Western inspired rice dish that has been localised. The Caesar salad wasn’t actually a salad—it came out as an English/American breakfast plate (see photo). The food took awhile to come out.

reviews_detailed.author: Rick Pennington
reviews_detailed.text: The Boulevard Cafe is very close to the National Palace Museum and had great reviews at 4.6 stars, however this was not our experience today. The service and the food were a little disappointing. The pizza was ok and the burger was pretty blah… 😑

reviews_detailed.author: Sharon Daniel
reviews_detailed.text: This Cafe is located between Shilin and Miramar so you'll need to take a bus to get here. You can take the 255, 620, or 957 from Shilin MRT Station. From Jiannan Rd Station, you can take the 620 or 957. It has two floors of seating and it's best to make a reservation as it a nice comfortable place to stay for a while. The staff is friendly and made recommendations from the menu. They have an English menu which is always very accommodating. I ordered the Vegetarian lasagna which has so much cheese on top that you'll wonder if it has any noodles. It comes with one piece of garlic bread but I'd recommend you get an additional order on the side with 5 pieces. My friend had the Spicy Chicken pasta and it was very spicy owing to the Szechuan pepper and garlic. For dessert we had the very decadent chocolate brownie and the creme brulee custard. We ordered from the unlimited soda refill menu for our drinks. If you order pasta, you can get a set menu price which saves about 60 ntd. We stayed for a long time chatting and lingering over our meals without any pressure from the wait staff to leave. That alone is a reason to return to this establishment.

reviews_detailed.author: A
reviews_detailed.text: A short walk from the national palace museum. First time dinning here, was surprise with the quality of their burger and pizza. I guess reservation will be encourage for dine and drink in the night.

reviews_detailed.author: Terrance Shih
reviews_detailed.text: Nice vibe, good food, kid friendly with a good kids meal. Came for a late weekend lunch and we were seated quickly. It feels like it was opened by a group of friends than being very commercial, but the scale is impressive. Mexican burger is small but tasty and spicy. The fries has a unique treatment, so it's definitely memorable. No on-site parking that I'm aware of. The closest parking lots are all 500m+ away.

name: 方家小館
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區天母東路7號
reviews: 餐點很豐盛，也很好吃！服務很好，隨時會幫你換成新盤子。適合多人包廂聚餐
每道菜都好好吃！跟高雄比台北的餐廳有水準很多！臭豆腐、豆腐煲、花素蒸餃都好讚！
餐點的單價不便宜，但味道是不錯的，清蒸臭豆腐很美味，砂鍋醃篤鮮的湯頭真不賴，麻婆豆腐很下飯。

reviews_detailed.author: Kate Shao
reviews_detailed.text:
Local time-honored brand Shanghai restaurant in Tainmu. Spacious and clean environment.

Miniature pork steam bun was cute but tasted normal. Fang's specialty tofu was awesome! Soft tofu and it was appetizing.

Shredded beef fried rice had Wok Hei. It was absolutely one of my favorite fried rice! Deep-fried space-rib dressed w/ sweetened soy-sauce was impressive. Crispy outside and tasted like Taiwanese fried chicken.

Reasonable price and friendly service. We ordered six dishes and one soup for a total of NT$2500. Good for family gathering. Especially bringing elders. Next time must order donpo pork.

reviews_detailed.author: Cherry’s Life in the U.K.
reviews_detailed.text: Famous Shanghai restaurant in town. Dumping were just okay as I expected too much from review. Flaky scallion pancakes 蔥油餅 were amazing and smelled nice. Rice with veggie, Spicy fish were good as well. This place is crowded, better to make a reservation.

reviews_detailed.author: Pang Cheung Sze
reviews_detailed.text: I used to enjoy meals in this restaurant but the quality has slipped in the last couple visits. It is now serving very average food and charge high price. The Shanghainese dim sum is still good, but the hot dishes are really not the same as before.

reviews_detailed.author: Janice Kuo
reviews_detailed.text: have not been in this restaurant since 2000. Still great food as usual

reviews_detailed.author: Mega Chan
reviews_detailed.text: Decent food, decent atmosphere and decent service. Only thing I can complain about is that the food must have had a lot of msg, as I must have drank 10 cups of tea while having the meal.

name: 食尚曼谷
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區大東路54號
reviews:
2/14晚上吃的。
口味都還不錯。
百年建築裡面用餐，別有一番風味。

套餐紅茶不能調成甜度（太甜了，不喜歡）
出菜速度比較慢一些。
偏台式的泰式料理，沒有這麼道地。份量一般，客人太多了，店員忙不過來。表情跟回話難免比較笑不出來。空間很棒，別有洞天感。喜歡老宅可以去！檸檬魚是最好吃的其他就一般般。
第二次造訪😊這次和家人一起吃晚餐，5位大人，一位兒童，餐點好吃，戶外也適合多人聚餐

reviews_detailed.author: owbert
reviews_detailed.text: Unfortunately after the updated menu, no CP值. Overpriced. Favorite dishes are also gone. $350 for 1/5th curry

reviews_detailed.author: YiHsuan Tseng
reviews_detailed.text:
Excellent service and delicious food.
The staff is friendly and helpful, leaving me and my friend good impressions. We sit at the outdoor area to enjoy the fresh air in the middle of noon, and it is not that hot as we thought. The appetizer is one of our favorite here, and the other dishes are also fine. We enjoyed a pleasant lunch.

reviews_detailed.author: Wesley Wong
reviews_detailed.text:
You'll find a Thai restaurant inside Xilin Night Market. It's set up in an old-fashioned building that gives off a traditional vibe. What's interesting is that the tables aren't completely flat – they're a bit slanted, which adds a fun twist. The bathroom is pretty small, fitting only one person at a time.

Now, when it comes to the food, it's not as spicy as regular Thai dishes. They've made it less spicy so that it matches the taste buds of Taiwanese people. It's a bit different from the usual spiciness you'd expect from Thai cuisine, but it's done this way to make it more appealing to folks around here.

reviews_detailed.author: chunky chen
reviews_detailed.text:
The food is not bad,
but very pricey

The environment vibe is good, the service is good

No particular dish wow me, very average.

Overall 3 stars

Payment : credit card

reviews_detailed.author: C
reviews_detailed.text: I can’t say the Thai food here is authentic but it’s rather Thai fusion. Don’t get me wrong though it’s delicious nonetheless. What’s special about this place is that there’s an outdoor seating area in the back for hosting private events or even small weddings. The atmosphere is great. Ambience on point. Definitely worth checking out

name: 士林廣澤擔仔麵｜芝山捷運站美食｜士林排隊美食｜天母推薦人氣必吃餐廳
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區福華路10號
reviews:
外觀看起來很有年代感，紅燈籠、老式招牌，加上門口那種台式小館特有的熱鬧氣味，走進去就知道是會吃得很滿足的那種地方。
這次點的菜不算少，每道都蠻有特色，整體偏重口味、下飯、很實在。
---
🐟 香煎/酥炸鸚哥魚
外皮非常酥，乾乾脆脆的，肉質保持得不錯不乾柴，加上酸酸的檸檬味道剛好提味。這道是整桌裡最有「主菜存在感」的一道。
---
🥬 清炒地瓜葉
味道不油、蒜味香，地瓜葉嫩，不會有粗粗的纖維感。看起來簡單但其實是考驗火候的一道菜，做得蠻好。
---
🦑 炒中卷
中卷口感 Q 彈，青蔥味道濃、熱炒香氣十足。調味偏鹹，超級下飯類型。
---
🥢 臭豆腐
臭豆腐吸滿醬汁，帶一點微甜微鹹，下飯度高。口感不會太軟爛，是偏紮實的那種。
---
🔥 麻辣鴨血煲
湯頭沒有到非常辣，是帶辣香與微微麻味，鴨血滑嫩，蔬菜吸了湯汁之後很好吃。這鍋很暖胃，冬天吃剛剛好。
---
🥩 蔥爆牛肉
是整桌口味最濃的料理之一。牛肉嫩度 OK，蔥與洋蔥爆香非常到位，鹹香又帶一點微辣，也是很適合配白飯的一道。
---
🍴 整體總結
是那種傳統又帶點江浙/台式味道的老館子，
料理走 濃香、下飯、熱炒路線。環境很有年代感，但也讓人覺得舒服、接地氣。
✔ 擅長熱炒
✔ 口味偏重但不死鹹
✔ 食材新鮮度不錯
✔ 適合多人聚餐、邊聊邊吃的地方
整體來說，是那種會想偶爾再來吃的店，尤其適合想大口吃菜、大口吃肉、配熱炒暖胃的時候。

是台南味道的台菜，每一道菜都好吃，絕對是天母的在地美食餐廳。
6個人全部吃完一個人才不到500，Cp 值很高，吃飯時間都很多人，建議人多的話要先訂位！

真心建議店家能有一個外場來看頭看尾，招呼客人。今天中午十二點多到店，看到外面坐滿客人，有一兩桌快吃完了，心想等一下應該就有空桌可以入座。無奈，外場一個服務人員都沒有，站在門口苦等約十分鐘才有人說裡頭還有空桌。

擔仔麵、擔仔米粉不怎麼道地，有半顆滷蛋（不知道是不是炸過，皮有一點皺皺的），一片瘦肉，一片豬肝，湯頭沒什麼香氣，@70元

麻醬麵有點太乾，如果能多加點油蔥會更香，也更古早味。

油條青蚵不錯，青蚵不是最新鮮的鮮甜，但是也沒有腥味，很不錯！ 如果用上最新鮮的蚵仔🦪，更加分！

皮蛋地瓜葉，好吃，但是皮蛋有點硬（新鮮度可以再改善），反正整體的味道正好是我喜歡的。新鮮皮蛋會軟一些，應該會更美味！

店內還有包廂，可以感覺有很多是老客人，菜色must be good!

不主動開發票，這一點很不ok’. 扣分！

reviews_detailed.author: Chlotus
reviews_detailed.text: This restaurant is like a fancy version of a noodle restaurant. It does not only serves noodles but also served some Taiwanese dishes and seafood. The noodle was tasty, and the owners were friendly. Strongly recommend this good place if you want to go to a simple place and chat with your friends in a good vibe which also provides tea for free.

reviews_detailed.author: Sue G
reviews_detailed.text: This place, our most favorite dinner venue for local Taiwanese home cook food. Just 2 min walking distance from our house, we called to order and just collect once the dishes are ready. For today’s meal, we ordered 2 types of taufoo. One for kids and mapo taufoo for adults. Their signature orange sauce pork which gives sweet and sour taste was truly a delight. The seafood taufoo was so good that it can match the one we ordered previously from Regent hotel. My husband said my mapo toufoo version is better than theirs but I liked theirs with the Szechuan peppercorn taste. Overall, my favorite!

reviews_detailed.author: Kanit T
reviews_detailed.text: Was in the area so tried this restaurant, the veg dishes and fried tofu were nice. Noodles were decent though nothing spectacular. Would give it overall more of a 3.5stars.

reviews_detailed.author: ABILENE
reviews_detailed.text: Incredibly tasty food and wonderful hospitality. The owner is very friendly and makes you feel right at home. A place I’ll happily visit again!

reviews_detailed.author: S L
reviews_detailed.text:
This restaurant is conveniently located next to a big carpark.  It's decoration is in the traditional home style.  We were the first customers and soon the restaurant is filled and it is only a Tuesday early afternoon.
Food is fairly priced and taste relatively good.

name: 蔦燒日式居酒屋-士林店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區中山北路五段505巷42弄1號
reviews:
蔦燒的烤功真的很厲害！
難得看到雞心會切開來烤，
除此之外，牛肋條把肉汁鎖滿在裡面，
雞腿肉的份量更是令人滿足，
各種調味我覺得都可以嘗試看看！

另外，主食的部分，
鮭魚炒飯主打一個鍋氣十足，
鮭魚的大小，可以炒到融入在飯之中，
又不會覺得口感上很突兀，
在粒粒分明的飯粒之中，
又可以吃到鮭魚的鮮味，相當飽足！

最後是酒水的部分，
Highball的比例抓得剛剛好，
首衝口腔的是足夠的酒感，
尾韻又能帶來氣泡和檸檬兩者的結合，
不論是要買醉還是喝氣氛都很適合！

五點半過來吃，沒有訂位、坐了吧台的位置。烏龍麵上的明太子非常豪邁，喜歡明太子的朋友不要錯過，烏龍麵的本體稍軟，沒有嚼勁。 雞軟骨不推，雞心和雞腿肉都好吃。
生日壽星送松露薯條，粉讚。

吃過很多烤魚，第一次吃到這麼好吃的午仔魚一夜干！魚皮烤得脆到不可思議，筷子輕輕一夾就破，還會發出像戳破玻璃紙一樣的「ㄘ~ㄘ~」聲，重點是裡面的魚肉既細嫩又多汁，完全不用沾胡椒鹽，就是人間美味！
還有塩烤雞翅也值得一提，先不說有多美味，光是師傅在備料時願意多花一些時間將雞翅剖開，讓骨頭部分完全裸露出來的這份貼心，就值得喝采。這是我第一次這麼優雅的吃雞翅，少了與骨頭奮戰的狼狽，只須專心品嚐手羽先的美味，不必水沾油膩、不必啃得滿嘴流油，簡直太貼心了！

reviews_detailed.author: Lisa Wang
reviews_detailed.text: Just moved into the area recently and not gonna lie, we haven’t tried any restaurants yet. This restaurant’s food is scrumptious. We definitely will be coming back. The food was warm and the place felt comfortable and homey. There are both table seating and bar seating with a view of the open kitchen. A must try restaurant if you’re in shilin. Delicious, cheap, and convenient because it’s pretty close to the subway station. YOU HAVE TO COME HERE! IT’S DELICIOUS!😋🤤

reviews_detailed.author: Ricky LK
reviews_detailed.text: Visited with my friends, they book the place in advance. I think without booking, it may difficult to get the seat. The food is very tasty, everything. The price is normal for Izakaya. The serving portion is pretty huge compared to the price.

reviews_detailed.author: Lim Chen Chun
reviews_detailed.text:
I love this restaurant.
The food here tastes good.
The food portion is bigger than usual. It makes me feel so full!

The serve your food quite fast too.

My wife and I got the bar seating hence we can see 3 chef there preparing all the food.

Friendly Young chefs that are willing to chat with you.

I will definitely come back again.

reviews_detailed.author: YiHsuan Tseng
reviews_detailed.text: The teriyaki restaurant is fantastic. The location is super convenient as it is located just right out side of the MRT. The decoration is cozy and classic. The foods surprised us as the portion is over large lol we two people tried so hard to complete the dishes we ordered. They all taste fine and in reasonable priced. A good place to hang out with friends by midnight for sure.

reviews_detailed.author: Stefano Notarbartolo
reviews_detailed.text:
The place is full crowded - a great sign. Food exceeded my expectations,  great service,  helpful waiters who managed to squeeze me in although there was not enough place.
An instant favorite,  totally recommended.

name: 士林放感情餐酒館
formatted_address: 11162台灣臺北市士林區大東路152號
reviews:
氛圍佳、調酒佳、貓貓可愛的酒吧，菜單以動漫為主題，並有附註酒感、酸度、甜度。室內裝潢設計獨特，主題調酒裝飾亦富有巧思，且本次遇到的調酒師講解詳細並友善，值得再訪！
260213-14
10252524

大家都是第一次來到這家餐酒館，搶頭香成為店裡第一批客人😏

一翻開菜單瞬間吸引大家眼球，是漫畫，而且好多可愛擺飾，也都介紹得好詳細，店內有兩層樓，二樓主要是吸水煙，尤其是燈光設計我非常愛，手機一直拍拍拍，每組酒都有乾冰，拍照起來更仙更美，也是我們這群人最吵鬧😆

殊不知過了多久意外發生，我把酒打翻了，好在沒波及到其他客人，酒杯沒破，工作人員迅速處理好，貼心的是老闆又補給我，還多送一杯Shot說是懲罰，但很好喝啦！！

今天朋友生日還有生日禮，香檳紅一組或蛋糕，我們都選香檳紅，一上來也是不得了，很像花束，還有唱歌這趴儀式感，所有店內客人都很開心，老闆很會帶動氣氛也很大方有趣，餐點也是超級好吃，情緒價值有拉滿，剛好這天有四組客人都有壽星，我們這群有六人，我們最後要離開時，老闆又送我們一人一杯Shot
，很會做人也很會做生意，五顆星都是給老闆的，謝謝老闆給我們這麼愉快的夜晚😁😚
擁有復古又chill 的氛圍，讓人能輕鬆的享用風味獨特的創意調酒、美味餐點，服務人員都很親切、貼心的服務，讓我們感到很開心，真心推薦是情侶約會、閨蜜聚會、慶生包場、續攤宵夜必來的水煙餐酒館！

reviews_detailed.author: Kim S
reviews_detailed.text: Absolutely loved this hidden gem.  There’s actually a speak easy inside the restaurant (upstairs).  The food was spectacular!  We had the spicy fried chicken and sugar cane shrimp roll.  Eat the sugar cane that it’s wrapped around!!  Hookah was also great!  Love love love.

reviews_detailed.author: Johnson Deng
reviews_detailed.text:
Small place. Not too many spots for couples to sit except at the bar. But the drinks—construction and taste, drink presentation were all top quality. I’ll come back because of the drink taste on some.

Fried platter was also great, I would’ve liked a lot more ketchup or a spread of other sauces to go with it. With how much I paid for the platter, I’m sure they would’ve still made money off me.

reviews_detailed.author: YiHsuan Tseng
reviews_detailed.text:
Been here for my birthday celebration last year (around Halloween) and it is a nice local bar. They played good music and offer creative drinks with fun games. For people come on their birthday, they treat them with special shots. This place is full of vitality at night but also got its balance for people to relax and chill.

Their drinks, however, is a bit Slim style. Maybe it’s why many girls fancy the place. The food is okay. It’s strongly recommended to make a reservation in advance. Otherwise, the queue will be quite long. Would love to come back for casual drinks from time to time.

reviews_detailed.author: ah ya
reviews_detailed.text: Nice and Cosy place. Great for gathering, there is a minimum spending requirement which is reasonable but it will be better to share during the booking to avoid any surprise for the customers.

reviews_detailed.author: Weeraya Jajai
reviews_detailed.text: The service that we had was really impressed from Mr.Kai ‘s service. He can speak english very well. The drink was good and the fried was good too. The cat is cute  and atmosphere was nice too.

name: 海友十全排骨
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區大東路49號
reviews:
這家被海內外許多媒體介紹過的名店，谷歌上的評分只有3.8，我開始還覺得奇怪，怎麼這麼低？但吃過以後，不得不承認是有點道理的。
首先先說說食物內容。我點的是肋排排骨湯。湯頭是清甜甘美的，中藥味恰到好處，不至於寡淡，也不會濃烈到讓人受不了。肉質偏柴，也不鬆軟。至於所謂的肋排就真的只有骨頭上附著一層薄薄的肉，說真的還不如吃便宜10元的排骨湯來得有滿足感。
網上所垢病的服務差，要拼桌，這些都可以諒解。畢竟減少排隊候位，增加客流量，是店家與消費者雙贏。然而在我結賬後，看到門口地上就這麼大剌剌的擺了四口大鍋，其中一口還打開露出肋排和肉湯，任憑風吹塵揚時，我實在沒法給四分，如果純就衛生面來說，恐怕三分都嫌多。傳統老店，傳統思維，「垃圾吃垃圾肥」的价值觀到底還有多少消費者能接受呢？我懷疑。

.很賺錢的店家，服務態度有點消極。

.就是喝排骨湯，品嚐藥膳味，沒有甚麼肉。滷肉飯乏善可陳。

.店家非常強調排骨湯不另加湯，滷肉飯不另加滷汁，宣稱是維護品質。其實排骨湯偏少，滷肉飯滷汁不香濃，只是顏色深。店家這麼說，無所謂啦，就是錢賺太多，怕加湯麻煩。

.我很納悶，那些可以加湯加麵的加飯的店家，難到就是不顧品質？

.前面爬文看到，男店員會對男女客人口語性騷擾，我倒是真的很想看看。

.士林夜市是年輕時的美好回憶，數十年來社會進步許多，在品質、衛生、服務等方面，海友似乎步伐前進緩慢，至於價格則是絕對跟上並超前。

.恭喜店家賺大錢。

藉到台北市遊玩之際，早上到各景點去走馬看花，走了一天之後，除了感覺有點累之外，肚子也有點餓了！網路介紹這一家藥膳排骨店，於是搭捷運紅線到士林站，然後步行約10分鐘左右到達這家店。
我們到這家店的時候是下午四點多，雖然離晚餐時間還有一段時間，可是客人已經相當多了！但是我們很幸運馬上就有了座位，只是坐下來點餐。店裡沒有點餐的單子，所有的餐點就寫在牆壁上，因為項目沒有很多，所以直接告知服務人員即可。這邊知名的就是藥膳排骨！有藥膳豬排也有羊排另外還有提供麵線和滷肉飯。我們點了一個豬肋排和羊排及兩碗麵線。上菜速度非常的快，幾乎不用什麼等待，一兩分鐘菜就上來了。藥膳的排骨燉的非常的透，藥膳湯也非常的好喝！麵線加上滷汁也很好吃，整個吃下來非常的滿意！兩個人吃的兩種藥膳湯和兩碗麵線共計$360元，個人覺得相當的合理！難怪這家店經營得這麼成功，因為東西好吃，價格又合理，除了慕名而來的客人之外，而且回頭客應該是相當的多！

reviews_detailed.author: Philip Raymond Lim
reviews_detailed.text:
I’d give it three star not because it’s bad. The taste is good, the make is really basic. The ten herbs soup was tasty but the rib is all bones. Would have loved it maybe because I’m comparing it to how my grandparents would make it at home. For the chicken, I think it’s not as tender and flavourful but it fills me up. The noodle and vegetable is tasty but there’s lack of ingredient.

However, if you’re not a local and you want to get a taste of Chinese local cuisine… this is not bad already.

reviews_detailed.author: Scott Pothier
reviews_detailed.text: We stopped here because it was awarded a Michelin Bib Gourmand. The pork ribs themselves were tender. Broth was fairly plain, but still good! Service and atmosphere here were excellent! Things are efficient! Overall, a pleasant experience and solid choice in the Shilin Market!

reviews_detailed.author: Culinary Traveler
reviews_detailed.text:
Good flavor, the ladies from the staff were friendly.

While leaving the male staff made a sexist joke, that maybe he assumed I wouldn’t understand and only my companion would. This might be considered local humor but both of us found it disrespectful and unnecessary.

reviews_detailed.author: Oanh Truong Buu
reviews_detailed.text: We ate in a rainy day, ribs were really good but who hate the herbal smell is not recommended. My father said the goat meat noodles was good too. But they use one-time bowls, not very sustainable.

reviews_detailed.author: heifoonlei
reviews_detailed.text:
Generally,  there are many places that sell this soup and I have not try most of them. However,  I believed its taste should be similar if not the same.

The soup is lightly herbal and tastes sweet so it might not appeal to those who like a heavy dose of herbal taste in their soup.

So to those who has sweet tooth do drop in and savour the soup.

Enjoy

name: Creative Pasta 創義麵 士林店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區美德街32號近士林捷運站1號出口
reviews:
令人驚豔的平價義大利麵，江振誠推薦入選500碗，不管是麵體和醬汁都不隨便，用心製作，特別喜歡蝴蝶麵的Q彈口感，份量也不少，普通份量女生就能吃很飽了。另外前菜只要79元有夠佛，白蝦酪梨塔超讚必點👍
內用環境舒適，也很親子友善，假日圓框女店員服務超好，貼心又熱情，對於小朋友需求和客製化餐點都很仔細確認，還主動給小朋友圖畫紙打發時間。
👍蒜頭小魚乾辣椒麵(220元)：被江振誠主廚稱讚「如果要我用蒜頭、小魚干、辣椒做一道Pasta，我很可能也會做成這個樣子」的台義合璧口味，真夠有創意的，雖加了豆豉但調味不會過鹹，鹹香辣味十足，配上Q彈的蝴蝶麵很好吃！
👍義大利肉醬千層麵(260元+加大20元)：好吃，超大片千層麵還保有一點Q彈口感，不會過於軟爛，沾上起司和紅醬味道平衡，而且加大份量真的好多啊～女生點普通就能吃很飽了
✅義式肉醬佐奶油麵(240元)：不錯，肉醬加奶油是好吃的調味
👍白蝦酪梨塔(前菜)：超好吃的，像中式的薄皮炸餛飩塞入冰涼涼的飽滿酪梨餡，口感清爽
✅番茄起司布斯切塔(前菜)：不錯，下面麵包很脆，配上上面的番茄和濃厚起司很搭
✅薯條：滿酥脆的，沒什麼調味就是，還行

前菜的外殼吃起來有點油味
整體的用餐環境和其他分店落差大
品質希望可以兼顧

主餐有點普通，前菜和甜點很不錯

鮮蝦酪梨塔$79：非常喜歡的一道，口感好，酪梨給的很多，蝦子新鮮

番茄斯特拉恰泰拉起司沙拉$79：沒有嘗試過的料理，能吃到濃郁的起司和小番茄，蠻好吃的～

泰式酸辣炸雞柳條麵$240：泰式口味沒有想像中的酸辣重口味，覺得有點小可惜，可能是為了配合大眾口味，如果能開放調整也許會更好～

甜點（奶酪、提拉米蘇）：兩個都很好吃，奶酪的奶香味很足夠，提拉米蘇的餡料比例搭配得宜，整體來說很喜歡

還有服務員奈奈很親切～！

reviews_detailed.author: Liam Lindemann
reviews_detailed.text: Sometimes you have to eat something familiar - pasta. Shilin branch of the pasta chain. There is an English menu, you then order online, but unfortunately the entries are no longer in English, so the detective work begins. The pasta dishes are quite good, considering the circumstances, and reasonably priced. Leftovers can be wrapped up.

reviews_detailed.author: Scott Chen
reviews_detailed.text: It is moderate. The service is nice, respecting to customers and solving issues efficiently. The price is reasonable. The meals I ordered was not too salty. I will try other flavors. Cash only.

reviews_detailed.author: Andy Lee
reviews_detailed.text:
I used to having the meal in creative pastas ! Unfortunately , the spaghetti which I order today includes the unknown fur !
I guess the restaurant sanitation is really horrible ….

Although they change the new one, I’m afraid that I won’t visit next time ….

reviews_detailed.author: Steve Ni
reviews_detailed.text: Don't be fooled. The worst fake lasagna ever. I don't recommend. Don't waste your time and money.

reviews_detailed.author: Oscar Chang
reviews_detailed.text: A Taiwanese influenced spaghetti restaurant. Decent price with interesting flavor.

name: 麵食士林
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區美德街66號
reviews:
品質直線下降 難怪假日的晚上客人這麼少
番茄雞肉麵加點了C餐230算平價
濃湯是好喝
但有頭髮😱還是半白半染的頭髮
沙拉一樣很普通 大蒜麵包不難吃
麵尚可 紅茶不好喝

十年前的高中生美食，那時候下課要吃還要排隊，對當時的我們來說平價、好吃。這次又回到士林品嚐，沒看到從前排隊的人潮了，覺得沒有說多好吃，在想是十年後的自己嘴巴變挑了嗎？
對照其它間麵食主義分店，竟然同樣的品項還比別人貴20
尤其蔬菜義大利麵麵食主義賣95，麵食士林賣到140
還是平價，但不知道為什麼比別家麵食主義貴
初訪，點青醬蛤蜊麵，加點B套餐，麵條過軟沒有麵心感，青醬稀淡如水無滋味，蛤蜊癟癟的不新鮮，吃了不到一半，受不了只好放棄。吃東西的感受是很主觀的，個人意見僅供參考

reviews_detailed.author: Lorraine Frederica
reviews_detailed.text:
The portion is more than enough for one people, next time i'm here i will choose to share than order for myself. The pasta itself tastes great, really generous with the sauce and the meat. The ambience of the restaurant is good, good cleanliness as well. The food was served quickly, and a bit crowded during my visit too.

Superb location, near Shilin MRT station.

reviews_detailed.author: Michael M
reviews_detailed.text: Decent Spaghetti, not overcooked and great, big portions. I had the vegetable pesto and it was pretty good, especially considering the price, I can't complain. They usually have a lot of space and also serve risotto and potato mash covered with cheese. Usually quite a lot of space and seats. Closing times a bit early.

reviews_detailed.author: Vláďa Janíček
reviews_detailed.text: Eat-x close to red line mtr. Good, tasty, big steaks.

reviews_detailed.author: Lucas Tristan Chang
reviews_detailed.text: This shop pasta was excellent full flavour n tasty. Cheap n in large size as average pasta at SGD$6.00...die must eat...but seating arrangement not ideal like HK eatery eat n get lost fast

reviews_detailed.author: Finn Chang
reviews_detailed.text: The pasta didn't taste good. It served better before, wonder if it has been traded off to another owner.

name: John的料理/士林官邸美食/無提供化妝室
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區福林路197號1樓
reviews:
非常驚豔的小店。

每一道都好吃。老滷汁做出來的各項菜色，包括滷肉飯、滷豬腳、刈包等等都很好吃。雞肉飯也令人驚奇地香，難怪生意那麼好！
最愛豬腳飯，很常吃，好吃😋常用ubereats會員優惠外帶自取，很方便又比現場便宜一點🤩住附近的便當店最優選擇☺️也蠻常內用，多元行動支付也超方便！
到故宮看展，路過剛好有路邊有停車位，就進來試試看，結果店雖小但客人不少，點了雞絲飯及舒肥雞胸飯，都還不錯，尤其是舒肥雞胸肉非常棒，值得推薦一下！

reviews_detailed.author: Rune Caboor
reviews_detailed.text: So good!! Paid 115 NTD in total for the rice and the pork bun. Very good value for money!

reviews_detailed.author: Matt Smith
reviews_detailed.text: Fantastic little shop serving elevated but unpretentious Taiwanese classics run by a super friendly and generous family. Definitely worth a short walk to this somewhat out-of-the-way location for a delicious lunch or early dinner. We will definitely come back!

reviews_detailed.author: J Z
reviews_detailed.text: Quaint, cozy, comfy restaurant with a home style feel and vibes. Traditional Taiwanese dishes made by a chef that's experienced in fine dining. My kind of comfort food.

reviews_detailed.author: Gregorio Villar
reviews_detailed.text: I had an incredible experience at this homemade Taiwanese restaurant! The daughter who greeted us was amazingly friendly and spoke excellent English, making us feel right at home. Her warmth and hospitality were truly special. The food, cooked by her dad, was absolutely delicious—every dish was bursting with authentic Taiwanese flavors and made with so much care. You can tell it’s a family labor of love. I can’t recommend this place enough for anyone craving a genuine, heartfelt meal!

reviews_detailed.author: Renne
reviews_detailed.text:
The food was delicious and satisfying, and in addition, the phone service from the female staff was excellent.

I ordered through Uber Eats today. There seemed to be some issues that needed clarification, so the restaurant tried to call me several times. However, due to a problem with my phone, all calls went to voicemail, and I caused some inconvenience to the restaurant. Eventually, I managed to get through to the restaurant by calling them, but as a Japanese person who can only speak a little Chinese, I was worried about communicating. However, there was a female staff member who could speak English, and we were able to communicate smoothly. Despite it being close to closing time and a busy period, she was very polite and helpful. Additionally, there was a note in Japanese saying “Thank you ❤️” on the takeout container, which made me very happy. I wanted to express my gratitude, so I’m leaving this review. I wish you all the best in your future success🙏 Thank you so much 😊

name: 及品鍋貼水餃專賣店
formatted_address: 111台灣臺北市士林區美崙街93號
reviews:
主要項目為：
水餃、鍋貼、湯品、飲品

△ 外帶內用 一起排隊
▲ 週日 公休日
△ 11：10 ~ 20：30
▲ 現場製作 需等候
△ 下午時段不休息
▲ 附近自找停車場 / 格
△ 建議騎車購買
▲ 僅 提供 現金支付
△ 有每日不同湯品
▲ 每樣最少 10顆

這家已經用餐多次，硬要說缺點就是需要排隊，因為內用的位置不多，再加上煮都需要時間，訂單也大量，所以.. 要吃就要排隊。

另外，每一樣都是最少 10顆，這個...我覺得不是很方便，因為很想多

還有這附近很難停車，雖然有付費停車場，但是不是很近，而且費用也高，建議還是停遠一些再走過來，或是騎車是比較理想。

這邊就是先抽號碼牌等叫號，菜單也有日文、英文等，很多外國遊客也是會來用餐。

醬料就是自取，基本給的就是辣椒醬油、醬油、醋等，依照自己口味去調整。如果有需要小菜也可以自取，點了飲品（劃單時有先付款）也可以先拿，這邊就是點餐後，付款結帳等餐點。

我覺得比較驚艷可能是湯品，裡面除了本身的魚丸，還加很多花椰菜，一般都沒有。鍋貼、水餃都表現不錯，水餃皮挺好吃的，不過我覺得料沒有很飽滿，有點小空，這部分有點可惜。

服務雖然也是不錯，挺客氣的，不過我覺得外國遊客很多，菜單可以放在外面讓客人先看，不然放裡面，客人都不知所措的感覺。

如果要吃，建議離峰時間來比較不用等很久，經過可以吃一下，我覺得不是特別跑的那種，但整體來說還是很不錯的，推薦給大家，有興趣的人可以來試試。

隱藏在士林華榮市場周邊巷子裡的美食，每天中午都大排長龍，但是呢排隊的人龍裡也有外帶的，其實不用等很久，但實際上餐廳裡面的桌子只有7桌，進場必須要跟人併桌用餐、兩個人來吃飯最適合，人多餐廳就不好安排，人少流動快，等到的位置也快。
到了先抽號碼牌，商家第一次叫號就是要先幫你填單收取費用，結束後你先在外面繼續等第二次叫號，就是入座用餐，裡面還有一些小菜，海帶、滷蛋、小黃瓜、豬頭肉、豬頭皮、豆腐，這些都是水餃店裡面經常會有的商品，可點可不點。
水餃上來了，不由的說他的煎餃的確是煎的酥脆，內餡的湯汁飽滿，這個分數在我心目中確實是滿分，皮不會很厚，但卻有嚼勁，我只點了一樣韭菜水餃，味道中規中舉，皮可以吃的出來是現桿的，味道也不錯，我們還點了酸辣湯，酸辣湯也好吃談不上驚豔，但卻具有水準，這樣就算是不錯的水餃店了，難怪外面會到大排長龍。

總結：說不上特別，就是精準了油與鹽，拿捏恰到好處的油潤感。
評論：
北市的鍋貼專賣不算多
已吃待吃的 統計僅約15家
士林是熱區 及品 阿財 阿堂
最知名都在這

自認 鍋貼的美味級距並不大
即便如 阿財與及品
這種人氣分屬一二的名店
感覺口味差異其實並不多
●原味鍋貼 4.5星
個頭不大 兩端閉合
有少許的冰花
口感 不是酥 是有如餅乾的脆
如網傳所說肉餡填充不紮實
但 這也許這就是密招
出空氣感 夾肉汁夾油湯
微微的香油與麻油香氣
好吃 但說不上哪裡好吃
像鼎泰豐 拿捏了對的油跟鹽
油潤 馨香 韻味足
●鮮肉高麗菜水餃 4.3星
表現較為遜色
麵皮有韌性 用筷子夾不斷
潰縮沒有很好 跑水沒有鎖鮮
但調味是可以的
菜肉比約5比5
有一樣的油潤感 還可以
●每日一湯(竹筍香菇貢丸) 4.5星
酸辣湯售罄 遂點這例湯
骨湯底 濃郁厚實
竹筍有處理過 出糯性
貢丸品質很不錯
作為名店 這湯沒丟面子
●切盤滷味 4.2星
以切盤等 賣相不如現切
口味一般

整體而言
鍋貼可以 水餃一般
重點在精準了對的油鹽比
用油潤感撐起一片天

reviews_detailed.author: Linus Wong
reviews_detailed.text: One of the best dumpling and potsticker places in the Taipei area! Also be sure to order the always changing traditional soup of the day!

reviews_detailed.author: Yu-Ting
reviews_detailed.text: The queue was worth it. The gyoza was good though next time I will skip the side dish. Press the yellow button to get a number from the printer next to the door.

reviews_detailed.author: Dave Pearce William
reviews_detailed.text: The potstickers are very oily, and the wait time around 10 minutes or so. Additionally, there’s a restriction requiring a minimum order of 10 pieces for certain items, which makes it less suitable for solo diners. Overall, not recommended if you’re dining alone or in a hurry.

reviews_detailed.author: Liaw Kok Heng
reviews_detailed.text: A small shop, not a touristic location and customers are mostly locals but serve delicious food with good service. Ordered fried dumplings, corn soup, soup of the day and refreshing drinks. All were very satisfying. Highly recommended if you want to taste local food.

reviews_detailed.author: Yen-Chung Chen
reviews_detailed.text: It is one of the most impressive dumpling restaurant we ever had. The boiled and fried dumplings are different, but both of them are very tasty. The restaurant is always crowded, you may need to wait for a while. Or, you can also buy the frozen dumplings and cook at home, and the taste is still great.

name: 雙月食品社 北投店
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區光明路228號
reviews:
每次看到大排長龍的店，第一次嚐鮮，可能期待值過高，覺得不是很合口味。
蛤蠣雞腿湯一共三塊雞腿肉，滿滿的高麗菜還加了九層塔，我不懂😅但是雞肉非常好吃。
牛蒡瘦肉湯牛蒡有點苦味，
滷味個人感覺不夠入味，
酸菜拌意麵還不錯，酸菜味十足，
愛恨椒芝麵吃起來像偏乾的麻醬麵，份量偏少，油金滷肉飯是真的油，肥肉超多，
很喜歡醬油辣椒，沾了以後感覺食物都變好吃了，

兩人桌桌面真的太小，多點一點都快放不下，跟隔壁座也沒有距離，用餐環境擁擠不舒適

來北投水美泡溫泉，看了附近的餐廳評價，覺得不錯就來嚐鮮了。

喜歡吃辣的，愛恨椒芝麵是個大推的選項，香香的花椒味，搭上芝麻的麻醬香，有一種相輔相成的感覺，讓人感覺1+1卻是大於2，相當的驚艷。

黑松露拌麵，松露味道超濃厚的，一口吸進去，松露的香氣充滿整個鼻腔。

雞汁拌飯也有自己的特色，特別炸酥的油蔥，灑上白胡椒粉，淡淡的鹹味，別有一番滋味。

大力推薦，湯品一定要點，阿甘剝皮辣椒雞腿湯，雞湯的湯頭鮮味十足，真的會讓人一口接一口停不下來，每一口都很舒服，雞腿肉很嫩，是一整隻大雞腿。
份量方面，麵類一個大男生可能吃不飽，就是要另外點個拌飯。
位子因為用餐時間人多，而且桌數有限，所以1、2人來併桌很正常。

服務方面都很棒，唯一美中不足的是，這次剛好遇到送馬年紅包袋的活動，因為真的很可愛，服務人員卻把我們忽略了，最後變成我們主動索取。

《雙月》
🌷在北投圖書館對面，在光明街228號，微居高處俯視溫泉公園，交通便利，🅿️停車得找附近停車場。

🌷11:00開始營業，門外就已大排長龍，須抽號碼牌，等候叫號後才可開始點餐。

🌷近期有活動，贈送麵線數碗，油蔥麵線，很香(^^)。

🌷滷味各式滷味小菜都很不錯（滷蛋、海帶絲、豆乾、月亮肉、白紅蘿蔔、油豆腐、甜不辣⋯等）、燙青菜（有點小油）。

🌷松露乾麵很中式，有蒜片很提味。
