🌷軻仔、魚肚⋯都十分新鮮美味。

🌷座位不多，等候的客人很多，店家或者合適邊邊區提供椅子供等候用。

🌷20260301初次造訪。

reviews_detailed.author: Critsy Y
reviews_detailed.text:
This spot serves up solid Taiwanese home-style comfort food. Very humble setting, nothing fancy, just good cooking. You can order on the machine (super easy), or if that’s not your vibe, the staff will happily take your order. The service is really friendly and everyone was nice. There's a self-help condiments that you get yourself on the side bar and a sink to wash your hands before eating too.

We ordered all the Taiwanese classics between the two of us and had ourselves a pretty satisfying meal. I’m not even that into Taiwanese food (other than that fatty pork over rice… my one true love), but everything was tasty. I’ve been to their other location too, and the quality is consistently good.

It was a rainy evening, no line at all, and we were seated right away. Cozy, comforting, and reliable—exactly what you want on a wet night!

reviews_detailed.author: Linda Ann Woo
reviews_detailed.text:
Interesting spicy sesame noodles.
Fried tofu not bad.
Garlic chicken soup, chicken dry n badly bruised. Not as nice.
Braised pork rice not bad.
Slice pork sesame oil soup is the tastiest dish.

reviews_detailed.author: Ada Erinal
reviews_detailed.text: I've been there with my mom and sister the other day, and we loved it! The staff is so nice and kind, they explained us how it works everything and even answered our questions regarding dishes even if they were busy. We got the chicken soup and spicy noodles. The noodles were so good we ordered another noodle to try which was the one with the black trufles. Also very good but the spicy one was the best! I would've go there to eat all the time if I was staying near. I recommend it!

reviews_detailed.author: YF
reviews_detailed.text:
DELICIOUS! Home-cook style!
I love the steam fish with chilli, bamboo shoots, clam soup (Juicy fat clams with cabbage that makes the soup naturally sweet, YUM!), dry noodle (texture of noodle is good, a little al-dente. We had the truffle style which i am not a big fan off. Taste of truffle is too strong and fake for me)

Restaurant is very clean and they are super efficient. First come first serve basis. Order from the machine and payment is made at machine too. Food was serve very fast! Alcohol is NOT allowed. They sell some type of juice in bottle but they allow you to bring in your own drinks as long as it does not contain alcohol. This is a place where you go for a quick delicious meal and not linger around.
If you are looking for delicious quality home cook food at a great value, visit Moon Moon, you will not regret!

reviews_detailed.author: Jay Yu
reviews_detailed.text:
In this restaurant, you must get a ticket to make sure you are in the queue first then go to take your orders via the vending machine. Don't go to order without a ticket.
Besides of a bit chaotic above, the dishes were excellent.
I like the love-hate-pepper-seasame noodle (愛恨椒芝麵 is the phrase listed on the menu).
Their soy product was also a spot on (吸汁花干). It is kind of side dish, and the soy product is not like silk tofu but pre-dried and porouse inside. It absorpts lots of broth in it. Like it a lot.
Service and environment are excellent amd relaxing.
Only thing is there are many foreign visitors in this restaurant. In my visit, it's like 80% were foreigners. They may not know how it works in this restaurant, and a bit loud when talk. Please be a bit patience.

name: 三燔北投 Mihan Beitou
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區泉源路19號北投晶泉丰旅2樓
reviews:
看了網路評價，抱了很高的期待前往，老實說覺得有點失望，我們花了5個人的錢，卻吃得很辛苦😓
因為空間超擁擠，別人兩人桌都配一個小餐車放肉盤，我們5人桌，其中一人還被安排在桌邊，整桌只有一個餐車⋯肉盤菜盤只能放桌上，桌子偏小又多安插1人⋯⋯
覺得這樣的消費金額應該要有舒適的用餐空間⋯⋯被列為嚐鮮的一次性店家～

不過北投能有稍微高檔的用餐環境是好的，不用跑遠就近可以吃飯，壽星是我媽媽，她很滿意～
前菜的口味都很特別很好吃，服務人員也非常客氣（但也確實無法即時收走用過的餐盤）～整體而言沒有網友評價那麼高，可能若是兩人來會更舒適吧！

今天點了2份松阪豬、2份雪花豬、1分海鮮～結帳含服務費後是90XX元。

高檔的壽喜燒
在北投晶泉丰旅1樓
裝潢好看好拍
平日壽喜燒放題1080/位
假日1280/位
自助吧180/位
（以上價格皆不含服務費10%）
用餐時間90分鐘
推薦大家加購自助吧
選擇蠻多的
有和風前菜、沙拉、蔬菜吧、水果、甜點（哈根達斯冰淇淋）…等
飲料有咖啡機、也可以自己調（抹茶、櫻花口味的糖漿+氣泡水）

壽喜燒放題有提供三種肉可以無限續
（澳洲牛、美國牛、丹麥豬）
肉質都不錯
豬肉意外的好吃
一開始會有服務人員先幫忙熱鍋
後面就自己加醬汁/水 調整
但鍋子蠻小的
要煮4人份的肉跟菜有點忙哈哈哈

服務也不錯
補水什麼的都很即時
整體來說個人覺得算是對的起價格👏

在旅展買了湯屋+餐券，泡完湯來用餐。
三燔可以選壽喜鍋或是涮涮鍋，肉類是吃到飽的，可以加198享有沙拉吧，飲料，冰淇淋，還有豆花！！這個加價還蠻超值的！建議加198。

reviews_detailed.author: Critsy Y
reviews_detailed.text:
Located inside the Regent Taiwan Hotel in Beitou, this spot dishes out some solid hotpot. Their seafood and meats are super fresh, and once you place your order, the salad bar turns into an AYCE situation. Same with the dessert bar—yes, you can build your own ice cream sundae, and yes, it’s as fun as it sounds. You can even mix up your own soda flavors if you’re feeling creative.

Service is very friendly and efficient and the ambiance is pretty nice. Your typical hotel restaurant vibe in Taiwan. Great for big or small groups.

A group of us came here and had a great meal—easy, tasty, and everyone left happy. The hotel also has an onsen, so next time I’m definitely pairing this with a spa day. Hotpot + hot spring? Yes, please.

reviews_detailed.author: Vivian San Mei Liang
reviews_detailed.text: Really good value and delicious set dinner with options of sukiyaki or shabu shabu. The salad bar has a great variety with fruits and ice cream. The staff are attentive and friendly.

reviews_detailed.author: Kelly Kong
reviews_detailed.text:
I came in here with high hopes after a day at some nearby hot springs, hoping to end with a delicious Japanese meal after seeing all the glowing reviews but I’ve never been more disappointed by a shabu shabu/hot pot experience in my life. We arrived around 7:30pm and service was incredibly slow, after we ordered it took us about 20 minutes to get all our shabu shabu pots when the restaurant was only 3/4 full. Once we started eating something just tasted like it was missing. I was excited to introduce shabu shabu to family having had it in Hokkaido and it being absolutely delicious but this was just… incredibly bland. I realized that rather than using dashi or any sort of flavored water for the broth, they just used plain unsalted water and no amount of sauce can make up for ingredients that are just blanched in plain water. It’s such a shame too since the salad bar has an amazing selection and the ingredients are high quality and delicious but nothing can shine though if it’s just boiled in plain old water.

Just very very disappointed in this as this has also been the most expensive meal (double the cost of Din Tai Fung) of a 1 week trip so far in Taiwan and also near the bottom of the list of worst meals I’ve had in my life since there is just no salt (and thus no flavor) to be seen anywhere in the shabu shabu pot. Plain old undressed salad is better than this. White rice is better than this. Boiled water is better than this because at least I wouldn’t be sad that I paid so much money for meat to boil in plain water.

Would not recommend coming here if you like flavor. Also very confused by other reviews here so maybe we just had a very off meal and they ran out of dashi since it was kind of close to closing times for them?

reviews_detailed.author: Jeff Kao
reviews_detailed.text: Stayed at the hotel for two nights and went to this restaurants for dinners two nights straight. First night we ordered hotpot (beef and seafood). The 2nd night we ordered sukiyaki (beef). We were thoroughly impressed with the quality of the food, service, and the atmosphere. The restaurant was a bit too cold for our liking, but we do understand the need to keep the resistant cool due to the type of food offered. The food sets are reasonably priced. The quantity was a bit too big for dinner, but you get your money's worth. Will definitely return for lunch the next time we are in town.

reviews_detailed.author: alna lau
reviews_detailed.text:
I had a wonderful dining experience at Mihan Beitou, located on the 2nd floor of Regent Taipei Beitou (北投晶泉丰旅). The restaurant has a calm, elegant atmosphere that perfectly matches the overall vibe of a hot spring hotel. The environment is clean, quiet, and comfortable, making it a great place to relax and enjoy a nice meal after a long day of traveling.

We ordered the hotpot set, and the quality of the ingredients really impressed us. Both the seafood and meats were very fresh. The beef slices were beautifully marbled and tender, and the vegetables were crisp and clean. After ordering the main set, we also had access to the salad bar and dessert area, which included fresh vegetables, sauces, drinks, and ice cream. Being able to build your own dessert and enjoy unlimited sides made the whole dining experience even more enjoyable.

The service was excellent. The staff were friendly, polite, and attentive. They explained the menu clearly, served our food promptly, and always checked in to make sure everything was fine. Even though the restaurant was inside a hotel, the service felt warm and personal rather than overly formal.

I came here with friends, and everyone left very satisfied and happy. What I really like is that the hotel also has hot spring facilities, so this place would be perfect for a full relaxing experience — soak in the onsen first, then enjoy a hotpot dinner afterward. I would definitely love to come back again next time I visit Beitou.

Recommended for couples, friends, and families. Indoor dining with comfortable seating.

name: 酒米食堂chumi_canteen－北投店beitou
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區永興路一段47號
reviews:
餐點非常好吃，雖然價格偏高，但是值得。

推薦鮭魚炒飯和茶泡飯，山藥蓬鬆燒也很推，明太子雞腿卷的明太子超厚很過癮，務必要搭配炒飯。
醃漬番茄可以解膩，抹茶蜂蜜啤酒讓我這個不喝啤酒的人也能喝完。

還不錯吃，份量比一般的日式餐廳多～會吃很飽！

唯一比較硬的規定是「低消，一定要點一杯飲料或水酒」，其中雖然也有供應熱茶，但對於不喜歡喝茶的我來說，即便是在9度寒流來襲時⋯為了不浪費80元的低消可樂，還是把它灌完了

20251115
我們大約在晚上十點抵達，進門才得知已接近打烊。結果一入座就得立刻把餐點全部點完。兩個又餓又慌的2人隨便點了菜，最後結帳金額為 NT$3,487（無酒精飲品，僅兩杯飲料）。
這次用餐體驗，我認為並不符合每人 NT$1,800 的消費水平，主要是出在服務、耐心與細心度上。

⸻
原因如下：

1）整體用餐過於匆促
因為店家即將打烊，我們又是最後一桌點餐，上菜速度快到完全來不及應對。
前一道熱菜還沒吃完，下一道又接著上，導致炸物、烤物一下子全部放涼。
主食還沒結束，甜點又緊接上桌，甜鹹混著吃，體驗大打折扣。

我們兩人既不是喝酒聊天，也不是滑手機吃很慢，就是正常用餐而已。
以我們這種「專心吃飯、翻桌率也高」的客群，上菜節奏完全不顧客人體驗，確實欠缺最基本的服務禮貌。

⸻

2）抹茶啤酒詢問時的態度不佳

因為好奇想試，但又怕一大杯踩雷喝不完，所以只是詢問是否能試喝一小口。
無論店家想堅持規定，或願意破例，都應以好的語氣來說明，而不是用明顯不耐的態度來回應。

若不是我想早點回飯店休息，光是當下的語氣，以我的個性可能直接轉頭離場。

⸻

3）清酒蛤蠣湯的溝通落差

我一開始有明確表達「想要薑絲多的蛤蠣湯」。師傅只說若加薑絲味道會不同，但並未多做提醒，導致我沒意識到你們的「清酒蛤蠣湯」與一般居酒屋的版本不同。

實際上桌後才知道，你們的是「清酒味極濃、類似清酒湯底」的版本，而不是我心中一般的蛤蠣湯。
身為第一次來訪的客人，自然不會知道這道湯的風味落差如此大，這部分以師傅的專業應主動提醒。

⸻

4）我沒注意到 22:00 最後點餐時間固然是我的疏忽，但既然仍願意收客，就應維持專業與用心

尤其是：

A）兩人點了這麼多，一開始為何沒有提醒「份量是否過量」？
B）若真的需要準時在 00:00 關店，也應先告知「上菜會一次全部出齊」以及客人可能會遇到的用餐壓力與體驗落差。

⸻

結論：

餐點本身並不差，味道與口感都有一定的水準。
但這次的整體感受，與你們「關於」頁面裡所強調的「溫度」與「用心」並不相符。
很可惜，食物不錯，但服務細節完全破壞了體驗。

Nov,15,2025

We arrived at the restaurant at around 10 PM and only learned upon entering that it was close to closing time. As soon as we sat down, we were told to place our entire order immediately. Two hungry and flustered people ended up ordering quickly, and the final bill came to NT$3,487 (no alcohol, just two drinks).

Based on this experience, I do not think it matched the NT$1,800-per-person level of service, mainly due to issues with service attitude, patience, and attention to detail.

* The details may refer to the above Mandarin version for translation.
⸻

Conclusion:

The food itself was not bad—both the flavor and texture were at a certain standard.
However, the overall experience did not match the “warmth” and “attention to detail” described in your “About” page.
It’s a pity that the food was good, but the service details completely undermined the dining experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Lukas Dxb
reviews_detailed.text:
Amazing place with exceptional food. Service is just as you wish it would be!

Thank you team for making my dinner memorable with "exotic" outstanding food!

Must visit !

reviews_detailed.author: Foo Seck Guan
reviews_detailed.text: The Macha honey beer is special and good if one prefer sweet notes of the beer. We loved the chicken wings and chicken backside - yeah absolutely right. BBQ to a perfect crisp on the surface and tender inside. We also ordered the grilled vegetable which was an icing on the cake. Definitely recommend to anyone who wants to try.

reviews_detailed.author: Ansabel Lim
reviews_detailed.text: I ordered the salmon fried rice, mentaiko yam, grilled squid, yuzu pepper pork, matcha honey beer and guava juice. Loved them all! :) Food was served quickly too! I think it gets crowded, it's better to reserve!

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel Ha
reviews_detailed.text: Amazing experience! I was skeptical of the number of great reviews here but it did not disappoint! Macha honey beer is a must try. Other than that all their red marked recommended menu seems great. My wife and I tried so many great food in Taipei but did not expect to put this Japanese restaurant in our top 5!

reviews_detailed.author: 지윤차
reviews_detailed.text: Very nice and cozy place, food was great. Ordered the miso eggplant, salmon fried rice, salmon rice balls and Hokkaido scallops. All food was 10/10. Would recommend the Matcha Honey Beer as well, smooth with green tea aftertaste, unique and delicious.

name: 長生塩人 北投車站
formatted_address: 112009台灣臺北市北投區育仁路8巷3號
reviews:
看起來平凡的一碗麵
吸了一口麵，才發現這一碗吃的不只是麵，而是料理人滿滿的熱情。

#長生塩人
記得是當初我還在醫院服務長時，就有人推薦我必需去員林品嚐的美味拉麵🍜

麵條有分2款，皆是細麵：
🔖立成製麵（Q彈滑順，可久放不爛的麵條）
🔖麗珠製麵（麵條偏硬，吃得到麵心的口感）

我選了招牌的鹽味拉麵🍜，搭配店員推薦的立成製麵，升級雙倍肉（叉燒、舒肥雞肉），加了溏心蛋。

一上桌，先吸了一口麵，麵條巴著清爽帶點油脂卻不膩的湯頭～嗯！豪好吃～🤤
炙燒過的叉燒帶著炙燒過的香氣，卻不會油膩（叉燒絕對是我吃過的前三名🥉），舒肥雞也鮮嫩美味，和拉麵搭起來毫無違和感。

推薦大家可以去嚐嚐

經朋友介紹來到這里，拉麵是我喜歡的口味，湯頭並不會太鹹！炒麵好吃份量也不少😋
吧台座位不多☝🏻餐期時間要提早來喲~

發跡自天母的長生塩人，在捷運北投站前開的分店，簡約樸素的木質日式風格，掛著書寫店名的白色燈籠，配上開店初期誇張的排隊人龍，讓人一出捷運站就能看到。店家營業時間從傍晚到半夜，也算是體貼值晚班的上班族與夜貓子。

小小的店面，提供10位吧檯式座位，剛開始僅以現場排隊為順序，後來調整成在店門口提供排隊登記表，店員依登記順序呼喚入座，這一改變多了些人性。

餐點品項為4款口味的拉麵，另有其他日式拉麵店少有的日本炒麵及單點配菜。

主打的塩味拉麵，算是淡麗系流派，湯頭以豬骨、雞骨、雞腳、洋蔥、蘿蔔、蔥薑等熬煮，看起來金黃剔透，入口不會淡而無味且不膩口，非常清爽。也沒有豚骨、雞白湯類的腥味。蠻適合長夏炎熱的天氣享用。
配菜有：舒肥雞胸肉、炙燒梅花豬各2片、紫洋蔥丁、蔥花、娃娃菜半顆、海苔一片。
麵體則有2款可選擇：豪億製麵(直細麵)-屬於生麵，剛上桌時麵心有點硬，到後來吸收較多湯頭，會稍微軟些(後來供應商改為 麗珠製麵 了)。另一款則是立成製麵(極細麵)，需另外加價。一進店門吧檯案頭， 放上傳統木盒，刻有大大的「立成製麵」字樣，展現出店家的信心。立成的極細麵，從頭到尾口感較一致，不會因為在湯中泡久了而有變化。

日本炒麵(微辣)：這道是一般拉麵店看不到的品項，同樣強調清爽不油膩的口感，也不會湯湯水水的。擺盤的造型，頗有富士山的既視感。旁邊點綴著一併翻炒的豬肉、雞肉與高麗菜。並灑上不少七味粉，所以有微辣感。雖然造型與口感不錯，但個人覺得鹹度略高，要搭配店家的白開水喝。

溏心蛋：表現一般，沒有出眾亮點。

reviews_detailed.author: A Leung (Andy)
reviews_detailed.text: Great service and delicious noodle. Japanese fried noodle is highly recommended.

reviews_detailed.author: Jamie Chua
reviews_detailed.text:
We ordered the salt and soy sauce ramen. I like this kind of ramen, very simple, clean and refreshing taste, perfect for summer. This is not for people who want their ramen rich and flavorful. I wish they had the option to choose the noodle doneness, and they have thicker cut noodles. But either way, I will come back for this.
PS the seats are limited, so the waiting time will be longer. Limited options for side dish (only egg, extra meat and kimchi).

reviews_detailed.author: Edderss
reviews_detailed.text:
Best damn ramen I’ve had all year.
Soup’s been sitting in a bucket for 8 hours, straight outta beautiful bones.
Noodles so bouncy the NBA might as well just use them.
Service so lovely I’m inclined to just move in.
Man, can I just not leave??????

reviews_detailed.author: Kamy Yeung
reviews_detailed.text:
A small ramen shop with high quality food! We ordered salty ramen with good pork and chicken plus super delicious soup. Side dishes were so tasty as the starters. 😋

The shop is clean and tidy with simple decor.
We will definitely want to come again.

Staff is helpful to introduce the ramen to new comers.

We came at 7:30pm and only waited for about 30 minutes.  We are managed to sit near the shop and also found an almond drink next store to drink while waiting for the seats.

reviews_detailed.author: Chun-Chih Hu
reviews_detailed.text:
I got the Spicy Miso Ramen with double meat, their special ramen noodles, ajitama and extra helping of the noodles. Good flavor but under-seasoned aka not enough salt. They do provide salt, black pepper and shichimi togarashi on the table to adjust the seasoning of your meal to your liking. It is not spicy at all to my palette, the black pepper I added has more kick to it than the soup base itself.  Even with double meat, it was a rather paltry amount of meat added.  The chef can adjust the hardness of the noodles to your preference.  With all the extras added to make a decent meal, I wouldn't really call this cheap.  I ended up paying $295NTD for my meal and I could've gotten another helping of noodles to really top off as I walked out just satisfied but not full.

TL;DR -A good bowl of ramen that's catered to the Taiwanese palette but not cheap if you get all the fixings to fill up.  It is still worth a visit if you're right in the neighborhood.

name: 大戶屋新北投店
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區泉源路12號2樓之1
reviews:
「碳烤雞肉香橘醋定食」，雞肉沒熟。

如圖箭頭處（中間部位較厚）未熟透，肉眼可見明顯的粉紅色與血水，與旁邊熟透的白色雞肉有極大差異。

且當晚因為網路當機，服務人員都在處理帶位、收桌、網路問題，在座位上等約5-10分都沒有人來點餐，還得自己去找服務人員告知要點餐。另因供餐時間只到晚上九點，基本上也無法再續飯與湯，話說茶水也包含在這其中嗎？因為完全沒再補第二次，其他分店都會一直問耶～～至於雞肉問題也就更沒機會再退回請店家重新復熱，可以理解九點後廚房要開始整理，但出餐品質也需要留意，若造成食安問題或任何身體不適，貴司應當難辭其咎。
在附近泡完湯後,，來這邊用餐。大戶屋吃很多次了，覺得料理都很不錯，服務也不錯。

天氣很冷一入坐就送上熱茶 服務很好
位子竟然有插座蠻神奇的
但味增烏龍麵鍋還好

reviews_detailed.author: Brandon LaRouche
reviews_detailed.text:
Food was tasty. We ordered the eel with rice and crispy pork. They have english menus to look at and then you order using a QR code they place at your table, on receipt paper, when you sit down. You pay at the end.

Service was fast. Bathrooms were clean.

reviews_detailed.author: Andrew Chwee
reviews_detailed.text: An excellent meal at this restaurant. They didn't hurry us even when we were almost the last few customers in the restaurant. The cod fish soup was terrific. I love my Pork Tonkatsu - it may not be the best, but it's nice and crispy (almost without the porky smell. The fish set was slightly disappointing; although it was big, this fish tasted off. The green tea latte was quite delightful. The service is excellent and helpful, so if you are with kids, this may be the best spot to have a family meal.

reviews_detailed.author: Janeki-neko
reviews_detailed.text: Good food and fast service. The online ordering menu seems to only be in Chinese. It’s quite busy at meal times.

reviews_detailed.author: Bob Cook
reviews_detailed.text: A second floor Japanese restaurant that you enter through a slightly sketchy looking set of stairs. This branch of Ootoya is medium sized with nice Japanese food and views over the busy intersection. Service was mixed - mostly very attentive, but it would have been good to be told that the two of the top three dishes on the menu weren’t available. You order using the screen and extra rice etc can be requested using the screen throughout your meal. Once we got the food it was generally nice, good clean flavours, generous portions, crispy fried pork. The noodles better very chewy, my wife tried them and thought that they were undercooked. I’m not sure but they were certainly on the borderline. Overall a nice experience, with some reservations.

reviews_detailed.author: Toh Bee Leng
reviews_detailed.text: Opposite the Xinbeitou MRT Station. Hot and delicious food. Peaceful and comfortable atmosphere.

name: PURE CUISINE
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區中和街2號1F
reviews:
午餐加泡湯方案
上道菜都有解說料理及吃法
時時刻刻都有感覺被服務的用心

✅冷盤：新鮮文蛤
可以吃到烏魚子 發酵奇異果 蕃茄 的多層次口感

✅湯：金湯雙鮮澄清湯
軟絲非常新鮮且有嚼勁 搭配清湯本身就很好喝了 如果再加上沙茶也別有一番風味

✅主餐：西班牙伊比利黑豚戰斧
雖然說是戰斧 但沒有浮誇的大塊骨頭
都是已經切好的嫩嫩的肉

✅甜點：新町焦糖布蕾
脆脆的餅乾 加上濃郁的布蕾 就是美味

✅茶：唐寧蜜桃茶
完全不會有苦澀的味道 喝起來很順又溫暖

結論是沒能符合期待，不會再去。

《早餐》
熱菜裡的魚有點腥味口感也稍硬、雞肉也不好吃。
看menu點的主菜跟各式蛋品，就普通⋯
而且不懂，怎麼點了一陣子才送來的餐點，主餐跟蛋都不能熱呼呼咧？不熱也沒關係，但是也要好吃嘛。

《溫泉》
偏普通，尤其SPA池很吵，馬達聲、水波聲已經很大，加上聊天的阿姨們，整間回音很大，躺在旁邊的躺椅上很受干擾。去洗一次150元的大眾池期待就不會這麼高了。

一泊二食專案的晚餐
唉 小小一杯康普茶 還不給續
麵包只有長棍可以續 另一種不行
主餐只有午仔魚 其他的還要加購升等
升等完就算了 壽星可以85折也沒講
服務那麼爛還多收服務費
鴨胸根本嚼不爛 像口香糖
生蠔味道好可怕 不是很新鮮
燉飯…你這份量是給人吃剩的啊？
上主餐前才會添水 要渴死誰
當天超級空 加我們只有兩桌需要服務
到底在幹麻
一直在教新員工要做什麼做什麼 很大聲欸
當我們不存在？
東西沒多好吃 服務也不周到
說好的生日特調  調去哪了
真搞笑

reviews_detailed.author: Grace L
reviews_detailed.text: we ordered their set dinner.  the service was top 5 star hotel services. they explained their food well, and was attentive to customer's needs.  though it was a bit strange that this restaurant is located on ground floor which lacked a bit of privacy.  the food was nice, but only a few dishes were memorable.  can pass on the "free" french dessert.  the dessert that was included in all sets was alright. i wished they made their own ice cream.  their main course was their highlight!

reviews_detailed.author: Xiao Mi Tee
reviews_detailed.text:
I came here for dinner alone. The decor is lovely. I had the lamb chops, which included several other courses.

The very attentive and courteous wait staff change the utensils every course, but, being OCD, I didn't want to give up the ones I had already disinfected.

Everything was interesting and yummy. I wanted the lamb chops medium-well (do not judge! Remember I have OCD), but I think the chef decided medium was a better way to enjoy the meat - still yummy.

It wasn't cheap, but it was worth the price.

reviews_detailed.author: Don Dizzlington
reviews_detailed.text: More attention paid to the look of food than the taste, sadly, as I was looking forward to this meal. Large wait between the pre-prepared entrees and pre-prepared main, which was cold when served in an empty restaurant. Fish and beef are unseasoned to my western palate and very very small portions, nothing I would return for. Finally the mushroom soup tasted canned or made from porcini powder. Would avoid, at least for lunch.

reviews_detailed.author: AT
reviews_detailed.text: Food was good and passable. Staff was amazingly nice and helpful.

reviews_detailed.author: Zichi 靜月梓（Archie）
reviews_detailed.text: Highly recommended for breakfast and hot springs

name: 少帥禪園-台北北投張學良幽禁舊居
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區幽雅路34號
reviews:
餐飲讓人印象深刻。每一道菜品都像藝術品般精緻，如照片中呈現的烤玉米筍搭配特製沾醬，保留了鮮嫩的原始甜味；還有層次分明的南瓜盅與精緻的鮮蝦料理。廚師運用了大量的花卉與自然元素，讓餐盤呈現如詩如畫的意境，完美呼應了窗外的山林景緻。

獨立堂屋（小六茶鋪與故居展覽區）
園區內的木造堂屋保存相當完好。走進室內，除了可以參觀張學良將軍的生平史料、書房與照片，感受那段「西安事變」後的沉靜時光。堂屋的建築風格充滿和式韻味，無論是廊道還是轉角，都是絕佳的攝影點。

溫泉泡腳池（長壽湯）
強烈推薦在用餐前後，到園區內的**「足湯」區**放鬆。這裡的溫泉水質透明帶點乳白，也就是著名的北投白磺泉。一邊泡腳，一邊眺望遠方的觀音山與關渡平原，尤其在夕陽西下時，景色極其迷人，疲勞瞬間全消。

庭園景觀與療癒角落
園區內處處可見禪意巧思，從各種吉祥寓意的雕塑（如照片中的可愛青蛙、招福鼠擺飾）到盛開的小花，讓人感受到主人對生活細節的熱愛。

少帥禪園不只是一個吃飯的地方，更是一個可以慢下來、感受歷史重量與大自然呼吸的療癒空間。雖然價位較高，但結合了歷史參觀、溫泉泡腳、山景視野以及高品質餐點，非常適合紀念日慶祝或款待重要的外國友人。
4.2🌟餐點部份相當有水準！有點類似食養山房那種養生半懷石料理，當歸雞湯甘甜好喝而且香氣濃郁卻不膩口，尤其鮭魚除了有特殊香氣，馬鈴薯泥更是令人驚艷～可惜最後糖醋肋排肉質不夠細緻軟嫩，藜麥飯也偏硬且貌合神離⋯古蹟很有味道也維護得不錯，環境超級清幽，但太多太多太多西式的擺設在風格上感覺很抵觸。

去雙喜湯屋泡湯後，接著享用下午茶(買的是下午茶套餐)！用餐環境很舒服，窗外即是庭院造景，遠方可鳥瞰北投區景色！

下午茶的茶點沒有特別驚艷的地方，中規中矩！

reviews_detailed.author: Lorna Tan
reviews_detailed.text:
Love the ambience, architecture n the cute landscape figurines! Omakase lunch was delicious especially the herbal duck soup.
Consider upgrading the service staff uniform to be more aligned with the premium pricing n elegant atmosphere.
Can improve on the range of toiletries in the spa rooms eg hair conditioner, facial cleanser, etc. Will recommend to friends!

reviews_detailed.author: Elizabeth Shieh
reviews_detailed.text:
For an afternoon tea set, you also get a free ticket for footbath.
The minimum price per person is 500 NTD. For 6 person, a two two-person Afternoon tea set are enough.
Afternoon tea set is very thoughtful and delicious 😋
The water for the footbath is quite hot, the sunset is gorgeous 😍

reviews_detailed.author: Reynald Ong
reviews_detailed.text:
Marshall Zen Garden is a historic site that now houses a tea house, a hot spring spa, and a restaurant. It's unique location provides an excellent sunset view over Taipei. It is quiet and serene and has a hot spring foot pool for those that don't need the full body submersion.

The dinner served are all health conscious without sacrificing taste. It is a hidden gem that anyone in the area should visit!

reviews_detailed.author: Joyce Lim
reviews_detailed.text: Quite an experience, the hot springs water is really hot and sulphuric. There are insects in the water but just small ants that don't bother much. Room is quite dated, looks like 1970s, but clean enough. Window panes were dirty, don't get good view of scenery. Halfway through our 90mins soak there was some noise from construction outside. Also heard some loud conversation from next door. We were the only ones at high tea, which was a mix of savoury and sweet pastries and fruits. Pretty good, enjoyed the food and the drinks. Not the most value for money, but was a good relaxing experience. Come here if you relish privacy and would like to spend some alone time with a romantic partner.

reviews_detailed.author: Sylvia HL
reviews_detailed.text: Workers at dinner site are too lazy and has no customer oriented service by not accepting us into lunch.  We arrived at the place around 1pm for lunch, but the service people won’t allow us to go for lunch instead of having us go for afternoon tea, which there’s not much to fill my hungry and the food is ordinary.  I just want to say workers are too lazy to work and serve.  All they care is to ensure they can finish job by 2:30pm, their break .  There ‘s no service attitude with customer oriented mindset! We are arriving right on time but was told However, I have to give credit to the owner who decorated this place which giving the place a vibe of relaxing and touch of female charm ! But, remind the owner to retrain your staff with manor of rejecting customers!

name: 谷炭燒肉
formatted_address: 11282台灣臺北市北投區裕民六路114巷22號
reviews:
先說結論是推薦 不過如果是想吃飽的話就不推
整體我願意給四星 但單純以飽度來說是2星
以下說明給四星的原因

首先整家店是單點無套餐的消費模式，在這個前提下，就大概知道價格不會太便宜，所以我吃完並沒有覺得有什麼不合適。
員工走一個親友路線，他是把你當朋友，不是客人，所以如果你是想要非常規矩的服務的，這裡不適合你，但如果你是個喜歡互動的E人，這裡超適合你。

今天是來幫朋友慶生，剛好我中午來的時候只有我們兩個，所以我們做吧檯，我個人是非常喜歡吧檯的位置，因為我個人很喜歡看料理的方式！

來說說食物，今天基本上算是店員推薦給我們的菜單，首先有四種和牛，分別是肋條、五花、牛小排跟一個我忘了什麼😂
價格1400左右 但每一份肉大概是4-5塊左右，牛小排切完有8塊，老實說肉量確實算偏少，但全程代客燒烤的情況下，我覺得價格合理。
肉的部分每一份都有調味過了，個人建議是不需要沾醬，但如果你口味重，加了絕對還是有加分。至於肉本身個人是覺得中規中矩，好吃，但就是沒有驚艷。

再來是松阪豬（這才是第一道）因為我不吃豬，所以不評論，但友人說很好吃，大概是6片。

接著是滿貼心的蔬菜，有很多節瓜、山藥、香菇及杏鮑菇，貼心的部分就是，他並不會一次全部烤給你，他分成好幾次，交叉在不同的肉之間，除了調整口味外，也會讓你有一種吃到很多菜的錯覺，這個我超加分。

再來是薄切牛舌，我印象是4片300上下？也是好吃但沒有驚艷。

吃到這邊我其實已經知道一定不會太飽，所以立馬加點了牛五花跟鹽味雞肉，結果這兩個完全MVP，因為這兩份肉品相對其他的，大一點也厚一點，老實說吃起來爽度更勝和牛四吃，建議點一下。

剩下其實都小東西，沒有特別想說的，會給四星，主要是全程代烤，可以跟朋友聊的開心，吃到的食物熟度也是烤的很剛好，如果沒有這個服務的話，我應該就是給個3星或低一點，這餐價格約是3200，飽度50%，所以如果是想要吃到很飽的這家不適合你，但如果你需要跟朋友好好聊天，或是你是一個人來，我覺得非常適合你！

我特別喜歡這裡的生蠔🦪 好幸福 真的是回到京都吃生蠔的感覺！又鮮又大又肥美！認真超推 ！居然在台灣也能吃到這種等級的 絕對榮登我的生蠔前三！

我男友長期住葡萄牙，他說這是他在葡萄牙&台灣吃過最好吃的第一名牛肉（我們點生牛肉跟三種和牛組合）！他最愛生牛肉，這家是他的第一名。
伊比利亞豬肉他也超愛！開始一直滔滔不絕跟我講豬肉故事(^_^)v
感謝老闆烤的這麼恰到好處！真喜歡這樣現場烤現吃❤️太幸福了！想去日本吃生蠔跟和牛烤肉的，還不快點去！😎

對了 忘記說 他也很愛這家的黑啤酒🍻 開心的還跟老闆碰杯🍻🤣
店員服務很親切，坐在吧台有師父師傅幫忙烤唷！非常專業，牛肉品質也非常棒，很好吃！！

reviews_detailed.author: Jonathan Chia
reviews_detailed.text: AMAZING food quality and service. This is not your regular Yakiniku - the passion of the staff and owners permeates into every bite. Highly recommended!!

reviews_detailed.author: Mário Fernandes
reviews_detailed.text: Amazing restaurant, the staff was so nice and food amazing, hopping como back soon

reviews_detailed.author: AnJu Lin
reviews_detailed.text: Visited the place for late dinner (8pm) with family and friend of total 4 people.  Really a wonderful experience!  First, really great to have this decent BBQ place at this area; we do not need to go to downtown Taipei.  Then, the food is really nice!  I do not eat beef but pork, chicken and duck are really tasty.  The service is also part of my enjoyable experience.  The people are friendly and having fun with customers.  You could often hear the laugh and talks between owner/employees and customers.  They also helped on grilling the meat or taught how to grill to the better taste.   Last, the place is not wide and can only accommodate said 3-4 tables plus 10+ bar seats.  I assume advanced reservation might be needed during weekend.  A great place and my family and I are expecting to visit again.

reviews_detailed.author: Maxime Michel
reviews_detailed.text:
Nice food but very expensive...
4500 NTD for 3 of us (1 kid). The food is good but not great, then it's overpriced.

reviews_detailed.author: Kindred Spirit
reviews_detailed.text: Great staff, awesome food and good drinks selection. They were all really attentive - helped to cook the whole meal and were so friendly to our group (especially my god daughter!).

name: 北投奇岩一號
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區奇岩路1號
reviews:
有五百盤的餐廳，可惜很多招牌菜要很多人才能吃。但整體上還是相當有水準的，左宗棠雞、清蒸鱸魚、乾癟四季豆配餅皮，都很棒

也有提供兩人位置很貼心，不是只有圓桌。

餐點非常好吃💕服務人員也都好親切
當時媽媽原本想再點一道麵，服務人員貼心提醒我們四人可能會太多～結果後來真的吃得很飽，慶幸聽了建議未加點那道，也非常感謝服務人員的用心！
餐點的部分：
豬肝很清爽、辣皮蛋窩窩頭很開胃、老皮嫩肉軟嫩的恰到好處、炒飯粒粒分明不油膩、四季豆配餅皮很有飽足感、酸菜牛媽媽很喜歡、豆酥魚細緻入口即化，每道菜都各有特色，整體口味水準都很高，吃得滿足又愉快🫶🏻
下次去想吃稻香牛～🤎

服務人員態度非常親切、餐點細緻、環境好
還有一些500盤餐點、麻油雞飯⋯等
下回人多再來吃⋯溫泉季買券1000可消費1200⋯旅展好像到11/16、11/17的樣子

reviews_detailed.author: Sébastien Bohérout
reviews_detailed.text: Great expérience here. Food is really good. View on the famous library make this special. Tina and Made were so kind and made your lunch very enjoyable. Great service. Thanks for their smile and kindness.

reviews_detailed.author: Ed Chi
reviews_detailed.text:
Wonderful food. We had the betel nut salad, chiyan small fry, seafood clay pot, minced pork Chinese buns. Each dish is well prepared and tasty. The small fry and seafood clay pot is particularly memorable.

Alex, and Tina provided wonderful and attentive service. Nicely done!

reviews_detailed.author: Vanessa Chia
reviews_detailed.text:
During our stay at The Gaia Hotel, we dropped by this restaurant that serves Sichuan and Hunan cuisine.

For starters, we were recommended a salad that was very unique. Once the Areca Flower Salad with Sesame Sauce (NT$380/ S$17.30) is served, the server will the toss the salad and portion it for you.

I was a huge fan of the Sautéed Green Beans with Minced Pork (NT$360/ S$16.40) here. It came with thick burrito skins for you to wrap the vegetable and pork in.

The next most impressive dish was the Chef Short Rib Specialty (NT$1780/ S$80.90). This huge rib would be served to you table side, which the chef hand wraps every day with straw (dao cao). You could smell the straw and when the server cut it open, steam would rise from the rib. We saw him effortlessly separate the beef from the bone, then chopping it and plating it with a side of the sauce it was marinated it or salt.

I can't not have desserts at the end of my meal but instead of having the usual cold type of dessert, we chose to have the Deep Fried Handmade Steamed Roll (NT$250/ S$11.40). It is basically a bigger and longer version of mantou. They also sprinkled fragrant shaved peanuts on top, and served it with a side of sweet condensed milk. So comforting!

reviews_detailed.author: Alan Chen
reviews_detailed.text:
Very nice Shichun food and some local Taiwanese dishes. They have another branch  restaurant in Dazhi( at Marriot ).
2/14/2024...We visited the restaurant again during Lunar New Year. Same good service and tasty food!

reviews_detailed.author: Daniel Wang
reviews_detailed.text: Inside the hotel Taste quite good and service is good too. The only issue is a little far away from subway and last mile arrangement can be defined better even they already got shuttle bus Good place for gathering

name: 泉源閣 Bando Club
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區泉源路19號北投晶泉丰旅3樓
reviews:
北投「泉源閣」餐廳，空氣中滲透著一種日式清雅的靜謐，為了避開過年的出國潮，我們提前在那裡聚餐，地下停車場寬闊得讓人想起某種無人的儀式感，重新整修後的空間，像是一本裝幀考究的新書，每一處裝飾都散發著恰到好處的矜持。

入座後，服務生如春風拂面般的親切，引導我們進入這場總舖師烤鴨六吃的序幕，桌上的器皿，別緻且帶有分量的質感，每人面前擺放著兩副筷子—公筷與私筷。那是一種體貼，在這個空間裡，每個人都能優雅地處理與食物的距離。

餐桌的一端，我弟正逗弄著我的孩子，而他的小女兒卻像一隻迷路的小貓，偏偏喜歡窩在我身邊，在那些細碎的家族交談與笑聲中，菜餚一道道上桌，冷盤的份量帶有一種日式的節制，不以數量取勝，但那份新鮮及口感卻是極其紮實的。

接著，主角登場了，那隻烤得金黃燦亮的鴨子，在廚師如「庖丁解牛」般從容的刀工下，被精準地拆解。第一道烤鴨握壽司入口的瞬間，我感受到一種絕對的說服力，任何形容詞在這種平衡感面前都顯得冗餘，蔥薑爆小卷上桌時，服務人員特別叮嚀要趁熱，那種海洋的野性與柔嫩口感交織在一起，加上獨特的醬汁，完美得無可挑剔，兒子斗膽對他母親說：「比媽炒的還好吃。」那一刻，空氣中漂浮著一種帶著危險信號的幽默感。

結尾是那桶手工豆花，黑糖、薑汁、珍珠與花生，在溫潤的甜味中，我們完成了味蕾的團圓。這餐飯後，我們將驅車前往陽明山祭祖，在泉源閣的優雅與先人的寂靜之間，我感受到了一種時間的連貫性。這是一個完美的、不容置疑的一天。

北投晶泉丰旅-泉源閣♨️🍴🌟
晶華集團旗下餐廳果然非同凡響，烤鴨外酥內嫩，肉質非常鮮美多汁。人員訓練有素且態度親切！特別感謝Bella & Jaimei 當天的桌邊服務，讓我們度過一個美好的壽宴❤️

第一次到泉源閣幫家人慶生，
飯店內的空間很舒適，讓家人的心情很放鬆愉悅
期間幫我們服務的 Bella及宜君 及 片鴨的師傅，在服務中，展現出了他們的專業與熱忱，給我們很棒的👍用餐體驗。
這裡建議來用餐的饕客們，對菜單上的品項有不清楚的地方，可以打個電話，詢問一下，Bella能給您適當的建議與回饋；不過泉源閣的電話不好接通就是了🤣，我最喜歡的品項是花膠佛跳牆，加點的烤鴨（是美鴨）的肉質也很軟嫩，桌菜的每道菜完整呈現台菜美味，份量很大份保證吃得飽。推薦大家來泉源閣用餐。

reviews_detailed.author: Jeff Koo
reviews_detailed.text: Excellent food and excellent service from Oscar. Thank you for your service!

reviews_detailed.author: Diana Lee
reviews_detailed.text: Bella’s service is excellent. We had great time here

reviews_detailed.author: RX- 0
reviews_detailed.text: Nice food and great atmosphere here. Our waitress Helen is also really attentive to the guests’ needs.

reviews_detailed.author: Barsik Liu
reviews_detailed.text: Good job! Andy and Vivian.

reviews_detailed.author: 雙胞胎
reviews_detailed.text:
The "Quanyuan Pavilion" restaurant in Beitou exudes a tranquil, Japanese elegance. To avoid the Lunar New Year travel rush, we had our meal there beforehand. The spacious underground parking lot evoked a sense of quiet solitude. The newly renovated space resembled a meticulously bound new book, every decoration radiating a perfectly restrained elegance.

Upon being seated, the waiters, with their warm hospitality, guided us into the six-course Peking duck feast. The tableware was exquisite and substantial, with two sets of chopsticks—one for the family and one for the guests. It was a thoughtful touch; in this space, everyone could gracefully maintain their distance from the food.

At one end of the table, my brother was playing with my child, while his little daughter, like a lost kitten, nestled close to me. Amidst the soft chatter and laughter of family conversation, the dishes were served one by one. The cold appetizers were served with a Japanese restraint, not for quantity, but for their exceptional freshness and rich flavor.

Then, the star of the show arrived: a golden-brown roasted duck, expertly dissected by the chef with the effortless skill of a master butcher. The moment I tasted the first bite of the roasted duck nigiri sushi, I felt an absolute conviction; any adjective seemed superfluous in the face of such balance. When the stir-fried baby rolls with scallions and ginger arrived, the server specifically urged me to eat them hot. The wildness of the sea intertwined with their tenderness, complemented by the unique sauce—perfect beyond reproach. My son boldly told his mother, "It's even better than Mom's!" At that moment, a subtle, almost dangerous humor hung in the air.

The meal concluded with a bucket of handmade tofu pudding—brown sugar, ginger juice, tapioca pearls, and peanuts. In its warm sweetness, our taste buds achieved a harmonious reunion. After this meal, we would drive to Yangmingshan to pay respects to our ancestors. Between the elegance of the Quanyuan Pavilion and the tranquility of the forefathers, I felt a sense of continuity in time. It was a perfect, undeniable day.

name: 北投文物館-怡然居餐廳
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區幽雅路32號
reviews:
座落於北投靜謐山腰的日式建築，
占地約八百坪環境清幽雅緻，
前身為1921年的佳山溫泉旅館，
於1984 年轉型為私人博物館，
承載著北投溫泉文化的記憶。

1998年更被台北市政府指定為市定古蹟，
展現其獨特的歷史價值，
建築於2008年完成全面整修，
保留原有木造與日式韻味的基礎上，
融入新的生命力。

如今館內結合精緻懷石料理(採預約制)，
與多元藝術展覽和文化活動，
讓人在自然與人文交織的空間裡，
感受歷史、藝術與美食所交織的魅力。

環境清幽，在幾乎客滿的情況下仍能保持安靜，用餐品質還不錯

但菜色稍嫌簡單且份量較少，餐廳本身沒有停車位，假日人多時需停到距離餐廳較遠的大馬路上，影響CP值⋯
在北投博物館裡的怡然居用餐是一種很愉快的體驗。懷石料理精緻細膩，份量恰到好處，氛圍安靜放鬆，讓人能專心感受食物與環境的美好。服務人員親切細心，讓整體用餐過程更添舒心。是一個值得再訪的地方。

reviews_detailed.author: Joyce Lim
reviews_detailed.text: Best meal of our trip in Taiwan so far. Every course was tantalising, ingredients were high quality, taste was sublime. Highlights were the first dish (black beans were incredibly sweet), third dish (interesting), fourth dish (prawn so fresh, pork so tender), sixth dish (finished last drop of the soup). Worth the price tag of ntd1430 after tax. Complimentary entry to the adjoined Beitou Museum if you have a reservation for a meal at Yiran house. If I had to suggest improvements, it would be to add some crabmeat to the chawanmushi (couldn't find any), and source for better quality fruits (watermelon was bland). Regardless, was a fantastic meal. Highly recommend.

reviews_detailed.author: Pauline
reviews_detailed.text: Lovely dining space in a well maintained Japanese house. The course meal was tasty and well priced at 1,300 NTD plus 10% service charge. An interesting exhibition on beads through the ages and across the world was on at the museum's gallery. The museum gift shop stocked an interesting array of well crafted items. There's no entrance fee but visitors have to remove their shoes & put on the socks provided prior to entering the museum.

reviews_detailed.author: Sihan Goi
reviews_detailed.text: Had lunch with my wife after visiting the Beitou museum. No regrets. Pretty much every dish was very well executed, in terms of taste, portion, and presentation. Especially loved the prawn which was very fresh and tasty. Service was prompt and professional, ambience was bright and airy. Would try this again if I come again.

reviews_detailed.author: Megan Lim
reviews_detailed.text:
Genuinely delicious meal in a Japanese style restaurant. The dishes were delicate and extremely fresh, served in multiple courses.

We did a walk in for lunch and were very lucky to be able to secure a spot. Price wise it can seem pricy for 1100 Twd per person, but it's worth every penny!

reviews_detailed.author: benny hu
reviews_detailed.text:
Nestled on a tranquil mountainside in Beitou, this Japanese-style building occupies approximately 800 pings (about 660 square meters) in a serene and elegant environment. Formerly the Jiashan Hot Spring Inn built in 1921, it was transformed into a private museum in 1984, carrying the memories of Beitou's hot spring culture.

Designated a municipal historic site by the Taipei City Government in 1998, showcasing its unique historical value, the building underwent a complete renovation in 2008. While preserving its original wooden structure and Japanese charm, it was infused with new vitality.

Today, the museum combines exquisite kaiseki cuisine (by reservation only) with diverse art exhibitions and cultural activities, allowing visitors to experience the charm of history, art, and gastronomy interwoven in a space where nature and culture intertwine.

name: 北投飢廠
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區中央北路三段17-1號
reviews:
店家使用的造型燈上堆滿灰塵。
有人反映等餐時間過長，我們 7:30 進餐廳，看大家都快吃飽了，我們也等了很久。詢問與提醒店家了2~3次(請問我們的餐作好了嗎?)，初次詢問表示在做了，之後有點不耐煩的回答......。義大利麵等了約 10 分鐘，還能理解，但小火鍋竟然等了將近 20 分鐘才上桌，是在現場「熬湯」嗎?
清炒鮮菇義大利麵 180 元。
韓式泡菜鍋 320 元，味道一般，有豬肉片，但大部分是火鍋料（魚板、螃蟹棒，都是澱粉製品），只附一碗白飯，就這樣。
唯一的優點是地點方便，離捷運復興崗站很近，出口右前方即可到達。

20260204這家餐廳就在捷運站對面，還滿方便的，室內空間寬闊，還算舒適，雖然有評論抱怨吊燈有灰塵，但我個人不在意這點，灰塵到處都有，感覺不影響用餐就好。
我點蝦仁炒飯100元，還不錯吃，份量符合價格。
孩子們各點一份180元的義大利肉醬麵+紅茶50元、果汁50元，他們也說好吃。
下次有機會再來了。

出復興崗站右前方就是😜😜害我繞一圈？
店裏只有主廚獨撐大局，所幸動作敏捷，不用等太久❤️❤️❤️
⭐⭐點美式活力早餐：塔塔醬酥炸魚條❣️❣️把飲料換濃湯❣️只加保20元👍👍
濃湯非常好喝！很棒！
不知還不能加價購😋
魚柳現炸💓💓別提多多美味！害我幻想是不是主廚一人在家無聊？開個小店打發時間？🤣
很少吃早餐？因為起不早🤫🤫為了這個餐食，我想練習早起🫣
其實座享咖啡應可以？可惜我不耐久座？吃飽就想走人🤣🤣🤣🤣

reviews_detailed.author: Tony Liou (TL)
reviews_detailed.text: It took thirty minutes to make fried rice with shrimp, and didn't tell us in the first place. While we asked about the estimated time, she just told us have some patience

reviews_detailed.author: William Chen
reviews_detailed.text: Fried rice is great !! Not oily nor salty

reviews_detailed.author: Shine Sheu
reviews_detailed.text:
The decorative lights used by the restaurant were covered in dust.

Some people complained about the long wait times. We entered the restaurant at 7:30 PM, and everyone else seemed to be almost full, but we still waited a long time. We asked and reminded the staff 2-3 times ("Is our food ready?"), and the staff initially said it was being prepared, but later gave somewhat impatient replies... The pasta took about 10 minutes, which was understandable, but the mini hot pot took almost 20 minutes to arrive. Were they "cooking the broth" on the spot? The stir-fried mushroom pasta cost NT$180.

The Korean kimchi hot pot cost NT$320. The taste was average; it had pork slices, but most of the ingredients were hot pot ingredients (fish cakes, crab sticks, all starchy products), and it only came with a bowl of white rice. That was it.

The only advantage is the convenient location; it's very close to the Fuxinggang MRT station, just to the right of the exit.

reviews_detailed.author: Vaster (光點嚮導•等級12)
reviews_detailed.text:
This restaurant is conveniently located opposite the MRT station. The interior is spacious and fairly comfortable. Although some reviews complained about dust on the chandeliers, I personally didn't mind; dust is everywhere, and it doesn't seem to affect the dining experience.

I ordered the shrimp fried rice for NT$100, which was quite good, and the portion size was reasonable for the price.

The kids each ordered a NT$180 Italian meat sauce pasta dish with NT$50 black tea and NT$50 juice, and they also said it was delicious.

I'll definitely come again next time.

reviews_detailed.author: 陳月鶯
reviews_detailed.text:
出復興崗站右前方就是😜😜害我繞一圈？
店裏只有主廚獨撐大局，所幸動作敏捷，不用等太久❤️❤️❤️
⭐⭐點美式活力早餐：塔塔醬酥炸魚條❣️❣️把飲料換濃湯❣️只加保20元👍👍
濃湯非常好喝！很棒！
不知還不能加價購😋
魚柳現炸💓💓別提多多美味！害我幻想是不是主廚一人在家無聊？開個小店打發時間？🤣
很少吃早餐？因為起不早🤫🤫為了這個餐食，我想練習早起🫣
其實座享咖啡應可以？可惜我不耐久座？吃飽就想走人🤣🤣🤣🤣

name: 漁當家食堂-請洽臉書IG預約
formatted_address: 112台灣台北市北投区裕民四路13號1樓
reviews: 位在石牌捷運站附近的OMAKASE，食材新鮮，擺盤精緻，每道料理都很用心製作，非常美味，老闆會依照客人的需求調整餐點內容，餐後的冰淇淋是店家自製的，口味很特別，非常好吃

令人印象深刻的無菜單料理。看google評價上的照片每次都不一樣，表示每天都是採購新鮮漁貨，看食材料理。這也是師父的經驗技術證明呢。
但其實最讓我驚艷的反而是熟食哈哈哈，烤功一流🥰

大約能容納12人的坐位
師傅選擇當季食材設計料理
有人不吃生食也很細心的設計熟食菜單
茶水自取不收服務費
值得回訪

reviews_detailed.author: Glen Ni
reviews_detailed.text: We came to Yu Dang Jia Restaurant for lunch after a morning soak in one of Beitou’s hot spring. They require advance reservations with a deposit which can be done via Facebook or Instagram and paid via PayPal. The restaurant is small with an L shaped counter. We communicated with the chef using Google translate and our limited Chinese. Tea is self serve and they have a selection of beer and wine though we did not ask for the list. The meal was about US$50 (TWD$1500) per person and comprised twelve courses. The dishes were beautifully presented. The quality of the seafood was superb. I thought it was just the right amount of food but others in my party were stuffed. My comments on the dishes are in the pictures I uploaded. My favorite was the tuna collar steak. I highly recommend this restaurant and it is an excellent cap to an onsen experience in Beitou.

reviews_detailed.author: jamie luo
reviews_detailed.text: I think the restaurant should get an amazing review because they are really kind and gave me free uni(sea urchin) sashimi with salmon roe .I had a kids menu there. They were very considerate to us and are really friendly people so you should go there 👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻. The food there is delicious and the food is a daily catch🎣 I give this restaurant 5 stars⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️!

reviews_detailed.author: Brian Wan
reviews_detailed.text:
For a long time I haven't been such a unique place with high CP ratio.
Highly recommend and make sure you need to book in advance and just told him how much you want to spend.

reviews_detailed.author: Zooin
reviews_detailed.text: Located near Shipai MRT station, OMAKASE uses fresh ingredients and is beautifully presented. Each dish is carefully prepared and very delicious. The owner will adjust the menu according to the customers' requests. The ice cream after the meal is homemade and has a unique and delicious flavor.

name: 陶板屋 新北投光明店
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區光明路217號2F
reviews:
這家日式洋食真的讓人驚艷。每一道菜都非常入味，而且都有不同的驚喜，吃完整套會覺得層次豐富、用心十足。

鴨肉料理特別出色，肉質鮮嫩多汁，熟度掌握得剛剛好。炊飯一開始看起來有點平淡，甚至有些 anti-climactic，但越吃越能嚐到淡淡的燒烤香氣，後勁十足，反而成為讓人回味的一道。

主餐前還貼心地提供番茄汁解膩，清爽開胃。服務更是加分，有著高級餐廳般細緻的講解與介紹，完全不像一般連鎖店的制式服務。

最驚喜的是，兩人七道式套餐只要1800台幣，真的超划算，CP值極高。下次一定會再訪。

This Japanized Western restaurant truly impressed me. Every dish was deeply flavorful, and each course brought a different surprise, making the entire meal feel thoughtfully curated and well-balanced.

The duck was exceptionally tender and cooked to perfection. The rice pot initially felt a little anti-climactic, but as I continued eating, a subtle smoky, grilled aroma gradually emerged, leaving a lingering and satisfying finish.

Before the main course, we were served tomato juice to cleanse the palate — a thoughtful and refreshing touch. The service was equally impressive, with detailed explanations like those in a fine-dining restaurant. It certainly didn’t feel like a typical chain outlet.

Best of all, the seven-course meal for two was only TWD 1,800 — incredibly worth it for the quality and experience. Definitely a place I would revisit.

交通方便，不限時的話還滿適合聚餐聊天的。
餐點的部分沒有什麼亮點，菜單設計或烹調、擺盤都沒有特別吸引人之處；服務人員會不斷來詢問餐點還ok嗎，實在也說不出哪裡不好，雖然沒有不好吃，也沒什麼特別不滿意，但是就覺得很多小地方都差一點點（例如雞肉沙拉的雞肉偏乾有點硬，鴨胸筋略多等），吃完沒有滿足的感覺。

新北投捷運站旁就有停車場
出口銜接七星公園 有電梯🛗
走到陶板屋很方便

店員服務周到親切
改裝後第一次來
整體環境設計感鮮明
與鄰座較為靠近

餐點都滿喜歡的
前菜有味增調味獨特
日式炊飯小孩也喜歡

鹽岩玄米奶茶滿甜的

reviews_detailed.author: Ox And Beyond
reviews_detailed.text:
chicken in the salad was very dry. played 1 single song, jingle bells, in repeating loop, for our entire meal.

food was decent.

reviews_detailed.author: Samantha Lin
reviews_detailed.text: 7 courses that you get to customize! When you start your entree, they bring in a vinegar slushie that helps you digest so you can eat more. My family and friends always start getting full by entree and the slushie helps a bit. The servers are so nice and patient and are always around so you can ask for refills or a change in the future courses. The fish was a bit dry and we know this because we got two tender and juicy fish but one was a bit over done, but once we mentioned how it was a bit dry they swapped our fish and gave us a new plate with everything minus the other piece of meat that was originally on it. I would definitely come back and try their other options in the meal course! They also held our luggage for us at the front but dont forget to pick it up!

reviews_detailed.author: Cao Sang Phan (SangPhan94)
reviews_detailed.text:
The menu could have provided more options for seafood and beef-allergic for the ones just like me. The food is more salty than i expected. However, the taste gives me a good satisfaction.
The service, the staffs and the atmosphere are brilliant, make me comfortable and delightful.

reviews_detailed.author: Dartii K
reviews_detailed.text: The food was delightful, even if the service was slightly quick, our waitress Ping Zhen set impeccable standards and made the experience even more enjoyable. I would highly recommend this place as their set meals are well thought out and executed.

reviews_detailed.author: Tabby Lei
reviews_detailed.text: Highly recommend the duck breast as main course of the 7 course meal. We are more than satisfied with the food. Service is decent considering how busy it was. We never felt rushed or crammed even though all the tables were full.

name: 蓬萊台菜餐廳
formatted_address: 11252台灣臺北市北投區中和街238號1F
reviews:
去北投玩跟飯店接駁司機說要吃蓬萊，被司機稱讚有做功課😆

-排骨酥嚐鮮即可，秤斤計價且骨多肉少，好吃但沒有到必點的程度；
⭐️ 水蓮炒銀芽炒功不錯，清脆鮮甜；
⭐️ 軟玉豆腐特別驚艷！搭配沾醬很好吃，內裡包的紫蘇葉無論香氣或口感都提升了這道料理的層次；
-三杯杏鮑菇沒有入味；
-明太子鴨肉捲是冷盤，鴨肉很硬，明太子醬吃起來很甜很噁心，唯一一道吃不完的菜色；
-鳳梨蝦球的鳳梨跟蝦球是好吃的，但擠了很多美乃滋跟巧克力米，味道變超怪（要把美乃滋撥開再吃才好吃）；
⭐️ 豬肝切得很厚實，有幾片口感偏軟、幾片偏硬，但整體來說是好吃的。

五人點七道（+3碗白飯）非常飽（本來還有點蚵仔酥但幸好單子沒寫到😅），5-6道應該比較剛好；服務人員都滿親切，座位也很舒適，適合帶長輩聚餐。

排骨好吃😋
豬肝份量超大～配上洋蔥超解膩好吃
炒地瓜葉牙齒友善，很清爽～
芋頭條跟杏仁可以單點一條超優秀👏🏻

蓬萊台菜餐廳果然名不虛傳，每一道菜都能感受到老店累積多年的功夫與穩定品質。這次用餐點了多道招牌料理，整體表現都相當令人滿意。

最讓人印象深刻的是 蓬萊排骨酥，雖然是帶骨排骨，但肉質卻非常軟嫩，使用店家特製醬料醃製後再下鍋油炸，外皮呈現金黃色澤，吃起來油甘酥脆又多汁，香氣十足，真的是必點招牌菜。

佛跳牆 湯頭溫潤順口，配料相當豐富，有筍乾、豬肚、魚皮、排骨酥、鳥蛋、香菇與芋頭，每一樣食材都吸滿湯汁，吃得出用心。

軟玉豆腐 也很有特色，豆腐中包著香菜與火腿片，一起裹粉炸成一包，搭配沾醬後層次感十足，口感特別又好吃。

另外 蓬萊芋頭條 外皮酥脆、內裡芋頭香軟綿密，搭配鹹蛋黃鹹甜交織，非常推薦；鹹蛋杏鮑菇 調味適中不死鹹；地瓜葉 份量大又嫩；鮭魚雞粒炒飯 表現中規中矩，但仍順順吃光。

整體來說，是一家經典又值得回訪的台菜老店。

reviews_detailed.author: Wai Tin KWOK
reviews_detailed.text:
Rather close to the New Beitou Station.  Waitress expects you to order your first dish right away, because it would be ready in minutes, and then you would have considerable time to choose your next dish.  We ordered five dishes in one go and we got five dishes on the table in five minutes.

Their signature Crispy Spare Ribs is a must-try.  The taro "fries" were in fact pieces of taro nuggets.  The Sugar Braised Pork Liver was something new to me in terms of flavour and texture.  The pumpkin rice vermicelli had minced pork in it but you can order a vegetarian version.

They had big round tables for 8-12 people only so they appeared to be reluctant to serve parties of two.  Adding the fact that dishes come in big portions bigger groups say six people may have better dining experience.

Cash only.

reviews_detailed.author: Dennis Weng
reviews_detailed.text: Traditional Taiwanese food, pretty decent.  All the old lady waitress were extremely helpful and nice.   The young lady who is the cashier and perhaps the owner were not too nice.   However, she was consistent.  I noticed she was rude to everyone.

reviews_detailed.author: Norman Ng
reviews_detailed.text:
Food - very authentic with a 70 year old history. Fresh and truly celebrates local ingredients.

Service - generally warm and hospitable.

Atmosphere - suitable for families and large groups. Bare bones restaurant atmosphere, simple and highly understated.

reviews_detailed.author: C Neon
reviews_detailed.text: This is one of the original Taiwanese style restaurants in Beitou.  It's not a fancy place, but the people there are friendly and professional.  The place is clean and bright.  The food is tasty and authentic to its roots.  You can get some dishes that are passed down from our grandparents days.  Dishes that reminded us are taro balls with duck egg yolk, Taiwanese style fried pork ribs, etc.   Overall, it's not only a place where we can get old style dishes, it also serves as a walk down memory lane.

reviews_detailed.author: Susan Kua
reviews_detailed.text: The signature dishes are really sumptuous. We had a fish roe fried rice, pork ribs and tofu. All are great. Sadly, the time we arrived, the chicken was already sold out. Worth to dine in!

name: 水龜伯古早味
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區石牌路二段75巷8號
reviews:
2026 年 2 月中旬某日，重回石牌的水龜伯古早味豆花。這裡可說是石牌夜市一帶的名店之一，但回頭想想也有些奇妙——先前在石牌住了十幾年，真正來訪的次數卻屈指可數。也許正因如此，這次再來，反而多了一點重新認識的心情。

店名是「古早味」，賣的東西是古早味，連整體空間與裝潢也都走同一條路線。店內擺放著不少老年代的物件：腳踏車、黑膠唱片、錄音帶收藏盒、老式電風扇等，一走進來就能感覺到店家刻意營造的懷舊氛圍，老味道十足，也難怪成了不少人心中「記憶中的豆花店」。

造訪當天，剛好接近過年前的最後一個上班日，人潮不少，門口排起了長隊。不過周轉率算快，實際等候大約十二分鐘便順利入座，流程算是流暢，沒有久候的不耐感。

這次點的是古早味豆花，配料選了三樣：粉粿、紅豆與花生；另外還有分開裝的芋頭，以及一份黑糖麻糬。豆花本身口感細緻，接近大家心目中對「古早味豆花」的想像：配料的風味濃郁、口感綿密，但整體甜度弄得剛好，不會太甜，不會膩口。粉粿的口感介於軟與彈之間，不會過黏、也不會刻意做得太 Q；紅豆與花生表現穩定，是熟悉、安心的味道。

至於另外分開點的芋頭與黑糖麻糬，表現就屬中規中矩，沒有特別驚豔，但也不至於失望，算是完成度正常、符合預期的甜點搭配。

水龜伯的「古早味」，我會形容為「接近古早味」，而不是完全重現。怎麼說呢？這些年來，曾在某些地方吃過真正兒時記憶中的「古早味」——那種一看到、一入口，彷彿搭上時光機的老做法甜品。只是老實說，那樣的口感與外觀往往「原始至極」，甚至稱不上好吃；如果現在的年輕人直接端上一碗，恐怕只會滿臉問號、甚至吐血。也正因如此，現在能被市場接受、又被稱為「古早味」的甜品，其實多半已經經過調整與修飾。

從這個角度來看，水龜伯選擇的是一條在懷舊與現代口感之間取得平衡的路線：保留記憶中的輪廓，但讓口感更圓融、更容易入口。或許少了一點真正「老派到極致」的衝擊感，卻換來多數人都能接受、也願意一再回訪的穩定表現。

整體而言，水龜伯古早味豆花是一家氣氛到位、味道穩定、適合帶著記憶來，也能安心推薦給現在的朋友的老字號甜品店。若剛好在石牌夜市一帶，想吃一碗不過甜、帶點懷舊氣息的豆花，這裡依然是個不會出錯又令人回味的好選擇。

2026/02

懷舊風格老店，價格便宜且量大。早上11:30營業，只收現金有開發票。

因為內用位置不多，建議先找位置再點餐，但翻桌率挺快的，用餐後要自行回收餐盤。

點了黑糖刨冰4種料(花生仙草湯圓Q圓），挺好吃的，份量也多，不是很餓的話中餐剛好也不用吃了🤣

就是不推薦加料加紅白湯圓，整個很硬，加珍珠或綜合芋圓都比湯圓好，芋頭要額外再加20-25元，地板跟桌子常常黏黏的。

整體而言3.5顆星，人多的話外帶也是一個不錯的選項。

只要經過一窺，永遠有排隊長龍，店內幾乎都保持滿座的狀態。
除了傳統口味且相當優質的冷、熱飲之外，價位在台北市、新北市是非常的「不合理」，實在是太佛心，在雙北地區那裡吃得到豆花加三款料的售價是45元？55元都算實惠了，更不要提前幾天在小鎮吃的60元僅加兩款配料的鄉下「名店」。
反正來這家店，再加宣傳也算不上錦上添花，就是要有排隊的心理準備，想不排隊，就經驗談，真有點困難。

reviews_detailed.author: 高先生
reviews_detailed.text:
We came here before and it was amazing. But this time we felt a
bit disappointed as we also lined up for like 30 minutes only to be served spoiled taro and 1 year old 油條. Nasty🤮 They did however have other special toppings that you can’t find anywhere else. Just hope they improve their food quality.

reviews_detailed.author: AL Chueh
reviews_detailed.text:
I normally stick to plain清冰（有傳統香蕉油味👍🏻）, but I decided to try the 雙仙鬧奶,today after seeing it on the DM. It comes with grass jelly and almond jelly as the base, plus taro balls, red beans, and condensed milk on top.

The unexpected twist was the 跳跳糖— I totally didn’t see that coming, but the mix turned out to be really fun and surprisingly tasty!

reviews_detailed.author: Emma Wangchen
reviews_detailed.text:
Unique banana flavored ice, great toppings, just really really good, inexpensive and big portion

Came here right after visiting a night market because I wanted to get red bean shaved ice for a while—
I got the banana flavored ice, which is an homage to a past in Taiwan where they had to use artificial banana flavoring to sweeten ice because sugar was so expensive
And it turned out really good! It’s like banana candy but not in an overly sweet way, it tastes unique and I highly recommend it especially if you’re wanting to try something special/particular in the shaved ice *genre*

The toppings were really good and so was their peanut mochi
It all looks really good and tastes really good, you can’t go wrong with any option

reviews_detailed.author: Anisah 思思
reviews_detailed.text:
One of the best desserts we had here in Taipei. Others are nothing compared with this.

The brown sugar mochi is so yummy.
I never liked almond pudding until i had it in one of their dessert mix - it was good!

There's always a long queue but they are very quick with their service , so the line loves quickly. Don't be put off by the queue. Perhaps a quick 5- 10 mins wait , check out their menu as you are moving , giving you time to decide.

Bon appetit

reviews_detailed.author: An Le
reviews_detailed.text: Sweet Uncle is a great spot for shaved ice in Taipei. We had the traditional shaved ice with four toppings, which was delicious. The tofu pudding shaved ice, a local classic, was also very good. The place is small but busy, popular with locals. Service was friendly and quick. Highly recommend!

name: 满来温泉拉麵 man-lai
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區中和街30號
reviews:
來北投吃過無數拉麵了，第一次遇到要服務費10%的拉麵店，真的很囂張喔
拉麵算好吃，叉燒也很大塊，麵體也非常q彈，但是到底為什麼要服務費，請問跟其他家的拉麵店服務有特別好在哪裡？？？倒不如說是變相的漲價
新店面，午餐時間來客量頗多，須排隊
但是我以後應該不會來了
最便宜的麵加上服務費就200以上了
因為是人氣餐廳真的是高朋滿座，蠻推薦他的握壽司真的很好吃！麻糬也是一絕，很特別，氣氛非常好，門口坐著候位可以拍拍照～

真心推薦
麵很好吃湯頭也不錯
尤其是招牌麻糬超級無敵好吃
還是熱熱的那種燒麻糬
納入口袋名單了
價格也不貴

reviews_detailed.author: YF
reviews_detailed.text:
Delicious springy ramen in bei tou. I love their fried mochi! They serve beer and sake.
They are open at 11.30am and make sure you are there early as the restraunt fills up within minutes. It's on a first come first serve basis.
If you manage to win a bell game, you get 50% off the fried tofu dish. Fun!
Service wise is efficient and ambience  wise, brings me back to 100 years ago in Japan. Overall a great experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Tris
reviews_detailed.text: Service from staff is excellent but is just I wanted to eat a bowl of nice ramen but not what I expected the ramen to be. Saw good comments n all decided to try but yup, not to me n my hus taste. We both felt sad after eating.

reviews_detailed.author: Nataku
reviews_detailed.text:
Food is good.
Egg was excellent.
Soup is only okay. It taste ok but dept of flavour was lacking to make it truly outstanding.

reviews_detailed.author: Totoro Stalla
reviews_detailed.text:
I recently visited this ramen noodles place after seeing a sign about a copycat location. The staff explained that this is the new spot since the old location was taken back by the landlord. They mentioned that the old place has a different vibe and the foods lack the original touch.

I tried a recommended dish, and while it was decent, it didn’t wow me. However, the crispy mochi was a delightful surprise with its unique texture.

If you order the fried tofu, there’s a fun challenge: slide a red tube from one end of a cable to the other with one swing, and you’ll get half price on the dish! This playful twist added to the experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Esther Khoo
reviews_detailed.text: the food was all really good and the people who worked there are all really nice and kind. there's a game to play to if you order the tofu which in my opinion is a must order when visiting. without expecting the most authentic Japanese ramen, the ramen is really good with a good variety of seafood and rich broth. the egg pairs with the ramen really well. the side were all really good as well and I highly recommend getting the mochi for dessert!!

name: 喜歡西餐廳(大地酒店)
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區奇岩路1號
reviews:
下午茶時間是14:30開始到17:00

今天預定的是雙人下午茶套餐，餐點內容是固定的，只需選擇飲品。

菜單內容大致如下，及不專業評論
咖央吐司：吃起來有點像冰火菠蘿包。
椰香雪花糕：有一層白巧克力，搭配藍莓，整體口味不會分散，也不會太甜。
脆球搭配羅惹沙拉：沙拉本身微辣，有酸豆，不喜歡的記得避開。
娘惹蝦米辣椒糯米糕：香氣很足，比沙拉再辣一點，以沙拉為基準的話，大概接近小辣，意外的好吃。
印尼牛文水：與客家牛汶水不同，不甜，香氣是有，但吃起來除了糯米外，其他味道有點帶不上來的樣子。
艷陽馬卡龍：馬卡龍對我來說還是太甜，不過中間夾的芒果不會太甜，味道算是有點中和。
鳳梨金沙達克瓦茲：不甜，內餡類似鳳梨酥那種。
紫芋舞曲：外觀有點像巧克力，但其實是紫芋，本身不太甜，口感有點像布朗尼。
南洋香蘭豬：妥妥的南洋風，不過有點overcook的感覺，有些部位吃起來稍柴。

ps. 用餐時剛好遇到攝影團隊，各人覺得若會拍到用餐的路人，還是要先告知，而非直接把用餐的人當背景，並非所有人都想上電視…不然以下午茶但用餐感覺，氣氛是可以給到5🌟的。

大地西餐廳的套餐前菜表現還不錯，油質與食材都很用心，口感也不錯，給人好的第一印象。但主餐的雞排表現普通，整體餐點沒有特別亮點，如果對餐飲品質有較高期待的人，可能會覺得一般。服務方面，若服務人員能多留意客人是否需要加水或茶飲回沖，整體用餐體驗會更完整。

用餐環境舒適安靜，座位安排合理，適合想找一個安靜空間吃飯或簡單聚餐的人。總體而言，餐點表現一般，但環境與服務還算可接受。
室內環境，衛生整潔，溫馨的氛圍氣氛，美味可口的迷人餐點，愛吃牛肉的我們連續選了同樣的餐點兩天，接待人員及桌邊服務，超級無敵好，整個Fu直線上升，加分了用餐的好心情。

reviews_detailed.author: Genta
reviews_detailed.text:
Dining at Piacere, the main Italian restaurant at The Gaia Hotel, was a delightful experience.

The ambiance is beautifully complemented by stunning garden views and a lovely vista of the hotel's lobby library, making it a perfect setting for both breakfast and dinner.

The menu features a wonderful selection of Italian cuisine, showcasing fresh ingredients and expertly crafted dishes. Every meal felt like a celebration of flavors, making it a highlight of my stay.

Whether you're starting your day with a hearty breakfast or enjoying a refined dinner, Piacere provides an inviting atmosphere that enhances the overall experience at The Gaia Hotel.

The combination of great food, beautiful surroundings, and attentive service truly sets Piacere apart. Highly recommended for anyone visiting Beitou!

reviews_detailed.author: KaiYin Yang
reviews_detailed.text:
The most delicious burger I’ve ever had in here ,
Service is top notch, highly recommended

reviews_detailed.author: Weizhong Pan
reviews_detailed.text: Definitely a hidden gem. I did not expect this level of Italian in Beitou. The breads are outstanding. Excellent risotto as well. You can taste/feel the Chef’s high standard from salad all the way to desert!

reviews_detailed.author: Hsiao-Wen Tsao
reviews_detailed.text: Tracy is super helpful and friendly. All the other staff are also cheerful.

reviews_detailed.author: 賴融（Ron）
reviews_detailed.text:
Afternoon tea is served from 2:30 PM to 5:00 PM.

Today's reservation was for a two-person afternoon tea set. The menu is fixed; you only need to choose your drinks.

The menu is roughly as follows, along with some unprofessional comments:

Kaya Toast: Tastes a bit like a pineapple bun.

Coconut Snowflake Cake: A layer of white chocolate paired with blueberries; the overall flavor is balanced and not too sweet.

Crispy Balls with Rojak Salad: The salad itself is slightly spicy and contains tamarind; avoid if you don't like that.

Nyonya Shrimp Chili Glutinous Rice Cake: Very fragrant, a bit spicier than the salad, but compared to the salad, it's probably close to mildly spicy; surprisingly delicious.

Indonesian Beef Noodle Soup: Unlike Hakka Beef Noodle Soup, it's not sweet. It has a fragrance, but apart from the glutinous rice, the other flavors are somewhat lacking.

Sunny Macarons: The macarons were too sweet for me, but the mango filling wasn't too sweet, which balanced the flavor somewhat.

Pineapple Golden Sand Dacquoise: Not sweet, the filling is similar to pineapple cake.

Purple Taro Dance: Looks a bit like chocolate, but it's actually purple taro. It's not very sweet and the texture is a bit like a brownie.

Nanyang Pandan Pig: Definitely Nanyang style, but a bit overcooked; some parts were a little dry.

P.S. We happened to encounter a photography crew while dining. We all felt that if they were going to photograph passersby, they should have informed them first, rather than using them as a background. Not everyone wants to be on TV… Otherwise, for an afternoon tea experience, the atmosphere would have been 5 stars.

name: 蔦燒日式居酒屋-北投店
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區溫泉路30巷24號
reviews: 🎊🎊很棒的地方，雖然窄小一點，坐吧台跟料理區域沒有隔板，所以很熱，臉不是喝出來的紅，是料理區域熱氣讓臉紅燙感🤭🤭。我們點了很多居酒屋餐點，每一道都讓我滿足滿意，硬要說一小缺點，可能是生蠔尾韻有點腥，如果生蠔是大顆更好，厚切牛舌一入口先有炙燒香氣，非常喜歡，脆口，但如果能在嫩一點就更好了。總之我們所點的食物就是好吃大推，服務人員都認真各其所職 辛苦啦🏅

生意很好的店！建議先訂位
內用有收10%服務費
五點半去現場排隊
本來說要七點才有位置
幸好臨時有多座位可直接內用

主食明太子烏龍麵 250元
份量大概是兩碗麵  建議分食
雖濃郁美味  但會吃太飽  到後面有點膩

串燒都是兩個一組的
烤得恰到好處 多汁入味 灑上七味粉更讚
醬燒羊肉 150元
特製雞屁股130元
醬烤杏鮑菇160元
下次應該少點主食 多點些不同的串燒嚐嚐

昨日晚上與男友在蔦燒用餐，因為沒有訂位的關係，店員說只有一小時的吃飯時間，只能吃到7點，評估一下我們應該可以在時間內吃完，因此選擇入座吧台，並點了一份炒飯、一碗湯及四份燒烤。

食物非常好吃，調味也很棒，但在吃飯途中，聽到一位師傅說了句：「7點離開還點這麼多」，因為我們坐吧台的關係，所以聽得非常清楚，當時我們只剩一道燒烤及一碗湯還未上，而且時間還不到6:30。

不確定是我們這次的點餐份量真的會造成店家麻煩嗎？如果認為我們點太多，店家其實也能和我們確認or修改一下餐點數量的，突然被說了一句讓人對於此次的用餐經驗感到不愉快☹️

reviews_detailed.author: Linda Ann Woo
reviews_detailed.text:
We arrived without reservations and sat at the counter. The service staff is attentive and helpful. She helped our elderly parents decipher the menu and order. They truly enjoyed the chicken skewers, grilled mackerel and pao fan.
The chefs are amazing, working like a fine tuned instrument making music to our stomachs!
Beef tongue stir fried with chilli is my favourite dish.
Beef skewer with soy or pesto are both delicious.
Lamb skewers underwhelming.
Stirfried lotus greens were perfect!

reviews_detailed.author: ng jiannan
reviews_detailed.text: This spot is near my hotel through a hidden staircase. Food is quite expensive but somehow very crowded. Food is delicious and substential which is good for sharing. Gives a very authentic japanese izakaya vibes. Gyu tan and fried rice is my recommendation to try.

reviews_detailed.author: D W
reviews_detailed.text:
great food, but as compared to local prices, a little more expensive. was recommended their sake that was reasonably priced.

favourite would be the garlic sauce beef

reviews_detailed.author: Hal Ginny
reviews_detailed.text: I got a recommendation from the hotel staff about this so-called Japanese izakaya, and honestly, it blew my mind! I had no idea it could be so much fun and the food so delicious. We sat at the counter, sipping drinks and enjoying small bites—Taiwanese people are just so nice! If you’re traveling, I highly recommend this izakaya in Taiwan. It feels like a brand in itself. The food was so comforting, even though we ate pretty quickly. The drinks and dishes left us so satisfied. I used to always visit Japan, but now Taiwan might just be my top favorite. I’ll definitely be back, and I recommend you check out this izakaya too!

reviews_detailed.author: J
reviews_detailed.text: Great Izakaya in Beitou area. Had a fab time and food was delicious.

name: 阿馬非餐廳
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區大業路516巷2號
reviews:
第一次到阿馬非用餐，已經聽説過這間餐廳很久，吃完之後感受到餐廳的用心跟滿滿的細節感，留下紀錄供參。

雖然沒有特地確認是否為手作麵，但義大利麵的口感跟粗細都跟一般市售的直麵不同，阿馬非的直麵較細，在口感上相對比較滑順，和醬汁的融合度蠻高，筆管麵的大小適中，麵體上的紋路也很好的讓醬汁巴在麵上，青醬白醬跟紅醬都有點到，青醬有帶一些堅果香氣，但不會過於濃厚，紅醬是走比較淑女系，微酸且沒有太多香料的點綴，白醬也不會過於厚重，奶味恰到好處。
飯類比較特別的地方是都是使用糙米，個人試過幾種後，覺得糙米跟奶油白醬搭配後，糙米的米粒感跟糙米本身的味道會蠻明顯，如果不愛糙米的人可能要選擇別道飯類，阿馬非烤飯跟西班牙節瓜燉飯的風格相近，都是以蕃茄為基底，但是阿馬非烤飯裡的薑黃和蕃茄搭配後，有豐富的香氣，西班牙節瓜燉飯裡面則是有加橄欖，所以那股獨特的橄欖香跟蕃茄搭配也是很特別，香氣跟醬汁混合後，跟糙米本身的香氣有很好的搭配。
披薩餅皮如其他評論中所寫，餅皮偏軟，但捲起來吃後能夠吃到麵皮香，臭臭披薩很有創意，餡料除了臭豆腐之外也有加一些小小的辣椒片，咬到辣椒時沒有太多辣味，但卻可以增加其他餡料的風味，非常不錯，香料馬鈴薯只有用鹽巴胡椒跟香料去調味，沒有太多過重的香料味，是由馬鈴薯本身的味道跟煎烤後的香氣配合，這道希望大家都可以嘗試。
最後是甜點，有點焦糖烤布蕾及布丁，如果有選擇障礙的人，個人會推薦烤布蕾，上面的糖殼有足夠的厚度，但又不會過厚，敲下去後跟裡面的布蕾搭配，除了有焦糖的焦香跟微苦的甜感外，中間的部分會剛好有一些些流心感。

整體用餐舒適，有庭院戶外座位 吹著風很愜意，室內座位氛圍感優～
掃碼點餐很方便，蔬食餐廳整體料理香氣非常濃郁，鹹度偏淡一點點， 吧檯有提供調味料粉 鹽巴、胡椒等 可自行添加。

👍推推 松露野菇s型義大利麵
一端上桌，被滿滿的起司給震驚了！
醬汁濃郁，麵條Q勁好吃！搭配茭白筍一起吃口感很特別。

很棒的素食餐廳
假日用餐真的是一位難求，建議一定要先訂位
平日用餐會好一點，不過人也是蠻多的，也建議要訂位

食物很多樣化，而且全部是素食，奶蛋不吃的有，吃辣的也有
有義大利麵有燉飯有Pizza，雖然是素食，但是有選擇障礙的一定會讓你選很久

reviews_detailed.author: FoodD2u FoodD2u
reviews_detailed.text: Perfect place...... Everytime back to Beitou will make a visit. Good vegetarian dishes

reviews_detailed.author: Nicole Pineda
reviews_detailed.text: One of the best pizzas and pasta I've had in Taipei. You can smell the oven-baked dough wafting outside. I didn't even notice the pasta was vegetarian; the mushrooms were sauteed and seasoned so well. Def would come back to try their risotto. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews_detailed.author: Derick Suen
reviews_detailed.text: Food taste good with good portion. Price is reasonable. Vegan friendly. Not for big meat eaters. Restaurant itself is small and therefore sitting size is quite limited and not for big guys. It will be very cozy to sit outside during cool weather.

reviews_detailed.author: Sharon Daniel
reviews_detailed.text: Amalfi Coffee is a vegetarian restaurant with an Italian menu. It's conveniently located across from Beitou Station. My friend and I both had gnocchi on our first visit. I had it baked with pesto and cheese. She had it with a tomato sauce. Both versions were tasty. They have a selection of drinks included as a set for a discounted price. I had the pineapple and kiwi juice (it wasn't terrible but I wouldn't get it again). My friend had the Valrhona Cocoa. I tried the Cocoa on a different visit and I didn't like it. It tasted more like chocolate water. The pizza is good and the penne with pumpkin cream sauce is good. The pasta with sun dried tomatoes and basil had more fresh tomatoes than sun dried. The basque cheesecake is okay and my friend loves their creme brulee.

reviews_detailed.author: 小山萌実
reviews_detailed.text:
We are vegan 🌱 on the Googlemap, it’s said vegan friendly, but menu was all vegetarian… we just got fresh juices only… was so sad !
Not recommend here to vegan people!!

name: 歐陸餐廳 C'est Bon - 北投麗禧溫泉酒店 Grand View Resort Beitou
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區幽雅路30號
reviews:
*特色：北投麗禧酒店內的西餐

*餐點：今天點了雲林安格斯黑牛肋眼牛排 雙人份(15oz) 套餐，前菜都不錯，擺盤以及口味都不錯，細緻又好吃，服務人員仔細介紹菜色的細節；牛排口感口味都很棒，完勝近期吃的圓山牛排館＆莫爾頓

*服務：優。普遍都良好面帶微笑，仔細認真地介紹每一道菜色的細節

*景觀／氣氛：位於飯店1樓，可以觀看美麗的山景，氣氛好

*價格：平均而言一人消費套餐大約在1500到3000之間。水資一個人120 ，可選礦泉水或者是氣泡水，可以續加。

*停車：停車位多，地下室3樓4樓5樓，但遇到假日，空位並不多

*網路：Yes

今年的初二家宴, 我們選在北投麗禧酒店內的歐陸餐廳.
歐陸餐廳主要提供法式、義式等的歐陸創意料理. 有主菜肉品, 海鮮, 甜點…等, 採精緻料理的風格走向. 餐廳設計優雅, 有大片落地窗可俯瞰山景, 輕鬆舒服的氛圍, 用餐環境極佳.
餐點的部份我們選擇了1,680 的套餐組合.
自製麵包有三種不同種類以及口味, 有原味法國麵包, 竹炭麵包以及紅酒桂圓鹹蛋黃麵包, 其中最喜歡的是有碳火柴香的桂圓麵包
開胃小品: 結合兩種不同哈密瓜的清甜, 加上炸薯泥球, 是一道特別且味道不衝突的料理.
開胃菜, 蕃茄布拉塔沙拉: 蕃茄搭上布拉塔起士再加上濃縮番茄清湯汁, 是一道非常清爽的開胃菜.
湯品, 松露牛肝菌菇湯佐北海道干貝與防風草: 湯頭濃郁, 松露及牛肝菌菇的香氣深厚.北海道干貝入口即化.
熱前菜, 季節鮮魚佐魷魚螺肉蒜: 鮮魚煎的香香酥酥的, 魷魚的口感柔軟帶一點點彈性, 搭著螺肉蒜熬煮的湯汁, 別有一番風味.
主菜, 紅酒燉澳洲巧克力和牛臉頰: 和牛臉頰肉相當細嫩入口即化, 醬汁帶有紅酒的酸香與牛骨膠質, 很滑嫩很好吃
珍珠玉米雞/北海道干貝: 以舒肥方式烹調的玉米雞, 保持雞肉本身的自然香甜, 也是柔軟的口感. 搭配著北海道干貝, 乾淨舒服
甜點, 法式千層酥/草莓/蜜柑/柚花: 主廚很用心的在千層酥的上端放上一個以酥片做成的小元寶.
精巧又可愛. 千層酥的中間夾了草莓及蜜柑. 一口咬下除了有千層酥的酥脆, 巧克力的香甜, 還有水果酸甜酸甜味道. 口感與口味多樣層次爆發, 很特別也很好吃.餐廳還另外備有一小杯草莓汁供客人搭配著吃. 另外還有一小碗的柚花開心果冰淇淋(這是我最喜歡的冰淇淋口味之一). 柚花的清酸與開心果的香甜互相壓制著, 讓冰淇淋不會太膩, 也很好吃.
飲料: 咖啡或茶
這一餐吃完, 解鎖了好多項從未吃過的料理方式, 食材, 口感, 以及擺盤設計. 超級棒的精緻料理套餐, 喜歡的朋友可以來嚐嚐.

2025/12/23 一泊二食＆慶生自帶好酒
服務態度：第三次用餐但這次令人不悅😡。入住時交付櫃檯上萬元的紅酒，請餐廳醒酒3/4，另1/4留瓶。
用餐時看到餐廳收開瓶費$ 1000但將紅酒橡木塞開到＂肢離破碎＂無任何歉意表示只是提已拿另一個瓶塞塞回酒瓶⋯⋯。
看著上萬元的酒就這樣在他們的過濾來過濾去不知損耗多少還敢收開瓶費？！ 氣的不是餐廳開壞酒，而是他們連歉意都未表達好像很一般不值一提…。

餐：就常吃美食的人來說，餐無亮點但也無雷。就兩千多元的餐算還可以。水資另算$ 120/人。 麵包提供三種，可續但不提供打包。

另慶生必須是當日壽星．．而非一定區間，相較其他飯店，規定較死板。

氣氛：燈光＂昏黑＂，較之前暗許多，連對面人臉都看不清的暗。偏向國外餐廳的style，好處是女性也不用化妝了～😄

reviews_detailed.author: Erin Erin
reviews_detailed.text:
We have a seat alongside windows with clean and comfortable environment.
Very nice experience while having each dinner set dishes, especially lobster with delicate flavor. Pretty good

reviews_detailed.author: Benjamin grand
reviews_detailed.text: The service is very good, the food (French food with Taiwanese ingredients) was awesome and perfectly made with quality and imagination. I only can recommend this place

reviews_detailed.author: ZhanYuan
reviews_detailed.text:
The matcha cake was soo good!✨👍🏻
The tart was also really good but not sure what it is🤭✨👍🏻

reviews_detailed.author: JungJung Chang
reviews_detailed.text: I’d heard a lot about this must-try restaurant in Beitou, so I had to come. The flavors were fresh and well-executed, and the dishes were beautifully presented, though not as extraordinary as I’d imagined. The atmosphere was comfortable, and the service was excellent. I’m looking forward to seeing some more standout dishes in the future!

reviews_detailed.author: misotam
reviews_detailed.text: A little gem hidden in the luxurious hotel. Not overly pricy. Foods are well prepared and appealing. Breads are freshly baked. Wine selection is a bit limited.

name: 左爺爺風味小館
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區明德路59號
reviews: 服務周到，餐點有家常味，也很好吃。點餐時，可以依照人數多寡選擇大份或小份，也可以客製化選擇少油、少鹽和素食（部分餐點）。餐廳旁邊還有他們的咖啡店，服務層面周到，結帳時會收10%服務費。感覺到店家的用心經營，力推！👍
有推出適合二人、三人、四人、六人、八人的精緻合菜，也有推出適合一人享用的點心組合以及平日限定的個人套餐，一個人也可以來用餐，上次點了「法式牛粒」、「梅汁排骨」跟「麻婆豆腐」都很好吃！

外帶便當
之前因為有到店裡用餐過，覺得口味不錯，所以加入line 訊息，看他們有發每天的特色便當，一天一口味還不錯，所以陸續訂了有7、8次，每次3個便當左右，今天一次訂了5個水煮雞便當，結果⋯⋯湯匙舀下去，第一口便吃到「一根長髮」，心想算了⋯⋯（努力給自己心裡建設），然後⋯⋯哪知吃第三口⋯又來「一根長髮」，這下心裡崩潰掉⋯⋯我實在無法再說服自己「無視」，食不下嚥只好丟掉，以後⋯⋯再也不想委屈自己，直接刪掉line

reviews_detailed.author: Justin Wang
reviews_detailed.text: Good Chinese cuisine around the neighborhood. The large portion of dishes  is a bit small for 4 people. We have ordered 5 dishes and good enough.

reviews_detailed.author: Isaac Lin
reviews_detailed.text: This is the best Taiwanese food I ever try. I just came back from LA, miss the food here and this restaurant brings back so many my childhood memories. Love it and willing to try next time.

reviews_detailed.author: Lerato Kgosiemang
reviews_detailed.text:
The food was delicious, and I had a great experience. I will definitely come back for more.
Great service indeed 👌

reviews_detailed.author: Stan Chokoe
reviews_detailed.text: Best I have ever had in Taiwan. I am back for another round and the food is even better.

reviews_detailed.author: 김동비
reviews_detailed.text: Delicious food and I really appreciated the kind service

name: 天饗食坊
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區中山路3號
reviews: 有預約被安排坐窗邊，即使窗簾拉下來也跟太陽直射沒有差別，非常熱和刺眼，餐點等了50分鐘才來，隔壁晚來的都上餐了，詢問疑似是忘記做單，餐點部分炒飯蠻好吃的，螃蟹粥沒有味道，重點跟服務人員要濕紙巾時被置疑，請問吃剝螃蟹蟹腳不用擦手嗎？飲料去冰也問了三次，最後沒有去到冰，下次不會再來了😡
牛腩筋軟嫩好吃，果汁咖啡自取飲用，套餐附甜點。

在天玥泉飯店2樓，用餐環境典雅，窗外就是北投溫泉博物館的大片綠色景觀。
單點菜色都蠻好吃的，不油不鹹，很適合老人。
推薦東坡肉(小份有附四個餅皮)、百合炒蘆筍(混炒彩椒、菇類，用料豐富)、冷盤的櫻桃鴨胸/牛肉片。山藥排骨湯、蟲草蒸鱸魚也很不錯，就是鱸魚的魚刺多了一點。
服務員很優，對於菜色的說明有問必答，解釋得很清楚。
支援Linepay、信用卡等支付方式。

reviews_detailed.author: Sue G
reviews_detailed.text: Came here for Mother’s Day lunch. Found this place after our visit to the library. Only 3 minutes walk. Be here early or ensure you make a reservation. Opens for lunch at 1130. They offer both set and ala carte meals. We order 2 different sets and additional pork dishes. Free flow of beverages are provided too. Overall, we had a pleasant experience.

reviews_detailed.author: Popaul Chen
reviews_detailed.text:
Hello Viewer,

I visit Taipei hot spring area Beitou, and looking for a comfortable place to sit down and eat.  as I visit during Monday, you can imagine not a lot of restaurants are opening during the day, nor did I want to try a fast restaurant which are located by the MRT station conveniently.  I decide to go for the google photo and found Gourmedise Fusion Cafe.   I was definitely intrigue by the Fusion when I did the search.

I order a veggie noodle soup and beef noodle soup to share, they taste alright, I am either not surprised nor enjoy.  I came into this restaurant to get a better air condition which I did, I can't ask no more.  if you are coming to the restaurant for a long resting foot, this is a place for you, I will suggest you look elsewhere if you are looking for real gourmet foods.

Paul

reviews_detailed.author: ice star
reviews_detailed.text: The staff here are helpful and friendly. The foods are excellent, and only the pig trotter noodle needs to improve on the taste.

reviews_detailed.author: Vladimir Podboronov
reviews_detailed.text:
This place is actually ok to have a nice dinner with a company of 6.
The food is good. That's for sure. And in general, it is a nice place.
I had taiwanese chicken set. And it was tasty. I mean for a foreighner. You should know, that the locals have a different understanding of the taste. More like a misunderstanding.
But this place is cool. I can recommend.

reviews_detailed.author: Ellie
reviews_detailed.text: I was seated by the window despite having a reservation, but even with the curtains drawn, it was still directly in the sun, very hot and glaring. Our food took 50 minutes to arrive, while the customers who arrived later had already been served. When I inquired, it seemed they had forgotten to take our order. The fried rice was quite good, but the crab congee was tasteless. Most importantly, when I asked for wet wipes, the staff questioned me. Don't we need to wipe our hands after peeling crab legs? I asked for ice for my drink three times, but they never gave me any. I won't be coming back. 😡

name: 滿味串燒溫泉拉麵-北投美食-北投餐廳-Restaurants
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區光明路218之5號1 樓
reviews:
1)竟然有服務費、每位低消。
2)餐點價位媲美頂級五星級國際飯店價位，但是竟然沒有提供桌邊衛生紙、每桌餐筷桶，還要自取檸檬水。
3)餐點品質與價位有極大違和感。
4)裡面座位超級擠、燈光極暗，三人要坐兩人桌，兩人也坐兩人桌⋯
5) 點餐時可以更實在一點，無需用什麼無聊的話術！

是一家我自己再也不會想要光顧的店。

兩個人吃2碗麵2個小菜 要1400…
我覺得我點的拉麵根本就叫做「白開水拉麵」🍜
第一次吃到喝起來跟白開水一樣的拉麵
完全沒味道 也沒加鹽巴的感覺！！
兩碗都一樣👍 雞肉串吃起來超油
然後烤年糕吃起來有油耗味 是多久沒換油？
某個服務員態度也不是很好
問你有沒有鹽巴可以提供還一副傻眼的樣子
您不知道你家的拉麵吃起來到底多難吃嗎？
所有的東西都吃完了 要準備走了 飲料才上來👏
自助區的七味粉跟辣椒粉還有檸檬水也全部都沒有了也不補
總而言之 這就是一家難吃到不行又超級貴
然後服務也不怎麼樣的白開水拉麵店
給一顆星都覺得多了🌟
要不是因為過年沒東西吃 到處都排隊
我也不會來這裡踩雷🙄

1.定價偏高、份量偏少，適合觀光客，本地人不宜食用。
2.蚵酥一份2顆150（本以為是一碟）、蝦捲一份2顆95、炸豆腐一份2小塊60,點一份送來2份+60（不知道為何算兩份錢），反正先已結帳，就算了。拉麵399（很清澈）+40（蛋）
3.沒有開單子，沒有啥服務，但+10%服務費，CP 值偏低，建議去舊址的那家拉麵店比較看看。

reviews_detailed.author: Rio Hikaru
reviews_detailed.text:
This is the worst ramen shop I have visited in Taiwan. Please don’t tell me the owner is from Japan—this quality would only embarrass us Japanese people! The food here is absolutely not worth the price, especially for tourists unfamiliar with the area. I am one of those tourists, and it’s obvious this place is taking advantage of visitors.
The ramen has no flavor at all, the soup is extremely bland, and the portion size is shockingly small. The side dishes are overpriced—for example, two small oysters cost NT$150, while other places offer at least three for the same price. The so-called “onsen tamago” doesn’t resemble a proper Japanese-style egg at all; it’s basically a regular hard-boiled egg with a slightly soft yolk, yet they charge NT$40 for one. I really cannot understand what is special about it.

On top of that, the restaurant charges an extra 10% service fee despite the high prices. Customers should also be careful, as this place even overcharges by one or two dollars. It may seem small, but when they do this to every customer, it becomes an unreasonable profit.

Most diners I saw were also tourists like us, and after this experience, I cannot recommend this restaurant to anyone.

reviews_detailed.author: Lena
reviews_detailed.text: Quaint little Ramen shop by the main junction near New Beitou MRT. Soup was pleasantly flavoured (not salty like Ajisen), chicken cutlet was crispy and delicious. Egg could have been more flavourful. Fried tofu was great! Our family all enjoyed our meal. Bonus that it was not crowded.

reviews_detailed.author: TravelMaus
reviews_detailed.text: Although the interior looks really cute it was sadly very disappointing. The portions were very smallI didn’t have anything expect two slices of bamboo and some seaweed in my ramen (for the egg I had to pay extra) it tasted very watery and the amount of noodles were very minor. The ramen did come with some skewers which were mid. For this high price of ramen I expected something way better. The waitress also constantly tried to upsell.

reviews_detailed.author: Stanley G
reviews_detailed.text: Amazing ramen with a lovely, comfortable environment. The broth was rich, the noodles were perfect, and the service was great. Highly recommended!

reviews_detailed.author: Linda Ann Woo
reviews_detailed.text:
Worst ramen I hv ever had. Salt water soup. Unfortunately we ordered 3 different flavours.
Pork cutlet was microwaved warm. Awful. Tofu was just cold tofu straight out of box and soya sauce poured over it.
I had expected better at such prices. Chef doesn't know Japanese cuisine at all. While lamenting the awful food my son went to look up the reviews.

While lamenting the awful food my son went to look up the reviews.
After reading the reviews about over charging I asked for an account of my bill. True enough, over charged.

name: 水美食府
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區光明路224號2樓
reviews:
點680和980的套餐
餐點精緻，食材搭配用心
之後有機會再來用餐
點了$680和$980的套餐，都很讚！值得回訪

因為只有兩人吃
沒辦法點太多
下次要多找兩個
可以吃比較多道
這次點了
｜避風塘軟殼蟹
吃的時候完全不知道是螃蟹
麵衣裹的有點厚
酥脆酥脆 好吃
｜蟹黃豆腐煲
還好沒點白飯
否則肯定會吃光光
下飯的料理
豆腐鮮嫩口味好
第三道是我個人覺得必點的
｜起司炸芋丸
會牽絲的芋丸
好好吃！
（雖然裡面有我不敢吃的鹹蛋黃）

另外不知道是飯店包廂還是大廳
不時有唱卡拉ok的歌聲
而且唱的還蠻令人驚訝
因為實在不是很好聽
有點影響用餐興致

週日晚上六點沒什麼客人
結帳時只有我們一桌
結帳時在櫃檯等了一下子
三位服務人員沒人要來結
但服務人員態度都很好👍

reviews_detailed.author: ひの
reviews_detailed.text:
We had this as a meal during our tour!
The spare ribs were hit or miss, with lots of bones and not much meat.
The broccoli that came with the spare ribs was well seasoned and delicious.

The food was generally heavily seasoned, but the salad was refreshing with a sesame dressing.

reviews_detailed.author: ke-chin chao
reviews_detailed.text:
Order the 680 and 980 set meals. The food was exquisite, and the ingredients were carefully selected.

I'd like to dine here again if I have the chance.

reviews_detailed.author: Mei-Chi Liao
reviews_detailed.text: Ordered the $680 and $980 set menus, both were great! Worth a return visit

reviews_detailed.author: YIAN CHEN (チェン・イェン)
reviews_detailed.text:
Since there were only two of us, we couldn't order too much. Next time, I'll get two more so we can eat more. This time, we ordered:
｜Typhoon Shelter Soft Shell Crab. I had no idea it was crab when I ate it. The batter was a bit thick, but it was crispy and delicious.
｜Crab Roe Tofu Casserole. I was glad we didn't order rice, otherwise we would have finished it all. It's a great dish to go with rice. The tofu was tender and flavorful. The third dish, which I personally think is a must-try, is:
｜Cheese Fried Taro Balls. The taro balls were stringy and delicious! (Although they contained salted egg yolk, which I'm afraid to eat.)

Also, I don't know if it was in the hotel's private room or the main hall, but there was karaoke singing from time to time. It was quite surprising because it wasn't very good, and it kind of spoiled my meal.

At 6 pm on a Sunday, there were not many customers. We were the only table there when it came time to pay. We waited a while at the counter. None of the three waiters came to pay, but they were all very friendly.

reviews_detailed.author: Gordon Lu
reviews_detailed.text: 水美食府供應傳統的北投酒家菜，道地好吃。招牌的炸排骨是必點的，外皮酥脆、肉質軟嫰；茶芙油蛋香氣滿溢，口感佳；蟹黃豆腐很下飯；酥炸蝦球配蔬菜沙拉，清爽不油膩；刈菜雞湯香醇好味道，忍不住多喝幾碗；飯後甜點香酥芋球滿滿芋頭香氣，還有整顆鹹蛋黃。

name: 仙客來海鮮庭園餐廳
formatted_address: 112台灣臺北市北投區東華街二段114號
reviews: 好吃，店員服務好又客氣，要先訂位，菜的份量還好，有些有點少，有點小盤，白飯可以一直吃，蠻重口味的

相比前幾年漲價不少，在物價上漲的時代這點是完全可以接受，但無法理解為什麼份量變少，糖醋排骨根本沒幾塊
點了何首烏雞湯(680)裡面的雞肉也很少，紅棗超硬
泰式椒麻雞腿一份超過200，卻只有一塊好市多雞腿排去炸過切塊
很多餐點的份量都偏小
唯一比較足的是脆皮大腸
飯還是可延續，雖然有點乾硬，18天啤酒價格是110

老字號的熱炒店
屹立不搖多年
口味一定不錯
從年輕吃到老
沒一樣都不錯
快炒用豬油 香氣才夠
今天水蓮比較有土味 唯一的小缺點
但其他品項都很好吃
雞肉 牛肉都很棒
白飯無限自取
香菇雞湯意外好喝
得到小朋友的肯定

reviews_detailed.author: Deborah Kay
reviews_detailed.text:
Visited 仙客來海鮮庭園餐廳 with a group of four and ordered 7 dishes. The food tasted good, and we appreciated the free-flow rice and ice cream, which was a nice touch. However, we did find the portions a bit small, especially considering the price, felt a little on the pricy side for what we got.

The restaurant was quite noisy during our visit since there was a party going on, so it’s probably better for large group gatherings than a quiet dinner.

Overall, decent food, but not sure if the value matches the price point unless you’re here with a bigger group looking for a lively atmosphere.

reviews_detailed.author: Patrick Doyle
reviews_detailed.text:
The food here is excellent. Very tasty, served quickly, and a very good price.

I have a serious nut allergy, and I would not recommend coming here if you have serious allergies.
